C: 躺在诊所的病床上，希儿终于得以暂时安静下来，默默回想自己成为「地火」以来的经历。 受伤或流血对她来说是家常便饭。希儿对疼痛的忍耐力胜过常人，这使她得以在战斗中尽情地释放自我，无视那些不足挂齿的伤口和瘀痕。 伤口总会愈合，正如裂界的威胁总会不断滋生，人们在获救之后总会返回枯燥、苦难的生活。有时，希儿的脑海中会生成一种错觉，仿佛整个下层区的时间都陷入了停滞…似乎她和「地火」付出的努力都是一场徒劳。 女医生走了进来，温和地询问她的伤势。希儿艰难地组织着语言，将她的困惑传达给了对方。 「比奇迹本身更重要的事，希儿，」医生莞尔一笑，将手掌轻轻放在她的额头上，「是守护人们对它的期盼。」
E: Lying on the clinic's bed, Seele is finally able to calm herself down as she silently thought over her experiences since becoming a member of Wildfire. Injuries and blood are routine occurrences for her. Seele has a better-than-average tolerance for pain, which allows her to fully unleash herself in combat — ignoring any lingering bumps and bruises. Wounds will always heal, just as the threat of the Fragmentum will always grow. Just as people always return to their boring lives once rescued. Sometimes, a misconception would pop up in Seele's mind, as if time in the Underworld had come to a standstill... It somehow seems that all the efforts she and Wildfire had made are all in vain. The doctor comes over and gently asks about her injury. Seele struggles to organize words, and conveys her confusion to the doctor. "What's more important than miracles, Seele," the doctor says with a smile as she places her palm lightly on Seele's forehead, "is to protect people's hopes for miracles."

C: 以下内容摘录自《银鬃铁卫面试选拔记录•情报部•第二十四卷》一〇二页。 有关应试者的个人基本信息—— 「本人的名字是佩拉格娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜，您可以叫我『佩拉』。」 「本人毕业于贝洛伯格士官学校社会科学学院及理学院，获战争研究学与情报学双荣誉学士学位。」 「您问兴趣爱好？不好意思，请给我一些组织语言的时间……」 「…本人的爱好是『贝洛伯格史前音乐研究』。就是这样。」 「没了，没有其他兴趣爱好了…真的，请相信我，大人。」
E: The following is an excerpt from page 102 of the Silvermane Guards Recruitment Records: Intelligence Department — Vol. 24: Basic information about the candidate — "My name is Pelageya Sergeyevna, but you can call me Pela." "I graduated from the Faculty of Social Sciences and the Faculty of Science from the Belobog Cadet School, with a double honorary degree in Military Studies and Cryptography." "My hobbies? Pardon me, I need a minute to collect myself..." "...My hobby is studying prehistoric Belobog music. That's it." "No, no, I have no other hobbies... Really... Please trust me."

C: 「丹鼎司医案治验总要 • 卷一百二十八 • 例三十九 主治医师：白露。 患者：景元（仙舟人），男，年龄不详（十王司肯定知道）。 主诉：胸闷气短，嗜睡，眼睛困得睁不开。此次问诊为例行复诊。 辨证：神策府里坐太久了。 处方：蒜苗五花肉1碟，脆瓜胡辣鸡丁1碟，鲫香肉丝1盘，陈婆豆腐1碗，脆皮仔猪1只，狩原毛峰1杯。 用法：吃就完事了。吃完觉得撑，自然就会想要外出走动消食，正好可以换换心情。 按语：将军每年都要来问诊，理由大多是什么『胸闷气短』、『眼睛困得睁不开』，想要检查检查身子。 将军的气机运行健旺得很，既没有奇症困扰，也察觉不出半点魔阴身征兆（虽然这事儿归十王司管，但本小姐还是特地留神了一下哈）。 本小姐觉得，他就是闷得慌，没事溜出来晃荡。不然他每次来也不会都带上一个甜点盒子，塞进三四样果仁蜜饯什么的，坐下就跟我侃大山。什么我最近身体怎么样，做不做梦，吃的如何，比起我，他倒像个医生了。 不过我挺喜欢跟他说说话儿的。不像那些老东西，将军不摆架子，又喜欢逗闷子，还经常说起自己出征去过的世界，各种精彩。唉，本小姐不想枯坐医斋，本小姐也想仗剑走天涯啊啊啊…… 」
E: "Alchemy Commission Collected Treatment Histories: Volume One Hundred and Twenty-Eight, Case Study 39 Presiding Physician: Bailu. Patient: Jing Yuan, male Xianzhou native of indeterminate age (though the Ten-Lords Commission surely knows). Complaint: Tightness of chest and shortness of breath, drowsiness, eyes too tired to keep open. This consultation is a routine repeat check-up. Diagnosis: Cooped inside the Seat of Divine Foresight for far too long. Prescription: One serving of Garlic-infused Pork, one serving of Crisped Melon and Diced Chicken, one serving of pork slices in fish sauce, one serving of Granny Chen's Tofu, one crispy suckling pig, and one cup of Hunter Maofeng tea. Usage: Just eat. It will make him feel full, then naturally he'll want to get out and about to work it off, which will also improve his mood. Remarks: The general comes to see me about his health every year, complaining of symptoms such as "tight chest and shortness of breath" or "struggling to keep eyes open" and wanting me to give him a check-up. The movement of the general's qi is extremely vigorous and there are no signs of affliction by strange diseases or being stricken with mara. (Although such things are the province of the Ten-Lords Commission, I always exercise special caution in this regard.) It is my view that he is simply bored senseless and has slipped out to rove about when he found some free time. If that were not the case, why show up every time with a box of sweetmeats, nuts and candies and whatnot, to plonk himself down and start shooting the breeze with me? How is my health? Have I had any dreams lately? How have I been eating? He's more like the doctor than I am. I do very much enjoy chatting with the general. He's not like those old so-and-sos, no grand airs, likes to joke and tease, and he often tells me about the parts of the world he's been on expeditions to. All sorts of marvelous stuff. Ah, how I would love to leave doctoring behind and head off to the ends of the earth with sword in hand...!"

C: 丹鼎云烟缭绕，女孩不安分地坐在蒲团之上，亮晶晶的双眼盯着上下颠扑的丹炉盖。 一声炸响，如焦糊卷子的女孩手捧晶莹的丹药，欢欣地跑向师傅的诊室。 「云华师父！你看，我炼成了！」 拥挤的诊室内，丹鼎司司鼎云华正在替病人医治。 看到师父凝神的模样，女孩乖巧地藏在师父身后，低下头嗅着丹药的芬芳。 「这脉象…难解……」 女孩听着师父的犹疑，凑近病人身旁闻了闻。 「小丹朱，你的鼻子最灵了！这位先生所患的病症，有什么高见吗？」云华将女孩叫到跟前，鼓励地看着她。 「嗯…闻起来有一股微微的果子熟烂味，应该是脾瘅消渴之症……」 「不错…倒符合前期的症状。所以，应用何药？」 女孩捧出手中的丹药，大声说道：「回生丹半粒，水服！」 …… 一日的诊疗结束，女孩跟在云华身后跑前跑后，不解地问道： 「师父，为何你每日还要亲自接诊病人？我看丹鼎司的其他高级医士，每日不是保养自己，就是拜访名流富商……」 云华将病历整理完毕，蹲下摸了摸女孩的头： 「小丹朱啊，你是不是听到了些什么？」 「上次我听到有些人诋毁您……」女孩低着头，似带着哭腔。 「小丹朱啊，你觉得医士的天职是什么？」云华微笑着，将丹朱抱在怀中。 「自然是精研药物，救死扶伤……」 「既如此，我等医士就该每日兢兢业业，忠于职责。你说是不是？」 「…是，师父。」 她看着师父温柔的微笑，心中的一丝疑惑却仍徘徊不去。
E: As the cauldron became enveloped with clouds of dark smoke, the young girl sits anxiously on the pillow, her bright eyes fixed on its rattling lid. Following an explosion resounds through the room, the young girl runs excitedly into her master's consultation room clasping a crystal-clear pellet, despite her entire person looking scorched like a scroll left too close to a candle. "Master Yunhua! Look, I did it!" In the crowded consultation room, Cauldron Master Yunhua is currently treating patients. Seeing her master focused and concentrated, the young girl obediently hides behind her master and lowers her head to sniff at the scent of the medicinal pellet. "This pulse... it's a tough one..." The young girl overhears her master's suspicion and approaches the patient's side to take a sniff. "Little Dan Zhu, your sense of smell is second to none! Can you tell me anything about this patient's condition?"Yunhua calls the young girl forward and looks at her encouragingly. "Hmm... There's a faint smell of overripe fruits, likely a sign of spleen deficiency with excessive thirst..." "Quite right... that would match with the early symptoms. So, what medication would you recommend?" The young girl raises the pellet in her hands and loudly proclaims: "Half of a revitalization pellet, take with water!" ... After a long day of diagnosing and treating patients, the young girl runs after Yunhua and asks perplexedly: "Master, why do you still insist on personally seeing patients? I see that the other high-level Alchemy Commission healers spend all their time either treating themselves or rubbing shoulders with wealthy merchants..." Yunhua finishes organizing her medical records, kneels down, and rubs the young girl's head. "Little Dan Zhu, have you heard something?" "I heard people saying bad things about you..."The young girl drops her head, looking as if she's crying. "Little Dan Zhu, what do you think is the duty of a healer?"Yunhua lets out a faint smile and picks Dan Zhu up in her arms. "To study medicine with devotion, and to treat the sick and save the wounded..." "If that's the case, don't you think that healers like me should spend every day working hard and being loyal to our duties?" "...Yes, master!" Even after seeing her master's warm smile, there is still a sliver of doubt that lingers within her heart.

C: 无貌的少女意识到自己一定受到了某种诅咒，不然为什么感受不到任何外部的刺激？痛感、味觉、嗅觉都很正常，她却无法对此做出反应，自然也丧失了喜怒哀乐，体会各种情绪的能力。她只能尽力弥补，试图提供不同的场景，通过观察来询问其他人的感受。 「…如果你在喝一杯很苦的茶，你觉得怎么样？会怎么喝？」 虽然被绑在椅子上不得动弹，但左边的流浪汉男士还是做出赞赏的姿势点点头，中间的女孩马上哭了起来，摇着头拒绝，右边的年长女士则嫌弃地皱了皱鼻子。 「如果你身处一个极其寒冷的小屋，手边只有这杯茶怎么办？」 男士自然不必说，女孩哭闹了一阵后接受了，女士则还是摆出拒绝的态度。 她不断变换预设，日以继夜地提问，直到受访者忍受不住昏了过去。她将他们送回家中，搜罗另一批人来接受她的采访。 那段时间，小镇里的居民都做着同一个噩梦，他们被关在一个地方，面容模糊的少女礼貌地向他们提问，他们没有拒绝的权利，只能对回答做一遍又一遍的补充，直到少女将每一处细节都面面俱到地记录在一个又一个纸面具上。一个写满了，就换下一个。 这个噩梦很快又被另一个噩梦取代了，居民们声称半夜会看到纸面具在空中飞舞，彼此交谈，它们隐隐发光，又转眼熄灭，就像夜空中的花火一般。他们每晚都会出现，仿佛是在小镇暗处生活的居民。 在一个幽暗的地下室，少女并不知晓这个噩梦。她搜集了足够多的资料——人们细微的情感，对不同事物的看法——用于制作更多的纸面具。她坚信，虽然自己无情无泪，但自己制作的那些面具却有血有肉，甚至终有一天，会成为真正的生命。
E: The faceless girl realized that she must be under some kind of curse. Why else couldn't she feel any stimuli? Her sense of pain, taste, and smell were all intact, yet she was unable to react to them. Naturally, she couldn't experience joy, anger, sadness, or a range of emotions. She could only strive to observe others' reactions in various situations to understand their feelings. "...How would you feel if you were drinking a cup of bitter tea? How would you drink it?" Although tied to the chair and immobilized, the homeless man on the left made an appreciative gesture and nodded. The girl in the middle immediately cried and shook her head in denial, while the madam on the right wrinkled her nose in disgust. "What if you were in an extremely cold hut, with only this cup of tea at hand?" Naturally, the man nodded. The girl cried for a while and then reluctantly accepted, while the lady still reacted in disgust. She continued to change her scenarios and ask questions day and night until her interviewees passed out. She would send them home and seek out new targets for her "interviews." During that time, the town's inhabitants all had the same nightmare. They found themselves trapped in a place where a blurred-faced young girl politely asked them questions, and they had no choice but to answer. They could only provide responses repeatedly until the young girl meticulously recorded every detail on paper masks, one after another. Whenever a mask was filled, it was replaced by another. This nightmare was soon replaced by another, as residents claimed to see paper masks flying through the air in the middle of the night. The masks would talk to each other, faintly glowing before eventually fading out, resembling sparklers in the night sky. They appeared every night, as if they were residents living in the shadow of the town. In a dark basement, a young lady remained unaware of this nightmare. She had gathered enough information about people's nuanced emotions and their perceptions of different things... To make more paper masks. She firmly believed that although she possessed no emotions, the masks she created had flesh and blood. She even believed that one day, they would become real beings.

C: 「有几个版本的身世特别招人喜欢。」到了愚者的「酒馆」，花火也只能大大方方地承认，「喜欢和相信是两码事，但大家更愿意相信自己喜欢的故事是真的。」 「撒谎？拜托，我不是为了讲一个精彩的故事，编一段博人眼球的经历…我是为了我自己才全心全意地锻炼和鞭策想象力，想象各种各样的生活，寻求刺激，然后尽我所能地表演、展现、还原，在想象力的气球爆破前的一秒，刹住车。」 「说真的，只有剧本当然不够，首先我自己就得毫无保留地相信我扮演的角色真的存在，然后我要想象这个角色还会出现在其他什么故事里，为了让表演的动机有逻辑，有情感，我总是要补充额外的信息。」 「然后，我觉得我才能抓住这个角色，不受其他人的影响。毕竟我可能还会碰到其他愚者，在确认彼此的身份前，我可不知道你们想干嘛。有时候，你们只是喜欢某个角色的外形，有时候你们就是想体验一下玩玩——我有时也会这样。」 「当然还有些人，只是把扮演当作一种交易手段，或者你们希望自己被当作其他人，因为这可能会带来不可预知的财富、地位、权力…总之我想说的是，在这样的环境里，除了我自己，谁能保证我不会偏离正轨，变成其他故事里的角色？没有！所以你看，我必须得不知疲倦地想象，还有扮演。」 「没有，我没有否认…这真的让我上瘾。我越想象，我就越沉迷于这些角色，沉迷于我为他们构造出的美妙的、悲惨的境遇，沉迷于他们在这些境遇下可能萌发的情绪……」 「当然，以前我当然想过那种人生…跟个戏团，当个演员，去不知名的星球表演几场，创造一个与自己同名的角色…但有一天，我突然想通了！」 「想要表演，还有比自己的人生更富感染力的舞台吗？」
E: "There are a few versions that are particularly popular." When Sparkle arrived at Fool's Tavern, she admitted her deeds. "Liking and believing are two different things, but people are more likely to believe in their favorite stories." "Lies? Come on, I'm not trying to tell a grand story or fabricate an eye-catching experience... I'm wholeheartedly exercising my imagination for my own sake. I imagine various lives, seek excitement, and then recreate them as best I can, and pump the brakes on my imaginative balloon just a second before it bursts." "Seriously, having a script is far from enough. First and foremost, I must wholeheartedly believe that the character I'm portraying truly exists. Then, I need to imagine the other stories where the character would appear. I always need extra information to make their motivation logical and emotional." "And only then will I feel I can grasp the essence of the character without being influenced by others. After all, I might encounter other Fools, and I won't know what they want until I know who they are. Sometimes, you simply like the appearance of a character, and sometimes, you just want to experience it for fun. I do that sometimes, too." "And of course, there are those who play solely for the sake of gain or to be regarded in that way, hoping for unimaginable wealth, status, or power... Anyway, what I'm trying to convey is that in such an environment, who but myself can guarantee that I won't stray from my intended path and become a character in someone else's story? Nobody! That's why I have to tirelessly imagine and immerse myself in the act." "No, I'm not denying it... It's truly addictive to me. The more I imagine, the more I get absorbed in those characters, the wonderful and tragic situations I create for them, and the emotions they experience in those circumstances..." "Sure, I used to think about that kind of life... Joining a troupe, becoming an actor, traveling to unknown planets for performances, creating a character with my own name on it... But then, one day, I had a sudden realization!" "If you want to perform, is there a stage more captivating than your own life?"

C: 哀丽秘榭，少年的家乡。 村庄日出而作，日落而息，如同他的身世，朴实无华。 只能容纳数人的校舍内，少年听着令人昏昏欲睡的历史课，心思早已跟手中飞舞的木屑一同飘向遥远的地方。  一笔一划，藏在桌屉里的木头逐渐显现出战士的模样。 「要有一把沉重的大剑，才配得上这样的实力……」 对着阳光，他磨利木片的边缘。 「铠甲闪耀着荣誉的伤痕，披风好似搏击风云的翅膀。 「还有……」 「白厄！想要成为最强的战士…就该好好听讲。」 皮西厄斯老师总是不厌其烦地打破他的幻想。 相比学校，少年更喜欢那麦秸堆垛的训练场。 那里是他的战场，稻草人时而是来袭的兵团，时而是横冲直撞的恶兽。 不上学的时候，他常常在这里与木头雕成的伙伴消磨一整天的时光，直到每一隅村户飘散出烹调的香味。 清凉的树荫下，疲惫的少年枕在草地便能安睡。 支离破碎的梦境中，他眺望着从未见过的城邦，见证波澜壮阔的故事。 「去成为英雄吧……」 那心声如同哀丽秘榭翻涌不息的麦浪，引领少年踏上远行的路。 ->->->->->->->->->->->->-> >>>第1次运算 …… >>>赋予对象「NeiKos496」定义 >>>载入场景[哀丽秘榭] >>>执行模拟 对象「NeiKos496」沿坐标组A-F轨迹运动 对象「NeiKos496」新建变量[心中的英雄] >>>变量[黑潮]开始位移更新，对[哀丽秘榭]执行覆盖指令
E: Aedes Elysiae, the boy's hometown. The village lived by the rhythm of the sun: working at daybreak, resting at sundown, just like his own life, simple and unadorned. In a tiny schoolhouse that could barely fit a handful of students, the boy drifted off during a droning history lesson, his thoughts floating away with the wood shavings dancing from his hands. Stroke by stroke, the figure of a warrior slowly emerged from the block of wood hidden in his desk drawer. "A mighty greatsword... only a blade like that could match this strength..." He sharpened the edges of the wood chip in the sunlight. "Armor scarred by honor, a cloak like wings soaring through the storm." "And then..." "Phainon! If you want to be the strongest warrior... you'd better start paying attention." Miss Pythias never gets tired of dragging him back to reality. The boy preferred the training yard stacked with hay bales far more than school. It was his battlefield — where scarecrows turned into charging soldiers, or wild beasts on the rampage. When he was not at school, he often spent entire days there with his carved wooden comrades, until the smell of cooking wafted from every household. Beneath the cool shade of the trees, the exhausted boy could fall asleep right on the grass. In his broken dreams, he gazed at city-states he had never seen and witnessed grand tales unfold. "Go... become a hero." That voice, like the endless waves of wheat in Aedes Elysiae, guided the boy onto the road of adventure. ->->->->->->->->->->->->-> >>> First Computation ... >>> Assign definition to object "NeiKos496" >>> Loading Scene [Aedes Elysiae] >>> Execute Simulation Object "NeiKos496" moved along trajectory defined by coordinate set A-F. Object "NeiKos496" initialized new variable [The Hero Within]. >>> Variable [Black Tide] begins displacement update, executing overwrite command on [Aedes Elysiae]

C: 灵砂：无妄之药
E: Lingsha: Unbidden Elixir

C: 在入侵现场优雅踱步的女人如同一道谜题，她嘲弄着受害者的同时又残酷地将加害者消灭殆尽。\n通讯里神秘的协助者透露出两人似乎怀抱着某种目的。\n她们的入局是混乱升级的预兆抑或是一段故事的开始？
E: The woman sauntering elegantly across the invasion site is a mystery. She mocks the victims, while also ruthlessly eliminating their oppressors.\n Over their comms, the mysterious helper revealed that the two seem to have some sort of agenda.\nIs their presence a sign of more chaos to come? Or is it the start of a new story?

C:
目光从陌生的天花板上移开后，你看着周围的各色「奇物」，脑袋中似乎残留着一个女人的声音，只是现在的情况不允许你确定自己是否能马上清晰地回忆起她。
「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
于是你选择先听这位「三月七」与刚刚那位已经离开的「丹恒」的话，至少，他们看着不像是坏人。
好了，现在路上有了伴，先离开这里吧。
E:
You move your gaze away from the unfamiliar ceiling and look at the variety of Curios around you. A woman's voice echoes in your head but you're in no position to confirm whether you can clearly remember it.
"When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret..."
You decide to first listen to March 7th and Dan Heng, who had just left. At least they don't look like bad people.
Alright, now that there are companions, it's time to leave this place.

C: 空间站的外部危机似乎得到了控制，如果还有没去过的地方，也可以趁这个机会再去瞧瞧。\n搞定这一切后，就去向艾丝妲汇报情况吧。
E: The space station's external crisis seems to be under control. If there are places you haven't been to yet, now's the chance to go and take a look.\nOnce everything has been taken care of, go and report to Asta.

C: 告别风雪转霁的贝洛伯格，列车再次驶向星穹深处。\n一场毫无波折的会议显然与开拓者们八字不合——星核猎手卡芙卡不期而至，向众人发出前往仙舟「罗浮」的邀约。\n这份邀请看似不容拒绝，且不怀好意，而三月七偏要大声说不！拉上丹恒那一票，你们就更有底气了。
E: The Express gallops into the depths of the interstellar sea after bidding farewell to Belobog, where snow had given way to sunshine.\nThe Trailblazers are destined to never have a smooth meeting — The Stellaron Hunter Kafka arrives unexpectedly and issues an invitation for the group to visit the Xianzhou Luofu.\nThis invite seems ominous and contains no room for refusal, yet March 7th insists on loudly saying "no!" Once Dan Heng votes with you, you would have even more confidence in the decision.

C: 司辰宫中，满心以为会获得支持的你们却遭到了驭空的回绝。\n所幸云骑军将军景元现身定策。但他并未将搜索星核的重任交给你们，而是让你们找到行踪无定的卡芙卡。\n出得司辰宫，你们暂得片刻休憩，却不知此时此刻，丹恒正在做什么呢？
E: In the Palace of Astrum, the hopeful Trailblazers are rejected by Yukong.\nFortunately, General Jing Yuan of Luofu's Cloud Knights appears and intervenes. However, he does not entrust you with the task of searching for the Stellaron, instead instructing you to locate Kafka's unpredictable whereabouts.\nYou have a short rest after leaving the Palace of Astrum, and you wonder what Dan Heng might be doing right now.

C: 在同卡芙卡缠斗时，太卜司之首符玄出现，奉景元的命令将犯人带往太卜司。\n在筹备审问事宜前，你们被暂时留在「长乐天」静候太卜司引路人的消息。
E: Fu Xuan, head of the Divination Commission, appears while you are engaged in combat with Kafka. She then takes Kafka back to the Divination Commission as per Jing Yuan's orders.\nYou are temporarily left in the Exalting Sanctum as Kafka's interrogation is being prepared and are told to wait for the guide from the Divination Commission.

C: 受符玄之托，你们要前往天舶司将「停云」留下的扇子送交驭空。无论幻胧究竟是幻化伪装停云，抑或是操控了她，这其中都潜藏着某种危险的可能性——那位停云也许遭遇了不测。
E: Fu Xuan had entrusted you to head to the Sky-Faring Commission and give to Yukong the fan "Tingyun" left behind. Whether Phantylia was disguised as Tingyun or mind-controlled her — both spell out dangerous possibilities. The real Tingyun might have suffered a lethal accident.

C: 在甜美的人声引导中，你的思绪随着房间中蒸腾的烟雾一同氤氲、流淌，超脱现实，来到了由「忆域」构成的梦境。然而眼前的景象说是美梦，倒不如说更像噩梦，不仅如此，这房间竟还有些微妙的既视感。\n在调查过程中，一阵急促的叫喊从房间某处传来——或许你该去看看那声音到底属于谁。
E: Under the guidance of a sweet voice, your thoughts grow clouded and flowing, transcending reality along with the smoke that fills your room, as you arrive in a Dreamscape created from a "Memory Zone." However, the scene you find before you is not a beautiful dream. It seems more like a nightmare. Not only that, but this room has a faint air of déjà vu about it.\nAs you investigate, you hear a panicked shout coming from a certain spot in the room... Perhaps you should go and check just who this voice belongs to.

C: 流萤带领你在城中各处知名景点打卡。你们来到了格拉克斯大道的中心，拜访了坐落在这里的吉祥物雕像「钟表小子」。在此处驻足时，你发现钟表小子的眼睫毛对于一尊雕像来说可能有些过于生动了。\n说真的，任谁都会想把那撮抖动不已的睫毛拽下来的。而在那之前，你也可以拜托流萤给你来一张经典游客照留作纪念。
E: Firefly leads you through some of the famous sightseeing spots in the area. As you arrive in the central Glaux Avenue, you visit a statue of a mascot located here known as "Clockie." As you linger in this place, you notice that the eyelashes on Clockie are a little too lifelike for a statue.\nHonestly, anyone who lays eyes on those trembling lashes would feel the urge to pull on them. Before you do, why not ask Firefly to take a classic tourist-style commemorative picture?

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n你们终于抵达了黑天鹅所说的区域。接下来，忆者为你们复现了出与流萤相关的记忆——试着从中梳理出凶案的真相吧。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nYou finally reach the area that Black Swan was talking about. From there, the Memokeeper reproduces the memories related to Firefly — Try to iron out the truth behind this murder.

C: 你们发现沙盘模型上有一道明显的缺口——或许这就是前往家族议事厅的关键线索。根据拉帝奥教授的回忆，能够契合这道缺口的积木就在不远处的珍品室里。\n不愧是教授，多么可靠啊！
E: There is a noticeable gap in the sandpit model, which might just be the key clue to unlocking the council chamber. As far as Dr. Ratio can remember, the block that can fit the gap is kept in the treasure room nearby.\nThe professor is as reliable as always!

C: 你们抵达现实酒店，决定从这里入手，打听有关两起命案遇难者的消息。希望前台的工作人员不会坚守底线，并将合适的线索和盘托出。
E: You two make it to hotel in reality to gather more information about the victims of the two homicides. Hopefully, the receptionist won't stick to their professional conduct and will drop all the right clues.

C: 视角又来到了另一边。有时候，你总觉得自己好像活在电影里——否则视角怎么会跳变得这样厉害呢？
E: Once again, the focus shifts. Sometimes, you feel as though you're living in a movie — nothing else can explain the constant switch of the point-of-view.

C: 登上舞台\n不要害怕\n不要回头
E: Get onstage\nFear not\nNever look back

C: 即便砂金以生命为代价向众人揭示了家族在匹诺康尼的黑暗秘密，但经由万众一心的家族运作，谐乐大典的倒计时仍未中止。与此同时，星穹列车似乎迎来了一位不速之客……
E: Despite Aventurine revealing The Family's dark secrets in Penacony to all at the cost of his own life, the countdown to the Charmony Festival continues thanks to the operations of The Family's united efforts. At the same time, the Astral Express seems to have welcomed an uninvited guest...

C: 你们即将面对本届苏乐达™盛会海选最后、也是最难的关卡——「巨星巅峰战」。能成为匹诺康尼下一位盛会巨星的，只有在擂台上笑到最后的那个人……\n那究竟是你？还是那位高大、坚实、热情似火、凭一己之力拿下演技挑战最高分的高贵男子？敬请拭目以待！
E: You are about to face the final and most challenging stage of the SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions — "The Superstar Showdown"! Only they who laugh last in the ring will be able to become the next Penacony Festive Superstar...\nWill that person be you? Or will it be the towering, strong, passionate nobleman who easily secured the top score in the acting challenge? Stay tuned to find out!

C: 出人意料的是，为你们戴上冠军桂冠的并非知更鸟，而是她的哥哥星期日。在这里，他终于表明自己的全部意图，但他似乎并不打算与你们刀剑相向，而是寻求彼此理解的可能性。\n他向你们提出一连串问题，令你感到有些手足无措。但不必担心——如果你对星期日的问题感到迷茫，那就从自己的经历中寻求答案吧。
E: To everyone's surprise, the person present to crown you champion is not Robin at all, but her big brother, Sunday. Here, he finally reveals his true intentions, but he does not seem to want to fight you, instead seeking the possibility of reaching a mutual understanding.\nHe asks you a series of questions that leave you a little lost, but fear not - if you are confounded by Sunday's questions, just look for the answers in your personal experience.

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C: 好嘛，上次见过的无名客姐们也在这。她的搭子说这有人见过「真正的睡蕉小猴」，你很好奇，这真小猴和假小猴的差别，有没有你跟真正的帕姆差别大。\n八成没有，但你还是去见识见识吧，开枪前多搞点情报不是坏事。
E: So, that Nameless from last time is here, and her pal mentioned bumping into someone claiming to have met the real Slumbernana Monkey. You're wondering if the gap between the real and fake monkeys is wider than the gap between you and the legit Pom-Pom.\nMaybe not, but still, you decide to snoop around and gather some intel. It's always good to have the deets before shooting.

C: 一场梦境，将*我们*带回那段早已为岁月所模糊的遥远回忆之中，而这场幻梦，印刻着*我们*内心最深处的不安。
E: A dream carries us back to memories long faded by time, and this dream mirrors the profound fears within our hearts.

C: 如今瑟希斯的火种就在你的胸中，这意味着阿格莱雅迟早会为了逐火之旅将它取出。届时，因火种死而复生的你将会怎样也不难猜到。\n为了求生，也为了求索，你需要寻找既能够保全自己、又能对抗阿格莱雅等人的力量——元老院的使者已经等待你多时了。
E: Now, the Coreflame of Cerces resides in your chest, which means that Aglaea will eventually extract it for the Flame-Chase Journey. It's easy to guess what will happen to you, who the Coreflame had revived.\nTo survive, and to seek, you need to find a power that can protect you and combat Aglaea and others — The messenger from Council of Elders has been waiting for you for a long time.

C: 次日午时，扎格列斯的半神将成为冥河之行的向导。今日今时，应为远行留存体力。\n回到私人浴宫，再做打算。
E: At noon of the next day, Zagreus's demigod will become a guide to traverse the River of Souls. Today, stamina should be conserved for the long trip ahead.\nReturn to the private bath chamber and make a plan.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 呈现在{NICKNAME}面前的第三幕，似乎是逐火之旅的终点，但与白厄一同见证末世的，是那名在我们的认知中，殒命于他童年时期的少女——昔涟。
E: The third act, as it plays out before {NICKNAME}, appears to mark the end of the Flame-Chase Journey. But the one who witnesses the world's end times with Phainon is Cyrene — the girl we believe to have perished in his childhood years.

C: 想要遇到一个奇怪的人，被他带往一场奇遇？生活哪儿有这么多奇遇？
E: Hoping to meet someone strange who'll whisk you away on a wild adventure? C'mon, life doesn't hand out fantasy side quests that easy.

C: 有时候，赝品未必打不过正版。
E: Sometimes, a knockoff may outshine the original.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C: 丹恒在螺丝咕姆的建议下重新回到星穹列车。\n时间的差速让事情变得与返程时截然不同。
E: Dan Heng returns to the Astral Express at Screwllum's suggestion.\nThe time discrepancy has made things drastically different from his return journey.

C: 多亏了星期日与长夜月的短暂碰撞，得以让潜伏起来的黑天鹅锁定了长夜月的藏身处，并沿着命途的河流逆流而上。\n忆庭决不允许黑天鹅擅自行动，而黑天鹅也不知道自己将面对什么……
E: Thanks to the brief collision between Sunday and Evernight, Black Swan, who had been lurking, managed to lock onto Evernight's hideout and travel upstream along the currents of the Path.\nThe Garden of Recollection would never allow Black Swan to act on her own, while she had no idea what she was about to face...

C: 成功集齐三卷失落的录像带之后，你发觉三者内容似有交叉，均记录着一位名叫「希拉」的科员的人生备份。\n正当你疑惑之时，录像带通过视讯号植入的秘密防卫机制使你头痛欲裂，失去了知觉。
E: After gathering the three lost videotapes, you notice that they all seem to be records of the life of a researcher named Sheila.\nJust as you start to figure this out, a secret defense mechanism implanted in the video signal gives you a splitting headache and knocks you unconscious.

C: 原来呜呜伯所要的东西，是科员荣仓终的遗物。\n在得到呜呜伯的认可后，它将族群据点的位置告诉你，你与阿兰决定前去一探究竟。
E: It turns out that the Wubbaboo was after possessions the researcher Eikura Shuu had left behind.\nWith the Wubbaboo's approval, it tells you the location of the Wubbaboo stronghold. You and Arlan decide to go investigate.

C: 姬子大方地摆好姿势让你拍下照片，你连忙将照片发给帕梅拉，换取谣言制造者的情报。
E: Himeko struck a pose for you to take her picture, and you immediately sent it to Pamela for information about the rumor spreader.

C: 质询结束，你暂时洗清了嫌疑，但真理医生点名要求你一同前往阿兰处寻求协助
E: You have temporarily exculpated yourself by the end of the interrogation, but Dr. Ratio specifically asked for you to go with him to Arlan to ask for help.

C: 艾丝妲在你们眼前被冥火吞没，先听听螺丝咕姆的判断再做打算
E: Asta was swallowed up by infernal fire before your eyes. Listen to Screwllum's deductions before you act on anything.

C: 阮•梅，培育生命的大师，让你去回收在空间站乱跑的「小生命」…她为了让你不透露此事，甚至喂你吃下「反吐真剂」。\n她究竟在想些什么？
E: Ruan Mei, the master nurturer of life, asks you to recover the "little lifeforms" that are running amok on the space station. She even goes so far as to feed you an "Anti-Truth Serum" to ensure you don't reveal this matter.\nWhat could she be thinking?

C: 看来你莫名成为了磐岩镇搏击俱乐部的客座拳手，可以随时参加本赛季中的各种赛事。\n如果想要在擂台上与人切磋切磋，不妨去找掘掘博士安排参加比赛吧。
E: It looks like you're the guest boxer at the Boulder Town Fight Club, where you can participate in all kinds of events anytime during this season.\nIf you want to hone your skills in the arena, you can go to Dr. Dig, who will arrange for you to participate in fighting matches.

C: 你们修好了帕斯卡——它的核心顺利装进了新外壳中；但你们并没有完全修好它——获得了新外壳的帕斯卡再次突发故障，向铆钉镇方向逃窜。\n你与克拉拉当即决定出发寻找帕斯卡，以防止它再次在史瓦罗基地外引发恶性事件。
E: You fixed Pascal. Its core fitted into the new shell nicely. But Pascal was not completely fixed — After receiving the new shell, Pascal malfunctioned again and ran away toward Rivet Town.\nClara and you decide to head out immediately to look for Pascal and prevent it from causing incidents outside of Svarog's Base.

C: 你在铁卫禁区再次遇到了希莉儿…她已经不再是一个小女孩了。\n希莉儿似乎找回了自己的记忆，但她却拒绝和你分享——根据她的说法，这是为了你好。\n无论如何，你觉得自己有义务向管事的铁卫汇报这件事…去和老朋友邓恩聊聊吧。
E: You bump into Cyrille again in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone... And she's no longer a little girl.\nShe seems to have recovered her memories, but refuses to share them with you. According to her, it's for your own good.\nIn any case, you feel duty-bound to report this to the Silvermane supervisor on duty... Go chat with your old friend Dunn.

C: 娜塔莎给你发来了信息，她似乎想和你聊些私人的事情。\n你何时拒绝过她的邀请呢？有空了就去诊所找她吧。
E: Natasha sends you a message. It seems that she wants to talk about some personal stuff with you.\nOf course you won't refuse her invitation. Go meet her at the clinic when you have time.

C: 你接到了来自朗道姐弟的短信。毫不意外地，他们和其他人一样，联系你只是因为有事相求。然而， 与他人不同的是，朗道姐弟特意为你设置了一个悬念——只有按照他们的要求前往博物馆的整理间，他们才会将需求和盘托出。\n这是求人应有的态度吗？你不理解，因为你才从空间站「黑塔」出生没多久——但想必你已经习惯这种无厘头的任务领取方式了。\n前往贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的整理间，听听他们的请求吧。
E: You receive a message from the Landau siblings. As expected, they contacted you because they want to ask for your help, just like everyone else. Unlike the others, however, these two deliberately set up a mystery for you — They will only tell you what they need if you head to the Museum Finishing Room as they had requested.\nIs this even the right attitude when you want to ask people for help? You don't quite know, since you were only born in the Herta Space Station a short while ago — but you must have gotten used to this random way of getting missions by now.\nHead to the Belobog History and Culture Museum Finishing Room and listen to their request.

C: 佩拉和玲可已经找到了合适的露营地。就在此处将露营用具准备好，等待极光的到来吧。
E: Pela and Lynx found a suitable camping spot. Prepare the camping equipment and wait for the aurora.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的展品遭遇了一连串的莫名失窃。\n为了找回失窃的展品，你和佩拉决定前往大矿区调查。\n「地火」的斯薇塔小姐将自己掌握的信息告诉了你，开始在周围寻找匹配的线索吧。
E: There has been a series of thefts in the Belobog History and Culture Museum.\nTo find the lost exhibits, Pela and you decide to head to the Great Mine to investigate the matter.\nMiss Swetta from Wildfire told you what she knew. Now, go find some appropriate clues around here.

C: 你不得不按照那位「绿芙蓉」的要求，抄写《千手慈怀药王救世品》。但五百遍确实太多了…也许有其他办法？
E: You have to copy the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation according to Green Hibiscus's demands, but 500 times is just too much... Maybe there's another way?

C: 陶德意图求取丹鼎司医书《要药分剂》，读书人的「求取」嘛，说出来不丢人…只可惜得让你替他去丹鼎司里跑一趟了。
E: Todd intends to obtain the Alchemy Commission's medical book, Compendium of Remedies. It's not shameful for a scholar to seek knowledge, but unfortunately he has to send you to the Alchemy Commission to fetch it for him.

C: 陶德向你透露了其中隐情，这竟然和他老师的失踪有关。你答应帮他收集他老师留下的标记，他将查到的坐标发给你，你来到丹鼎司，在这里收集着破碎的学会秘密标识。只要将标识拼合而成，便可用相机记录下光印拓迹。
E: Todd revealed the secret to you, which is actually related to his teacher's disappearance. You agree to help him collect the markings left by his teacher. He sends you the coordinates he discovered, and you arrive at the Alchemy Commission, where you will collect the shattered secret Guild markings and record them down. As long as the markings can be pieced together, you can use the camera to record the Optical Markings.

C: 尽管还没有找到线下工作人员，但是直觉告诉你，青雀出现在这里并不是因为偶然，她肯定知道有关「美丽狐仙聊天」的事。直接去问她应该是效率最优的做法。
E: Although you haven't found the in-person operative yet, intuition tells you that Qingque's appearance here is not a coincidence. She must know about the Foxian Beauty Chat. It's best to just ask her directly.

C: 你听到了呼救的声音，那是一名男子的声音，赶紧去救人吧。\n那个男子难道就是半夏的心上人梁沐吗？
E: You hear cries for help, it was a man's voice. Go and help him out.\nIs that man Banxia's lover, Liangmu?

C: 星核危机爆发后，六司忙得四脚朝天，却始终也没能找到始作俑者。地衡司的执事长大毫专门找到星穹列车，希望你们帮助罗浮辨认一下可疑的嫌犯。听起来又是一桩麻烦事…不过身为无名客，就是应该助人为乐，快点去找他详谈吧。
E: After the Stellaron Crisis outbreak, the six commissions were busy as a bee trying to find the perpetrator in vain. Official Dahao of the Realm-Keeping Commission requested support from the Astral Express to identify suspects. Sounds like another bothersome case... However, as a Nameless, you should lend a helping hand as much as you can. Go talk to him.

C: 对使用大衍穷观阵推演过去的请求，符玄倒是没什么抗拒——她似乎不是第一次帮人做这种事了。\n对穷观阵而言，只要有足够多的资料来辅助演算，探寻过去就像预测未来并无不同。
E: Fu Xuan is not opposed to the request to use the Matrix of Prescience Ultima to deduce the past. Seems like this isn't her first time helping someone with something like this.\nAs long as enough data is provided to support its calculations, deducing the past is the same as predicting the future for the Matrix of Prescience.

C: 三月七实在不觉得「黑塔空间站的显示器」可以代表「黑塔」。她猜想，它会出现在这里，是因为整个空间站放眼望去满坑满谷都是同一型号的显示器…它们以过于强烈的存在感，在潜意识里给三月七打下了记忆的烙印。\n「但这也不是坏事，」三月七想，「毕竟除此之外我印象最深刻的就莫过于那只末日兽了…幸亏是显示器！」
E: March 7th really doesn't think "a monitor from the Herta Space Station" can represent the entire station. She surmises that this item appeared here only because the station is positively covered by monitors of the same model and build... Their overwhelming presence had stamped themselves indelibly into her memory.\n"But that's not half bad," she thought. "The only other memorable thing I have from there is the Doomsday Beast... Thank goodness it's the monitors that showed up!"

C: 丹恒返乡兹事体大，甚至需要向罗浮六御以及持明族长老通告…既然丹恒安排好了渡船，就随他一起同行吧，自己一个人用界域定锚到丹鼎司不算数啊。\n丹恒没打算隐藏持明族的身份，这也许说明了他如今坦荡的态度。但，持明族会怎么看呢？
E: Dan Heng's homecoming seems to be a big ordeal, requiring notice to be delivered to the Luofu's Six Charioteers and the Vidyadhara elders... Seeing as Dan Heng already made travel arrangements, you should go with him. It won't do for you to just use a Space Anchor to teleport to the Alchemy Commission alone.\nDan Heng never intended to conceal his Vidyadhara heritage, and this might explain why he possesses such a magnanimous demeanor nowadays. Yet, the Vidyadhara's attitude towards his return remains to be seen...

C: 地衡司收到居民在丹鼎司洞天里发现近似「云吟术」的异象，并且在异象中遭遇了隐身怪物。\n广进根据异象的规律，在海滩上备好了饵食，希望借此找到引起异象的元凶……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission received reports that anomalies resembling cloudhymn magic have been spotted in the Alchemy Commission delve, and that invisible monsters were encountered within this phenomenon.\nBased on the patterns of anomalies, Guangjin has prepared bait on the beach in hopes of uncovering the true source behind the phenomenon.

C: 根据忧郁诗人的定位，边塞诗人此时正处在丹鼎司，去回收它的灵感玉兆吧。\n小聪说自己造出不同的诗人是为了写情诗，那么边塞诗人真的有「情诗」吗？\n可能是写给云骑军的情诗。
E: According to the position of the Gloomy Poet, the Borderland Poet should currently be in the Alchemy Commission. Go and recover its Inspo Jade Abacus.\nCong said that he created different poets to write love poems, so does the Borderland Poet really write "love poems"?\nPerhaps it's a love poem written to the Cloud Knights.

C: 挨个听听大善人们的诉求吧。放个生还能让他们放生出食物链来，可真是一群人才。
E: Listen to the requests of the Benevolent Ones one by one. Who knew they could manage to create a food chain just from releasing living creatures? What a group of geniuses.

C: 黑天鹅解开了这个不算谜题的谜题…而游戏，却显然还未结束。黑天鹅再次依照花火的指引，赶往下一个案发现场。你似乎察觉到了又一股短暂的情绪波动——黑天鹅有些玩腻了。
E: Black Swan has solved the puzzle that isn't a puzzle... Clearly, the game is still not over. Once again, Black Swan follows Sparkle's instructions and rushes to the next crime scene. You feel as if you sense another brief burst of emotion... Black Swan is getting a little tired of these games.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 原来莱斯利•迪恩的确早已离世，梦境中的他只是由一众难以接受他死讯的人们联合创造出的幻影。\n一位惊慌的保洁员出现在你身后，或许她知道些什么……
E: It turns out that Lesley Dean has been gone for some time, and the person in the Dreamscape was created by his fans struggling to accept his death.\nA startled janitor appears behind you. Perhaps she knows something...

C: 你通过钟表把戏进入了查德威克的心绪空间。\n跟随旧日的影子，见证这位天才的一段段过去。
E: You have entered Chadwick's Emoscape through your Clockwork.\nFollow the shadows of his past and witness a fragment of this genius's life.

C: 虚数脉冲起爆后，为了逃离公司的魔掌，查德威克开始了流亡。\n找到螺丝咕姆的拼图，帮助查德威克与他重聚。
E: Following the Imaginary Pulse's detonation, Chadwick went into hiding to evade the IPC's clutches.\nFind Screwllum's puzzle pieces to facilitate their reunion.

C: 收集齐了筑梦拼图的碎片，回去完成拼图吧。
E: All Dream Jigsaw pieces have been collected. Go back and complete the jigsaw.

C: 虽然纷争的泰坦已陨，但纷争的余波并不会因此彻底消弭——城门前的喧哗证明了这点，作为天外的英雄，你或许还要继续进行荡除纷争的纷争……\n在银河球棒侠的正义执行下，一切纷争都将绳之以法！闹事的纷争泰坦被你赶走了，但到底发生了什么呢…去问问被你救下的可怜人吧。
E: Though the Strife Titan has fallen, the repercussions of war have yet to fully disappear — the commotion outside the city gates makes this perfectly clear. As a hero from beyond the sky, perhaps you may wish to continue your battle to eradicate all strife...\nAll strife will be brought to justice under the swift hand of the Galactic Baseballer! Though you have driven away the troublesome Strife Titan, something must have happened here... Go and ask the poor people you rescued for more information.

C: 记忆的舞台从纷争的剑下来到了负世的座下，危险与灾厄暂且远离了这段往事，你接下来或许可以欣赏一段没那么沉重的故事。但你要知道，以厮杀与苦难作为进场歌的戏剧，往往也以此作为退场——逛街，促进感情的好方式，无论在哪个时代、哪个世界，都是如此。\n「迅速接受情人是可耻的，应该经过一段时间，因为时间对于许多事物常常是最好的考验。」
E: The stage of this memory has transitioned from under Strife's blade to beneath Worldbearing's seat. The threat and disaster have subsided for now, and maybe you might even be able to immerse yourself in a slightly less heavy story. But you must be aware that any play that begins with slaughter and suffering often meets a similar end... Shopping — it is a wonderful way to increase intimacy in any world or time.\n"It is shameful to accept a lover too quickly. One must take their time — as time is often the best test."

C: 为了「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，尤利安打算继续秘密配送「地火」留下的快递。\n这件快递包裹上的署名模糊不清，也许她是娜塔莎诊所的某位患者？
E: For the Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, Julian plans to keep secretly delivering the packages Wildfire had left behind.\nThe name on this package is illegible. Maybe it's a patient in Natasha's clinic?

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 你检查了地板，原来脚印一事是场误会，是时候将真相告诉帕姆了。
E: You check the floor. The footprints incident is just a misunderstanding, so time to tell Pom-Pom that.

C: 向守卫迴星港的云骑兵复命，领取清理污染的酬劳。
E: Report back to the Cloud Knights guarding Stargazer Navalia and claim the rewards for cleansing the contamination.

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

C: 得知欢宴真相的阿波罗尼想要离开幻境？必须阻止这等同于寻死的行为……
E: Apollonius now wants to leave the fantasia after learning the truth behind the feast? You must stop this death-seeking behavior...

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是贝洛伯格上层区中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the Belobog Overworld...

C: 西衍先生邀请你同去鳞渊境，在你战斗过的地方改编你的冒险传奇。算了，编就编吧，就当用评书给星穹列车打广告了。
E: Mr. Xiyan invites you to go to Scalegorge Waterscape together and edit your legend at the place you once fought. Alright. He can edit it to his heart's content. Just treat it as making an advertisement for the Astral Express.

C: 暂时处理了码头的问题，工人们提出还可以从物流上降低成本。\n本着「吃瓜就要吃到底」的原则，继续陪着小秘书去鹤运物流看看吧。
E: With matters on the docks temporarily resolved, the workers also mentioned that their logistical costs can be reduced as well.\nSince you're seeing the gossip through to the end, you should continue following Mingxi the secretary and head to Heron Express.

C: 拍摄完绘影图形之后，需要和素裳讨论一下「商业宣传」的方向，并决定下一处拍摄主题。\n你当然可以相信素裳的商业直觉，不过，有没有一种可能，直接问问小秘书会更有效率？
E: After shooting the visiograph, you need to discuss with Sushang about what direction the "business promotion" is supposed to take, and decide the theme for the next promo.\nYou can definitely choose to trust Sushang's business instincts, but might it be wiser and more efficient to directly ask Miss Secretary Mingxi?

C: 拍摄完绘影图形之后，需要和素裳讨论一下「商业宣传」的方向，并决定下一处拍摄主题。\n你当然可以相信素裳的商业直觉，不过，有没有一种可能，直接问问小秘书会更有效率？
E: After shooting the visiograph, you need to discuss with Sushang about what direction the "business promotion" is supposed to take, and decide the theme for the next promo.\nYou can definitely choose to trust Sushang's business instincts, but might it be wiser and more efficient to directly ask Miss Secretary Mingxi?

C: 帮助商会完成码头营收的任务，建立商铺与商会的合作，规划合理的路线…这都将帮助金人巷实现复兴。\n金人巷商会通过码头运营赚取储值金，至少应该先挣到目标金额，帮助商会摆脱眼前的危机。
E: Help the merchant guild reach the dock's revenue goal, build up cooperation between the guild and the stores, plan reasonable routes... All these tasks will help revitalize Aurum Alley.\nThe Aurum Alley Merchant Guild accumulates funding through operating the docks. You should prioritize reaching the revenue goal and help the guild overcome their immediate crisis.

C: 阿克赛挖掘出了新的古代遗迹，继续你的探宝之旅吧！
E: Aksay has excavated a new ancient ruin. Continue your treasure hunting journey!

C: 凶宅中总是会出现一些意料之外的物件，背面示人的广告牌便是一种。也许探访凶宅之旅，应该从这里开始。
E: There will always be unexpected items appearing in haunted residences, such as billboards with their backs to the front. Perhaps the journey to penetrate into the depths of the haunted residence should start here.

C: 空间站里还游荡着一些特殊造物，科员们需要足够的样本，这样才能破译造物身体特征的秘密，现在这个重任被交托到你的肩膀上……
E: There are still several special creations wandering around the space station. The researchers need enough samples to crack the secret behind their physical traits. The weight of this task now rests upon your shoulders...

C: 许多监狱区划都被这些古怪的迷钟占据了。你需要想办法修好它们，以免影响美梦小镇的重建工作。
E: Many prison areas have been taken over by these strange Tickers. You have to find a way to fix them, so they don't interfere with the rebuilding of Dreamville.

C: 监狱的狱警们破坏了球笼航道，你必须手动调整路线将它们修复，不然就永远没法跟伙伴们汇合了。
E: The prison wardens have destroyed the Spheroid lane. You have to manually reroute the course to repair the lanes, or you'll never be able to reunite with your companions.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n原来淑女打算向忧郁派表明心意，可怎么都开不了口，忧郁派也还是很消极…或许你可以帮得上忙。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nIt turns out that Lady intends to confess its feelings to Melancholy, but it struggles to articulate its words, and Melancholy remains pessimistic... Perhaps you can help.

C: 前往终点，前方或许就有答案。
E: Head to the finish line. Answers may lie ahead.

C: 托帕在金人巷等待着卢卡。\n出于尊重，卢卡希望可以当面拒绝她的邀约，陪他去一趟吧。
E: Topaz is waiting for Luka in Aurum Alley.\nLuka wishes to refuse her invitation face-to-face as a gesture of respect. You should go with him.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n万事俱备，该前往此行的「战场」了！
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nAll is ready. It's time to head to the battlefield!

C: 困了，懒得写描述了。睡大觉！
E: So tired. Can't be bothered to write a description. Night night!

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about the work

C: 颁奖典礼进入尾声，三月七终于空闲了下来，找她聊聊吧。
E: As the award ceremony enters its conclusion, March 7th finally has time to rest. Chat with her.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「黄金替罪羊」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by Golden Scapegoat. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 今日待鉴定宝物已准备好，去找西塔罗斯吧。
E: The treasures up for appraisal today are ready. Time to talk to Theodoros.

C: 今日待鉴定宝物已准备好，去找西塔罗斯吧。
E: The treasures up for appraisal today are ready. Time to talk to Theodoros.

C: 你做过美梦、噩梦、白日梦，唯独没有做过预言梦。\n默念十次「预言梦」入睡，或许会有效果？
E: You have had sweet dreams, nightmares, and daydreams, but not a prophetic dream.\nSilently recite the phrase "prophetic dream" ten times before you sleep might work?

C: 只差最后一场胜利，你就能赢取「金盏徽章」，获得角逐冠军的资格了！但你知道…对手并不好对付。
E: Only one victory left before you win the Golden Chalice Badge and qualify for the championship! But you know... the opponent is formidable.

C: 大家都在忙着为宴会做准备，你和昔涟当然也不能闲着，去看看有什么能帮忙的。\n妖精们搬不动那些巨大果实，帮它们布置好中央的木盆吧！
E: Everyone's busy preparing for the feast, so you and Cyrene certainly can't just sit around. Go see what you can help out with.\nThe fairies can't move those huge fruits, so help them arrange the wooden basins in the center!

C: 在「情商」配方的助力下，真理医生为素裳上了一堂精彩、成功、妙趣横生的课程。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者为真理医生再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: With the help of the "EQ" Recipe, Dr. Ratio delivered a brilliant, successful, and entertaining lesson to Sushang.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Dr. Ratio.

C: 你的思维在接待中碰撞出了新的火花，灵感层见叠出，原本四处缺漏的「特调配方」也全部填补完成。是时候向舒翁汇报，领取你应得的赞赏和奖励了！
E: New sparks were generated in your mind as you welcomed the guests, with new ideas and novel inspirations positively leaping out at you. The previously incomplete "Special Mix Recipe" has now been fully completed. It's time to report back to Siobhan and receive the praise and rewards you deserve!

C: 委托派遣已经完成了，请及时查看。
E: Assignments have been completed. Please take a look soon.

C: 我们还不动身吗，姬子？
E: Shouldn't we go down there, Himeko?

C: 「毁灭」的纳努克、「丰饶」的药师、「终末」的末王…我自问也算见多识广，可有些星神的行为真是难以理解啊。
E: Nanook the Destruction, Yaoshi the Abundance, Terminus the Finality... I've seen and learned a lot in my time, but I still struggle to understand some of the Aeons' actions.

C: 我不喜欢凑热闹，何况眼下还有更重要的工作要做。
E: I enjoy being alone, especially when I have important work to do.

C: 能让我看看吗？
E: Can I have a look?

C: 你来错地方了，卡芙卡。我们不打算接受你的请求，也不打算和星核猎手扯上什么关系。很高兴和你聊天，也许哪天你愿意亲自登门拜访，届时我们可以再谈。
E: You're in the wrong place, Kafka. We're not about to accept your request, and we're not about to get into bed with a Stellaron Hunter. It was nice talking with you. Perhaps next time you'll be willing to pay us a visit in person and we can continue our little discussion.

C: {NICKNAME}，你有什么想法吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, what do you think about all this?

C: 哦？为什么？
E: Oh? How come?

C: 匹诺康尼正在举办一场盛会，因此「家族」给列车发来了邀请函。姬子打算接受邀请，所以这次，我们不是作为开拓者，而是以客人的身份前去赴宴。
E: Penacony is holding an event, and The Family sent an invitation to the Express. Himeko intends to accept the invitation, so we were planning to travel there as guests, not Trailblazers.

C: 帕姆去过仙舟吗？
E: Have you visited the Xianzhou before, Pom-Pom?

C: 所谓真人不露相吧，你问他的时候，他只会说自己是做动画的。
E: You could say he keeps his cards close to his chest. If you ask him, he'll just tell you about how he worked in animation...

C: 所以，我的任务评分是…
E: How would you rate my performance?

C: 谢谢你选择了成为我们的伙伴，{NICKNAME}。希望我能解答你在旅途中萌生的疑惑。
E: Thank you for becoming our companion, {NICKNAME}. I'll do my best to answer any questions you may have.

C: 请各位科员进行特殊放射性实验前，务必检索实验室的隔断功能是否处于开放状态。
E: Please make sure the isolation function of the lab is on before conducting radioactive experiments.

C: 一个聊天窗口界面跳了出来。对方发来了数条消息。
E: A chat window pops up and several messages appear.

C: 还要说多久？按照剧本，{RUBY_B#「开拓」的旅行者}星穹列车{RUBY_E#}的人就快到了，我们不该跟他们照上面。
E: How long do you think you need? According to the script, the {RUBY_B#Trailblazers}Astral Express crew{RUBY_E#} is arriving soon. We should avoid being seen by them.

C: {NICKNAME}，要不你把这个拿上吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, maybe you should take this.

C: 喂，这亮晶晶的是…「光锥」吧？这不是星际和平公司内部才有的稀罕货吗？
E: Hey, these shiny things... Are these Light Cones? I thought only the Interastral Peace Corporation had rare stuff like this.

C: 我就知道…没关系，我也会向黑塔发信，说她要的奇物我们带来了。至少这个对她还有点吸引力。
E: I knew it... No matter. I'll also send a letter to Herta and tell her that we've brought the rare item she seeks. At least that might get her attention.

C: 唔，我对你的身份一无所知，但我很熟悉你的…气息。
E: Who exactly you are escapes me, but you seem familiar to me.

C: 没记住。
E: Could you repeat that again?

C: 它的打分依据会是智力吗？好像不是……
E: Is it basing things on intellect? Don't think so...

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着白露：「<unbreak>71</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Bailu: "<unbreak>71</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着黑天鹅：「<unbreak>61</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The rating pistol's eyes look at Black Swan: "<unbreak>61</unbreak> points!" It announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着灵砂：「<unbreak>29</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Lingsha: "<unbreak>29</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 空气中忽然传来一阵微热，拂过脸颊，在你的耳畔驻足停步。
E: A gust of heat suddenly arrives through the air. It touches your cheeks and pauses next to your ear.

C: 先别闹，攻击要来了！
E: Incoming, look out!

C: 没门儿！
E: No way!

C: 啥研究？
E: Study what?

C: 「星核」到底是什么？
E: What exactly is a Stellaron?

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 如果你只是在这随便走走逛逛，或者同意被封在实验舱里，那没什么问题。
E: If you were just wandering around, or if you agreed to be sealed away in an experiment pod, that would be fine.

C: 一如既往，追随阿基维利的足迹。
E: As always, to follow in the footsteps of Akivili.

C: 剧本指导\n艾利欧
E: Script Supervisor\nElio

C: 浑身头疼。
E: I've got a killer headache.

C: …待会儿我来给你检查一下。
E: ...I'll check you out in a minute.

C: 其实没想那么多…
E: I didn't think too much about it...

C: 硬床板对脊椎有好处，床铺太过柔软反而不好。
E: A hard bed is good for your spine. A bed that's too soft will end up hurting you.

C: 阿基维利…
E: About Akivili...

C: …但是，这样的牺牲毫无意义，您不可以——
E: ...But that's a meaningless sacrifice, how can you—

C: …我当然明白。
E: ...Of course I understand.

C: 纪念碑有什么象征含义吗？
E: Does the monument have any symbolic meaning?

C: 大守护者应该已经知道了我们的到来，布洛妮娅……
E: The supreme guardian has probably learned of our arrival already. Bronya...

C: 没问题，我正这么打算呢！但是，这条路可不是嘴上说说那么简单啊。
E: Not a problem, I was thinking the same thing! But I'm afraid telling you might not be enough.

C: 茉莉小姐的祖先显然没给我们留下这种奇形怪状的钥匙，导致我们现在就只能硬着头皮解谜。但无论如何，都得先把谜面解读出来才行。
E: Apparently, Miss Molly's ancestors didn't leave us any such oddly shaped key, so we have to bite the bullet and solve the puzzle. But in any case, we have to decipher what the puzzle is first.
*sigh*

C: 你家里有没有人受伤？
E: Did anyone in your family get hurt?

C: 那么，按照这个方法的话…有了——「关键」…「在群山的隘口」…「等候」，「彼处为」…「大守护者」…「运筹之地」？另外，落款是「理查德•巴拉金」。
E: So, according to this method...it should be... I got it! Here it is: "The key"... "At the mountain pass"... "Waiting," "That place is"... "The Supreme Guardian"... "The place of operation"? In addition, the inscription is "Richard Balakin."

C: 怎么办？好不容易找到了线索，却只能在这一步放弃了吗……
E: What do we do? We've finally found a clue. Do we have to give up after all?

C: 宣讲的时候好像没看到希儿。
E: Was Seele not there for the address?

C: 缆车站重新开放了？
E: Is the cable car station operating?

C: …接下来，就该去歌德宾馆好好睡上一觉了！
E: ...Time to head back to the Goethe Hotel for a good night's sleep!

C: 再随便逛逛。
E: Walk around a bit more.

C: 收到姬子的信息了吧？该回去了。若是延误了发车，列车长又该唠叨了。
E: Did you get Himeko's message? It's time to go. The conductor will nag us again if we put the Express behind schedule.

C: 对了，咱们回来以后还没见着希露瓦呢！去机械屋看看吧。
E: Oh, we haven't seen Serval since we got back! Let's head to the workshop.

C: 不过嘛，话说回来…其实我约你这趟出来，是有点事想拜托你。
E: Anyway... about the something I needed your help with.

C: 也许她只是想看看外面的世界。
E: Maybe she just wants to see the outside world.

C: 杰帕德——能给姐姐搭把手吗？帮我收拾收拾行李～
E: Gepard, can you lend your dear sister a hand? Help me pack my bags~

C: 图纸是我负责设计的，但由于部分原材料昂贵又稀有，我始终没能把它打造出来。是她帮我把概念变为了现实。
E: I came up with the design, but I was never able to build it — some of the raw materials were either too expensive or too hard to get a hold of. She helped me turn the concept into reality.

C: 你想啊，你第一次来这里的时候就帮我修了机器，这最后一次来也帮了忙…这就叫有始有终，对吧？
E: Think about it — you helped me fix my machine the first time you came here, and now you're helping me the last time too... That's called having a beginning and an end, right?

C: 我…我还是不发表看法了。我不想给你增加思想负担。
E: I... Forget it. I don't want to complicate things for you.

C: 行吧，那我就帮你这个忙——朗道姐弟第一次、也是最后一次通力合作！
E: Alright, I'll help you out — the first and last time the Landau siblings will work together!

C: 我只能说，说走就走确实是她的作风。她一直这么任性，每次都心安理得地给人添麻烦……
E: All I can say is that it's in character for her to say something and then do it without thinking. She's always been impulsive, and she doesn't mind creating a headache or two along the way...

C: 哎，那毕竟是和我一起从小到大的亲姐姐。如果说舍得…那肯定是假的。
E: *sigh* She's my sister — we grew up together. I'd be lying if I said I'm not going to miss her.

C: 你想起某个古老世界的刑罚：在那里，失德之人身披黑色的斗篷，被挂在路灯上。
E: You remember a punishment from an ancient world, where those judged to have lost their virtue would be put up on street lamps draped in black cloaks.

C: 关于「你」的流言在城市内纷纷扬扬：据说一个陌生人翻遍了全城的垃圾桶，像在寻找，又像挽留。
E: Rumors are spreading around the city about "you." The whispers speak of a stranger that has rummaged through all the trashcans in the city — as if in search of something, trying to prevent something from being lost.

C: 你注意到海报上刻意隐去了特鲁太太那可怖的造型：她骨瘦嶙峋，头发凌乱，留着长长的指甲，穿着破布一样的衣服…没能在宣传画上登场，也许是出于票房的考虑。
E: You notice Mrs. Trude is missing from the poster. Perhaps her skeletal appearance, frightful hair, long nails, and tattered clothes aren't the best recipe for a box office hit.

C: 非常精致的茶具，好像很久没人用过了。
E: A very fine tea set. It seems like no one has used it for a long time.

C: 你看见牌子上写着：「『侯爵夫人』——本店特产，永不打折！」
E: You see a sign that says: "The Marquise is our specialty — no discounts!"

C: 等下，这真的是活人吗？不会是雕像吧。
E: Wait, is that definitely a person? Don't tell me it's a statue.

C: …火淇淋，听着好像丹恒描述过的一种神兽。
E: Fire Chillin' Ice Cream... sounds like a mythical creature Dan Heng once described.

C: 投入邮箱。
E: Put it in the mailbox.

C: 人一旦踏上这条路，就回不了头了。
E: There's no turning back once you've walked down this path.

C: 一张「水晶日报」，印着大守护者可可利亚的头像，一群银鬃铁卫簇拥在她左右；纸团；
E: A copy of the Crystal Daily with Supreme Guardian Cocolia on the front page, surrounded by Silvermane Guards. Crumpled paper ball.

C: 垃圾桶里躺着一张漂亮的明信片，上面写着：「朋友，你过界了，这不是你应该触碰的东西。署名：垃圾之王。」
E: A pretty postcard is lying in the trashcan. It reads: "Friend, you've crossed the line. This isn't something you should have touched. Signed, Garbage King."

C: 怎么了，身体有哪里不舒服吗？
E: Everything alright? You feeling okay?

C: 总之，你跟我走一趟。奥列格头儿要见你，他好像有很多问题要问。
E: Enough talk, you're coming with me. Chief Oleg wants to see you, and he's got more than a few questions.

C: 地下原本有许多矿区，但是近几年一种叫裂界的侵蚀在地底蔓延，许多矿场都遭了殃，没法再开采了。
E: The underground used to have many mines. However, in recent years, some sort of corrosion called the "Fragmentum" started to spread. It's ruined a lot of mines.

C: 没太听懂，你能再说一遍吗？
E: I don't think I understood, can you go over it again?

C: 看见这些人了吗？都是矿民和矿民家属，他们是来跟挑事的地痞讨说法的。
E: You see these people? They're all miners and their family members. They want an explanation from the instigators.

C: 你不能以貌取人啊，其实我也有几百岁了，可你看不出来吧？
E: Don't judge a book by its cover. I myself have put a few centuries behind me. Would you be able to tell?

C: 胡说！你见过这么老的8岁小孩吗？
E: Nonsense! Ahem! How many eight-year-olds do you see walking around that look like this, huh?

C: 不用怕，我有对付它的经验。我们上吧！
E: Don't be afraid, I've dealt with those robots before. Let's go!

C: 军官大小姐吗？看着人不错的样子，长得也好看。
E: The Silvermane girl? She's pretty. I like looking at her.

C: 请逮捕我吧！
E: Please arrest me! I can't wait!

C: 不、不行啦！我从来没通宵过哦？熬夜有多伤皮肤你知道吗！
E: N—No I don't! *pretend yawn* Besides, I've never pulled an all-nighter before! Do you know how bad it is for your skin?

C: 一下子得知了太多，今晚我怕是睡不着了…要是你们信得过我，就把放哨的事就交给我吧。
E: I've come to know a great deal in a short time — I doubt I'll be able to fall asleep tonight.

C: …或许你说的对，或许不对。现在我…还要想想。
E: ...Maybe you're right, or not. Right now I just... need more time to think.

C: 哈…下层的事总算是告一段落了，可以去找「星核」啦。
E: Ahhhh... Well, now that we're done with that whole situation in the Underworld, we can finally look for the Stellaron.

C: 她还有很多事要善后，你们就跟我这个老头子聊吧，我说的话就代表她的意思。
E: She has a bunch of other things to attend to, so I hope you don't mind talking to this old man instead. I speak on behalf of Natasha.

C: …这次用不着弄晕咱们了吧。
E: ...There's no need to knock us out this time, right?

C: 我感觉这玩偶好像平平无奇。
E: It seems like a regular teddy bear to me.

C: 我以前其实也是银鬃铁卫的军官。负伤退伍以后，我跟着家里那口子来到下层，计划在这儿过上退休生活。
E: I was actually once an officer of the Silvermane Guards. After being discharged due to an injury, I followed my old lady here to the Underworld, where I planned to retire.

C: 怎么，还有什么话想说？那就快点。
E: What, still something you want to talk about? Alright, let's make it quick.

C: 这种拳手，要来何用？所以我上个月就给他们发了降薪通知书…要么自愿降薪，要么乖乖滚蛋！
E: So what's the point of keeping them around? That's why I sent a message to everyone last month... They can either take a pay cut voluntarily or kiss their sweet butts goodbye.

C: 有说过一些，比如要我穿上盔甲装成裂界里的怪物什么的。
E: A little, like asking me to put on the armor and become a monster from the Fragmentum or something.

C: 我签拳手是为了挣钱，不是给自己请了个祖宗！他的身体哪有那么娇贵！
E: I sign boxers to make money, not to treat them like babies! He's not that delicate!

C: 咳咳，看完了吗，医生？能让我回去了吗？
E: *cough* *cough* Are we done now, doc? Can I go back now?

C: （递上信件和匿名的包裹）
E: (you hand over Kluzer's letter and anonymous package)

C: 面对火力全开的机械战将，{NICKNAME}该何去何从？屏住呼吸吧，现场的各位观众！比赛现在正式开始！
E: Facing the full firepower of this mechanical warrior, what should {NICKNAME} do? Hold your breath, everyone in the audience! The game officially starts now!

C: 谢谢你们特意来告诉我这个好消息。我现在感觉浑身充满了干劲儿…等上下层的通路重新开放，肯定会有不少人来我这儿住宿吧？
E: Thank you all so much for coming to tell me the good news. I haven't felt like this in a long time... We'll get plenty of guests staying at the hotel again once the passageway is open!

C: 咳，不说没用的了——怎么样，你们准备好搭乘缆车了吗？
E: *cough* So! Ready to climb aboard?

C: …啊，这个商业街后面铁门的钥匙，虽然现在已经没有人用得上了。真是谢谢你了！
E: ...Ah, that's the key for the iron gates behind the business street. No one needs it anymore. Thank you so much!

C: 哼，小屁孩儿到一边玩儿去。
E: Hmph, you cheeky little brat.

C: 读者从来都是不好伺候的，大人连这都不懂吗？
E: Readers always have been fickle. How can grownups not understand this?

C: 采掘用具横七竖八地躺在路边，睡相十分奔放。
E: Mining tools are laid haphazardly on the roadside.

C: 呃，你可能没注意看刚才的旁白：这座垃圾箱长者已经在本地伫立了很久，它就像一位长者，你必须尊重一位长者的智慧。
E: Uh, you may have missed the narration just now: This elderly dumpster had been standing in this spot for years. You must respect its years of accumulated wisdom.

C: 拒绝！？
E: Decline!?

C: 客气客气，各位下回见到驭空大人，替小女子美言几句便是最好的安慰了。我已经接受了我的劳碌命。
E: Not at all, though I'd appreciate it if you mention to Madam Yukong that you got a warm reception from me when you next see her. *sigh* Better to be busy than idle, I suppose.

C: 她居然毫不抵抗…
E: She didn't resist at all...

C: 对不住、对不住嘛。我原本也想等你们来着…哎，那个，碰！！
E: I know, I know, I'm sorry — I was going to wait for you by the statue, but— Ah— Triplet!

C: 我明白，你们瞧我身材小小，就觉得我一定是背着父母偷偷跑出来的「小朋友」。
E: I get it — you think because I'm small I must be a runaway child.

C: 不能分心
E: I can't be distracted

C: 你加入云骑军多久了？
E: When did you join the Cloud Knights?

C: 这……好可爱！！！
E: Awwww he's so CUTE!!!

C: 嘿嘿，多亏了小谛听，咱们才没闯进去。
E: Hee-hee, thanks to little Diting, we didn't have to break and enter.

C: 当猎物的痕迹突然消失，猎手就该小心了——
E: When the trace of the hunted disappears, the hunter better think twice...

C: 你听得懂她说什么吗？
E: ...What the actual heck is she saying?

C: 你等我们，怕是又有所求吧？
E: Just ask for our help already...

C: 我也不想受人摆布。但人们行于命途之上并非独来独往，不受羁绊。每个人的选择除了造就自身，也将同行之人推向前方。
E: I do not wish to be their puppet, either. In any case, we do not walk alone and unhindered on our paths. Our choices define us and influence others.

C: 「药王秘传」所为的，是每个联盟子弟最痛恨的卑劣行径！
E: What the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus did are despicable acts that every Alliance resident detests!

C: 咱们俘虏了几个「药王秘传」的妖人，有些人疯了。他是疯得最彻底的一个。
E: We captured a few devils from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Some of them are already mad, and this one is the maddest.

C: 登上星槎，前方便是封印建木的洞天，「鳞渊境」。
E: We need to take a starskiff to Scalegorge Waterscape — the Ambrosial Arbor can be sealed from that delve.

C: 嗯，完了。
E: Mm, that it is.

C: 你怎么知道…
E: How did you know...

C: 这些回忆…
E: These memories...

C: 呼剑如影！
E: Edged companion!

C: 我深入「建木」后，若海水恢复原状，便立刻撤离，重新闭锁洞天。一切事宜听从太卜安排。
E: After I enter the Ambrosial Arbor, and if the seawater returns to its original state, you must withdraw immediately and seal off the delve once more. The Master Diviner will lead you.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 怎么了，老朋友？感觉你对封印似乎没什么头绪啊…
E: What seems to be the problem, friend? It would appear the seals have you at a loss.

C: 片刻后，你们唤来了符玄与云骑军。星槎载着你们飞向长乐天。
E: A few moments later, Fu Xuan and the Clouds Knights arrived. A starskiff was ready to take you all to Exalting Sanctum.

C: 欢迎光临「不夜侯」！客人几位，想要喝点儿什么茶？我是小店的主人梦茗，有什么吩咐您随时告诉我。
E: Welcome to the Sleepless Earl! I'm the owner here — the name's Mengming. How many of you are there? Which tea would you like today?

C: 哇，这礼物还真是下了血本啊。
E: Wow, now that's what I call a pay-off.

C: 杨叔诗意大发。
E: Didn't know you were a poet, Mr. Yang.

C: 我还是难以相信。那份战报当真不是一个拙劣的玩笑么？
E: I still can't believe it. The whole report reads like a bad joke — it's simply unimaginable.

C: 照相机，没问题；换洗衣物，没问题；洗护用品……
E: Camera, check. Extra clothes, check. Toiletries...

C: 谢谢，你的好意我心领了，但我不喜欢太过喧嚣的地方。列车的工作也总得有人来处理。
E: Thank you, I appreciate the invitation, but I don't like bustling places, and someone has to handle the work on the Express.

C: 你也多花些时间清点行李为好。听说家族的入境手续很繁琐，等入住了再发现问题，就来不及了。
E: I'd advise double-checking your bags. Word is that The Family's customs procedure can be quite demanding. Better to sort it out now than face issues at your hotel check-in.

C: 离开这里吧，就像平日那样醒来，忘记这场偶然的邂逅，回到你来的地方。
E: Leave this realm, and rise as you would on any other day. Forget this fortuitous encounter, and return whence you came.

C: 听闻星际和平公司也收到了匹诺康尼的邀请，想必您就是代表了，公司精英果真气质不凡——如此了不得的大人物，可否给我们行个方便呢？
E: I've heard that the IPC has also received Penacony's invitation, so forgive me if I'm mistaken, but you must be the representative. The IPC's elite certainly does have an extraordinary air about them. I suppose such an exceptional figure such as yourself wouldn't mind paving a convenience for us?

C: 如果我出手，那这省下的时间应当是我为自己争取来的——而不是你们带给我的。
E: If I do something about it now, the time saved is from my own effort, not a favor from you all.

C: 「警告」！哈哈哈，你太幽默了。
E: Warning me! Hahaha, you're too funny.

C: 欢迎光临白日梦酒店——愿您有一段难忘的度假体验！如有搬运行李到客房的需求，随时可以找我。
E: Welcome to the Reverie! May you have an unforgettable holiday! Should you need assistance with moving your luggage to your room, feel free to contact me.

C: 梦中的匹诺康尼被划分为十二片独立的梦境，听说初次入梦时，不同人去往的目的地也不尽相同。
E: The dream Penacony is divided into twelve individual dreamscapes. I've heard that the destinations vary for different people when they first enter the dream.

C: 别太吓人。
E: That sounds scary.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>开个玩笑，别紧张，这的确是你的房间。我只是偶然路过……</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>I jest. Take it easy, this is indeed your room. I was just passing by...</color>

C: 如果身配一柄刀，总要用它斩下些什么。而一名赌徒在满盘皆输前，也一定会破釜沉舟，孤注一掷…我只能言尽于此。
E: One who wears a blade must use it to cut eventually. And when a gambler has nothing to lose on the table, he will surely go for broke and bet it all on a final hand... That is all I can say.

C: 好比喻，我完全理解了。
E: That's a great analogy. I get it now.

C: 这扇门似乎无法从这一侧打开。
E: This door appears unopenable from this side.

C: 「白日梦酒店」发生什么了？
E: What happened to The Reverie?

C: 好了，让我们开始吧——请您闭上眼睛，将额头抵在梦泡上即可。
E: Well, let's begin. Please close your eyes and rest your forehead against the dream bubble.

C: 谁在说话？
E: Who's speaking?

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 你们是怎么办事儿的？睁大眼睛瞧瞧，这姑娘是我们要找的偷渡犯吗？
E: What's gotten into you all? Open your eyes and take a good look. Is this lady the stowaway we're looking for?

C: 救救！救救我啾！揪我出来啾！啾！
E: Help! Help me! Pull me out! Please!

C: 哎哎，别这样，多生分啊。
E: Oh, don't be like that. You're making things awkward.

C: 嗯？哦…是你，又来照顾生意了？
E: Eh? Oh... it's you. You here to relax?

C: 好嘞，给您掌掌眼！
E: No problem! Here it is!

C: 恐怕没这么简单吧？
E: I don't think it's that simple.

C: 不打扰你了…
E: I'll leave you to it...

C: 天哪…天哪、天哪、天哪…！
E: Oh my... Oh my, oh my, oh my!

C: 你有话想对我说吗？
E: Do you have something to tell me?

C: 我也想为你分担…
E: I wish to share your burden...

C: 至少带上我，好不好…
E: Take me with you at least, all right?

C: 我们已经走投无路了…
E: We have nowhere to go...

C: 取出垃圾。
E: Remove some trash.

C: 啊，我从没感觉像现在这样畅快过！等你向塔塔洛夫掀起反旗时，我和其他受压迫的桶必跟随你的左右！
E: Ah, I've never felt so exhilarated before! When you raise the banner of rebellion against Tatalov, I and the other oppressed cans shall stand by your side!

C: 所以我有必要向各位澄清一个事实：花火小姐的把戏能令人陷入幻觉，但那片诡异的梦境和她无关，而是源自匹诺康尼本身。
E: So I feel the need to clarify with everyone: Miss Sparkle's tricks can induce hallucinations, but that strange Dreamscape? Nothing to do with her — it originated from Penacony itself.

C: 梦境酒店的遭遇就是预兆。
E: The encounter at the dreamscape Hotel was a sign.

C: 发生这种事，我很遗憾…我太过专注于那女孩，却忽视了……
E: I'm sorry for what happened... I was too focused on that girl, and got sloppy...

C: 暂且不考虑极端情况，推动梦境异变的主使，立场定然与家族对立，那就不外乎两种可能……
E: Well, excluding any extreme scenarios, the mastermind responsible for these shifts in the dreamscape undeniably stands against The Family, which narrows it down to two possibilities...

C: 嗯…有了。我能看见这片梦境的中心，还有家族的人…还有几个身影在摸索着向前，看来你的朋友也不太顺利呢…一个、两个、三个……
E: Mm... got it. I can see the core of this Dreamscape, and there are members of The Family... and some figures trying to find their way forward. It appears that your friends aren't faring too well... One, two, three...

C: 没错。是这个房间留下的，有关她的记忆。地面的轻微震动，屏幕中闪过的倒影，忆质的流向…我将它们汇聚，以片段形式复现了出来。
E: Yes. It's what this room left behind — the memories of her. The slight trembling of the ground, the fleeting reflections on the screen, the flow of memoria... I gathered and reproduced them in fragments.

C: 知更鸟就是她口中的「哑巴」。她失声了，一般人注意不到，但逃不过你我的耳朵，那不是器官在发音，而是「同谐」的共振。
E: Robin is what she calls the "mute." She has lost her voice and while most people can't pick up on it, you and I cannot mistake that sound — not produced by any voicebox, but rather by the resonance of the Harmony.

C: 在这样说时，她的手也轻轻搭在了刀镡上。
E: She says this as her hand gently rests on the hilt of the sword.

C: 「巡猎」…并非我所行的道路。
E: The Hunt... is not the path I truly follow.

C: 也许不是你的敌人。
E: Not your enemy, perhaps.

C: 你最初的提问——「你是否还会做梦，梦见那些因你而死的人。」
E: Your first question was: "Do you still have dreams about everyone who died because of you?"

C: 不知道是不是太突然了，我总觉得…知更鸟小姐没有死，还好好地活在什么地方。一切就只是场…恶作剧……
E: I hope it's not too soon to bring it up, but I feel like... Miss Robin isn't actually dead, but that she's still alive and well somewhere. That everything's just some... horrible prank...

C: 匹诺康尼的秘密…也许与曾经的「开拓」息息相关。
E: The secret of Penacony... may be closely related to the Trailblaze.

C: 上一次，那位叫康娜的侍者专门去<color=#dbc291ff>侧面的房间</color>确认了什么，才把雕像布置到位。
E: On the previous occasion, an attendant named Conna had gone to <color=#dbc291ff>the side room</color> to verify something before setting the statues in the correct positions.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>六只朝向各不相同的隐夜鸫</color>，显而易见的提示。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Six Nightingales facing in different directions</color> — an obvious hint.

C: 说，说，引，导，吧。
E: Tell. Me. About. The. Tour.

C: 将模型置入沙盘。
E: Place the model in the sandpit.

C: 所有，或者一无所有。
E: All or nothing.

C: 「基石」——我听闻那是战略投资部的宝贵资产，封存「存护」令使大权的圣石，列位{RUBY_B#石心十人}清算专家{RUBY_E#}各自持有一枚。
E: Cornerstone — I've heard it's a treasured asset of the Strategic Investment Department, a sacred stone that seals the "Preservation" Emanator, granting significant power, and every {RUBY_B#Ten Stonehearts}Liquidation Specialist{RUBY_E#} holds one.

C: 但我不会，因为这不*得体*——你应当在出门前就确保一切井然有序，绝不偏移。
E: But I don't, because it's not appropriate to do so in public — you should make sure everything is presentable and in order before leaving the house.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 我又得…婉拒你了。
E: I'll have to decline...

C: …他在说什么？
E: ...What's he talking about?

C: 哈哈哈…姬子小姐太客气了，对我不必用「您」。
E: Hahaha... Miss Himeko, you're too polite. There's no need to call me "Sir."

C: 足够了，在匹诺康尼发生的事我记得很清楚。请问吧。
E: That should do it. I vividly remember everything that occurred on Penacony. Ask away.

C: 「在战略投资部员工『翡翠』的指导下，星链现已重归存护的版图，但泛星系奴隶贸易和海盗活动的泛滥，仍是公司迫切关注的问题。公司将不遗余力……」
E: Under the guidance of Jade, an esteemed member of the Strategic Investment Department, the Star Chain has now been returned to its rightful owner. However, the rampant spread of the Interstellar Slave Trade and piracy remains a pressing concern for the IPC. The IPC is fully committed to...

C: …你疯了。
E: ...You're insane.

C: …如果我说「不」呢？
E: ...And what if I say "no"?

C: 喏，就在柜台下面。几位客人远道而来，你不打算弄点特调饮品么？
E: They're all under the counter. Since our guests have traveled from afar, shouldn't you whip up some special drinks?

C: 那…那我们就先收着吧。
E: Then... we'll keep it for now...

C: ——敬未竟的心愿。
E: ...To unfinished business.

C: 即便如此，我们还是希望为他正名。只要能把真正的叛徒，这一切的幕后主使揪出，匹诺康尼的「同谐」便能重回正轨……
E: Nevertheless, we wanted to clear his name. We intended to find the real traitor, the one responsible for all this, and restore Harmony to Penacony...

C: 知更鸟小姐认为这是因为「同谐」受到了某种干扰。但据我所知，能够干涉命途伟力的存在少之又少。
E: Robin believed it was because the Harmony had been tampered with somehow, but as far as I know, there aren't many entities capable of interfering with the power of Paths.

C: 看起来都是家族的内部人员啊…但我没见过其中任何一人。
E: They all seem to be insiders... but I haven't met any of them.

C: …所以你让拉帝奥找到他，故意把计划泄露出去。为了不让对方起疑，你向拉帝奥交代的内容全都是真实的，他也如实转告了星期日。
E: ...Which is why you had Ratio seek him out and leak the plan on purpose — to prevent the other party from suspecting anything. The intel you gave to Ratio was all true, and he spoke the same to Sunday.

C: 你也来试试吧，先生！看你一直愁眉苦脸的，在游乐园要开心点呀。
E: You should give it a try too, Mister! You look sad. The amusement park will cheer you up.

C: 你现在的表情真的很难形容。妈妈给你留下的这枚护身符是纯金打造的，为什么从没考虑过卖了它？
E: Your expression right now is hard to put into words. The lucky charm Mama left you is made from gold. Why did you never consider selling it?

C: …所以「钻石」才会选择你？
E: ...So, that's why Diamond chose you?

C: 很辛苦吧。
E: It's hard, isn't it?

C: 你要做的事我阻止不了，你要去往的地方…我们也改变不了。
E: I can't stop you from doing what you want, and... we can't change where you want to go.

C: 你们的关系真是令人羡慕。
E: I envy your close friendships.

C: 容我提醒，这片舞台和{NICKNAME}的身份，应该都和缉拿真凶无关。
E: Let me remind you that in all likelihood, this stage and {F#her}{M#his} identity have nothing to do with the wanted murderer.

C: …你做不到。
E: ...You won't do it.

C: 除非有人去往壁垒的另一边……
E: Unless someone goes to the other side of the barrier...

C: 既然你知道自己在做什么，那我也必须提醒你这么做的风险。
E: Since you already know what you're doing, I'll also have to remind you of its risks.

C: 这不可能。
E: That's impossible.

C: 这个按钮是……
E: This button is...

C: 我知道，要无条件地相信这些很难。我只是想说，你离最后的答案很近了。只需做一件事，我就能为你证明……
E: I know it's tough to believe all this without reservations. I just want to say you're very close to the final answer — just one more thing needs to be done, and then I can prove it to you...

C: 关于流萤和列车组…
E: Regarding Firefly and the Crew...

C: 走过这条路右转就是贸易区，那里人多一些，也许有人知道她们在哪。
E: Take a right turn at the end of this road and you'll reach the trade district. There are more people there, and perhaps someone knows where she is.

C: 「白日梦」酒店的门童，他怎么会出现在这里，又恰好在黄泉小姐斩断美梦后不久？
E: The Reverie Hotel's bellboy... How did he end up here? And right after Miss Acheron severed the beautiful dream...

C: 为了弄清「钟表匠」米哈伊尔为何会与家族决裂，又究竟是谁做出了背叛的决定…米凯先生，还记得我们的交易吗？现在是我作出答复的时候了——
E: I must uncover the reason why Mikhail cut ties with The Family, and who exactly it was who betrayed us all. Do you remember our arrangement, Mr. Micah? Well, here's my answer...

C: 这个思路也很有趣。那你现在应该想明白如何对待这只小鸟了吧？
E: That's an interesting perspective. So, have you decided what to do with the bird now?

C: 我们会好好照料它的。对吧，哥哥？
E: We will take good care of it, won't we, brother?

C: 呵呵，真有活力啊。至于那位名叫帕姆的列车长…请代我向它问好，它的朋友总是会在喝醉以后，念叨起列车上的时光。
E: Heh, you're full of energy. Please send my regards to... the conductor, Pom-Pom. Please let them know that their friend has fond memories from his time aboard the Express, which he reminisces on every time he has a good drink.

C: 他留下的遗产是一枚梦泡，我猜那里边，存放着某种只对无名客有意义的东西。
E: The legacy he left behind was a dream bubble. I believe inside that bubble, there's something that holds meaning only for the Nameless.

C: 如有冒犯，星穹列车向您郑重道歉。但眼下情势紧急，容不得细密探访了。这也是为了梦境的安稳着想，还请您打消我们的顾虑。
E: If I have offended, the Astral Express extends its sincere apologies... but the current circumstances are dire, and leave no room for meticulous inquiry. We're doing this out of concern for the Dreamscape's safety... so if you could, please alleviate our concerns.

C: 对不起，列车长，是我失了礼数，误以为列车对忆庭已经很熟悉了…眼下匹诺康尼局势错综复杂，也只剩下各位无名客值得信任。
E: My apologies, conductor. It was an oversight on my part. I assumed you were already acquainted with the Garden... Given the chaotic situation in Penacony, the Nameless are the only ones we can truly trust right now.

C: 哈哈，看来二位是有些醉了。就在半分钟前，您刚跟我点了一瓶阿斯德纳白橡木。
E: Looks like you are a bit intoxicated, esteemed guests. You ordered a bottle of Asdana's White Oak just a moment ago.

C: …哦对对对，瞧我这脑子，义体改造多了就是会这样，健忘！让我看看…他宝贝的，真是阿斯德纳白橡木，上面有行字……
E: ...Oh, right! Sorry, my memory's not the best. You know, too many modifications and all. Anyway, let me check... Well fork me... It's Asdana's White Oak alright, and there's a note...

C: 这么说的时候，老者的目光始终看向远方。那细密的黑雨中，数之不尽的，像是烟雾缭绕般变化、朦胧的手的翳影，一只、一只从海面中伸出，伸向天空。
E: As he spoke, the old man's gaze remained fixed on the distance. Amidst the fine drizzle of black rain, countless shadowy hands emerged from the sea, shrouded in an ethereal mist, reaching out towards the sky one by one.

C: 只要你有雄心，有梦想，肯奋斗——亲爱的朋友，下一位匹诺康尼的盛典巨星，就是你！
E: If you have ambition, dreams, and the drive — dear friends, the next superstar of Penacony's Charmony Festival could be you!

C: 哇！搞得有模有样的！我都有点激动起来了！
E: Wow! They've really outdone themselves! I'm starting to get excited!

C: 还得是你！
E: Of course, you do! I never doubted you for a sec.

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 滴答，这时候就要轮到我出场了！
E: Tick-tock, it's time for me to make an appearance!

C: 在最后一关，你们将面对一位守擂至今的选手。一旦失败，将无缘盛会巨星的桂冠！
E: In the final stage, you will face the defending champion. If you fail, you will lose the opportunity to become the Festive Superstar!

C: 啊…原来剧团成员也会陷入存在主义危机啊……
E: Ah... I guess even Troupe members can experience existential crises...

C: （不会吧，我好像看见了什么…非常不得了的人物。）
E: (No way. I think I just saw someone... someone extraordinary)
Hmm...

C: 咦？我们还什么都没做…她也太能脑补了吧？
E: Huh? But we haven't even done anything... Is her imagination running wild again?

C: 别走太远，评委在盯着我们呢……
E: Don't wander off, the judge is still watching us...

C: 没错，这座富丽堂皇的美梦就建立在星核和无数人的牺牲之上。
E: That's right. This magnificent dream is built upon the Stellaron and the countless sacrifices of many people.

C: 漂亮！漂亮！真是一场精彩的对决！是各位让我明白，为了捍卫伊德莉拉的美名，我还需多加砥砺精进…多么美丽的教训！
E: Beautiful! Beautiful! Truly a captivating contest! It is through you that I realize, to uphold the honor of Idrila, I must further hone my skills... What a beautiful lesson indeed!

C: 那家伙没脑地抛给我们这么个问题，到底是几个意思？不过答一答也不是不行……
E: That guy just casually throws this kind of question at us? What exactly is his deal? But fine, I'll answer I guess...

C: 「米哈伊尔」…是爷爷的名字。
E: Mikhail... is Grandpa's name.

C: 在、在哪？别闹！我就是有感而发嘛。
E: Hey, don't tease! I was just being a bit sentimental.

C: 不如就从<color=#dbc291ff>你的名字</color>开始吧？现在，我们应该怎么称呼你，「米沙」，还是……
E: How about we start with <color=#dbc291ff>your name</color>? Now, should we call you Misha? Or...

C: 我有异议！
E: I object!

C: 别紧张，加拉赫，我只是想到了一个绝妙的点子，要听听么？
E: Relax, Gallagher. I just came up with a great idea. Wanna hear it?

C: 所以你的名字，应该是「罗盘小子」……
E: So, your name should have been "Compassie"...

C: 好怪啊！我还一直防着大反派什么时候会搞事呢，结果他到最后还在说什么「公平起见」…该不会根本没把咱们放在眼里吧？
E: This is weird! Aren't arch villains usually plotting some dirty conspiracy in the end? But he actually said something like "in all fairness"... Could it be that he's underestimating us?

C: 米哈伊尔说，天上有更浩瀚的海洋，是星星的海洋。有一辆列车载着想要去远方的孩子，永不停息地穿越星海。
E: He told me about a vast ocean in the sky — an ocean of stars. He spoke of a train that transports children with a desire to venture far away, traversing the sea of stars without ever stopping.

C: 你的生存，是为了灭亡？
E: Do you exist just to perish?

C: 你知道，在我们的计划中，她才是谐乐大典的主角。
E: You know, she was supposed to be the star of the Charmony Festival in our plan.

C: 普世同谐，群星共熠，无上功德颂神主！
