E: The world is in harmony and the stars shine bright. Praise the Great One!

C: 改变不了？什么意思……
E: You can't change them? What does that mean...?

C: 黑、黑天鹅小姐怎么在这儿？
E: Wh—What's Miss Black Swan doing here?

C: 他只是使用了一种名为「调律」的能力，将我们的意识和他自己连缀在一起。换句话说，他把我们囚禁在了意识中。
E: He used an ability called "tuning" to connect our consciousnesses with his. In other words, he imprisoned us within his consciousness.

C: 这对一位忆者来说不是很正常的事么？
E: Shouldn't this be expected of a Memokeeper?

C: 你们抵达「白日梦」酒店，在这里<color=#dbc291ff>遇到了门童米沙</color>，还与公司使节砂金起了冲突。所幸黄泉小姐再次路过，才让你及时脱身。
E: When you arrived at The Reverie Hotel, you <color=#dbc291ff>met the</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>bellboy</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>doorman</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>Misha</color> and had a confrontation with Aventurine, an IPC representative. Thankfully, Acheron appeared again and helped you.

C: 小米沙和老米哈伊尔的故乡…在经历了匹诺康尼的种种后，我想身为未来的无名客，无论如何都得去他的家乡看看。
E: Little Misha and Old Mikhail's homeland... Having been through so much in Penacony, as an aspiring Nameless, I believe a visit to his home world is a must.

C: 他来自边陲世界弗拉提，崇拜当地传说中的快枪手奥克莱，因为她的事迹登上列车。
E: Hailing from the frontier world of Frati, his worship of local legend Oakley the Musketeer saw him board the Astral Express.

C: 所幸「秩序」的命途执掌万物，却无法影响「虚无」本身。我也是在「梦主」不计一切代价将我驱逐时，对这一点有所察觉。
E: Fortunately, while the Path of the Order governs all things, it can't affect the Nihility. I came to realize this when the Dreammaster tried to expel me at any cost.

C: 正是如此。这一计划的难度恐怕和复活一位星神差不了太多……
E: Indeed. I'm afraid it's almost as difficult as resurrecting an Aeon...

C: 我会义无反顾地开拓下去。
E: I would blaze a trail without hesitation.

C: 你的「钟表把戏」无法令此人动摇。
E: Your "clockwork" has no sway on them whatsoever.

C: 他们已经出发了。只有善良的本姑娘特地来喊你起床，还不快说声谢谢。
E: They've already left, leaving this kindhearted girl to wake you up. You owe her big time.

C: 走咯走咯！离登船还有些时间，咱们先去惊梦酒吧和大家汇合吧。
E: Yeah, let's go! We've got some time before we board the ship, so let's catch up with everyone at Dreamjolt Hostelry.

C: 啊，不好意思，请你继续。
E: Ah... I apologize. Please, continue.

C: 毕竟在很多人眼里，您可是只手撑起匹诺康尼经济体系的传奇人物啊。
E: After all, to many, you are the legendary figure who single-handedly built the Penacony economy.

C: 想知道我会如何应对危机？告诉你们也无妨：通过我的操作，匹诺康尼将会迈出伟大的一步，在寰宇间「自主上市」！
E: Curious about how I plan to respond to the IPC? Well, I don't mind sharing. My actions will help Penacony take a significant step forward by "self-listing" and going public!

C: 正是如此！与其坐以待毙，眼睁睁地看着你们一步步蚕食匹诺康尼，我宁愿向全宇宙敞开美梦的大门。
E: Precisely! Instead of watching the IPC gnaw away at Penacony, I'd prefer to open the doors of the sweet dream to the entire universe.

C: 一切阴谋的始作俑者被指认为前「梦主」歌斐木，但当我们赶到的时候…{RUBY_B#群鸦}他{RUBY_E#}已经陨落了。
E: The mastermind behind the plans was confirmed to be Gopher Wood, the previous Dreammaster, but by the time we arrived... {RUBY_B#Crows}he{RUBY_E#} was dead already.

C: 加拉赫怎么了？
E: What happened to Gallagher?

C: 你在太一之梦里遭遇了什么？
E: What happened to you in Ena's dream?

C: 但胜利的天平还没有向哪边倾斜。喊话声再大，声音本身都没有重量。托帕，拜托你打的那通电话，有下文吗？
E: Still, the outcome is uncertain. Shouting loud doesn't necessarily carry any weight. What about the phone call I asked you to make, Topaz?

C: 这样正好。「甘露」的上桌顺序本就该在「鸩毒」之后。
E: Just as it should be. The "sweet dew" should be served after the "bitter poison."

C: 我们只是想建立永恒的「存护」。所以你也一定能理解——
E: Our intention is to establish enduring Preservation, so I'm sure you can understand...

C: 至于沃克警探——他用了二十年的时间尝试抓捕一位罪大滔天的通缉犯，但始终踩不到对方的影子。彻底绝望之际，他找到了我。
E: As for Detective Walker, he spent two decades chasing down a wanted criminal for some heinous crime, but he never caught the guy. In his desperation, he came to me.

C: 你知道我的身份，那也一定能想到我的{RUBY_B#银狼}伙伴{RUBY_E#}很可能正在监视这个房间。只要她愿意，只需几秒，整个庇尔波因特都会看到这场会谈。
E: You know who I am, and you must know that my {RUBY_B#Silver Wolf}partner{RUBY_E#} is keeping an eye on this room. If she wanted to, she could let the entirety of Pier Point know about it within a few mere seconds.

C: 欸，你看到了吗？
E: Hey, did you see that?

C: 那么，三月七{M#先生}{F#小姐}——你想要什么？你又愿意为之付出什么？
E: So, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} March 7th — What do you wish for? And what are you willing to sacrifice for it?

C: 你也要离开了吗？
E: Are you leaving, too?

C: 不仅如此，以往按惯例在匹诺康尼大剧院召开的开幕典礼，也将舞台转移至了「晖长石号」——也就是各位嘉宾现在脚下的这艘空艇——
E: Not only that, the customary opening ceremony held at the Penacony Grand Theater has now moved to the Radiant Feldspar — the very airship you all stand upon.

C: 而最后，还有一个原因——各位，还记得「钟表匠」吗？事实上，家族为此次大典尽思极心，也是为了纪念这位传奇大亨——
E: And finally, the last reason. Does everyone remember the Watchmaker? In truth, The Family has poured their efforts into this festival just to commemorate this legendary luminary...

C: （什么时候塞到我手里的…？！）
E: (When did this get shoved into my hands...!?)

C: 你也是被假面愚者喊来的吗？
E: You were also summoned here by the Masked Fools?

C: 只要我们还记得，他们的{RUBY_B#「开拓」}故事{RUBY_E#}就还没有结束。
E: As long as we remember, their {RUBY_B#The Trailblaze}stories{RUBY_E#} will never end.

C: 如果…那不是错觉呢？
E: What if... that wasn't an illusion?

C: 的确，记忆造就了我们，而所有的记忆都源于「现在」，至于未来…它早在其中诞生了，不是么？
E: That is true. Our memories make us who we are, and all memories originate from the "now." As for the future... it's already taking root in the now, isn't it?

C: 这便是「旅途」的含义。
E: This is the meaning of "journey."

C: 关于列车获得「燃料」的方式，我不小心都听到了呢。
E: I accidentally overheard how the Express obtains fuel.

C: 也不知源头是什么，一夜间就火了。粉丝们总结了一套只有小猴迷才听得懂的*蕉语*，还为它制作了各种表情包和同人！
E: No one knows where it came from. It just blew up overnight. Fans made up Bananese that only fellow fans would understand, and even created sticker packs and fan works!

C: 助蕉…是想说「助教」吗？
E: Assistanana? Like a teacher's assistant?

C: 她真可爱。
E: She's very cute.

C: 不管怎样，我们总算是把入学流程都搞定了，接着就去逛逛校庆吧——就先从蒙塔娜说的「创意集会」开始？
E: Anyway, we're finally done with the admission process. Let's go check out the anniversary. How about we start with the Creator's Market that Montana mentioned?

C: 你、你们好，欢迎来到甜品社……
E: H—Hello and welcome to the Dessert Club...

C: 你这不是没钱吗…还是我来买吧！
E: You don't have money... Let me buy it!

C: 什么东西？
E: What the?

C: 芭蕉花？
E: Nanabloom?

C: …你又是谁？这儿到底演什么戏呢？
E: ...Who are you, now? What kinda show they runnin' here?

C: 但今天…给你个面子也无妨，等着瞧吧——我们走。
E: But fine, I'll back off for today. I'll be back. Let's go.

C: 用不着这么弯弯绕绕，瞧我这样还不明白？他香蕉的，一嘴巴都是香蕉。
E: You don't gotta beat around the bush. Can't you just tell by lookin' at me? Banana sundae, everything's bananas.

C: 虽然还没过去多久，但那些人来得也和你一样突然……
E: It wasn't that long ago, but they arrived just as suddenly as you did...

C: 不是暗号，是入社考核。毕竟里面有很重要的活动，不少人都想见识见识。
E: No, that wasn't a passphrase but an entrance test to become a member of the Society. We're hosting an incredibly important event inside, after all. Everybody wants to be a part of it.

C: 我曾走过许多世界，是睡蕉小猴陪在身旁~
E: I've wandered far, I've wandered wide, with Slumbernana Monkey~

C: 我凭什么信你？
E: And why should I believe you?

C: 但或许胡闹的危机，就应该用胡闹的方式来解决吧。
E: Perhaps an absurd crisis calls for an equally absurd solution.

C: 不…「唱片骑师」。
E: No, I should call you "DJ queen" instead!

C: 这似乎是白日梦酒店为你准备的礼物，他们想的可真周到——如果在房间里准备好放映机就更周到了，这儿根本没有播放胶卷的地方。
E: This appears to be a present prepared for you by The Reverie, a most considerate gesture — it would've been even more thoughtful if there were a projector in the room. There's nothing here to play the reel.

C: 不管它了
E: Ignore it

C: 落座等待
E: Take a seat and wait.

C: 但愿不会出事吧。刚才蕉授明显在转移话题，我们也回去找乱破吧，看看她有何见解……
E: I hope she'll be okay. Profnana was clearly steering the conversation his way earlier. Let's go find Rappa and hear what she thinks...

C: 在下无意否定落入骗局的忍徒，但绝对不会放过设置陷阱的恶党。虫豸•邪祟殿下，忍•巡猎要开始了，吟诵辞世句吧！
E: Censure shall not fall upon the ensnared ninja initiate, but the trap's orchestrator ought to be punished. I beckon the Ninja Hunt upon you! Say your final words, Fiendling Pest!

C: 乱破小姐，现在可以谈谈游侠前来匹诺康尼的理由了吗？
E: Miss Rappa, can we talk about why the Rangers came to Penacony now?

C: 蕉，蕉蕉。
E: Bana, bana bana.

C: 你的阴谋到此为止了。
E: Your scheme ends here.

C: 瞧。乱破也在这里，这下咱们和她想一块儿去了。
E: Look! Rappa's here too. Looks like she's thinking along the same lines as us!

C: 好哦…哎，等等？
E: Mm-hmm... Huh? Wait!
...Wh—What?

C: 如果你没有其他法子，就按我说的做吧，优秀会员。
E: Unless you've gotta better idea you can think of, then let's do it my way, star member.

C: 三月同学，你可算来啦。
E: March, you're finally back!

C: 不是不是，睡蕉小猴几乎是在一夜间爆火的，对于它的起源，人们众说纷纭。
E: Haha, that's not it. Slumbernana Monkey went viral overnight, but people have different opinions on how the fad began.

C: 以原始博士的名义。
E: In the name of Dr. Primitive, that is.

C: 这就是死的另一件好事，管你有什么苦衷和理念，我都犯不着浪费时间听。
E: That's another good thing about dyin'. Whatever your excuses and ideas are, I ain't gotta waste time listenin' to 'em.

C: 当然还有你，最具潜力的一位，梦想之地的盛会巨星。
E: And you, of course. The one with the most potential, Festive Superstar from the Land of the Dreams.

C: 我是研究猿，不是蕉师。是你把她养成了这种该死的样子，实验室就应该向你追责。
E: I'm a Research Ape, not a BananAdvisor. You're the one who made her into this damned state she is in. The laboratory should hold you accountable for the way she turned out.

C: 大岚神在上。祓除万恶，不死不休，纵使箭在弦上，永不复还……
E: Great Lan above. Eradicating evil, till my last breath. My bow drawn, no turning back...

C: 原来你们遇到了这么刺激的事情…真是的，下次这种冒险一定要带上我啊！
E: You guys actually experienced something so exciting... Seriously, bring me along on such adventures next time!

C: 太愉快了。
E: It was amazing.

C: 遇到了一些意外…
E: We ran into some trouble...

C: 天呐，是真的知更鸟小姐！这次开幕式可比上次强多了！
E: Oh gosh, it really is Miss Robin! The opening ceremony this year is much better than last time!

C: 有的同学想要创造美好的事物、有的同学想要拥有美好的生活、有的同学想要让自己成为美好的人——这些梦想都很棒。
E: Some students wish to create beautiful objects, while others desire to lead amazing lives. There are some who even wish to become a better person. These are all amazing dreams.

C: 此处虽与邪恶国度相似，但也并无任何线索…
E: Despite the similarities to the Evil Realm, there are no clues here...

C: 现在的「核心」里有多少实验品的心愿呢，一千？一万？
E: How many of the experimental subjects' wishes have been collected inside the core so far? A thousand? Ten thousand?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>莫奈拉介绍我来的</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Monella referred me.</color>

C: 跑快点，再快点！
E: Run! Go faster!

C: 怎么可能。即便火种意义非凡，拿那个男人的性命来祭祀泰坦也太过可笑。
E: Why would we? The Coreflame is important to us, but it's beyond absurd to even consider sacrificing him to the Titans.

C: 既然如此…那我们也不推辞了。感谢奥赫玛的赠礼，也欢迎风堇女士随时交流。
E: ...I see. In that case, we will accept this gift from Okhema. We welcome the chance to talk with you, Lady Hyacine.

C: 现在怎么办？
E: What should we do now?

C: 这套理论十分复杂，如果感兴趣，不妨让他亲自讲解吧。
E: It is an extremely complicated theory. You should get him to explain it himself if you're interested.

C: 这鬼还挺好看。
E: What a good-looking ghost.

C: 其实我上了四个人。
E: Actually, there's four of us.

C: 迈德漠斯，吾儿啊……
E: Mydeimos, my son...

C: 去给你们的疯王陪葬吧！
E: Join your Mad King in death!

C: 这、这是怎么了？！
E: Wh—What happened here?

C: 算了，恐怕还轮不到我来给你提建议。
E: Never mind. It's probably not my place to offer you counsel.

C: 不过，缇宝老师…你不一起泡泡么？
E: But, Lady Tribbie... Aren't you going to soak in the bath with us?

C: 是的，他誓死守住了{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种。
E: Yes. He managed to protect {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} Coreflame at the cost of his life.

C: 不辛苦，为「开拓」服务。
E: Not at all. It's all in service to Trailblaze.

C: 呵…没想到翁法罗斯还能锤炼无名客的意志。
E: Heh... I wasn't expecting Amphoreus to temper the will of the Nameless.

C: 神圣的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}就会降下指引，让你为人们点明正确的道路。
E: The divine {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} will then give you guidance and help you light the way for the people.

C: （我当时…怎么会知道「缇安」这个名字？）
E: (How could I have known the name "Trianne" back then?)

C: 既然这样，不如眼见为实…把好伙伴们放上来，看看会有什么奇妙的反应吧。
E: Well, you might as well see for yourself. Put your good friends on it and see the wonders it can do.

C: 或许…让她提前让渡「门匠」的职责，就作为一个普通的孩子无忧无虑地活到最后，也不失为一件好事。
E: Perhaps... it wouldn't be such a bad idea to let her relinquish her role as the "gatekeeper" and live out her days as a carefree child.

C: 曾经，*我们*也有完整相连的身体。如果把那副躯体比作大树，那么树干和枝叶都会因命运使然，以相同的速度凋零。
E: Once, we had a whole and connected body. If that body were a tree, then its trunk and branches would share the same fate, decaying at the same pace.

C: …无论如何，那是我们必须战胜的敌人。
E: ...Nonetheless, it's an enemy we must overcome.

C: 缇安…慢点……
E: Trianne... Slow down...

C: 又出现了……
E: It appeared again...

C: 正是。各位一定记得，{NICKNAME}和{M#他}{F#她}的伙伴在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一役中施展过令人惊叹的神迹，唤醒了悬锋城的过往。
E: Yes. I'm sure everyone remembers the astonishing miracle {NICKNAME} performed with {M#his}{F#her} companion during the battle with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and how they awakened Castrum Kremnos' past.

C: …万敌阁下。
E: ...Lord Mydei.

C: 看到那边的小孩子了吗？是他们把大家聚在一起的。
E: See those kids over there? They're the ones who brought everyone together.

C: 谁知道呢？
E: Who knows?

C: 错啦！迈德漠斯殿下已经不是王子了…他是<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的守护者</color>！
E: Hold on! Lord Mydeimos isn't the prince anymore... He's now <color=#dbc291ff>the Guardian of Amphoreus</color>!

C: 向您致敬。
E: We salute you.

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}…即便身陨，也绝无可能指引凡人弑杀它的同袍。
E: Even if {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has fallen... they would never guide humans to kill their own comrades.

C: 嗯，是*我们*的母亲。早在很久以前，她就从这里跌落谷底……
E: It's our mother. She fell from this spot into the valley a long time ago...

C: 妈妈带着它回来的那天，她的朋友倒在了战场上。他没有活着的家人，这块玻璃就只能由她自己收留……
E: On the day Mother returned with the glass, her friend lost his life on the battlefield. Since he had no family left, Mother had to keep it herself...

C: 别紧张…别紧张……
E: Relax... Take it easy...

C: 没错，以命运三相之名：这就是我的回答，绝无悔改。
E: That's right. In the name of the Three Fates, I stand by my answer with no regrets.

C: 历经百年苦旅后……
E: After a century of arduous journeying...

C: 但不是每个人都有机会走到明天。这样的话语，如何能被称作预言？
E: But not everyone has the chance to see tomorrow. How can such words be called a prophecy?

C: 当然，为什么不呢？
E: Absolutely! I don't see why not.

C: 我被两个卫兵打扮的人缠住了，害我错过了缇安的送别仪式。
E: I got held up by two people in guard uniforms and ended up missing Trianne's farewell ceremony.

C: 他们自称是<color=#dbc291ff>元老院的使者</color>，要对我的身份进行盘查。
E: They said they were <color=#dbc291ff>messengers of the Council of Elders</color> and wanted to verify my identity.

C: 你知道它的动向么？
E: Do you know where it's headed?

C: 而在这作为示范的第一届圣杯战争中，没什么比「一位小角色愿望成真」的故事更有煽动力了，明白吗？
E: And for the first-ever Holy Grail War, what story could be more compelling than the wish of a nobody coming true? Understand now?

C: 你说的不错，葛瑞迪这个名字在如今的匹诺康尼一文不值，还是不提为妙。
E: You're right. In the current Penacony, the name Grady carries no weight. Best not to bring it up.

C: 唔，{F#她}{M#他}似乎不在。不如转交给三月乘客和丹恒乘客——欸！帕姆的手为什么染上了一块涂鸦！
E: Hmm... Seems like {F#s}he's not around. Maybe I should pass this to March and Dan Heng instead — wait, why is there graffiti on Pom-Pom's hand!?

C: 究竟会是哪位匹诺康尼的历史名人会受召降临呢？是筑造梦境的格拉克斯？还是最初的猎犬？让我们拭目以待！
E: Who will it be? The legendary dreamweaver Glaux? Or perhaps the first Bloodhound? Let's find out!

C: 目标已经进入包围网了！准备好了吗？Assassin！
E: Target is in position! Ready, Assassin?

C: 好好庆幸吧，{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}。你中头奖了。
E: Well, kid... you just hit the jackpot.

C: 啊，忘了自我介绍，你可以称呼我身为从者时的职阶「Saber」，也可以称呼吾名阿尔托莉雅•潘德拉贡。我曾是卡美洛的骑士之王。我猜，你应该对这个地方也一无所知。
E: Ah, I forgot to introduce myself. You may call me by my Servant class, Saber, or by my True Name, Altria Pendragon. I was once the King of Knights in Camelot. I assume you know nothing about this place either?

C: 给我放尊重一点，这可是我宝贵的一部分！
E: Watch your mouth! They're very valuable to me!

C: …谢谢你，知更鸟小姐。请暂时称呼我「音符小姐」吧。
E: Thank you, Miss Robin. Then call me Miss Note. For now.

C: 这场「圣杯战争」确实蹊跷。诸位也许不知道，在我的世界，圣杯战争原本是魔术师们的仪式，它需要保持仪式的神秘性，以获得创造奇迹的力量。
E: This Holy Grail War is indeed suspicious. You may not know, but in my world, the Holy Grail War was originally a ritual for mages, one that needed to preserve its mysticism in order to obtain the power to create miracles.

C: 这邀请函写得真郑重。盛情难却啊！我们得欣然赴约才行。
E: This invitation is written so earnestly. I guess we'll have to graciously accept.

C: 明明只是一场{RUBY_B#虚假的圣杯战争}似是而非的闹剧{RUBY_E#}，却有如此精妙的布置，这一点让我百思不得其解。
E: It's a {RUBY_B#False Holy Grail War}mockery of a war{RUBY_E#}, but you set it up so intricately... I don't get it.

C: 不过，获得这第二次生命实在不易，我还有未实现的愿望。因此，我请他稍事休息片刻。
E: But I still have dreams left unfulfilled in this miraculous second life... So, I asked him to take a break.

C: 可当我信誓旦旦向所有人描绘了理想之国，最后却只在不列颠的国土上留下无休止的战争、流血的战士和饥饿的孩子。
E: I promised everyone that I would build the ideal kingdom, but I left the land of Britain with endless wars, dying warriors, and starving children.

C: 关于星穹列车，关于那些无名客，记忆正像海水冲刷下的沙塔，四处溃散。你理解了Saber想要停留片刻的感受。
E: About the Astral Express and the Nameless. Like sand under the waves, your memories crumble and fade. And suddenly, you understand — why Saber chose to stay, even just for a moment.

C: 科长那小子，正忙着和逃跑的阮•梅造物斗智斗勇呢，可没时间管我。
E: The chief is too busy chasing those Ruan Mei Creations that ran away. He won't have time to read your report.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>或许你再也追不上星穹列车了</color>。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Maybe you'll never catch up to the Astral Express again</color>.

C: 嘘，不可以和解哦。
E: Shh. No peaceful resolutions, please.

C: 夺取圣杯也好，碾碎圣杯也罢！能办到的话，就来吧！
E: Do you want to take the Holy Grail, or crush it!? You'll have to get through me first.

C: 多灾多难的大剧院，我都有些心疼匹诺康尼的猎犬和筑梦师了。
E: Is this Grand Theater ever gonna see a day of peace...? I'm starting to feel bad for the Bloodhounds and the Dreamweavers.

C: 时隔数百年的时光，少年以英灵之身终于回到了他曾辛勤工作过的地方。在这儿，有位老朋友等着他。
E: Centuries have passed. Now, as a Heroic Spirit, the young man finally returns to the place where he once worked tirelessly. An old friend awaits him here.

C: 我看房间里这怪物就挺扎眼的。
E: That monster in the room sure is an eyesore.

C: 是不是偏题了？
E: Aren't we a little off-topic?

C: 抱歉，亲爱的，差点忘了，你的声音已经是我的私产。
E: Oh, my bad, sweetheart. Almost forgot — your voice is already my personal property.

C: 等等，请各位务必留一个人下来，与我一同保护知更鸟小姐。我知道这个要求非常过分，我可以把自己的命交给——
E: Wait, please, someone must stay behind with me to protect Miss Robin. I know this is asking too much, but I'll even offer my life—

C: 我向来对每个朋友都很有信心——御主，祝你顺利。
E: I always have faith in every friend of mine — Master, good luck.

C: 好久不见，虽然也没分开多一会儿。自打被那个小可爱吸进电视里，我就一直在酒店中迷路，顺便一路爱爱那些小可爱。
E: Long time no see... Though it's only been a little while. Ever since that shirthead sucked me into the TV, I've been lost in the hotel, sending my greetings to all the other lil' fudgepies along the way.

C: 其实根本就不存在什么正义斯科特！
E: There's no such thing as a Skott of Justice!

C: 发现自己的钟表把戏不起作用，是不是很惊喜？很意外？这是当然的。
E: Surprised your Clockwork is useless? Shocked? Confused? Well, of course you are.

C: 当然是因为，这些人中你最聪明，最明白「你们的力量看似强大，却始终没能摆脱我的结界」这一事实。
E: Of course it's because you're the cleverest one here, most aware of the fact that despite your apparent power, none of you have actually escaped my Bounded Field.

C: 砂金
E: Aventurine

C: 要是他们没有拍出…如果那些电影是我拍的……
E: If only they never made those films... If only those films were... mine.

C: 喂——你就光顾着自己看了？
E: Hey! Heeeey! In case you didn't notice, I can't see anything!

C: 抱歉，公园设施出了些故障，正在重新布设。请之后再来吧。
E: Sorry, but park facilities are out of order. Refurbishment works are currently underway. Please come back again later.

C: 这不什么都没发生吗？
E: Pfft. So, where are those corrective measures?

C: 喂喂喂…小心啊！
E: No, no, no! Hey, look out!

C: 星期日向瓦尔特讲述了自己的经历，毫无保留……
E: Sunday unreservedly shares his story with Welt...

C: 如果各位天才莅临谐乐大典，故事的走向恐怕就截然不同了。
E: I'm sure if all of you geniuses showed up to the Charmony Festival, things would've been very much different.

C: 其时已至，揭晓吧……
E: The time has come. Let it be revealed...

C: 是啊，我们甚至都分不清停云小姐是何时被幻胧取代的。
E: Yeah, we couldn't even tell when you were replaced by Phantylia.

C: 欢迎光临梦境贩售店，爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
E: Welcome to the Dreamscape Sales Store! Dr. Edward at your service!

C: 担心自己会在众目睽睽下失态，甚至想清楚了要说的每一句话。
E: I was worried I might embarrass myself in front of you. I even rehearsed every word beforehand.

C: 仍未改变？
E: That hasn't changed?

C: 行商原则……
E: My principles...

C: 朦胧的梦中，好似有人对我说过：幸存者的名字往往是「不幸」，可是……
E: In a hazy dream, I vaguely remember someone telling me that the inescapable price of survival is often more adversity, but...

C: 可惜数百年过去，此事早已无从查证。匹诺康尼毕竟只是一片小小的属地，家主们贵为管理者，也无权踏足「同谐」圣地，探问神主真意。
E: Unfortunately, too much time has passed to verify that. Penacony is just a small territory, and even the family heads with their authority cannot enter the sacred site of the Harmony and inquire about the true will of the Great One.

C: 我也赞同。
E: I second that.

C: 还要做点心理建设？别太久哦。
E: Oh? Need to psyche yourself up? Don't keep us waiting too long.

C: …就别想再逃跑咯。
E: ...you can forget about escaping.

C: 你们…是怎么进来的？
E: How did you get in?

C: 我是失去了球棒的银河球棒侠。
E: I'm the Galactic Baseballer who's missing a baseball bat.

C: 看来这个世界不像我们猜测的那般民智未开，兴许在他们口中的「圣城」，还能有更多意想不到的发现吧。
E: Looks like this world is nowhere near as primitive as we had first thought. Perhaps they have more to surprise us with at this "holy city" they mentioned.

C: 不必担心，我留下来保护附近的人，几位速去速回。
E: Don't worry about me. I'll stay behind to protect those in the area. Please make haste.

C: 该死的「终末」还在追我……
E: The darn Finality is still after me...

C: 好好休息，会有办法的。
E: Rest up. There will be a way out of this.

C: 这不能混为一谈……
E: These are separate matters...

C: 休要靠近她……
E: Keep away from her...

C: 「一道神谕出现了！它突然降临在翁法罗斯——」
E: "A prophecy appeared on Amphoreus! Something no one saw coming!"

C: 方才，浴场精灵为你讲述了翁法罗斯的传说，但它们不愿揭示传说之下的残酷。
E: You learned the legends of Amphoreus from those bath sprites a while ago, but that was a sanitized version that spared you from the harsh and bitter realities of our history.

C: 我已对你袒露了心声。接下来，只想请你做出一句承诺。
E: I have laid my heart bare, and in return, I just want you to make a single promise.

C: 心疼你。
E: There, there.

C: （保持沉默。）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: …你眼中的三月七还真单纯。
E: ... Is March 7th really that simple in your eyes?

C: 你们还未清醒吗？粉霞天女是被编造的谎言，是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的恶作剧。我们应当追随阿格莱雅女士的领导，而非沉浸在消磨意志的幻想里……
E: Please wake up! The Rosy Celestial Maiden is a lie crafted by {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} as a prank. We should follow the lead of Lady Aglaea and not subject ourselves to such mind-numbing fantasies...

C: 怎么办，丹恒？！
E: Dan Heng, what should we do!?

C: ——达米亚诺斯！跟我们回去接受审讯吧！
E: Damionis! We're taking you in for an interrogation!

C: 达米亚诺斯会怎样？
E: What will happen to Damionis?

C: 成交！从现在开始，这幅《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》就是您的私人收藏了！
E: Deal! Now, this {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden is yours!

C: 没人告诉你们吗？本狮可是奥赫玛的千里眼、顺风耳，街头巷尾流传之事，全都逃不过本狮的视听。
E: Didn't anyone tell you? I'm the far-seeing eye and all-hearing ear of Okhema. I see and hear every single thing that happens in the streets and alleys of this place.

C: 两位满意就再好不过。先花些时间，熟悉房间的环境吧。
E: I'm glad that you're satisfied with the arrangements. Here, take some time and get to know your surroundings.

C: 分开十指，现在低下头，去找寻你的掌心。感受灵水沿着你的脸颊逆流而上，浸润五官……
E: Spread your fingers, then lower your head and search for the palms of your hands. Feel the spirit water flow against your face, until all of your senses are submerged...

C: <size=28>我是达米亚诺斯！我会向所有人证明！</size>
E: <size=28>I'm Damionis! And I will prove it to everyone!</size>

C: 闯进黄金裔浴场了？
E: Barged into the Chrysos Heirs' baths?

C: 是不是有两次撒谎机会？
E: Does this mean that we can lie up to two times?

C: 为了我们的旅程能够继续。
E: To allow our journey to continue.

C: 我不愿意，也不能答应。
E: I am not willing, and I cannot agree to your request.

C: 那可是毁灭的祸种，小心反噬。
E: It's one of the Destruction's seeds of disaster. Be careful, it might backfire.

C: 不应该是唯四吗？
E: Shouldn't it be the only four?

C: 说回你们，我想郑重地发出邀请，希望两位能加入黄金裔的阵营，助我们一同讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，从「纷争」的泰坦手中夺得火种。
E: Alright, that's enough of my story. I want to extend a heartfelt invitation to you: Join the Chrysos Heirs, and aid us in hunting down {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and retrieving the Coreflame from the Titan of Strife.

C: 遐蝶，你要留在城中。前线并非你的归宿，战场应当被交还给纯粹的战士。
E: Castorice, you must remain here. Your place is not on the front lines, and the battlefield is best left to the warriors.

C: 我会以人之怒火，剥夺神的权柄。至于火种，还有那即将空缺的神位……
E: I will use my wrath as a human to strip that god of their authority. As for the Coreflame and that soon-to-be-vacant divine throne...

C: 没想到，一觉刚醒就要踏上征程了。
E: I wasn't expecting the expedition to set off after only a night of rest.

C: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯
E: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

C: 看来阻碍我们的不止有敌人。这桥年久失修，悬锋城的工艺也有不可靠的时候？
E: It seems enemies aren't the only things stopping us. This bridge has fallen into disrepair. I suppose even Kremnoan craftsmanship can be unreliable sometimes.

C: 巧了，这儿有一位专家。
E: Lucky for you, I'm an expert.

C: 那你还真是慷慨。这里是「堆料区」吧，我们离{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}应该很近了？
E: Well, how generous of you. This is the Stockpiling Zone — we must be getting close to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

C: …前提是你我做得到。
E: ...The real question is if we can pull it off.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，它的亡魂属于真正的强者。
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul should be claimed by true warriors.

C: 丹恒也在。
E: Dan Heng is there too.

C: 这家伙的级别够吗？
E: This might be above its pay grade.

C: 说话慢吞吞的，可爱捏。
E: Isn't it kind of cute how slowly it speaks?

C: 这么多石料，不知能打造多少战争机器？
E: So many stones here. I wonder how many war machines can be built with all this?

C: 但那股气焰不再纯粹，它掺杂着血腥味，还有亡灵的哭嚎……
E: But that bluster is no longer pure. It's mingled with the scent of blood and the cries of lost souls...

C: 你们一定很珍视和她的关系，才会时刻帮她记录旅行中的点滴。
E: You must really value your friendship with her to go through all this effort to document the journey for her.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}…不能再耽搁了，赶紧去找阿格莱雅。
E: Let's go, {NICKNAME}... It's a race against time. We have to find Aglaea right away.

C: 莫非这遗迹里呈现出的错乱风景，也是它给我们布下的障碍…？
E: Could the Titan have created this chaotic scene we see in these ruins as a barrier to hinder us?

C: 神殿已被废弃许久，无法判断门后藏着什么危险。从遗迹中传来的声音判断，恐怕那位泰坦也谈不上友善。
E: This temple has been forsaken for so long that we have no way of telling what dangers await us behind this gate. From the way Oronyx spoke to us in the ruins, I won't count on them being cordial toward us.

C: 「这里没有你们在找的东西…只有悲伤和消亡。」
E: "You won't find anything you desire here... Save for despair and demise."

C: 它的火种已经归位，但接替神职的黄金裔…如今不知所踪。
E: Talanton surrendered their Coreflame, though the Chrysos Heir taking over their legacy is... nowhere to be found today.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 卡芙卡别过头去，不再理会你的呼唤。
E: Kafka turns away, ignoring your call.

C: 「迷迷」是你的名字？
E: Is your name "Mem"?

C: 这是…什么意思？
E: What... does that mean?

C: 你刚才就呆站在这里，无论我们怎么呼喊都不回应。
E: You were standing here motionless just now, no matter how much we shouted, you didn't respond.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 至少它遵守了承诺，打开了谒见的道路。
E: At least they kept their promise and opened the path for an audience.

C: 请问，这幅作品有什么故事？
E: Could you tell us the story behind it?

C: 它又说了什么，{NICKNAME}阁下？
E: What did they say, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}?

C: 谢谢你。不介意的话，就把这里交给我吧。
E: Thank you. If you don't mind, I will handle it from here.

C: 呃，当然是…当然是因为我们想为奥赫玛的公民除害啦，桀桀桀！
E: Uh, it's... it's we're just trying to get rid of any threats to Okhema, haha!

C: 鼎盛时的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}配得上这些词语。但现在……
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} did live up to these values in their prime, but now...

C: 遐蝶。
E: Castorice.

C: 银河球棒侠，遐蝶，格奈乌斯……
E: Galactic Baseballer, Castorice, and Gnaeus...

C: 格奈乌斯阁下，等等！
E: Don't do it, Lord Gnaeus!

C: 失去目标的野兽，只是在凭本能追踪血腥罢了。
E: A beast that has lost sight of its target and is now guided only by its innate bloodlust.

C: 准备好穿越了吗，角斗士？
E: Ready to travel through time, gladiator?

C: 「以此为证：它陷入沉眠前最后留下的话语，是为世界抵御黑暗浪潮的誓言。」
E: "A testament that their final words before sinking into dormancy were a vow to defend the world against the black tide."

C: 果然，大门打开了。
E: The gate has opened, as expected.

C: 破坏力比想象中更大……
E: This is a lot more destructive than I expected...

C: 应该说…反而比我想象中轻松多了？我本以为承载火种需要付出更多…代价。
E: Or rather... it felt a lot easier than I expected? I had assumed that bearing the Coreflame would take... a lot more out of me.

C: 我准备好了。两位，我将和你们一同承担神性之重…我愿意做出必要的牺牲。
E: I am ready for this. I will shoulder the burden of divinity alongside the both of you... I am willing to make the necessary sacrifices.

C: 终于等到这一天了，小白。这是你一直以来的愿望，对吧？
E: This day has finally come, Snowy. You've been wanting this all along, right?

C: …完全没有。仍旧是一团乱麻，甚至不知道该从哪里开始。
E: ...Not at all. Everything's a jumbled mess still. I don't even know where to start.

C: 最近这段时间，我的故乡…哀丽秘榭的景色总在我眼前闪过。
E: The sights of Aedes Elysiae — my homeland — have been flashing before my eyes lately.

C: 我们能做的只有等待…还有相信。
E: All we can do is wait... and have faith.

C: 在翻阅这些书籍时，我仿佛看见了阿尔基皮亚的一生…这种感觉，就像和一位素未谋面的人共同旅行。
E: While flipping through these books, I felt like I was afforded a glimpse into the life of Archepia... It felt just like I was traveling with someone that I'd never met before.

C: 好事？恐怕谈不上。
E: Good news? I wouldn't call it that.

C: 跟你补充下前情：元老院是由翁法罗斯的城邦代表们组成的权力机构，手握圣城的立法权，负责主持数年一度的公民大会。
E: Some background information for you: The Council of Elders is an authoritative body in Amphoreus made up of different city representatives. They hold legislative power over the holy city and are in charge of presiding over the citizens' assembly held once every few years.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>赛飞儿</color>…假如这世上还有人可能掌握了「死亡」的去向，那便是她了。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Cipher</color>... If anyone in this world knows the whereabouts of Death, it would be her.

C: 否则，我与吾师千年来的努力…也许将因那位「大表演家」付之一炬呢。
E: Otherwise, the efforts of my teacher and I over the past millennium... might be reduced to dust because of that "Great Performer."

C: 不久前
E: Not long ago...

C: 哈哈，只有悬锋人和哀地里亚人才会通过死亡追求荣耀，您能幸免于难就是好事，好事！
E: Haha, it's only the Kremnoans and Aidonians who chase glory through death. But your survival is a victory in itself! I'd settle for that gladly!

C: 全盘计划就在我的脑子里，你不妨自己找找看。
E: The entire plan is stored in my memory, so why don't you look there?

C: 不过，如此一来，元老院的威严成了一张浸血的莎草纸，一戳就破，还痛失了一枚宝贵的火种……
E: However, by doing so, the authority of the Council of Elders will be as thin as papyrus that has been soaked in blood. Not only can it be destroyed at the slightest touch, but the Council will also lose possession of a valuable Coreflame...

C: 呵…那就借你吉言了。
E: Ha... I hope things go as you say, then.

C: 喂，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}…我问你，你可认识名为格奈乌斯的人？
E: Hey, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}... Do you know a certain Gnaeus?

C: 我刚才看到了：格奈乌斯，似乎是一名战士，与你就在此处交谈……
E: I just saw him. Gnaeus... a warrior-like figure who was just chatting with you here...

C: 我也很期待，遐蝶，当你的故事甄于完整，又将为逐火的旅途新添何种诠释。
E: Castorice, I too look forward to your journey. I wonder what kinds of new interpretations your completed story will bring to the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 时至今日，我仍会觉得不可思议。在摇摇欲坠的翁法罗斯，唯独这里依旧是一片光明。奥赫玛的人们还会用投票来解决问题……
E: To this day, I still find it almost unreal that Okhema is the only place illuminated by light amidst the crumbling ruins of Amphoreus, and its people are even holding votes to reconcile differing opinions...

C: 无论拥有怎样的名目，这都是在夺走他人的性命……
E: No matter the titles, I am still taking away human lives...

C: 不，孩子。我不想你对此习以为常。
E: You misunderstand, child. I am not telling you to get used to it.

C: 因为恐惧、愤怒、憎恨，还是你所谓*仁慈的死亡之触*根本就是个谎言？
E: Is it because of fear, anger, and hatred, or is your so-called merciful Touch of Death simply a lie?

C: 很快，一切陷入死寂，化作漆黑的露水随风散去。你听到自己的心跳盖过剧烈的呼吸声。
E: Quickly, everything falls into a dead silence, turning into pitch-black dew that scatters with the wind. You hear your own heartbeat drown out the sound of heavy breathing.

C: 阿蒙内特，试图向我传授「死亡」的人，也最终如朝露消失在晨雾中。她一生都在贯彻哀地里亚人的信仰，而当死亡真正来临，她也如那信仰所述……
E: Elder Amunet, the person who tried to teach me about "Death," ultimately vanished like dew in the morning mist. She spent her life embodying the beliefs of the Aidonians, and when death finally came, she embraced it exactly as their doctrine had taught...

C: 嗡嗡……
E: Grumph...

C: 什么鬼口癖——
E: Ew, what kind of quirk—

C: 这是遐蝶自己的请求。我从未见她如此坚决。
E: This is Castorice's own request. I have never seen her so determined.

C: 不过，到底为何，这段记忆会在此时显现…当真是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的影响吗？
E: But... why would this memory appear right now? Is this really {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s power?

C: 抱歉…这个问题我同样无法回答。
E: I'm sorry... I'm also powerless to answer that question.

C: 「死亡」…难道你们是来讨伐恶龙玻吕刻斯的？
E: "Death"... Could it be that you are here to defeat the evil dragon Pollux?

C: …各位，快躲到我身后！
E: ...Everyone, hide behind me!

C: 正如方才途中那些亡灵…我也没能从缇安大人身上感知到生者的气息。
E: Just like the other departed spirits we've encountered along the way... I'm also unable to sense the aura of the living on Lady Trianne.

C: 回收灵魂的时候听到过…
E: I did when I was collecting the souls...

C: 哦，你们坐在你们的小小船上\n渴求聆听我的歌唱而紧随其后\n请你们且回头，回到你们自己熟悉的故土
E: Oh, you sit in your little dinghy\nEager to hear my song and follow closely behind\nPlease, turn back, return to the homeland you know so well

C: 我本以为，至少你能在这一世好好活下去……
E: I had hoped that maybe you would at least have a good life in this cycle...

C: 嗯…此乃命运使然。但只要有你在，我就不会害怕。
E: Yes... as dictated by fate. But I won't be afraid, as long as you're here with me.

C: 这里…以前肯定是座很美的庭院。
E: This place... must have been a beautiful courtyard in the past.

C: 哼，错了又如何？身为学者，最重要的品质正是不假思索的鲁莽。如果永远谨小慎微，无法大胆迈出第一步，那一切变化也无从谈起——
E: Hmph, it matters not. The most important quality a scholar must possess is foolhardiness. If you are overly cautious, then you'll never have the gumption to make the first step, and change will never come.

C: 「阿格莱雅将机会托付给你」是否正确？别引我发笑了，这不是那女人自己的问题么？为什么你要替她考虑这些？还是说，你一直都把自己当成她的工具？
E: Is "Aglaea entrusting the world to you" the right decision? Don't make me laugh. That is a question that woman must answer herself. Why are you fretting about this on her behalf? Or have you been seeing yourself as her pawn all this time?

C: 吾不禁在想，是否世间一切磨难都会被汝当作物尽其用的手段。
E: I cannot help but wonder: Is every hardship in the world something you will exploit and use to your advantage?

C: 看来有人还不尽兴啊。那好，不妨让我来为这场大会再添一笔吧。
E: It seems not everyone is ready for the assembly to end. Very well, let me entertain you for a little longer.

C: 住口！你这渎神的狗鼠，休想妖言惑众！你有什么根据……
E: Enough, you blasphemous imbecile! How dare you try to deceive us with all these lies and falsehoods! How can you prove—

C: 谢谢你。
E: Thank you.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>不要回头，向前看。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Don't turn around. Keep looking forward.</color>

C: <color=#ff3a3e>它将为你指引出路。如此…你们一定能够在阳光下相聚。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>It'll guide you and illuminate the way out. By doing so... you'll eventually reunite in the warmth of the sunlight.</color>

C: 你是她在大地上行走千年，亲手留住的唯一一条生命。我想…没有人比你更值得代行这高尚的职责。
E: You are the only life she ever saved by her own hand in her one thousand years on this earth. I believe no one is more qualified for this noble task.

C: 那就让仪式开始吧。
E: Let the ceremony begin.

C: 我就知道……
E: I knew it...

C: 我相信你，{NICKNAME}。
E: I believe in you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 旧事啊…第一次仰望{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}时，我也是个孩子。它的枝叶反射着星星的光，躯干仿佛是天地的支柱。
E: Events of the past, huh... I was also a child when I looked up at {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Their leaves and branches reflected the sparkling stars, and their trunk was like a pillar that supported the sky and ground.

C: …一时分不清你是开玩笑还是认真的，这也是深不可测的一种体现吧。
E: I can't tell if you're serious or not... But being hard to read isn't without its perks, I suppose.

C: 先不说这个，给——我在附近发现的，你可能会感兴趣。
E: Anyway, never mind that for now. Here, you might want to have a look at this. I found it around here and thought it might be of interest to you.

C: 请随意。
E: Sure, go ahead.

C: 黄金裔…
E: The Chrysos Heirs...

C: 那刻夏老师，在进行「灵魂炼成」的研究。
E: Anaxa was carrying out experiments on soul transmutation.

C: 可是，用来做什么呢？留在世间的泰坦，也只剩下……
E: Like what? There's only one Titan left in the world now—

C: 总有种不妙的预感，难道树庭之灾背后还有别的秘密？
E: I have a bad feeling about this. Could there be more to what happened at the Grove?

C: 我吩咐族人绊住他们了，但还是别太张扬。除非你们想动动筋骨，来一场厮杀。
E: I've already ordered my people to hold them back, but we should still lay low... Unless you're itching for a bloody fight to get a workout in.

C: {M#他}{F#她}最近太劳累了，体谅一下。展开说说雷声吧？
E: {M#He's}{F#She's} been through a lot lately. Please pardon {M#him.}{F#her.} Can you tell us more about these thunderclaps?

C: 用行动证明吧，遐蝶。决议马上要开始了，别忘了你的承诺。
E: Actions speak louder than words, Castorice. With the assembly about to begin, don't forget the promise you've made.

C: 请饶过我们吧！我们为仇恨冲昏了头脑，才会被那群黑衣人带入歧途……
E: Please spare us! We were blinded by hatred and misled by those people clothed in black.

C: 黄金裔……
E: A Chrysos Heir...

C: 直到枯萎的大地上，重新长出一片蓊郁的森林，它将生生不息，也终有一日…能再度触及天空。
E: Until the barren land is reborn as a thriving forest, growing endlessly, and one day... reaching for the sky once again.

C: 白厄，阿格莱雅她……
E: Phainon... Aglaea is...

C: …接头传纸条？这通讯方式未免太原始了吧……
E: ...A paper note? Talk about old school...

C: 「阿雅…你能听到吗？」
E: "Agy... can you hear me?"

C: 你是翁法罗斯湮没无闻的英雄，赛法利娅。你拯救了我们所有人。
E: You are the unsung hero of Amphoreus, Cifera. You saved us all.

C: 那刻夏老师…你还记得那一课吗？
E: Professor Anaxa... do you remember that lesson?

C: 不如再附加一个任务目标：<color=#dbc291ff>玩牌的忆者告诉我，那结了冰的开拓小姑娘，很可能也被困在了翁法罗斯内部。</color>
E: Why not add another mission objective while we're at it: <color=#dbc291ff>The card-playing Memokeeper told me that the frozen Trailblazer girl might just also be trapped inside Amphoreus.</color>

C: 逐火之旅…阻止……
E: The Flame-Chase Journey... stops...

C: 原来如此。这便是您口中的「开拓」。
E: So I see. This is what you call "Trailblazing."

C: 糟了，他要撑不住了！
E: Oh no! He can't hold on anymore!

C: 哼…哼哼…与半神正面较量？我们没蠢到那个地步。
E: Hmph... going toe-to-toe with a demigod? We're not that foolish.

C: 巴特鲁斯开启了挖掘模式，找出了藏于地底的宝藏……
E: Bartholos activated excavation mode, unearthing the treasure buried deep underground...

C: 不得了，不得了！桀桀桀，大姐头都这么说了，搞得我也跃跃欲试了呀。
E: Incredible indeed! Hehe, if even Boss Lady says so, how can I not be excited?

C: 「我此生机关算尽，却无论如何也预料不到，你我的关系竟会凝至冰点。」
E: "I've plotted and schemed my whole life, but I never could've predicted our relationship would end up like this."

C: 过于简陋，容器…配不上你的品位。你坚持如此？
E: Far too plain, this vessel is... Not worthy of you. Do you still insist?

C: 风堇。
E: Hyacine.

C: 我失去的是一位导师、战友。而缇宝和缇宁老师，她们失去的是千年的牵绊…如同生命的一部分。
E: What I've lost is a mentor, and a comrade-in-arms. But for Tribbie and Trinnon, they've lost a thousand-year-old bond... like losing a part of their lives.

C: 最后，我想起了一位老师的教导：在以口舌为兵器的场合，激愤和盲目是远胜理性的强大武器。
E: In the end, I remembered a lesson from one of my teachers: In battles where words are weapons, outrage and blind passion often overpower reason.

C: 而且还没结束…对吗？
E: And it's still not over yet... is it?

C: 多谢夸奖。直觉是样神奇的东西，当时我就隐约感觉到，你也在场。
E: Thank you. I had a feeling back then that you were in the audience. Intuition certainly is a thing of wonder.

C: 你现在还真是冷静得不像样哪……
E: Just look how ridiculously calm you are right now...

C: 所以，我很庆幸自己活在一个不缺少英雄的年代。
E: That's why... I'm glad that my era does not lack heroes.

C: 我用闲暇时间研习，取得了一些阶段性的成果。<color=#dbc291ff>现在，只要随身携带「灵水」，我就能用秘术开拓出通向创世涡心的通路</color>。
E: I've been practicing that in my spare time and made some progress. <color=#dbc291ff>Now, as long as I have spirit water with me, I can use those techniques to carve a path directly to the Vortex of Genesis</color>.

C: 我这就准备出发了。啊，缇宝阿姐，临走前，我还有个礼物要送给你——
E: Anyway, I'm about to head out. Oh, big sis Tribbie, before I go — Got a little gift for you.

C: 泰坦的每声怒吼都横生落雷，泰坦的每次倾身都卷起飓风。
E: The Titan's every roar summoned lightning bolts, and their every movement stirred cyclones.

C: 啊…抱歉，这我就爱莫能助了。
E: Ah... sorry, I'm no help there.

C: 「半场开香槟，等着被翻盘吧！」
E: "Crack the champagne at halftime to watch victory slip away!"

C: 会赢的，老白。
E: We'll win, dear fellow.

C: 也请将感激献给两位来自异邦的勇者吧——为了素不相识的你我，他们甘愿挺身而出，赴汤蹈火！
E: Let's extend our gratitude to the two warriors of the outlands — who bravely stepped up and risked their lives for those they've never met!

C: 我想，这次「开拓」的经历…应该足以令阿基维利称羡。
E: I bet this trailblazing expedition... could even make Akivili jealous.

C: 它…消失了？
E: It... disappeared?

C: 一定能听懂的…虽然深陷黑潮的苦痛，但它是位智慧而坚强的生灵。
E: It must have understood me... It's a creature of wisdom and tenacity, despite being mired in the agony of the black tide.

C: 索拉比斯，传说中陪伴在英雄身边的「烈阳之翼」，如果这场战斗能让你回想起当年的伟绩，那会是我的荣幸……
E: Solabis, the Sunlit Wings that once accompanied the hero... If this battle can remind you of your great deeds from back then, it would be my honor...

C: 无关的话就不多谈了。你们知道该如何启动浑象仪。去吧，逼出那画壁上的泰坦。
E: Let's not elaborate on unrelated topics. You now know how to activate the celestial globe. So go, and force out the Titan in the mural.

C: 塞涅俄丝的处境，我无从知晓。
E: I have no knowledge of Seliose's situation.

C: 假如传说是个谎言…
E: If the legend is a lie...

C: 那么，我们会让你明白…这是无谓的挣扎！
E: Then, we will make you understand... that resistance is futile!

C: 嘟…嘟，嘟！
E: Doot... Doot, doot!

C: 看来会是一场绕不开的恶战，那就直面它吧。
E: Looks like we can't skip this fight. Let's go get them.

C: 我无法证实这种说法的真伪。随塞涅俄丝与艾格勒交战时，那泰坦的化身也曾飞向高空…但它好像从未试图突破天幕，以躲避我们的追击。
E: I can't verify the truth of this claim. When Seliose fought Aquila, the Titan's incarnation did ascend into the skies... But they never attempted to break through the sky's veil to escape our pursuit.

C: 它还在挣扎，想阻止我们…但我们已经把它逼入绝境了。
E: They're desperately struggling to block our path, but we've backed them into a corner.

C: 试着用它的力量扭转风场的方向吧，搭档？
E: Why don't you try to change the wind's direction with this thing, partner?

C: 露奈比斯阁下！是你吗？你听得到吗？
E: Lady Lunabis! Is that you? Can you hear me?

C: 索拉比斯阁下…为何在你苏醒前，露奈比斯阁下一直沉默不语？
E: Lord Solabis... Why did Lady Lunabis remain silent until you woke up?

C: 意外才是我们旅途中的常量，无论如何，我们会陪奥赫玛走到最后关头。
E: The unexpected is always part of our journey. We'll stay with Okhema until the end, no matter what.

C: ——直到她出现在我们面前，带着一贯玩世不恭的表情。
E: ...Until she shows up in front of us, with her usual rebellious attitude.

C: 那些建筑物……
E: These buildings...

C: 它被减削至贼灵形态的神躯逐渐化作尘土消散，不羁的笑声亦随风远去……
E: Their divine body, reduced to the form of a Spirithief, disappears into dust. Their unbridled laughter fades away in the wind...

C: 如果成功，我们一定会感知到的。
E: We'll definitely sense it if she's succeeded.

C: 混乱很快就会结束…我向你们保证！
E: The chaos will soon cease... I promise you!

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，请跟紧我们，去同丹恒大人会合。
E: {NICKNAME}, please stay close to us. We need to rendezvous with Lord Dan Heng.

C: 抓紧时间，离开吧。
E: No time to waste, let's get out of here.

C: …现在说这个，怕不是有些晚啦。
E: ...It's a bit late for that now, isn't it?

C: {NICKNAME}，这是什么意思？
E: {NICKNAME}, what are you saying?

C: {M#他}{F#她}涉入此世，已然太深。
E: {M#His}{F#Her} bonds with this world run too deep.

C: 总觉得…不是第一次做这样的梦了。可醒来以后，什么也回想不起来。
E: Strange... like I've dreamed this before. But it all slips away when I wake.

C: 再创世…完成了？
E: The Era Nova... is it done?

C: 倒不是这个理由啦。
E: That's not what I meant at all.

C: 三、二、一…跳！
E: Three, two, one... jump!

C: 哆啦迷、徕啦迷、咪啦迷、发啦迷…呵，真是太久没见到这些可爱的小家伙了。
E: Dolimem, Relimem, Milimem, Falimem... Ah, I've missed these cute little troublemakers.

C: 哀丽秘榭离流血的世界太远了…这种传奇故事，实在无法不引人遐想啊。
E: Stories of such bloodshed like this feel so distant from Aedes Elysiae... but they sure can stir the imagination.

C: 他们的话语，和那言语中逐一流露的「心愿」，为哀丽秘榭出身的少年勾勒出对外界最初的想象。
E: Their stories and wishes showed the village boy glimpses of a world larger than he'd ever imagined.

C: 明天见！
E: ...tomorrow!

C: 白厄……
E: Phainon, you look...

C: 接下这份礼物吧：神谕牌承载岁月，受{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}祝福……
E: Accept this gift: oracle cards carrying time's wisdom, blessed by {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

C: 可是，爸爸妈妈，还有村里的伙伴们……
E: But my parents... the whole village...

C: 只要活下去，就还会有希望……
E: As long as we survive, hope remains...

C: 我的内心，那浮现出的唯一答案，是……
E: My heart knows but one path...

C: 哈哈，干脆利落的回答！就该这么自信。
E: Haha! Now that's what I like to hear!

C: 这不算作弊吗？
E: Wouldn't that be cheating?

C: 每一位黄金裔都是如此，从未改变。
E: That's what it means to be a Chrysos Heir. So has it always been.

C: 现在，让我为您揭开最后的谜底吧。
E: Now, allow me to reveal the final piece of the puzzle for you.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是它对遗弃自身的神明，深不见底的怒火啊！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A bottomless well of fury, aimed at the god who cast it aside!</color>

C: 那，为什么……
E: Then why...

C: 哎呀，这个问题很难回答吗？还是说我猜对了，实际上……
E: Heh, is this question really that hard to answer? Or did I guess it right? And in reality...

C: 一个真实的、活生生的人。一个真正的「英雄」。
E: A real, living person. A true hero.

C: 然后，卡厄斯兰那杀死了自己。
E: Then, Khaslana killed himself.

C: 所以你才变成了这副模样：残缺的神像…悲哀的薪柴。
E: So that's why you've turned into this, a broken idol... tragic firewood.

C: 因为你还没有彻底断绝信念，对么？
E: Because you haven't completely abandoned hope, am I right?

C: 我…从未抛弃过。
E: I... never have.

C: 可是…你呢？
E: But... what about you?

C: 这一次，逐火的终点……
E: And this time... the end of the Flame-Chase...

C: 我…被卷入了你的记忆。
E: I... I'm being pulled into your memories.

C: 虽然光彩已几近浑浊，但仍有余温……
E: Though the light has grown dim, its warmth still lingers...

C: 刚才，你叫我「三月」？你认识我吗？
E: Wait, you know my name is March? Have we met?

C: 我们是初次见面哦。但从刚才的记忆里，我已经了解了你的经历。
E: No, but I've witnessed your story through those memories just now.

C: 启程前，可以再等我一会儿吗？想小小收拾一下，变成这幅样子后，要考虑的事情多了许多，还有些不适应呢。
E: Can you give me a little bit of time before we go? I want to pack some stuff. There's so much more I need to take care of in this form, and I'm still getting used to it.

C: >>>EpieiKeia<unbreak>216</unbreak>，原动力：██，泰坦权能：死亡，命途：██<<<
E: >>>EpieiKeia<unbreak>216</unbreak>, Primum Mobile: █████, Titan Authority: Death, Path: ███████████<<<

C: 少装腔作势，直接说重点。
E: Enough purple prose. Get to the point.

C: 星核？不，相信我，您对命途的理解还停留于表面……
E: The Stellaron? No. Believe me, your understanding of Paths has yet to reach any true depth.

C: 所以你是来干嘛的…
E: So why did you drag me here...?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯必将挣脱束缚，走向天外之界。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus shall break its chains and reach the world beyond the sky.</color>

C: 你、你们好，我叫维吉妮娅，我会吟风…啊不，吟、吟诗。
E: H—Hello! I'm Verginia... I compost... I mean, compose! I compose poetry.

C: *诸代表议论纷纷*
E: *Representatives chattering*

C: 救世主，留步——
E: Deliverer, please wait...

C: 啊…那的确令人神往。
E: Ah... that certainly captivates my interest.

C: 去去，别瞎打听了，让我一个人清净清净！
E: Ah, stop trying to get things out of me. Leave me alone!

C: 几位若是还想入浴，就抓紧时间吧。
E: If you still want to bathe, hurry up.
...Who's there?

C: 对凯撒应尽的义务罢了。
E: It's simply our duty to the Imperator.

C: 天外世界是这样描述友情的吗？还真是新奇呢。
E: Is that how friendship is described beyond the sky? Fascinating.

C: 啧啧，道阻且长啊……
E: Tsk tsk, the road ahead will be long and difficult...

C: 嗯，就这么定！凭我们的默契，无论发生什么都能顺利解决的。
E: It's settled then! With our great teamwork, we'll be able to deal with anything that comes our way.

C: 只要使用得当，羽毛笔也能化作凶器。所有随身物品——「所有」——昔涟小姐。
E: Even a quill pen can become a deadly weapon in the right hands. I'm asking for all your items. All, Miss Cyrene.

C: 两位怎么愁眉苦脸的？这副表情可不适合「救世主」啊。
E: Why do you two look so distressed? That's not what the Deliverer should look like.

C: 我见证过许多美丽的世界。探索、了解、建立、连结，这是「开拓」选择的道路，今后也不会改变。我们还会继续旅行下去，团结整片银河。
E: I have seen many beautiful worlds. The road chosen by the Trailblaze is to explore, understand, establish, and connect. That will never change. We will continue our journey until we have united the entire cosmos.

C: 纳努克！借我火焰烧穿监牢。
E: Nanook! Lend me flames hot enough to burn through this jail!

C: 你集中精神，尝试用心跳模拟克里珀筑墙的锤击……
E: You focus intently, trying to mimic the Qlipoth's wall-building hammer strikes with your heartbeat...

C: 不过，咱们先别在这个阴森森的地方聊天了，这场面一点也不适合重逢。
E: But let's get out of this spooky place first. This is not a good spot for a reunion chat.

C: 关于这个，倒是不用担心……
E: You don't need to worry about that...

C: 不过，其中大多时间皆是徒劳…何不让我们用「岁月」的神力飞跃至旅程终点？
E: Though most of that journey was in vain... why not let us use the power of Time to leap ahead toward the journey's end?

C: 寰宇中定会有遍布汪洋的星球，待我攻克那里，便将它封为你的领地！
E: Surely there's a planet draped in oceans out there in the stars. Once I claim it, it shall be yours to rule!

C: 阿波罗尼…你看…我把敌人赶跑了……
E: Apollonius... look... I chased the enemy away...

C: 「他的重量…压住了鸟儿的翅膀…和萌动的心……」
E: "His weight... presses down on the bird's wings... and the stirring heart within..."

C: 蠢货…到了这个时候还不明白吗？
E: You fool... How could you still not get it even now?

C: 我一直在思索，塔兰顿口中的诅咒之血究竟为何物。后来，我终于找到了答案……
E: I pondered long on what Talanton meant by "blood of the accursed." Then, I found the answer...

C: 然后，继续下潜，直至深渊尽头。
E: And dive deeper still until we reach the very bottom of the abyss.

C: 试炼过后…你我再无瓜葛。
E: After the trial... there's nothing left between us.

C: 而后，登上那血腥的舞台。
E: And then, onto that bloody stage.

C: 浇奠第二次逐火之旅的英雄们。
E: Libate for the heroes of the second Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 海洋的囚徒、身负三千万世罪孽的神礼观众、「智识」的奴仆——
E: O prisoner of the seas, Theoros carrying thirty million cycles' of sin, slave of the Erudition...

C: 一座名为「命途」的至暗牢笼。
E: ...I led them into a lightless cage called "Paths."

C: 这是{NICKNAME}遨游星海的第一站，叫做「黑塔」空间站。嗯，就当它是一座超级大的神悟树庭吧。
E: This is the first step of {NICKNAME}'s journey among the starry seas. This place is called the Herta Space Station. Ummm... Just think of it as a supersized Grove of Epiphany.

C: 你看，他们心中仍有尊严。有朝一日，这份希望能融化坚冰，助他们走向繁荣。
E: They still have their dignity intact. One day, that hope will melt through the ice and help them into a prosperous tomorrow.

C: 说说吧。远处那人头上长着翎羽…我着实有些好奇。
E: Tell me about it, then. That man standing afar has wings on his head... I am truly curious.

C: 凯撒，您真的要否定过去三千万世的英雄们——连同您自己在内——屈服于暴虐的命运，让操弄一切的「毁灭」如愿以偿吗？
E: Will you really renounce the heroes in the world's previous thirty million cycles, Imperator? Including even yourself? ...Will you bow to brutal destiny and allow that puppet master named the Destruction to have THEIR wish?

C: 很久以前，当我还是一尾海中的鱼儿，在水中畅游的时分总是那么真实。
E: When I was still a fish in the ocean, I always felt so genuine swimming through the waters.

C: 「毁灭」不言自明。让我们跳过那些无趣的推导吧。
E: The Destruction needs no introduction. Let us skip those boring inferences.

C: 届时，她要将我打碎，将尘砂撒入涡心的海洋。
E: And when the time comes, she needs to shatter me and scatter that stone's ashes into the ocean within the Vortex.

C: 呵…和她预料的一样。你一旦得知真相，肯定会急得失了方寸。
E: Heh... It's just like what she predicted. The truth shook you, just like she said it would.

C: 早在你和丹恒来到翁法罗斯前，「三月七」就先一步进入了这个世界。
E: "March 7th" entered this world long before you and Dan Heng arrived at Amphoreus.

C: 是姬子的声音？还有瓦尔特先生……
E: Is that Himeko's voice? And Mr. Yang...

C: 并且那位神秘人的样子，和三月七如出一辙。
E: So you're saying that person's appearance is identical to March 7th?

C: 那之后，你就一直潜伏在暗处，操纵「岁月」，与「大地」合谋…直到现在。
E: And you've been hiding in the shadows ever since, while manipulating "Time" and colluding with "Earth"... all the way till now.

C: 贤人万敌，还有…「那霎」？
E: Mydei the Sage? And... "Anaksa"?

C: 我在思考，这一路上的「记忆」，会不会是「长夜月」设置的陷阱。她始终没有出现，这点十分可疑。
E: I've been wondering... Could all the "memories" we've encountered on the way be "Evernight's" traps? She still hasn't shown herself. That's very suspicious.

C: 这层层保障，的确让人难以下手。
E: Those layers of security do make things a little difficult.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「——激起往昔的涟漪！」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"</color>

C: 这些忆灵是？
E: What are these memosprites?

C: 怎么可能！当然是…「长夜月」小姐！
E: Of course not! Take a photo... of Miss Evernight!

C: 看来，有人在我看不见的角落付出了许多努力呀……
E: Hmm... Looks like someone's been busy behind my back.
...Hah.

C: 既然如此，我可以向你证明。
E: In that case, I can prove it to you.

C: 空无的精魄……
E: An empty spirit...

C: 构成它的记忆，全部来自相机中的照片，也就是我一路以来的「开拓」。
E: Its memories are all drawn from the camera's photos, in other words, from my journey of Trailblazing.

C: 我们无法回到过去，做出更好的选择。
E: We can't go back to the past and make better choices.

C: 它们都能帮助我，变得比{NICKNAME}和丹恒更强！
E: Will help me become even stronger than {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng!

C: 千万不能放松警惕。
E: We absolutely can't let our guard down.

C: 的确，她可能躲在大堂的某个角落。
E: True, she might be hiding somewhere in the lobby.

C: {NICKNAME}的语气，很怀念呢……
E: {NICKNAME} sounds really nostalgic...

C: 从沉睡中醒来，回到现实吧。
E: Wake from your slumber... and return to reality.

C: 「先到舞台上来吧。『三月小姐』迟早会带着忆灵袭来，必须早做准备，我们才能带你平安撤离。然后再救出昔涟和三月七。」
E: "Step onto the stage first. 'Miss March' will come for us soon, and she won't be alone. Those memosprites will follow. We need to prepare early. Only then can we get you out safely, and go back for Cyrene and March 7th."

C: 没错。拜她所赐，我才能遁入忆潮，从世人的记忆中消失。
E: Exactly. Thanks to her, I was able to escape into the memoria tide and disappear from the world's memories.

C: 不仅如此，他还意图染指{RUBY_B#「不朽」}危险的力量{RUBY_E#}。身为战友，或许你知道他的目的是什么？
E: He also intends to get his hands on a {RUBY_B#the power of Permanence}dangerous power{RUBY_E#}. As his comrade-in-arms, do you know what his goal is?

C: 定然会有无数持明族有去无回，再无机会蜕鳞重生。这一点每个人都清楚。
E: Countless Vidyadhara will lose their lives, with no chance at a molting rebirth. We all understand this.

C: 和他们一同长眠。
E: In the unchanging past.

C: 即便世界崩落，「大地」也必须伫立——
E: Even if the world collapses, the "Earth" must remain unshaken.

C: 但此刻，{F#她}{M#他}正陷于一片深不见底的漩涡。
E: But right now, {F#s}he's trapped in a bottomless whirlpool.

C: 那位陌生人在我眼前掠走了「救世主」。我号令众水奔涌追逐，却被层岩阻断了流向……
E: The stranger snatched away the "Deliverer" right before my eyes. I commanded the waters to surge after them, but layered cliffs blocked the water's current...

C: …空壳。维持这具法身的心识消失了。手段干脆利落，不留半点痕迹。
E: ...An empty shell. The consciousness that maintained this dharmakāya has disappeared. So efficient... Not a single trace left behind.

C: 作为答谢，我会将你们仅存的心识带离此地。
E: I'll take your remaining consciousness out of here as a gesture of thanks.

C: 嗯？那里有一束光……
E: Hm? There's a beam of light over there...

C: …丹恒阁下，我只是陈述事实：那位女士，对你而言亦是不可忽视的威胁。
E: ...Lord Dan Heng, I'm simply stating a fact. That lady is also a threat to you, a threat that you cannot afford to ignore.

C: 迈向与「毁灭」的决战吧。
E: Let us march toward the final battle against the Destruction.

C: 我知道，你在看着，对吗？
E: I know you're watching, aren't you?

C: 有炎老在，别有用心之徒掀不起风浪。可一旦罗浮夺来金血，事态就大为不同了。
E: With Elder Huaiyan around, those with ulterior motives won't be able to stir up any trouble. But once the Luofu gets their hands on the golden blood, it'll be a whole different story.

C: 可「疑虑」二字，正是她意图在你我心中留下的心魔。
E: Doubt is exactly the demon she wants to plant in our hearts.

C: 我名下的慈善基金会也会为此战尽可能出力，确保前线伤员和受灾区域居民得到妥善安置。
E: My charitable foundation will also do as much as possible to provide support in this battle. They'll ensure that proper arrangements are provided for those wounded on the frontlines and for residents in affected areas.

C: 铁墓一役，我们已经听托帕小姐说了。她亲自跑了一趟，为贝洛伯格送来了疫苗。
E: We've already heard from Miss Topaz about the Irontomb operation. She made a special trip to deliver the vaccine to Belobog.

C: 往往是神明垂迹的序曲。
E: Is often the prelude to divine intervention.

C: 探索、了解、建立、连结——
E: Explore, understand, establish, and connect...

C: 不是还有你么？二打一，我们什么时候输过。
E: That's why you're here. Two-on-one. We've never lost that matchup.

C: 可惜，希望渺茫，不代表没有。
E: Still, slim chances doesn't mean no chances.

C: 借力打力，传统但管用。导航去最近的那个。
E: Classic move: Use their own systems against them. Take us to the nearest one.

C: 可惜，金血仍与铁墓同源。只怕和这些走卒一样，众神即便并肩作战，也会被它分而治之，逐个击破。
E: Sadly, our golden blood shares its origin with Irontomb. I fear that, like these pawns, even if the gods stand side by side, we'll still be divided and destroyed, one by one.

C: 我们正在挽救无数生命。
E: We are saving countless lives.

C: 站在这里，天空前所未有地开阔，它不再是高墙，而是触手可及的彼岸。
E: Standing here, the sky feels wider than ever. It's no longer a towering wall, but a shore within reach.

C: 「当彩虹在天际升起，至暗的命运也将放晴。」
E: "When the rainbow rises across the horizon, even the darkest clouds of destiny shall scatter."

C: 她不是*我们*记忆中的昔涟……
E: She is not the Cyrene we remember...

C: 好高大，好威风！和神谕牌上的「英雄」…好像！
E: So tall, so cool! Just like the "hero" on the oracle cards!

C: 尽管立场不同，但我们都在等待一场奇迹。
E: Though we stand on opposite sides, we are both waiting for a miracle.

C: 「翻越万千门径，直至追回失却的一切。」
E: "Through myriad passages, until all that was lost is reclaimed."

C: 地底深处，竟然是一座花园……
E: There's a whole garden down here...?

C: 到处都是一片红，可气氛却截然相反，好阴森……
E: It's red everywhere, and the atmosphere is super creepy...

C: 兜兜转转这么久，终于可以大步流星啦！
E: After running all around the place, we're finally making big strides!

C: 「毁灭」的胎盘，蠢蠢欲动……
E: The Destruction's placenta is getting restless...

C: 若那一刻来临。答应我。用净世金血，烧尽一切。
E: When the time comes. Promise me. Use the world-cleansing golden blood. To turn everything to ash.

C: 审判▀▀寂灭▀█坠入█▄▄痴愚▄
E: Judgment▀▀Exterminate▀█Falling into█▄▄Foolishness▄

C: 「别担心，在这里…『时间』是静止的。」
E: "Don't worry... 'Time' does not flow in this place."

C: 很久以前，祂也和你一样，站在道路的起点犹豫不决。所以我过来，只是为了给你一句话——
E: Many, many years ago, THEY were standing at the start of the road in hesitation, just like you are right now. So Pom-Pom came over to give you one message...

C: 「你是诞生于翁法罗斯，却因{NICKNAME}的到来而苏醒，因{M#他}{F#她}行于『记忆』命途而成长的模因。」
E: "You are a memetic entity born in Amphoreus, yet you only awakened with {NICKNAME}'s arrival, and only matured as {F#s}he embarked on the Path of Remembrance."

C: 记忆…好沉重……
E: These memories... are so heavy...

C: 「每天都这么多破事？毁灭吧，统统都毁灭——」
E: "Every day it's the same nonsense! The world is better off destroyed... every single thing—"

C: 很简单。就像它一直对我们做的，只是反过来。
E: Simple. Just like what it was doing to us all this time, but reversed.

C: 让铁墓成为空白，意味着…
E: To turn Irontomb blank means...

C: 咕…咕嘟……
E: Bloop... bloop bloop...

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，去和他们打声招呼吧？
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, why don't you go say hi to them?

C: 银河中一定也有那样的小村庄。
E: There must be a village like that somewhere in the cosmos.

C: 说再见的时候，要笑一笑，好吗？
E: When we say goodbye, give me a smile, okay?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「去杀死玩耍，游戏便会诞生。去杀死纷争，荣光必然降临。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Kill the play, and games shall be born. Kill the strife, and glory shall descend."</color>

C: 被铁墓吞没的记忆，回到现实吧。
E: Memories swallowed by Irontomb, return now to reality.

C: 当然。
E: Of course.

C: 觉得冷的话……
E: If you're feeling cold...

C: 人家的魅力，果然始终如一呀。
E: I always do have my charm.

C: 倒是符合他给人的印象。但就在刚才，「赞达尔」亲自把这种可能性否决了。
E: That does track with the impression he gave about himself, but "Zandar" shut that theory down himself just now.

C: 「因为世界对我温柔，我就长成温柔的模样。」
E: "The world was gentle to me, so I grew up to be gentle as well."

E: I'm so happy now to be able to freely waste my own life, just... so... happy~

C: 你在下面答应给我报酬…

C: 只要有心，哪里不是天地？你只需要到收容舱段取上一根「黯柴」——不过听说这等奇物全被「反物质军团」偷光了——再点燃实验台上的「无明磷粉」……
E: As long as you are determined, anything is possible, anywhere! All you have to do is pick up some Dark Matches from the storage zone — Oh, although I heard all these things have been stolen by the Antimatter Legion — anyway, then you light up a bit of Lightless Phosphorous Powder on the experiment bench...

C: 待出版的集体创作著作名我已经想好了，就叫《论科员爆炸头浓度与宇宙大发现大繁荣的正函数关系》。
E: I have already figured out the title of the paper we will publish in collaboration: "On the positive functional relationship between the concentration of scientists with luscious hairstyles and the prosperity and great discoveries of the universe."

C: 泥巴…泥巴怎么啦？！即便是和莱斯莉聊泥巴，那也是相当有意思。更何况……
E: Mud... what's wrong with mud!? With Lesley, it's fun even when I talk about mud. Besides...

C: 虽然监控只拍到了一个模糊的背影，但他好像是…伯纳德？！
E: The camera only captured the image of a blurry figure from behind, it looks like... Bernard!?

C: 终于被我找到了。
E: Found it, at last.

C: 还是别告诉他了。
E: We better not tell him.

C: 毕竟，我这大半辈子的心血，除去倾注给地概科研究的那部分，就是给了洛奇这小子。
E: After all, other than Department of Cosmic Geography, I devoted the majority of my life to Rocky.

C: 太好了！
E: Nice!

C: 声源到达两耳的时间差在<unbreak>0.5</unbreak>毫秒左右，说明声源在三点或九点钟方向。
E: There is a <unbreak>0.5</unbreak> ms time delay between the sound reaching both ears, which indicates that the source is in the 3 or 9 o'clock position.

C: 倒也不必笑得如此夸张。
E: You don't have to laugh like that.

C: 顾名思义，主要负责回收因怪物入侵而收容失效的奇物。
E: As the name suggests, it is mainly responsible for collecting the Curios that have been displaced due to the recent monster invasion.

C: 快快快，让开让开，我憋不住了。有事到机修间找我！
E: Come on, get out of the way, I can't hold it anymore. Come get me in the maintenance room if you need anything!

C: 仿佛曾在一段无线电里听过。对不起，嘈杂的无线电中传出疲惫的声音，「黑塔」在「军团」入侵的事件中选择中立。不会有援军抵达，如果可以，请按照预定的航线尽快返回，你听见了吗？
E: As though you have heard it before on the radio. "Sorry," a tired voice comes through from the noisy radio. "The space station chose to remain neutral in the invasion by the Legion. No reinforcements will arrive. If you can, please return as soon as possible according to the scheduled route. Do you hear me?"

C: 某位科员曾离开「黑塔」报信…
E: A researcher once left the space station with information.

C: 年轻人，我说过了，我正在帮法政科的年轻向导治疗。虽说出了一点小意外，但是无伤大雅，远远称不上另有阴谋。
E: Look, like I said, I'm helping this guide from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics. Although there was a little accident, it was not serious and far from being a conspiracy.

C: 他的手稿提到了一种神秘实验。
E: This manuscript talks about a mysterious experiment.

C: 是一种像病毒一样能不断传播的信息粒子，会给寄主带来思维性质上的改变与污染。
E: It is a kind of information particle that spreads around exponentially like a virus, which will bring changes and contamination to the host's nature of thinking.

C: 那可不嘛！
E: It is!

C: 像你在虚拟世界里炫耀来炫耀去的还不够，还非要顺着平台找到我，当着我的面炫耀。
E: It's not enough for you to show off in the virtual world. You have to track me down and show off in front of my face.

C: 别急，等我慢慢跟你解释。
E: Don't worry. I'll explain to you when I have time.

C: 哈哈，原来如此，我之前就怀疑乔安是感染者，只不过先前一直没有找到实质性的证据。
E: Haha, I see. I did have a suspicion that Joanne was the one who got infected. But I didn't have any substantial evidence.

C: 我还有一个秘密武器！那就是……
E: I have a secret weapon! Say hello to...

C: 是…是的！好，我现在就过来。
E: Y—Yes! I'm coming right now!

C: 阿兰平时…居然是这么看我的……
E: So that's... how Arlan sees me...

C: 那是…丹恒和防卫科的人！
E: That's... Dan Heng and the Security Department staff!

C: 我以为阿兰和佩佩亲如兄弟，才一直让他和佩佩一起玩，难道这种超出工作范围的委托，给了他很大的压力吗！
E: I got Arlan to look after Peppy because I thought they got along... but was that giving him too much extra pressure?

C: 你们去找阿兰的话，带上咱一块儿吧。他一个人我还挺不放心的呢。
E: Come to think of it, maybe I shouldn't have left him alone. Take me with you if you're going after him!

C: 卡波特限定写真。
E: Capote's limited-edition snapshot.

C: 那就是——佩佩的大头贴！
E: A photo of Peppy!

C: 尤其是和佩佩一起玩…我每次都很开心。
E: I... really like taking Peppy out to play.
What!?

C: 这还只是冰山一角呢。科员们拍到的照片可不止这几张！
E: That's just the tip of the iceberg. Other staff members have taken more photos of the same thing!

C: 没了。啧，谁有精力天天关注这些鬼神之谈。多关注自己吃了几碗饭不好吗？
E: Nope. Tsk, who in their right mind would focus so much on these talks of spirits and ghosts? Can't we just focus on our sustenance intake instead?

C: 我有种不祥的预感，{NICKNAME}，小心为上。
E: I have a bad feeling about this, {NICKNAME}. Just be careful.

C: 要不别多管闲事了？
E: Maybe now we should just stay out of this?

C: 是呜呜伯的研究员？
E: The Wubbaboo researcher?

C: 不知道，东西里或许有线索。
E: I don't know. There might be some clues among the items.

C: 没让你看这个！
E: I didn't ask you to look at that!

C: 感觉本末倒置了吧。
E: Feels like you got it backwards.

C: 你还是辞职吧。
E: Maybe it's time for you to throw in the towel.

C: 正确的猜测。在你面前的，就是今晚的主角。
E: You've guessed correctly. The person that stands before you is tonight's starring role.

C: 唉，一个两个还好说，这次玩得有点大，基本上全部阵亡。分部估计不行，我得去一趟庇尔波因特。
E: *sigh* If it were just one or two accounts, sure... I kind of overdid it this time — I lost basically everything. A branch office probably won't be enough. I'm gonna have to make a trip to Pier Point.

C: 最初的「角色扮演玩家」说，游戏是为了成长。
E: The earliest Role Playing Gamer said, "Games are about growth."

C: 现在，你所身处的这片区域已遭到网络入侵，我模拟了银狼的手段，你会在舱段各处发现<color=#dbc291ff>「奇怪的涂鸦」</color>。
E: Currently, the network of the area where you are has been hacked. I emulated Silver Wolf's methodology, so you can discover many <color=#dbc291ff>strange graffiti</color> in various locations in the zone.

C: 看，敌人变弱了，趁现在！
E: Look, the enemies are weaker than before. Now!

C: 跟我来！
E: Come with me!

C: 我尊重不同的理念，{NICKNAME}…但如今看来……
E: I cherish different ideas, {NICKNAME}, but judging from this situation...

C: 没办法，小命要紧，我就跟着他说：「纯、纯美女神德伊莉拉美貌盖世无双！」
E: My life was on the line, so I just repeated after him: Adrila the Beauty, et cetera... You get the picture.

C: 车厢的列车座椅。
E: The car seats.

C: 我难以形容这种现象…但在目睹某些事物时，我会自心底里产生「美」的情绪，它含糊不清，也只可凭本能感知。
E: It is challenging for me to articulate this phenomenon... yet when I observe certain entities, an indistinct sensation of beauty arises from my core, discernible only by instinct.

C: 伊德莉拉？
E: Idrila?

C: {NICKNAME}，三月，列车行进被阻塞了。方才的骚动造成了连锁反应。
E: {NICKNAME}, March, the Express encountered an obstruction. The disturbance triggered a chain reaction.

C: 家常便饭而已，不用担心。
E: Just business as usual, nothing to worry about.

C: 这些阴暗的小人，尽干些隔着屏幕搬弄是非的勾当！
E: Those despicable villains are distorting the truth online!

C: 留在当前回忆
E: Stay in the current memory

C: 我想找阿德勒。
E: I'm looking for Adler.

C: 一定有蹊跷，这么长时间，什么事都没查出来，我是不信的。
E: There's something fishy going on — how come they haven't recovered anything? I don't believe it.

C: （怎么回事，这种被轻视的感觉……）
E: (Why do I feel like I'm being looked down on...?)

C: 拉帝奥先生，这是因为……
E: Mr. Ratio, it's because...

C: 有什么立场比黑塔的安危更重要？
E: What could be more important than Herta's safety?

C: 一切都是布好的陷阱，目的从一开始就是挑起空间站的内乱！
E: It was all a premeditated trap to stir up chaos on the space station!

C: 嗯，至此便结束了。
E: Yes. It is over.

C: 可惜，空间站的人还是多了些，嘈杂的声音和点心不够般配。那么……
E: Unfortunately, there are still too many people in the space station. The clamor is not fitting for desserts. By the way...

C: …喔，是这事？这你都知道，消息蛮灵通的嘛。这会儿空间站一团乱，有大人物要来，大家原本就够忙的，又不知道哪冒出来一堆小怪物。
E: ...Oh, that? You've got pretty good contacts if you know that already. The space station is a mess. Everyone's already swamped as it is, and now out of nowhere, there are a bunch of little creatures popping up.

C: 你！嘘——小点声！
E: You! Shh! Quiet!

C: 你培育出了一个香菜麻酱味生命！
E: You have nurtured a coriander sesame paste lifeform!

C: 那当然了，咱这也没有支持豆沙灰灰的呀。
E: Of course. It's not like we have any followers of Gray Bean Paste here.

C: 它似乎认为，这是可以带来幸福的口味。
E: It seems to believe that this is a flavor that can bring happiness.
(Meow...)

C: 来吧，{NICKNAME}，我送你离开。
E: Come along, {NICKNAME}. I'll see you out.

C: （阮•梅、阮•梅，你前进的路通往何方？ ）
E: (Ruan Mei, Ruan Mei, where does your path lead?)

C: 我的目的大抵和你相同，既然你来了，我便不会干涉；可如果你失败，我就会强硬介入，阻止一些不必要的麻烦。
E: My goals are roughly aligned with yours. Since you're here, I won't intercede... but should you fail, I will be forced to prevent some avoidable misfortunes.

C: 你为什么在这里？
E: Why are you here?

C: 他人在哪儿？
E: Where is he?

C: 你俩日子过好比什么都重要。
E: I'm just glad you're both doing well.

C: 我正好要去找她。
E: I was actually just on my way to see her.

C: 我刚攒了几天休假，就想着赶紧回家看看老婆孩子。
E: I hurried home to see my wife and daughter as soon as I accumulated a few days of leave.

C: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}…呜呜…对不起，是我太没用了…又拖累大家了……
E: {F#Sister}{M#Brother}... Waaa... I'm sorry, I'm so useless... I've been a burden on everyone again...

C: 您现在的心跳频率是<unbreak>127</unbreak>次/分，呼吸过于急促。请跟随我屏幕光波的节奏调整呼吸。
E: Your current heart rate is <unbreak>127</unbreak> BPM and you are hyperventilating. Please match your breathing to the rhythm of the light displayed on my screen.

C: 原来…原来是这样。
E: So... So that's what happened.

C: 啊？！好可惜，虎克分了我半包糖，我一直舍不得吃，我还想拿给他们吃……
E: Really!? That's such a shame... Hook gave me half a bag of candy. I've been saving it all this time, and now I want to share it with these soldiers...

C: 「呆呆」和「笨笨」在空间站终端内已有重名，无法注册。你说得对，我的确不能取这个名字。
E: There are already entries for "Dumb-Dumb" and "Duh-Duh" in the space station terminal records. Registration could not be completed. You are right, I cannot use these names.

C: 我懂，这叫大数据。
E: I know. It's called large-scale data collection.

C: 我们和跃渊重新取得了联系，她给你发了短信，快看看吧。
E: I have managed to re-establish contact with Yueyuan. She has sent you a message. Check it quickly!

C: 以后就不用麻烦你了，我引进了一批机巧鸟，日常巡逻之类的任务都会交给它们去做。
E: I don't need to trouble you with all this anymore. I have bought a batch of cycranes that will do daily patrols and other missions like this.

C: 复读机啊你！
E: Hey, get your own metaphor!

C: 何不直接降落在目的地？
E: Why didn't we land at the destination?

C: 抱歉，长官！跟丢了，我们找不到他的足迹……
E: Apologies, Captain! W—We lost him during the pursuit. We can't find his footprints...

C: 不，也不能这么草率地下判断。你看他们的穿着，那确实不是贝洛伯格的风格。
E: As you were. We must not be tempted into careless judgment. Look at their attire. Indeed, it is not in the Belobog style.

C: …只是个寻常的雪堆，确定不是你的幻觉吗？
E: Mm... It's just an ordinary snowdrift. Are you sure you're not seeing things?

C: {NICKNAME}，三月七，这个杰帕德…很强。
E: {NICKNAME}, March, this Gepard... he's no pushover.

C: 盛装出席啊~
E: Very fancy!

C: 好冷酷的思维模式…
E: What a heartless way of seeing things...

C: 一个字都不能信！
E: That's right! You can't believe a word they say!

C: 再等等。
E: Not just yet.

C: 贝洛伯格…欠了一笔债。
E: Belobog is in debt...

C: 没人能逆转这个结果。你不能，那几个「无名客」不能，银河中任何一方势力都不能。
E: No one can reverse this outcome. Not you, not the Nameless, nor any power in the galaxy.

C: …哦？居然这么好说话？我还以为你跟传闻中一样，是个固执己见的角呢。
E: ...Oh? So, you're not as stubborn as the rumors suggest.

C: …咳，没什么，你们什么都没听见！既然你们执意要战，那就准备好脸抗我这发激光重炮吧！
E: Ahem... Anyway! Since you seem intent on settling this matter with violence, prepare yourselves for my heavy laser cannon!

C: …布洛妮娅小姐——请允许我在往后的文字中使用这个亲昵的称谓——接下来，我想和你讲一个和我自己有关的故事。
E: Miss Bronya — if you'll permit me to call you that — I'd like to share a story with you from my own life.

C: 我也这么觉得。
E: I think so, too.

C: 嗯…我不愿意相信她是为了欺骗我才编撰了这个故事。
E: I'm inclined to agree... It's hard to imagine she wrote that letter just to deceive me.

C: 原来姬子这么出名？
E: Himeko is that famous?

C: 我就把这垃圾效果器关掉咯。
E: Ugh, this voice changer is driving me crazy. Let me turn it off.

C: 哎呀，三月，{NICKNAME}！真是稀客，什么风把你们吹来了？
E: Well, well, look who we have here! {NICKNAME} and March, paying us a visit. What's the occasion?

C: 十七轮？哦~我大概知道你说的是谁了。
E: <unbreak>17</unbreak>? Oh... I think I might know who you're talking about.

C: 接下来，佩拉姐姐要开始介绍博物馆的历史背景了，大家要认真听哦。
E: Next, I'll be introducing the history of the museum. Everyone, listen carefully, okay?

C: …真是好一顿折腾啊。
E: ...Seems it's just one wild ride after another...

C: 听上去像是个公益组织。
E: Sounds like a charitable organization.

C: 我猜猜，是娜塔莎让你来劝我去复诊的？
E: *sigh* Let me guess, Natasha wants you to persuade me to go back for a follow-up visit, right?

C: 也就是说，「互助会」找到了哥…瓦赫留下的研究成果，而且还在向一些患者出售那些所谓的「特效药」……
E: So the mutual aid society found my bro— ...Vache's research results... and now they're selling this so-called "wonder medicine" to patients...?

C: 然后…
E: And then...

C: 也还好啦，以前我们可是想向应物科支取多少就能支取多少。不过，现在物资不比以前宽裕，短时间内很难凑齐……
E: It's okay. In the past, we could take as much as we wanted from the Department of Implement Arts. But now we are short of materials, it'll be hard to collect everything we need soon.

C: 是我想得太简单了…费了这么大功夫，还差点遭遇危险，要不然就…放弃吧？
E: I underestimated the situation... We put in so much effort and almost got seriously hurt. So... should we give up?

C: 所以这「铁鞋踏破不世」，指的就是需要经过由「不世之材」修建的道路吧？
E: So this "iron shoes worn out unearthly" refers to the road built by the Unearthly Marvel?

C: 姐姐她…她不知道去哪儿了。
E: She... she... I don't know where she is.

C: 它们…总会不断地出现，不断逼着我思考。可我不是姐姐，我不擅长思考……
E: They... keep showing up and keep making me think and think. But I'm not like my sister, and I'm not a good thinker...

C: 你是不是觉得这事没赚头？
E: Are you worried that it's not profitable?

C: 历代情报官的照片都挂在我办公室的墙上。如果只看这幅肖像，这位老巴拉金还是很有风度的…说是帅哥也不为过。
E: I have photos of all the intelligence officers throughout the ages hanging up on my office wall. Compared with them, old Balakin here does look quite classy in this portrait... One can even describe him as handsome.

C: 记得——笔记——顺序——！
E: Remember the sequence from the notes!

C: 查宝好像有反应了，在这附近仔细搜索吧。
E: Findie seems to have found something. Let's take a closer look here.

C: （似乎听到了旋转栈桥运作时的轰鸣……）
E: (I seem to hear a gear bridge moving...)

C: 他最后一次实验的时间是接近两年之前。在那之后发生了什么？看实验笔记上的内容，他应该还在寻求改良「风雪免疫」的方法。
E: His last experiment was nearly two years ago. What happened after that? His notes seem to suggest he was working to improve Blizzard Immunity.
...I do.

C: 没问题，我们这就出发吧。
E: I'd love to.

C: 咳，那我说正事了。「地火」也还没查清楚偷盗团伙的头目是谁，但是我听说了一些有趣的传闻，说不定对你们有帮助。
E: *sigh* I'll cut to the chase. Wildfire hasn't identified the ringleader yet, but I've heard some interesting rumors that might be helpful to you.

C: 爸爸给我新买了……
E: Daddy bought me a new one...

C: 这个区域的小机器人应该都已经恢复正常了……
E: The little robots in this area should all be back to normal now...

C: 杰、杰姬会一直努力的……
E: O—Okay, I'll do my best...

C: 房门内没有任何动静，也许你应该再试一次。
E: (There is no reaction from behind the door, perhaps you should try again.)

C: 想来，我小时候还时常缠着养父母，问他们何时才能进到博物馆参观…没想到如今真的迎来这样的一天了。
E: Come to think of it, when I was young I used to pester my foster parents about going there all the time... I never thought such a day would come.

C: 想了解一下科学考察队。
E: Tell me more about the scientific expeditionary team.

C: 想了解一下铆钉镇的孤儿院。
E: Tell me more about Rivet Town's orphanage.

C: 既然这样…请允许我问最后一个问题吧。
E: If that's so... Then please allow me to ask you one more thing.

C: 这面试越来越不对劲了…
E: This interview is getting out of hand...

C: 放飞自我比较好！
E: You should let loose!

C: 现在是休息的时候吗？
E: Can I take a break now?

C: 看来我可以告辞了…
E: Seems like time for me to go...

C: 去吧。我是无所谓的，就是要再折磨一会儿希露瓦了。
E: Go ahead. It doesn't bother me, but Serval would need to deal with the anxiety for a bit longer.

C: 其实，当时发生了这样的事……
E: So, this is what happened at that time...

C: …你讨打！
E: Don't test me. You wanna mess around and find out?

C: 她自愿过来的。
E: She came of her own volition.

C: 那么，请你做好准备，希儿。面试马上开始。
E: Please get ready, Seele. The interview will begin now.

C: 啧…你就是想看我吃瘪吧。
E: Tsk... I'm sure you're just waiting to see me suffer.

C: 你好像跟「地火」很熟？
E: You seem to be familiar with Wildfire.

C: 就像你看到的，史瓦罗把所有人赶出去之后就离开了。很显然，他对这个矿脉并不感兴趣。
E: You saw for yourself — after he pushed everyone back, he disappeared. It was clear: He didn't have any interest in the vein itself.

C: 就不能超过一个吗？
E: There can't be more than one?

C: 什么，你凭什么诬赖我？叔叔我啊，要生气了！
E: What? How could you say that! You're gonna make me angry!

C: 你看到探测器了吗？
E: Did you see the detector?

C: 喂！你到底靠不靠谱啊？
E: What! Can I even count on you?

C: 帐、帐篷？我从来没接近过费斯曼老爷子的帐篷啊……
E: T—Tent? I've never even been close to Mr. Fersman's tent...

C: 就在那个方向，我们赶紧去看看吧！
E: That way, let's go take a look!

C: 你还在乎别人养不养家呢？
E: Do you really care whether other people can support their families?

C: 这里安全了，继续前进吧。
E: It's safe here. Let's move on.

C: 总觉得…是不是有点冷？
E: Is it me or is it... cold here?

C: 他们已经退到安全区域了。
E: They've retreated to the safe zone.

C: 小心，希露瓦！
E: Serval, watch out!

C: …啊！我想到一个好地方——离这里不远，跟紧我。
E: Ah! I remember a good place that's not too far from here. Follow me!

C: 呼…这样就算是把它赶走了——虽然不知道去了哪里，但一时半会大概不会出现了吧。
E: Phew... Hopefully it won't be coming back any time soon.

C: 那个…要不让我来做吧！玲宝你就休息一下……
E: Um... Why don't I cook tonight? You can take a break...

C: 小时候那段无忧无虑的日子，现在想想还真怀念啊……
E: Oh, I miss those carefree days as a kid...

C: 呜…呜……
这…这是？
E: What... what's this?

C: 那边的角落里，我依稀记得有些存货。我们小时候经常在户外打闹，皮外伤是常有的事。
E: The kids at the orphanage were always getting into scraps when we played out here. If I remember it right, there ought to be some supplies for our cuts and bruises stored in that corner there.

C: 酒精这种东西还是检查下保质期吧，如果过期了就没什么效用了。
E: You should still check the expiration date for things like rubbing alcohol. If it's expired, it won't be effective.

C: 孤儿院的孩子总是来来去去…真没想到，我们中居然出了个未来的大守护者！娜塔知道这事吗？难道她一直瞒着……
E: The kids at the orphanage are always coming and going... I never thought that there would've been a future Supreme Guardian among us! Does Nat know about this? Could she have been keeping it a secret...

C: 因为他听说了有矿工和流浪者们发生了大规模的争斗…他的本意是想阻止大家为了矿脉流血。
E: He heard that the miners and vagrants had begun to engage in a large-scale conflict... He wanted to stop everyone from getting hurt fighting over the mines.

C: 你那是什么表情呀！虎克知道了，你觉得这罐玻璃珠根本不值钱，对不对？
E: What's that look on your face? Oh, I get it. You don't think this jar of glass marbles is worth anything, right?

C: 完蛋了…完蛋了！笔记的后半部分全都糊了！
E: ...Oh, no... I'm doomed! The second half of my notes are completely ruined!

C: 真的有大人对玩偶熊感兴趣吗？
E: Do adults really like teddy bears?

C: 娜塔莎生气了可别带上我。
E: Don't drag me into this when Natasha gets furious.

C: （这是…科鲁泽吗？怎么变成这样了？）
E: (This is... Kluzer? What happened to him?)

C: 捉迷藏比赛，列车组对鼹鼠党——二比零！
E: Hide-and-seek update... Astral Express crew — 2, The Moles — 0!

C: 裂界怪物？！你在说什么呀……
E: A Fragmentum creature!? What are you talking about?

C: …{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}说得对。刚才那个大家伙说的话，让克拉拉很在意……
E: ...Right. That bigger robot said that, how strange...

C: （铆钉镇出事后，它的后备能源启动…却发现铆钉镇已经空无一人了。）
E: (His backup power was activated after the incident in Rivet Town... and it woke up to discover that Rivet Town had been abandoned.)

C: 可重新醒来的它发现，铆钉镇已经空无一人了。于是，帕斯卡决定收集零件、修缮城镇，等待大家回来。
E: It woke up to discover that the whole place had been abandoned. So, it decided to collect parts, repair the town, and wait for everyone to return...

C: …我明白了。谢谢你，帕斯卡。
E: I see. Thank you so much, Pascal.

C: 别想那些没用的了，这家伙要进攻了！
E: Wishful thinking, it's about to attack!

C: 欸？怎么又是我？很痛的好不好！
E: Huh? Me again? It hurts, y'know!

C: 这玩意到底好不好用？快点回大门那试试吧。
E: This better work. Let's get back to the gate and give it a go.

C: 「家人」…唔，我不是很懂。
E: Family... Huh, weird.

C: 坏了，她有危险！快，赶紧去工坊确认下情况，我认得路。
E: Not good. She's in danger! Quick. Let's head over to the workshop and check it out. I know the way.

C: 这个世界，正在发生非常可怕的事情…在他看来，地上已经快要走到尽头了。
E: Terrible things are happening on this world... Mr. Svarog thinks that the Overworld will end soon.

C: 不，他的推算很准确。「星核」带来的麻烦，靠「地火」现有的力量是不可能解决的。不过，他的计算落后于现状了，新的「变量」还未加入算式……
E: No, his calculation is correct. At its current strength, it is highly unlikely that Wildfire would be able to resolve the problems stemming from the Stellaron. However, that calculation didn't take the present situation into account. There's a new variable yet to be added to the equation...

C: 你的计算能力也不过如此了。
E: Your powers of calculation suck.

C: …我不明白，博士，为什么要把那些宝贵的研究成果藏起来？那些可是你毕生的心血……
E: ...I don't understand, doctor. Why do we have to hide such valuable research results away? They're the work of a lifetime...

C: 咦…咦！？所以，娜塔莎医生才是「地火」的首领？那、那位奥列格大叔他……
E: Huh...? Huh!? So, you're the real chief? Wh—What about Oleg?

C: 当下层区重获自由时，人们会像称颂英雄一样称颂你们。
E: When the Underworld recovers its freedom, the people will indeed extol you as heroes.

C: 「地火」从来不是什么野心组织，我们所做的一切都是为了下层区的民众。这条通路只是达成目的的手段，并不是目的本身。
E: Wildfire has never been in this for its own gain. Everything we do is for the citizens of the Underworld. That passage is a means to an end, not the end itself.

C: 哎唷，这可是天大的误会！我只是热衷「看别人打架」——毕竟人与人斗，其乐无穷嘛！
E: Hey now, you've got me all wrong! I just enjoy watching people fight, that's all. Fierce words, fists flying... what's not to like?

C: 啊！你怎么知道虎克在想什么？虎克正打算问你有关探针的事呢！
E: Ah! How did you know what I was thinking? Hook was about to ask you about the probe!

C: 你这家伙，把虎克当笨蛋嘛！
E: Hmph! Do you think Hook's stupid or something?

C: 什、什么事？
E: Wh—What is it?

C: 这大熊玩偶是好心人在卖的吧…行啊，我们去看看呗。
E: Oh! I'm sure that teddy bear must've belonged to a nice person... Let's go and take a look.

C: 你怎么净喜欢那种小孩子的玩意？嗐，算了，跟你说不到一块儿去。
E: What's so appealing about a toy? *sigh* We're clearly operating on different wavelengths.

C: 五百五十冬城盾三次，成交！
E: <unbreak>550</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold!

C: 这下宝石归我了。
E: Phew! The gems belong to me.

C: 还有人敢偷「地火」的东西？
E: Who would dare steal from Wildfire?

C: 虎克做的是正确的事！才、才不会后悔……
E: I did the right thing! H—Hook regrets nothing...

C: 呜…反正也没买到礼物，只好回去问问老巫婆有什么建议了。
E: Ugh... what does it matter, Hook didn't get the gift. I'll have to go back and ask the old witch for ideas.

C: 七百五十！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak>!

C: 等下我们一起去找老巫婆！一定要让她把探针包装成最好的礼物，送给老爹！
E: Let's go see the old witch later! I'll ask her to wrap this probe up as a beautiful gift for daddy!

C: …这、这是卖掉「菌菌」赚到的钱，全部都交给娜塔莎姐姐！
E: ...Th—This is all the money we got for Junjun. Here, it's all yours!

C: 这探针有多稀有我会不知道？我得查查拍卖会上那个买家到底是谁……
E: Do you think I don't know how rare that probe is? I need to find out who that buyer at the auction was...

C: 啊、啊！原、原来是克拉拉，我还以为是…吓死我了！
E: Oh! Clara, it's you! I thought it was... You scared the living daylights out of me!

C: 呜…对不住，人家太害怕了嘛！猛地一个黑影窜出来，谁还会关注那些细节啊……
E: I'm sorry... I was too scared! When a shadow leaps out at you, who could possibly pay attention to such tiny details?

C: 喔…不愧是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！可我们要上哪找具备这种特征的人呢？
E: Oh! You've figured it out. But how are we going to track down someone with such an unusual appearance?

C: …不要，史瓦罗先生！求求你，请不要这么做……
E: No, Mr. Svarog! Please, don't...

C: 但…史瓦罗先生是不一样的。
E: But, Mr. Svarog is different.

C: 等等…我想再找史瓦罗聊聊。
E: Wait... I want to talk again to Svarog.
█Die██end██████Pascal██████Cla! Ra█████{NICKNAME}███—

C: （大概是告一段落了…过后再联系克拉拉看看状况吧。）
E: (I think it's over... I'll check in with Clara later to see what's up.)

C: 呃…你还好吗？
E: Uhh... How are you doing?

C: 呃…今天早上？对，就是早上。他今天不是负责城区巡逻嘛？所以就顺路来委托我了。
