E: Uh... this morning? Yeah, that's right. He's on urban patrol duty today, right? That's why he popped round and asked the favor.

C: 这里的银鬃铁卫，这里的每一个人，都做好了随时为人民牺牲的觉悟——时刻准备好为贝洛伯格抛洒热血……
E: Every Silvermane Guard here, every person here, is ready to sacrifice themselves, ready to spill their blood for Belobog at a moment's notice...

C: 三思吧，杰帕德！
E: Think thrice, Gepard!

C: 抱歉，把你卷进来。
E: Sorry for getting you involved in this.

C: 嗐，现在说这些有点不合时宜了，你别介意。
E: ...Sorry, hardly the time for me to be obsessing over all this.

C: ——这机器人是有什么毛病？！它识别不出我们是自己人吗？
E: What's wrong with this robot? It doesn't recognize us?

C: 啊？这批机器人不是新货吗，怎么突然就…是不是戍卫队没仔细验收啊？
E: Uh, aren't they brand-new? How come... Is it because the Garrison didn't do proper quality control?

C: 好了，研究员先生…对此您想发表什么评论吗？你的口供好像和这位{M#先生}{F#小姐}的有点出入嘛。
E: Alright, Mr. Researcher... Do you want to comment on this? Your statement seems to be a little bit different from this {M#gentleman}{F#lady}'s.

C: …对不起，我没事，只是突然有些控制不住情绪。我还是听佩拉士官的话，先回机械屋吧……
E: ...Sorry, I'm fine. I just couldn't help myself. I'd better listen to Officer Pela and head back to the workshop...

C: 你说你在仓库里有些发现？
E: You said that you found something in the warehouse?

C: …不过大门还是纹丝不动呢……
E: ...But, the gate didn't move an inch...

C: 如何？
E: Well?

C: 这、这家伙，真的不是本尊吗？
E: A—Are you sure this isn't the real her?

C: 为何在面对不可抗辩的力量时，我们想到的第一件事永远是抗拒、堵上耳朵，而非聆听它的诉求？
E: Why, when faced with irrefutable strength, is our first thought always to resist, to cover our ears, instead of hearing the call?

C: …还是来了啊。本以为这暴风雪能将你们埋葬……
E: ...You came. I thought the blizzards had entombed you...

C: 第二，记得我说过的话吗？如果你出了什么事，我一定会来救你的。
E: And two: Do you remember what I said? If anything happened to you, I'd save you.

C: 我不是正在和可可利亚战斗吗，为什么会在这里……
E: But I was fighting Cocolia. Why am I here...?

C: 我向你们承诺，一定会带领这座城市走向复兴，绝对不抛下上下层区的任何一人…绝对不辜负我们这一番奋战。
E: I promise you, we will lead this city and its people back to prosperity, both the Overworld and the Underworld... This hard fight will not have been for nothing.

C: 把我们的功劳给抢了啊…
E: ...Maybe we include some of the cool stuff we did?

C: 当然，交给我吧——我猜娜塔都等急了。
E: Of course, leave it to me — Nat's probably getting anxious about the delay.

C: {NICKNAME}，刚才你突然出现在战场上，手里还提着那么酷拽的武器…到底发生了什么，也该告诉我们了吧？
E: So, {NICKNAME}, wanna tell us what happened back there? Don't think you can just reappear on the battlefield with a cool weapon in your hands and skip the story.

C: 你因何如此笃定？
E: Ah, a believer, I see?

C: 我自知不配登上如此高位。若不是姐姐当年无缘无故地离开…我根本不可能走上这条道路。
E: I know I don't deserve to be in such a high position. If it weren't for my sister going off then for no reason at all... I'd never have been able to take this path.

C: …咦？你们谁的手机响了吗？
E: ...Huh? Whose phone is ringing?

C: 不过，没想到这个小家伙居然被丢到了雅利洛-Ⅵ，还在那里度过了七百多年…真是一段神奇的故事。
E: Still, I never imagined this little one got sent out to Jarilo-VI and spent over <unbreak>700</unbreak> years there... What an incredible story.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你需要在规定时间内，记下往来这里的所有星槎的型号和颜色。等到结束之后，我会向你提问。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You will need to remember the models and colors of all starskiffs that pass by within the specified time period, and I will ask you a few questions at the end.</color>

C: 她这人智力上有些缺陷，脑袋不太好，粗活可以，记事都不太行，买菜也总是出错。
E: Mei might not be the brightest and may even be slightly dense in the head. She's good at manual labor, but memory is not her forte. She keeps getting the wrong groceries.

C: 你和檀檀在现场调查取证了不少，比对现场的机巧鸟影像，应该就能找到肇事的星槎。
E: You and Tantan have done an investigation on the field. If we match the cycrane footage, we should be able to find the starskiff that caused the accident soon.

C: 没见过这么破的。
E: Never seen a beat-up vehicle like this.

C: 快给我拦住他们，铁疙瘩。
E: Stop them, bucket of bolts!

C: 你放心，虽然交通肇事我处理得不多，但是交通肇事的后续赔偿我非常熟悉。
E: Don't worry. Although I don't have much experience with traffic accidents, I am very familiar with compensation matters.

C: 看你的打扮，是来瞧病的化外民么？你找这个干什么？难不成想自己开方子？
E: Your clothes... Are you an outworlder here for treatment? Why do you want that book? Are you trying to write prescriptions for yourself?

C: 但你就不一样了，你是被将军选中的人，来去方便，不是一般人可比的。
E: But you are different. You are chosen by the general and can go into many secret places, unlike normal visitors.

C: 玉络冲你笑了笑。
E: Yuluo smiles at you.

C: 听说你找我有事…
E: I heard you have something to tell me...

C: 今天还要来教希拉吗？
E: Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?

C: （直接打开它的后盖）
E: (Open up its back flap)

C: 喏，这就是我刚拍的照片。
E: Look, this is the photo I just took.

C: …算法生成中。
E: ...The algorithm is being generated.

C: 我曾经喜欢过一位诗人，但是这不代表着我喜欢的是诗人。你能理解吗？
E: I was once in love with a poet, but that doesn't mean I'll like every poet I meet. Do you understand?

C: 我做出了诗仙机巧，它写出来的诗，就是我的诗。而且你知道吗？这样诗，想要多少就有多少，你要是喜欢，我能一直写下去。
E: I've made some poet ingenia. The poems they write are considered mine. And you know what? You can have as many poems like this as you want. If you like it, I can write more for you.

C: 她本人，当然是写诗吟诗。哈哈，静斋的爱好还蛮古雅的。喔，你问除了诗歌之外有什么爱好啊？
E: It's undoubtedly writing and reciting poems. Haha, Jingzhai's hobbies are quite old-fashioned. Oh, you want to know about her other hobbies?

C: 如果静斋再次拒绝我，我会拿出我和她的定情信物，她一定会惊讶我究竟是谁。
E: If Jingzhai turns me down again, I'll show her our love token. I'm sure she'll be surprised and curious about my identity.

C: 想要最新款的玉兆。
E: I'd like to buy the latest jade abacus model.

C: 「你是世界尽头的叹息，」
E: "You're a sorrowful sigh at the end of the world,"

C: 现在，你就当我是陌生的蘑菇吧，这也算是我们的默契了。
E: Now, just treat me as a stranger mushroom, and let that be the mutual understanding between us.

C: 我一定会深入调查的。
E: I will investigate.

C: 请讲暗号。
E: Please say the pass phrase.

C: 我的牌友们对外人警惕得很，你也别放在心上。你出现在这里，是不是因为古道热肠，闲着没事要来调查「美丽狐仙聊天」的？
E: My game mates are naturally suspicious of strangers. Don't take it to heart. Are you here because of your altruistic nature, and have nothing better to do than to investigate the Foxian Beauty Chat?

C: 我搞到了「高级会员资格」。
E: I managed to get myself a "premium membership."

C: 这云骑军是有问题的。
E: This Cloud Knight is suspicious.

C: 黛青小姐姐就在那个转角对吧？我不能转过去，我不能见到她本人。
E: Ms. Daiqing is over around that corner, isn't she? I shouldn't look over there. I shouldn't see her true self.

C: 我曾经有过轻生的念头，是黛青不厌其烦地关心我的精神状态、联系上了我的朋友来帮助我，是她让我觉得自己好像也能努力地活下去。
E: I have had thoughts of ending it all. It was Daiqing who kept my spirits strong and contacted my friends to help me. It was her who make me feel like I can continue living.

C: 可是，我已经改了好几版了……
E: But, I've already rewritten it a few times...

C: 如果是赛博诈骗的话，接下应该很快就会用各种理由来骗你花钱了。
E: If you get cyber fraud messages, they'll use every trick in the book to get you to spend money as quickly as possible.

C: 那么，我们谈谈调查本身吧。
E: Now, let's talk about the investigation.

C: 咳咳，有意思。这些纹样似乎是在描绘某个仙舟历史的重要时刻。
E: *coughs* Interesting. These motifs seem to depict a significant historical moment in Xianzhou.

C: （好邪恶的图案，光是远远地看一眼都好像会沾染上某种不幸…这是隐喻了什么吗？）
E: (What an evil drawing. It seems like one will be stricken with some misfortune just by looking at it... Is there an intrinsic meaning to it?)

C: 他们的血脉传承与我们仙舟人不同。持明具有某种与生俱来的生命力，据说那是「不朽」的遗赠。
E: Their bloodline is different from us Xianzhou natives. The Vidyadhara are born with great vitality, the gift of the Permanence, as they say.

C: 是吗，谢谢你，那我去渡口那边找找。
E: Very well, thank you. I'll head over to the jetty.

C: 孩子望向海水，口中哼哼着谁也听不懂的童谣。
E: The child gazes back at the sea, humming a nursery rhyme that nobody can understand.

C: 返老还童？
E: You're de-aging?

C: 听见了没？
E: Hear that?

C: 嘻嘻，我竟然梦寐以求一直想成为他们。
E: Teehee, and in spite of everything I always dreamed of becoming one of them.

C: 你现在越来越有家长的样子啦。跑到别的小孩面前，把自家的孩子抓走。
E: Now you're starting to get the hang of this parenting business. Running over to other kids and snatching away your own child.

C: 白露不情愿地治好了这名化外民的病症，相比魔阴身，这不过是举手之劳。
E: Bailu healed the Outworlder begrudgingly. Compared to being Mara-struck, his illness is but a common disease.

C: 六御已批复您的请求。
E: The Six Charioteers have replied to your request.

C: 希望您听我把话说完，妾身绝不是在无理取闹。
E: Please hear what I have to say, I have good reason to be concerned.

C: 在下丹恒，见过白露小姐。
E: I am Dan Heng. It is an honor to meet you, Miss Bailu.

C: 我想借修复「建木」的封印的机会，看看能否唤起你我的回忆——
E: I want to use this opportunity to repair the Ambrosial Arbor's seal and see if I can help recall our memories...

C: 看来有人对我的出现已忍无可忍了。
E: Seems like some people have had enough of my presence.

C: 丹枫大人，我终于明白您的良苦用心了，那个小姑娘才是「化龙妙法」的关键！我的研究取得了重大进展！
E: Master Dan Feng, I finally understand your plan. That little girl is the key to the Transmutation Arcanum! This is a breakthrough for my research!

C: 所以，是长老们派你们来清除不合格的龙尊？
E: So, did the elders send you to take out the "unworthy" high elder?

C: 龙女大人，龙女大人，这件事我已经疑惑了很久了。
E: Dragon Lady, Dragon Lady, I've been wondering about this for a long time.

C: 我看看我看看，这些就是本案的嫌疑人吗…唔唔…嗯嗯…原来如此……
E: Let me take a look... Mm, so these are the suspects. Ahem, hmm, I see...

C: 嗯。你能这么想，我也很高兴。
E: Mm, I'm glad to hear you say that.

C: 请再稍等一下。
E: Just a moment.

C: 原来这个系列隔了这么多年又出新作了！这罗浮我真是来对了！等查完这个案子，我一定要马上买来读。苏芳老师太强了。
E: *gasp* A new addition after so many years! Looks like I made the right choice coming to the Luofu! As soon as we've cracked this case, I'm getting myself a copy — Su Fang is the greatest.

C: 有必要一上来就这么刺激吗？
E: Does the story have to be this... stimulating?

C: 嗯…杨叔说得很有道理，确实是这样哦！看来我神探三月七和渔公还有一点点小差距……
E: Hmm... You're right, Mr. Yang. Guess I can't compete with the Angler just yet...

C: （…继续吧。）
E: (...Let's see where this leads first.)

C: 没想到天舶司的司舵会亲赴现场处理这么危险的事。
E: I didn't know the helm master of the Sky-Faring Commission dealt with situations like this in person.

C: 这件圣物一直存放在驭空司舵随身携带的挂饰中，晴霓小姐暂时交给了我们。
E: This object has been stored inside Helm Master Yukong's personal trinket all along — Miss Qingni lent it to us.

C: 我想知道是什么将她从那位天才飞行士，变成了现在的驭空司舵。
E: I want to know what happened... how she went from ace pilot to helm master.

C: 采翼…坚持住…采翼，采翼，睁开眼睛，采翼……
E: Caiyi... Hold on, Caiyi... Caiyi, open your eyes... Caiyi...

C: 妈妈…不必道歉，真的不必道歉……
E: Mom... you don't need to apologize. Really, you don't need to...

C: 这…为什么？
E: But... why?

C: （居然藏在太卜司…胆子真大。）
E: (Hiding out at the Divination Commission... that's a bold decision.)

C: 我知道危险何时会到来，也知道它是什么。所以不用担心，你我携手，一定能渡过这一难关，你也不会承担任何负面后果。
E: I know when danger will come and what form it will take. Don't worry, together we can do this — no harm will come to you.

C: （说谎）我喜欢你。
E: (Lie) I like you.

C: （卡芙卡…她将我送进星穹列车。关于她的一切都笼罩在迷雾里，我想知道更多她的事情……）
E: (Kafka... She's the one who put me on the Astral Express. Everything about her is shrouded in mystery and I want to know more...)

C: 未来好似一座迷宫，许许多多的分岔不过是诱导，真正的道路有且只有一条。
E: The future is like a labyrinth: Every divergence is merely an inducement. There is only one real path.

C: （按照规则）我想再见到你。
E: (Obey the rules of the game) I want to see you again.

C: 我没有「恐惧」这种机制。我的头脑和内心里存在着一个空洞，虽然连我自己都意识不到。所以这种改变，我自己是做不到的。
E: I have no mechanism for "fear." There's an empty space in my mind and my heart, but I'm unable to perceive it. Changing that part of myself isn't something I can do alone.

C: （应该怎么回答才好？）
E: (How should I respond?)

C: 众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: Everyone, take them down!

C: 好家伙，全是密密麻麻的集装箱，一眼都望不到边。
E: Ugh, Look, it's just containers as far as the eye can see.

C: 杨叔，咱们怎么办？
E: Mr. Yang, what should we do?

C: 是「星核」。侵蚀现象已经产生了…现在还不严重，但这个征兆…不好。
E: It must be the Stellaron — the corrosion has already started to spread... It doesn't look serious yet, but this is a bad sign.

C: 用不着恩公操劳。身为接渡使，星槎操舵可是咱们这行的必备技能。
E: Uh-uh. Just sit back, and relax. All Amicassadors know their way around a starskiff.

C: 打开看看。
E: Open it.

C: （不会吧。丹恒的敌人，会发出这样的邀请吗？）
E: (I highly doubt Dan Heng's enemy would send an invitation letter...)

C: 这不是丹恒先生吗！真是稀客呀。该不是最近身体有什么贵恙？来来，这边请。
E: Dan Heng!? What a surprise! Are you not feeling well? Please, come this way.

C: 我不是来看病的…
E: I'm not here for a check-up...

C: 她是重犯，此事由云骑和十王司说了算。
E: She's a criminal. That's up to the Cloud Knights and the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 这样的人啊……今天就有一个！
E: Hmm... Oh! Yes, someone came by today that matches that description!

C: 谢谢，但我自己也还未理清……
E: Thanks, but I don't even know where to start...

C: 奇怪，奇怪，阁下的行为可真令人捉摸不透。
E: Your behavior truly is puzzling... I can't seem to piece together your motive.

C: 为什么…为什么只有孽物能一遍遍卷土重来……
E: Why... why is it that only the abominations can return time and time again...?

C: 你…看得见？
E: You... you saw that?

C: 我喜欢你的自信。不过「剑芒未出，怎知胜负高下」，对不对？
E: I admire your confidence. But what was it you said earlier about declaring a winner before swords were drawn?

C: 坦白说，这个问题，我不知道该怎么处理。这事儿超出了地衡司所能管辖的范畴。所以，我联系了将军大人坐镇的神策府。
E: I'll be honest with you, I've got no idea how to handle this problem — it's beyond the Realm-Keeping Commission's jurisdiction. I contacted the Seat of Divine Foresight, which is overseen by the general.

C: 你是指「慈怀药王」？
E: Are you talking about Merciful Medicus?
Uh...

C: 不用担心这个云骑。他和你一样，在接受考验。
E: No need to be concerned about him. Much like yourself, he is here to undergo the trials.

C: 没想到啊，一来就被他们怀疑了…费了好大的力气才勉强让他们相信我是真心想加入药王秘传的……
E: They were suspicious of me as soon as I arrived... It took a lot of effort to make them believe I wanted to become a disciple...

C: 趁着那些看守你们的莳者不注意，这位云骑奋笔疾书，很快就将经文抄好了。
E: The Cloud Knight swiftly scribbles away and finishes copying the sacred text while the disciples watching over you aren't looking.

C: 那可不好保证…
E: I can't make any guarantees...

C: 好，那就开始吧。
E: Then let's begin.

C: 咱们组织有多少人？
E: How many people are in our organization?

C: …话说，我还从没摸过加热器呢…这玩意儿烧得通红，要是把手放上去，我这细皮嫩肉怕不是会变得金黄酥脆……
E: ...Uhh, is touching a heater a good idea? This thing is red-hot — what if my hand turns extra crispy...

C: 本座说你不会被烫伤，又没说你不会被烫到。只要你能理解「烫」，记忆就会自行补足你的感受。
E: I said that if something hasn't injured you in reality, then it cannot injure you in memory..... I didn't say anything about the sensation of injury.

C: 好冷…唉？太卜你没感觉到吗，我忍不住打哆嗦了。
E: It's freezing... Huh? Master Diviner, aren't you cold? I can't stop shivering.

C: 太好了，这次只需要摸一台显示器，而不是什么滚烫的加热器……
E: Phew, I'll take a monitor over a red-hot heater any day...

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 你不是{NICKNAME}，一点都不像。
E: You're not {NICKNAME}. Nothing like {M#him}{F#her}.

C: （开门）
E: (Open the door)

C: 你没来的时候，我已经逛了…找了一圈，三月七不在这儿。
E: I was looking around before you got here... I already looked everywhere, but March 7th is nowhere to be found.

C: 云璃自信地看向了你。
E: Yunli looks at you confidently.

C: 怀炎将军打算在司辰宫亲自致谢，将宝剑作为罗浮演武仪典胜者的奖品赠出。我和帕沃尔先生正打算前往那儿。
E: General Huaiyan plans to personally thank them at the Palace of Astrum and present the sword as a prize to the champion of the Wardance. Mr. Paavo and I were actually on our way there.

C: 我，帕沃尔•卡拉萨加，谨代表卡勒瓦拉使团，将宝剑「米卡•奇瓦沙」交还仙舟联盟，它本来自仙舟，也应当归于故乡。
E: On behalf of the Kalevalan Delegation, I, Paavo Kalastaja, am here to return the legendary Miekka Kivessä to the Xianzhou Alliance, its rightful homeland.

C: 你说的姑娘是不是提着大剑？
E: Was she carrying a massive sword?

C: （将内鞘底部的红色取出来）
E: (Extract the red coloring from the interior of the sword case)

C: 他们死了，为你而死，为你承诺的「没有步离人的好日子」而死。
E: They died. They died for you. They died because of your big promises, promising them a life free from the borisin.

C: 不过，再过一段时间，我打算离开仙舟，继续旅行。希望我们有缘在银河相会吧，挚友。
E: However, I plan to leave the Xianzhou soon and continue my travels. May our paths cross again in the vast Cosmos, my dear friend.

C: 不过，也仅仅证明到那时为止，剑尚未被窃走。
E: However, it only proves the sword wasn't stolen up to that point.

C: 我们走，桑…桑…博？
E: Let's go, Sam... Sampo?

C: 最后是阿佑，这家伙贪得无厌，好不容易逃出生天，竟打算私吞剩下的货物，谎称是被山贼全部抢走了…佐罗和钟珊气不过，就<color=#dbc291ff>把他的腿打断了</color>。
E: Last of all comes Wright. This guy was so insatiably greedy that he still came back to try and embezzle the rest of the supplies after they narrowly escaped with their lives, lying about how the gang had taken off with everything... Lefton and Zhongshan were so incensed that they <color=#dbc291ff>broke his legs</color>.

C: 那请您尽快，时间可不等人啊！
E: Then please hurry up with it. Time waits for no one!

C: 二位还有什么事吗？
E: Do you two need anything else?

C: 如何，黑天鹅警探，你找出凶手是谁了吗？
E: How's it going, Detective Black Swan? Have you found out who the killer is?

C: 谁曾想，花火大人竟将戒指吞了下去！钟珊不得不用手中的领带勒住对方的脖子，阻止她将戒指吞下肚，没想到竟失手勒死了花火大人。
E: Who could've known that Miss Sparkle would end up swallowing that ring! All Zhongshan could do was use the tie in his hand to try and strap down her neck to prevent her from swallowing the ring — but he unexpectedly managed to strangle Miss Sparkle to death.

C: 掌门，是看大门的意思吧？
E: "Keeper"? You mean guard, right?

C: 别冤枉我啊，我在认真上班的。瞧，这几位是太卜要见的客人。
E: That's unfair — I'm working hard! Look, these are the guests the master diviner wants to meet.

C: 唷，稀客啊。
E: A rare honor.

C: 关于未来，我只能告诉你一件事：在最好与最坏的那些未来里，你们终将直面「毁灭」的纳努克。届时你会需要所有的帮助，因为那将是属于星神那个层次的残酷战斗。
E: There is only one thing I can tell you about the future: In the best and the worst cases, you will eventually have to face Nanook the Destruction. When that time comes, you will need all the help you can get. It will be a brutal struggle of Aeonic proportions...

C: 你为什么要告诉我？
E: Why are you telling me this?

C: 瞧见了没有？！老夫猜得没错！就按这个法子来！
E: See!? My theory was correct! Keep going!

C: 青镞面色凝重地看完了丹枢的研究报告。
E: Qingzu's expression is serious as she completes reading Dan Shu's report.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，谢谢你帮我……
E: Thank you for helping me, {F#miss}{M#mister}...

C: 但在下的双眼情况不同。视神经发育不全，现在只能依靠植入物来医治，但植入物很快会被仙舟人强大的恢复能力「排异」出去…那过程生不如死。
E: My eyes are another story — the optic nerves never fully developed. Transplants are a temporary solution, but they are soon rejected by the superior healing powers of the Xianzhou natives... The entire process is worse than death.

C: 不过奇怪的很…来检查你身体的医士却说，你的身体机能并未受什么影响。
E: ...but the healer who examined you just now said your body doesn't seem to have been affected... how strange.

C: 我早看出她有问题。
E: I knew there was something off about her.

C: 你吃了我给你的「餐云承露丹」吗？
E: Did you ingest the Brumedew Concentrate Pellet I gave you?

C: 再见了，无名客。
E: Farewell, Nameless.

C: 我跟你说啊，我可和那帮打着「丰饶」旗号杀人越货的坏东西不一样。恰恰相反，我和我的朋友们是在用实际行动践行「丰饶」之道向善的那一面！
E: Let me make it clear that I'm different from those evil people who kill and steal in the name of Abundance. On the contrary, my friends and I are practicing the virtuous side of Abundance with our actions!

C: 要知道，你帮了我，就是帮了那些下落不明的小羊。如此你便在丰饶之主那儿累积了功德福报。往后你的人生便会身体健康，好运连连！
E: You should know that by helping me, you're helping those missing sheep too, and that will earn you merit with the Aeon of Abundance. You'll be in good health and have great luck in the future.

C: 功德？可以吃吗？
E: What's merit? Can you eat it?

C: 他们能不能接受…就看咱们俩的三寸不烂之舌咯。
E: Well, it depends on how we convince them.

C: 接下来，咱们分头行动吧。这么多机兵，全都装到星穹列车上，你们家那个列车长非急眼不可。
E: Now, let's split up. I'm sure the Astral Express conductor will freak out if we load so many automatons on the train all at once.

C: 通过！我没问题了。
E: It's a pass! I'm fine with this.

C: 当然，更好的结局是…您再次发挥了您的特长，将这个危险的组织给瓦解掉了。
E: Of course, it'd be better if you could use your expertise to dismantle this dangerous organization.

C: 顺利个屁！我都快哭背过气去了……
E: Don't even mention it! I've cried so much that I can't even breathe...

C: 咱们放生的那几个机械宝宝，怎么会自爆啊？
E: Why did the mechanical darlings we released blow themselves up?

C: 那两个伪善的家伙，脑子里根本是一团浆糊。
E: Those two hypocrites are outright idiots.

C: 当初说好要一起修善心、行善举的朋友，一出事就揭下伪善的面具了！
E: When we first met each other, we promised to do good together. Now, they've finally shown their true colors!

C: 又是镜子…有完没完啊？
E: Mirrors again... what a surprise.

C: 那座浮空岛上好像有面镜子…就是有点远……
E: I think there's a mirror on that floating island... but it's a bit far away...

C: 你明白该怎么做吧，藿藿？
E: You know what to do, don't you, Huohuo?

C: 走，一块儿见鬼去吧~
E: Let's face the ghosts together!

C: 至于这边这个……
E: As for this one here...

C: 嗯，说的在理。不过我上限也就能坐几十年牢，嘿嘿。
E: Mm, true, but I'd probably only do a few decades, hehe.

C: 嘻嘻，真不愧是判官啊，警惕的很哪。
E: Hehehe, no wonder she's a judge. Very perceptive...

C: 嗯，恚炎的碎片已经封印的差不多了。
E: We're doing well. We've sealed most of Furynox's fragments.

C: …我真的是判官吗？
E: What kind of judge am I...

C: 我能等待，等你们松懈，等绥园的阵法崩毁。时间和机会永远站在我这儿。
E: I can wait. I'll wait for humans to let their guard down. I'll wait till the matrix drawn over Fyxestroll Garden collapses. Time and opportunity will always be on my side.

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 柯柯娜？噢，是那位奢侈品店的店长吧——她怎么了？
E: Cocona? Oh, that luxury goods shop owner... What's wrong with her?

C: 不行哦——现在是工作时间，我不能擅离职位。
E: I can't. It's work hours now. I can't simply leave my station.

C: 欸…突然想到一个不错的动机。略加发展的话，也许能写出一首好听的歌曲？
E: Hmm... I've suddenly thought of a good motif. If we expand on it just a little, perhaps we can even pen a nice melody?

C: 我就知道娜娜与众不同！等娜娜在匹诺康尼歌剧院举办演出的时候，我就要和别人炫耀：「看！那是我最好的朋友！」。
E: I knew you were different, Cocona! When you hold a concert at the Penacony Theater, I'm going to show off to everyone: "Look, that's my best friend!"

C: 格尔温太太，您来了。今天想看看什么？
E: Mrs. Gerwin, you're here. What would you like to look at today?

C: …柯柯娜小姐？
E: ...Miss Cocona?

C: 那…我要代为传达的就是这些，柯柯娜小姐。希望您往后的生活愉快……
E: Then... that's all I have to deliver, Miss Cocona. I wish you a happier life down the road...

C: 柯柯娜转过头去，直面远方的一片虚空。你似乎还能看到她微微上扬的嘴角。
E: Cocona turns back, facing the curtain of void in the distance. You think you can see the corners of her mouth curl slightly.

C: 说的也是……
E: That's true...

C: 「时间的芬芳啊，你闻到了吗？」
E: "Can you smell the fragrance of time?"

C: 啊…原来您是柯柯娜店长的老客户，十分抱歉。
E: Ah... So you're an old customer of shop owner Cocona. I'm truly sorry.

C: 他举手投足间散发出来的魅力摄人心魄…迷离、慵懒、洒脱。你开始理解莱斯利•迪恩的名声为什么能响彻星系了。
E: The charisma and charm that he emanates with his every move are captivating... Filled with emotion yet unaffected and unrestrained. You start to understand how the name "Lesley Dean" has come to resonate across the galaxy.

C: 身体不舒服吗？不对呀，在梦境里应该不会发生这种事……
E: Do you feel unwell? No, things like that shouldn't happen inside a dream...

C: 你在台词中看到了他的名字，「克伦威尔舰长」。在这场剑拔弩张的对手戏中，他与某位狡黠的公司精英展开了言语上的交锋。
E: You see his name in the subtitles — "Captain Cromwell." In this tense showdown, he seems to be engaged in a war of words with a sly IPC elite.

C: 那个，能说的我都已经告诉您了…不介意的话，能请您尽快离开吗？我要抓紧把这个房间收拾出来，后面还有客人要入住……
E: Um, I have told you everything I can... If you don't mind, could you please leave this place? I need to hurry up and tidy this room. There are other guests that wish to move in.

C: 用我的名字命名吧！
E: I'll name it after myself then!

C: 哦对了，差点忘了最后还有件事得跟你汇报。
E: Oh right, almost forgot the last thing that I have to report.

C: 别急，这就开摆。
E: No rush. We'll do it immediately.

C: …嗯？交接？什么交接？
E: ..Eh? Handover? What handover?

C: （…这才像样！这才是配得上大股东的办公环境嘛。）
E: (...That's more like it! That's more like an office worthy enough for a major shareholder.)

C: 周围本就寥寥无几的客人全都被这骇人的一幕吓跑了…或许这也是一种另类的减轻工作负担的方式。
E: The few customers nearby are scared away by this horrifying scene... Perhaps this is another way to alleviate your workload?

C: 抱歉…你能再念一遍吗？
E: I'm sorry... Could you please repeat that?

C: 真的吗？！太好了！奥帝叔叔果然靠谱！
E: Really!? That's amazing! Uncle Oti's the man!
Mmm...?

C: （继续看戏。）
E: (Keep watching the drama.)

C: （以身高作为邀请的条件…怎么看里面都有些蹊跷啊。）
E: (Making one's height the prerequisite? Something's bizarre about this...)

C: 呃，我大概没太搞清楚状况，{F#女士}{M#先生}……
E: Er, I guess I don't really understand what's going on then, {F#madam}{M#sir}...

C: 你背后明明全是苏乐达。
E: You're standing in front of nothing but SoulGlad.

C: 黑塔的空间站值得一去。
E: Herta's space station is worth a visit.

C: 时间差不多啦，{NICKNAME}。这次告别虽然有些匆忙，但我们一定还会再见的，对吧？
E: It's almost time for me to go, {NICKNAME}. It feels a bit hurried to say goodbye now, but I'm sure we'll meet again, right?

C: 让傲慢的巨人都跪下来仰视我们！让他们全都记住「四尺圣堂」的教义！
E: Make those arrogant giants look up at us on their knees! Make them remember the doctrine of the "Four-Foot Hall"!

C: 说话一套一套的，看来你就是管事的了？
E: Given your eloquence, you must be the one in charge here, right?

C: 不必着急，{NICKNAME}老师来得正是时候。
E: There is no rush. You're here just in time, {NICKNAME}.

C: 稍等一下，我还有些事情。
E: Wait a moment. There's something I need to do.

C: …好像还是有点不太对，不过，就这样吧。{NICKNAME}快说点什么，冷场了！
E: ...I think you're still a little off but... Well, that's good enough. {NICKNAME}, say something quickly. There's an awkward silence!

C: 哎，这要换作是我，太卜司的文件没有保存或者备份，我根本都不敢睡觉。
E: Well, if I were in his shoes and didn't save or back up any of the Divination Commission's files, I wouldn't even dare to sleep.

C: 铖杰，你没事儿吧？
E: Chengjie, are you okay?

C: 呜呜，我太怂了，我怎么是个这么窝囊的人。口口声声说为了老师的手稿、老师的梦想，我却只是坐在原地等你们帮我取回来……
E: Oh, I'm such a wimp. How can I be such a good-for-nothing? I keep saying I'm all about my master's manuscript and his dream, but all I did was sit here, waiting for you guys to do it for me.

C: 铖杰，别影响别人表演啊。
E: Chengjie, don't interrupt the performance.

C: 不对…是莱恩老师单方面对我太好了，我的水平实在称不上是「他的徒弟」。我缺乏天分、又爱偷闲，他却始终没有放弃我。
E: No... Master Ryan was always so nice to me, but my level was technically never good enough to be his apprentice — I lacked the talent and was too lazy, but he still never cast me aside.

C: 原来你师傅不是仙舟本地人啊？
E: So your master wasn't actually from Xianzhou?

C: 我俩听得一头雾水的，你能告诉我们你和你师傅之间的故事吗？
E: We're both confused here. Could you please tell us the story between you and Master Ryan?

C: 没有关系，请详细讲讲。
E: That's cool. Tell me all the details.

C: 我也好奇星槎是怎么制造的。
E: I'm curious too about how starskiffs are built.

C: 所以也有工造司的工匠专门负责研究培养液的配比，为的就是在萌芽阶段将船只打造得更轻盈、更耐用、也更安全。
E: So there are craftsmen from the Artisanship Commission who specialize in researching the ratio needed for the culture medium during the germination phase, so as to make the ship lighter, more durable, and safer.

C: 哎呀，我光顾着自言自语了…还是说回培养舱和星槎吧。
E: Oops, ha! I've been talking to myself again... Let's go back to the incubator and all those starskiffs, yeah?

C: 「坏掉」的前提是「它以前是好的」，但它也许从一开始就不是「好的」？
E: The term "broken" implies that it used to be working fine. What if it wasn't fine from the beginning?

C: 这样的话，你既可以询问他技术问题，也可不必公开老师的核心技术。
E: In that way, you can consult him without disclosing your master's core techniques.

C: 你们看着我燃起了斗志打算好好奋斗一番，到头来，我还是这样垂头丧气。
E: I was all motivated to do my best last time, but in the end, I still lost my fighting spirit.

C: 现在你终于肯来问我了，我倒要看看这是什～么～东～西～
E: Now, you're finally seeking my help. I can't wait to look at your masterpiece! Drumroll, please!

C: 莱恩老师也犯过错吧？
E: Master Ryan made mistakes before, right?

C: 对啊，要是莱恩老师还在，他就能告诉我他是怎么想的了。
E: Indeed. How I wish Master Ryan were still around. He would have been able to explain his design to me.

C: 自打建木重生后…太卜一直受命演算未来。这不，她让我这个司库整理呈报占算结果，又在文件上盖了「呈禀十王」的印戳。
E: Since the rebirth of Ambrosial Arbor, the master diviner has been ordered to perform divination. So, she asked me, a custodian, to compile and submit the divination results and stamp the reports with the "To the Ten Lords" seal.

C: 先把你们的请求，与来龙去脉讲清楚吧。
E: Now, please tell me what you need and the ins and outs of the matter.

C: 十王判官，在此敕令——莱恩•玛斯特隆佐，速速苏醒！
E: By the order of the Ten Lords, wake up now, Ryan Masteronzo!

C: 这份手稿是有问题的。
E: The manuscript is flawed.

C: …他们还真不知道累啊。
E: ...The crowd never gets tired, do they?

C: 唷，幸会，史瓦罗大佬！我叫卢卡，和希儿一样是「地火」的干部。
E: Hey! An honor to meet you, Boss Svarog! I'm Luka, a senior member of Wildfire, just like Seele.
—Hey!

C: …嗯。没什么理由，纯粹是直觉。
E: ...Yeah. I don't have a reason. It's just a feeling.

C: 可咱们跟了这一路…要是不打开看看，就白折腾一场了。
E: Then again, we followed him for ages... It'll be a waste if we don't see what's inside.

C: 费了这么多力，必须打开看看。
E: We've come this far — let's open it up.

C: 糟糕，露馅了……
E: Oh no, he caught us...

C: 唔…他这是要去哪…？
E: Ugh... where is he going...?

C: 这批货物压根就不是运往罗浮的，还是公司的专利科技，你们凭什么「检查」啊？
E: But this shipment isn't even meant for the Luofu! And it's IPC's patented technology. Who do you think you are to conduct an "inspection?"

C: 好、好、好！老朽今日能一次得见这么多青年俊彦，真是不枉此行。
E: Great, great! It's a real treat to see so many talented young people around here today.

C: 他确实不该说你「偷」。
E: He shouldn't have said you "stole" his sword.

C: 那么多年过去了，你始终做得很好。但对仙舟人来说，活得太久是一种诅咒。这意味着生命中犯下的每一次错误都在暗处虎视眈眈，终有一日追上你，吞没你。
E: So many years have passed, and you've done well. However, longevity for the Xianzhou people can be a curse. Living too long means that every mistake you made will lurk in the shadows, and one day, they'll eventually catch up to you.

C: 不必麻烦了。朱明的人一时半刻也不会离开罗浮，之后见面再讨要也不迟。
E: No need to bother. The Zhuming envoys won't be leaving the Luofu anytime soon. I'll ask for it later when we meet again.

C: 炎老，舟车劳顿，真是辛苦您了。
E: It's been a long journey, Elder Huaiyan. Thank you for your presence.

C: 不过这罗浮丹鼎司千疮百孔，早已到了积重难返的地步。我想要开一道「医治良方」，却不知两位有什么高见？
E: Honestly, the Alchemy Commission is riddled with problems and has reached a point where fixing it seems impossible. I'm looking to "remedy" this problem, but was wondering if you could provide any insights?

C: 彦卿对政务懂得不多，只知道药王秘传在丹鼎司中经营多年。灵砂小姐要想革除其影响，可与将军商议对策。
E: I may not know about politics, but I do know that the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been operating within the Alchemy Commission for years. If you're determined to root them out, maybe you should discuss it with the general.

C: 安心吧，妾身明白「人在其位，身不由己」的道理，绝不会对将军心怀什么怨恨的。毕竟，对我们这个年纪的成年人来说呢，所谓「私人恩怨」，已经是一件很奢侈的事情了。
E: Don't worry about it. I understand that when someone holds a position of power, they may sometimes have to make tough decisions. I won't hold any personal grudges against him. Besides, at our age, holding personal grudges is a luxury we can't afford.

C: 两位小朋友，打得不错啊。
E: Well fought, my young friends.

C: 嗯，那位将军的确了得…
E: Hmmm, that general is totally something else...

C: 怎么会，当然还有我。
E: No, no. I am, too.

C: 对建木灾异一事，老朽自始至终要做的只有旁听。真正要提出问题的，是飞霄将军。而我更关心的，则是演武仪典能否如期平安举行。
E: As for the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis, all I need to do is listen. General Feixiao will be the one asking the questions. To be honest, I'm more concerned about the timely start of the Wardance.

C: 彦卿一定会为罗浮守住演武仪典的擂台！
E: As the Luofu ringmaster, I won't let anyone defeat me in the Wardance!

C: 以我的出身，能一路走到今天，我很满足了。
E: Given my background, I'm happy to have made it this far.

C: 也不全是。至少，许多事情未必有你想的这么糟糕。你托我寻找的目标，已有了眉目。
E: Well, not everything. There might be a silver lining. By the way, I've found some clues about the thing you asked for.

C: 巨大的威灵丑面凶恶地瞪视着你，仿佛在警告你行止戒慎。
E: Towering spirits with gruesome appearances glare menacingly at you, as if warning you to proceed with caution.

C: 三月七朝你和丹恒挥了挥手，开始了她习剑之路的第一课……
E: March 7th waves to you and Dan Heng, embarking on the first lesson of her sword training journey...

C: 怎么样，师父们？这装扮还算合适吗？
E: So, what do you think, masters? Does this outfit suit me?

C: 最近这段日子，我因为某些机缘巧合，成了两位云骑剑士的弟子，跟随他们修习剑术。
E: As for me, I've somehow become the apprentice to two Cloud Knight swordmasters, and I've been honing my sword skills with their guidance.

C: 很好，今天就练到这儿吧。
E: Well done. Let's call it a day.

C: 彦卿还是更愿意将胜负放在剑锋之上，而不是…呃……
E: That may be so, but still I prefer settling things with a sword than... you know...

C: 姐姐，姐姐，咱们快走吧~
E: Big sis! Let's go! I want to play in Ever-Hunt Plains!

C: 可疑的云骑士卒
E: Suspicious Cloud Knight Soldier

C: 能再等等吗？
E: Maybe just one moment?

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Glad to meet you again, {NICKNAME}.

C: 公司似乎招惹了步离人…
E: Looks like the IPC has caught the attention of the borisin...

C: 从刚才开始，似乎有某种东西在干扰幽囚狱内的通讯。
E: Something seems to be jamming communications within The Shackling Prison.

C: 一刻之前，「断狱轮钥」的机关启动。想来是雪衣大人和曜青使节进入幽狱之底进行探视了。以眼下失联的情况来看，贼人的目标正是此处。
E: Just a short time ago, the Nether Key mechanism was activated. It was probably Madam Xueyi and the Yaoqing messengers, heading to the bottom of the prison. Given the situation, I'm afraid that area is exactly where our enemies are targeting.

C: （我必须…让这畜生留下…不管是为了飞霄，还是为了曜青……）
E: (I've got to... make this beast stay here... whether it's for the sake of Feixiao or the Yaoqing...)

C: 我的身份，我对仙舟的了解，还有，我知道许多战首的部下们不知道的事情。
E: My identity, my knowledge of the Xianzhou, and my understanding of many things that your minions have no knowledge of... They'll all be valuable.

C: 驭空，不必担心，飞霄一力承担起猎狼行动，对她的实力，你应该很清楚才是。
E: Don't worry, Yukong. Feixiao is leading the Wolf Hunt operation, and you know how capable she is.

C: 那恐怕由不得我——动筷子吧，我让你来这儿，是要看着你吃光它们。
E: Well, that's not up to me... Dig in. I called you here so you could enjoy the food.

C: 好，那我们这一路上慢慢说来。
E: Alright, let me tell you more about it as we go.

C: 长乐天
E: Exalting Sanctum

C: 你当然可以心存侥幸，以为靠自己的急智能摆脱眼下的状况。但记住，身处闹市，我们不只有你一个人质。你的任何异动，都会让无辜的人因你而死。
E: Of course, you can try your luck and believe that your wits will save you. But remember, you're not the only hostage in this city. If you try anything funny, innocent people will die because of you.

C: 迴星港
E: Stargazer Navalia

C: 最后是那个穿着工造司服色的匠人，煞有介事地对着装置看个不停。
E: Lastly, there's that craftsman wearing Artisanship Commission clothing. He's unusually focused on checking that device.

C: 哼，你可悲的脑袋里转动的念头，真是不出所料。
E: Hmph, the thoughts in your pathetic head are hardly surprising.

C: 战首大人，我们的狼群不在这里！我们不能贸然开战！
E: But Great Warhead, our packs are not here! We can't go to war like this!

C: 三月，师父退赛，这可是你出人头地的好机会啊。
E: March. Your master has dropped out of the contest. This is a great opportunity for you to stick your neck out!

C: 这就是竞锋舰吗？虽然执勤的时候在地面上看还是挺气派的……
E: So this is the Skysplitter? It looked quite impressive from the ground where I was on duty, but...

C: 观察对手使用的武器，判断他们擅长使用什么样的战术，又有哪些短板，这就是争取胜利的捷径。比如重量惊人的巨剑，显然不利久战，所以要选择拖延时间的战术。
E: Observing the weapon that your opponent uses, assessing what kind of battle skills they excel at and where their weaknesses lie is the key to victory in battle. A shockingly heavy sword like mine, for example, is obviously not suited for a long, drawn-out battle. So, it would be best to find a way to drag the battle out.

C: 报告将军，队伍已各就其位。天舶司对星槎航道的管制也全部完成。
E: General, report! The teams are in position, and the Sky-Faring Commission has taken control of the starskiff lanes.

C: 这才是那家伙的底牌。呼雷的体内潜藏着步离人之间世代传承的寿瘟祸迹。我亲眼看见他将一个狐人转变成了步离狼卒……
E: He has an ace up his sleeve. Hoolay's body holds a plaguemark passed down through generations of borisin. I've seen him convert a foxian to a borisin wolftrooper with my own eyes...

C: 步离人毫无反应。
E: There are no responses whatsoever from the borisin.

C: 「步离人的复兴」？
E: The borisin resurgence?

C: 我和三月七已经感受到了，来到竞锋舰上的云骑士兵们个个都是精锐。
E: March 7th and I could already tell. It's clear that every Cloud Knight soldier we've met on the Skysplitter is an elite warrior.

C: 走吧！
E: Let's go!

C: 治好了又如何？看你再次登上战场去送死？听我一句劝，孩子，你的身体状况，不适合再上战场。
E: And what if I can? Do I just sit back and watch as you head back out to die in battle? Listen to me, child, your condition is not suited for the battlefield.

C: 竟然派几个幼崽来送死…
E: I see Feixiao has sent some young cubs to the slaughter...

C: 你不该存在的。我亲眼看到你死了……
E: You shouldn't be here. I saw you die with my own eyes...

C: 救救我！
E: Help me!

C: 你的医士，椒丘，他如此忠诚地侍奉你，为了治愈你的月狂不惜一死。我告诉过他，解救之道在我手中。
E: Your healer, Jiaoqiu, served you with such loyalty. He was even willing to die in order to cure your Moon Rage. I told him before that the only way to save you lay in my hands.

C: 只要你点一点头，你将立刻从这场「赤月」带来的疯狂噩梦中醒来，你的身躯将焕然一新。从此，不再有疯狂困扰着你，怀疑只是心头随手拂去的尘埃，恐惧也将荡然无存。
E: If you just nod your head, you will awaken from this nightmare that the Crimson Moon has inflicted on you, and your body will be born anew. From that moment, you will no longer be trapped by your rage, your doubt will be swept from your mind like dust, and your fear will naturally disappear.

C: 我不会借口「一无所知」而轻易为自己宽宥往罪，也不会任由你们乘隙脱责。
E: I won't forgive myself for past sins under the pretext of "knowing nothing," nor will I allow you to evade accountability.

C: 我…我不想留在这儿。我不想再被人差来遣去！我不是任人摆布的娃娃！请你们带我走！
E: I... I don't want to stay here. I'm tired of being pushed around! I'm not some puppet to be controlled! Please, take me away with you!

C: 龙女大人，你没事吧。
E: Dragon Lady, are you alright?

C: 想必你心里已有了念头。说出来吧。
E: You must already have some ideas. Let them out.

C: 她要我相信年轻人的能力，放手任其施为。如此说来，卜测确实应验了。
E: She advised me to trust the younger generation's abilities and let them lead. Her predictions, it appears, have come true.

C: 镜流与那名异邦人，献出了什么策略？
E: And what was this grand strategy proposed by Jingliu and that traveler?

C: 禀告将军，天才俱乐部的阮•梅博士的舰船已经抵达港口，她希望求见您。
E: General, Dr. Ruan Mei from the Genius Society has docked and is requesting to see you.

C: …唉，陛下，您教训得对。这家伙其实相当有两把刷子，做过好几张爆款专辑，但就是沉迷玩乐，还没有时间观念……
E: ...*sigh* Your Majesty, you're right to admonish me. This fellow's still got some talent, having released several hit records. He's just obsessed with having fun and has no concept of time...

C: 看来这位埃夫姆沉迷于玩乐…那朕大概能猜到他去了哪里。随朕来吧。
E: It appears that this Ephraim is very much a fun-seeker... Then I can guess where he has gone. Come with me.

C: 以朕的身份地位，有个侍卫不过分吧？
E: I doubt it's uncommon for an Emperor to have a retainer, is it?

C: 这么随便吗？
E: Just like that?

C: 所以大家很拥戴蒂索克二世，只有她真心实意地从他人的立场出发，为个体的利益行动、为个体的利益忧愁。
E: That's why everyone supports Tizocic II. She's sincere, empathetic, and genuinely cares about others' interests, always putting herself in their shoes.

C: 再见，灰骑士。记得平时多做好事。
E: Goodbye, Gray Knight. Keep up with the good deeds.

C: 你还是个婴儿时我就看得出来，你和你爸、你哥、你姐一样，是个天生的禽兽！
E: I could tell when you were just a baby. You and your father, your elder brother and sister, you're all the same — all beasts of nature!

C: 灰骑士！你在哪里？灰骑士！
E: Gray Knight! Where are you? Gray Knight!

C: 「赎罪」是个伪命题。不管你再怎么行善，曾经犯下的恶及其后果都不可能被忘记。
E: Atonement is a fallacious concept in itself. No matter how much good you perform, your past evils and repercussions cannot be easily forgotten.

C: 没问题，和臣民交流感情也是皇帝的工作～
E: No problem. It's the Emperor's duty to communicate with her subjects.

C: 朕会将她留下的善意传递下去，至死方休。
E: I will continue her legacy of kindness till the day I die.

C: 我还以为你已经没气了。
E: I thought you were breathing your last.

C: …席位和地位又不是画等号的，想靠这个激我？没戏。
E: ...Our seats do not influence our statuses. You're not going to be able to rile me up with that.

C: ——那种武器曾经夺去无数人的家园和生命。
E: That weapon took millions of lives and destroyed countless homes.

C: 我已经确认过了，您的名字确实在「永久贵宾名单」上。欢迎您回到匹诺康尼，螺丝咕姆先生——请问有什么是我能为您效劳的吗？
E: Your name is indeed on the Permanent VIP List. Welcome back to Penacony, Mr. Screwllum! What can I do for you?

C: 卡尔德隆•查德威克博士——您能否安排我们见上一面？据我所知，他应该已经在匹诺康尼滞留了很长时间。
E: Dr. Calderon Chadwick. Could you arrange for us to meet? From what I know, he's been staying here for quite some time.

C: 你是说……
E: Do you mean...

C: …像是你能说出来的话。
E: ...It sounds like something you would say.

C: 曾几何时，在世界与世界互相隔绝的年代，某些文明已经拥有了足够毁灭自身的武器。
E: Once upon a time when there was no interaction between different worlds, some civilizations were already in possession of weapons powerful enough to destroy themselves.

C: 博士？
E: Doctor?

C: 不要。我见过钟表小子那套玩意儿…让别人钻进自己的脑子？太恶心了，我不要。
E: No. I've seen what Clockie does... Letting someone into your brain? That's disgusting. No.

C: 钟表把戏，强制启动！
E: Clockwork, forced activation!

C: 更何况…那孩子也不是自愿留在这片梦境中的，你就体谅一下吧。而且，他很可爱呀~
E: Furthermore... it's not like that child wants to be in this Dreamscape of his own accord, so please be more understanding. Also, isn't he super cute?

C: 虽然手法还比较稚嫩，但空间与结构都很稳定，你造出了一处非常优秀的「庇护所」。
E: The craftsmanship is amateur, but the space and structure are stable. You've made an outstanding shelter.

C: 孩子，你叫什么？
E: What's your name, child?

C: 折纸鸟不再说话，仿佛重新变回了玩偶。
E: The origami bird stopped speaking, as if it were a doll again.

C: 助人为乐，不客气。
E: I'm happy to help. You're welcome.

C: 不听话的湛蓝弟弟，终于找到了啾～
E: Naughty little Blues, we finally found you! Tweet!

C: （关于筑梦师的事情，或许还得找「家族」的人问问……）
E: (I'd better look for a Family member to ask about the Dreamweaver...)

C: （「奥尔拉」…这大概就是湛蓝爵士真正的名字。他受到两位筑梦师的邀请，加入了隐夜鸫家系。）
E: (Orla... That's probably Dr. Blues' real name. He was invited by the two Dreamweavers to join the Nightingale Family.)

C: 路边躺着一叠破损的《逐梦客时讯》，几条不同年代的报道夹杂其中。
E: A stack of torn Dreamchaser Bulletins is lying by the roadside, with reports from different times mixed in it.

C: 真离谱，这帮人就不能找个工作、自己掏钱买面包吗？
E: Outrageous. Can't these guys just find a job and pay for their own bread?

C: 至少在我看来，奥赫玛应当是包容的。哪怕我们不能拯救所有人，也应怀抱更多善意、给予他们足以活下去的资源……
E: How I see it at least, is that Okhema should be tolerant. Even if we can't save everyone, we should embrace kindness, and provide resources for others to live on...

C: 回头记得给我报销。
E: Don't forget to reimburse me then.

C: 哈哈，当然！等事情结束后，直接把账单交给帕拉滕就好，他最会算账了。
E: Haha, of course! When everything's over, just give the invoice to Palaten — he's the best at doing the accounts.

C: 是啊，今天我们可以做苹果馅饼了——虽然离烤苹果派还有些差距，但也不错。
E: Yes, honey. We can make apple tarts today... They're not baked apple pies, but they taste just as good.

C: 谢、谢谢{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。
E: Th—Thank you, kind {F#lady}{M#man}.

C: 一看就是干了坏事。
E: He must've done something bad.

C: 然而黑潮不会分辨城邦。在它眼里，我们都只是人，是弱小的存在。如今世上已经没有其他城邦了，那些我们熟知的名字早就消散在了风中。
E: But the black tide does not discriminate between cities. In its eyes, we are all humans, insignificant existences. In the present day, there are no other cities left, their names that which we are oh-so familiar scattered to the winds.

C: 圣城对弱者到底该是何态度？我们究竟要把这座永恒之城引向何方？以上，再次感谢伊特罗大人。
E: What stance exactly does the holy city take with the underprivileged? Where exactly are we leading this Eternal City? That's all. I thank Elder Etro again for this chance.

C: 保持中立。
E: Maintain neutrality.

C: 英雄有所不知，公民法庭判案时，确实会考虑到先例的影响。至少在这一点上，辩方代表的担忧不是无中生有。
E: Hero, you may not be aware, but it's important to note that when the public court rules on a case, precedent is considered. In this respect, the concerns raised by the defense are not entirely unfounded.

C: 你的发言逻辑严密。直到掌声响起，帕拉滕也没能给出一句反驳。
E: Your argument is logically sound. Until the applause erupts, Palaten is unable to provide any counterargument.

C: 那副踉跄的破碎身躯甚是狼狈，完全引不起胜者追击的欲望，所以你只是凝望着她的影子消逝在光芒一同消逝的境界线外……
E: Its staggering and broken form is so pathetic that you lose all urge to chase it down for a victorious counterattack. So, you simply watch as her shadow disappears into the border where the light vanishes altogether.

C: 当然可以，传递知识正是瑟希斯交由我们家族的使命！我知无不言！
E: Of course! Imparting knowledge is the very mission entrusted to my family by Cerces! I will share any knowledge I have!

C: 阿格莱雅女士——阿格莱雅女士！
E: Lady Aglaea! Lady Aglaea!

C: …贵客，看来我们的话题需要暂时中断在这里了。愿你们能早些找到想要知晓的事情，我先告辞了。
E: ...Dear customer, it seems that we must leave our conversation here for now. I hope that you find the answers you seek soon. I bid you farewell.

C: 但你先扪心自问一下，为了得到赞许而行使的善行，值得崇高道德的瞥视吗？
E: You can't help but stop to ask yourself... If something is done in order to receive praise, is it worthy of being looked at as highly moral?

C: 若是你为我带来的喧闹能将空虚填满，我也不厌沉入无底的杯中。
E: If the noise that you bring me can fill this void, I would not resist sinking into the bottomless cup.

C: 看吧，完好如初！咱就不要太计较了，让客人见了笑话可不好。
E: See? Good as new! Let us fight no more. We would not want to cause a scene in front of our guest.

C: 因为我？
E: My fault?

C: 恩人…我、我觉得俄诺涅说的没错。
E: Savior, I... I think Oenone is right.

C: 到底…在哪里呢……
E: Where... Could it be...

C: 但若让我以「理性」来评判，它既不神圣，也不贵重——
E: However, if you are to judge it through the eyes of Reason, it has neither divinity nor value...

C: 第二场的记忆
E: The Second Memory

C: 靠，不会要排队吧？
E: Ugh, don't tell me there's a queue.

C: 总之，她是个好人。要不是她提醒我早些回家，我的女儿就要被大火带去{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的国度了。
E: Anyway, she's a good person. If she didn't remind me to return home earlier, my daughter would have been summoned to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos'{RUBY_E#} kingdom by the fire.

C: 为了利益，他们甚至可以篡改{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神谕。
E: They would even distort {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} prophecies for their own gains.

C: 咕，暴露了。
E: Ugh, I've been exposed.

C: 那如果，她没能成功呢？我是说，帕西提亚只是个随处可见普通的孩子，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的目光怎么会垂怜这样一个女孩呢？
E: What if she doesn't succeed? What I'm saying is, Pasithea is just a normal child you can pick off the street. Why would the gaze of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} land on such a girl?

C: 还是一无所获？你这个圣女到底是干什么吃的？
E: Still nothing? What exactly are you good for as a Holy Maiden?

C: 反正，无论如何，你们都会用自己需要的说法去糊弄别人。既然如此，我这个圣女还有什么用呢？
E: No matter what, you will all say what you need to in order to mislead others. If that's the case, what use am I as the Holy Maiden?

C: 那些死难者的家属，你都记下来，报酬按双倍来算。这是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}恩赐给他们的。至于多出来的部分，都算在我的头上。
E: The relatives of the dead... note them down, and double their remunerations. This is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} blessing unto them. I will pay for the portion that exceeds the allotted compensation.

C: <size=28>礼赞命运，你终究还是成为了圣女。</size>
E: <size=28>Praise destiny, you still became the Holy Maiden.</size>

C: 天外之音…原来是这种感觉，明白了！
E: Echoes from beyond the sky... So this is how it feels. Got it!

C: 而且，童话的创作难度很高，你必须相信那些美好的事物存在——依我看，有时大人比孩子更需要童话。
E: Besides, writing fairy tales is quite challenging. You must believe in the existence of beautiful things to write about them. In my opinion, sometimes adults need fairy tales even more than children do.

C: 你不信我，还不信虎克老大吗？
E: If you don't believe me, will you at least believe Boss Hook?

C: （沉默）。
E: (keep silent)

C: 你会如何选择呢？好在这里是梦境，家具也会开口说话，不妨听听它们的建议吧。
E: What will you choose? Lucky for you, this is a dreamscape where furniture can talk. Why not hear what they have to say?

C: 感谢您提供的记忆，这是我的判断：它一定会大受欢迎。
E: Thank you for providing the memories. Here's my verdict: It's bound to be a huge hit.

C: 可惜，主题还是老套——不就是英雄打怪兽嘛，都看过一百遍了！
E: Too bad the plot is so cliché! It's just another story about heroes fighting monsters! We've seen that a hundred times already!

C: 它们对新生的翁法罗斯——姑且先这样称呼它——很关键。如果顺利，世界的演化能跳过无机生命阶段，向前迈进一大步。
E: They are crucial for the newborn Amphoreus. Well, let's call it that for now. If things go smoothly, the world's evolution can skip its inorganic life phase and take a big step forward.

C: 反正都是幻想，你就不能想象得更出格一些吗？
E: Since it's all make-believe anyway, couldn't you let your imagination run a little wilder?

C: 一个反抗命运的世界。
E: A world that defies destiny.

C: 听说你找我有事…
E: I heard you have something to tell me...

C: 这不叫个人生活。
E: That's not work-life balance.

C: 你平时都做些什么？
E: What do you usually get up to around here?

C: 书里不写着吗，你自己不会去搜？无非就是人类对话逻辑中的漏洞与规则，这么简单的东西，你不会不懂吧？
E: It's in the books, isn't it? Why don't you go look it up yourself? It's just the rules and logic in human conversations. Such simple concepts, surely even you understand, right?

C: 那你想成为什么样的人？
E: Then what kind of person do you want to become?

C: 至于现在的生活，完全没有任何继续下去的必要了。这种普通到令人腻味的生活，不要也罢。
E: As for my life now, I don't see the need to continue living it. It's so boring. I might as well discard it altogether.

C: 埃美丽这人还可以。
E: Emily's pretty alright.

C: 夸赞倒是不错，但是这也太突然了吧？有没有更适配聊天上下文的。
E: Flattery's a great idea, but isn't this too sudden? Got anything more suitable for a conversational scenario?

C: 这也太敷衍了吧，连我都能听得出来。
E: That's too sarcastic. Even I can tell.

C: 埃美丽好温柔！
E: Emily is so kind!

C: 我们的饭呢？别耽误我们搞研究哇！
E: Where's our food!? Don't waste our time! We need to do research!

C: 不过什么？
E: But what?

C: 你也在找幸运签吗？
E: Are you also looking for the fortune leaf?

C: 啊？就这？没啦？
E: Huh? That's it? Nothing more?

C: 你的研究初心变了！
E: You've lost the purpose behind your research!

C: 谢谢你啦，{NICKNAME}！
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}!

C: （金色和绿色还挺常见的，空间站里的<color=#dbc291ff>植物花卉</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>星穹列车</color>都对得上号……）
E: (Gold and green should be quite common. The <color=#dbc291ff>plants and flowers</color> in the space station and the <color=#dbc291ff>Astral Express</color> should be enough...)

C: 有话直说！
E: Just tell me!

C: 拍完了？让我看看……
E: Done? Let's have a look...

C: 不过莱姆士汀家的人是不会轻易气馁的。我迟早会交到「真心」的朋友，让拒我于门外的人后悔。
E: But we Limesteins are not quitters. Sooner or later, I will find a "true" friend, and those who rejected me will regret it.

C: 没错，年轻人。我，华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，想继续在这茫茫人海中寻找真心朋友。
E: Yes. I, Wallace Cambridge Limestein, wish to continue to seek true friends.

C: 我相信，只要继续把持莱姆士汀家真诚的待人之道，本人有朝一日必定能友遍天下。
E: I believe that I will one day make friends all over the world as long as I continue to treat people with sincerity like all the Limesteins.

C: 感谢你的帮助，年轻人。这是你的报酬——下次我再需要帮忙的时候，希望你还在。
E: Thank you for your help. This is the payment I promised. I hope you can still help me the next time I need your help.

C: 一个纸团孤零零地躺在地上，它为什么会在这儿？你弯腰将其拾起，内心却有个声音让你不要打开——你应该把它带回给阿丽娜。
E: A paper ball is lying on the ground. Why is it here? You bend down to pick it up. Your inner voice tells you not to open it — you should bring it back to Alina.

C: 我懂我懂，你想问的是，我怎么知道恶魔之胃里藏着好东西，是吧？
E: I know what you want to ask. How did I know there's some good stuff in the Devil's Stomach, right?

C: 又要玩捉迷藏吗？
E: Are we playing hide-and-seek again?

C: 什么叫鬼鬼祟祟！我可是负责给鼹鼠党出谋划策的干部，隐秘行动就是我的工作！
E: What do you mean by sneaking around! I'm the cadre in charge of making plans for The Moles. Covert operations are what I do.

C: 我就知道事情没这么简单…
E: I knew this whole thing wasn't how it looked...

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 听说最近又有一头「灰熊」自动机兵失控了，现在还在禁区里游荡破坏。现在人手短缺，我的部下只能暂时控制住它周边的区域，不敢妄自行动。
E: I heard that another automaton "Grizzly" has lost control recently, and is still roaming and wreaking havoc in the restricted zone. Now that there is a shortage of personnel, my subordinates can only maintain control in the surrounding area temporarily and they dare not act rashly.

C: 你确定不会后悔？
E: Are you sure you won't regret it?

C: 送礼？当然没问题！
E: Then you came to the right place!

C: 我们习惯了将「时间」比喻成流动的物体，将「空间」理解为不动的舞台…也许，一切是相反的…也许，流动的是「空间」，而「时间」则是可以被穿凿的磐石……
E: We're used to thinking of "time" as something that flows, and "space" as something static... But what if everything was the other way around? Perhaps it's "space" that moves, while "time" is the one that's set in stone...

C: 别担心，不是什么大事。
E: Don't worry about it. It's no big deal at all.

C: 不过…你确实蛮聪明的，下次再来挑战吧。…不不不，你还是别来了，怪麻烦的。
E: But... you really are quite smart. Let's give it another try next time. No... no no, actually don't come back. It's too much hassle.

C: 什么芝士劈叉？什么乱七八糟的？
E: "Real lies"? What are you harping on about?

C: 这…我怕这样会影响到流程的公正性。不过嘛……
E: I... I'm afraid this will impact the fairness of our process. However...

C: 小女子希望，你能去探访一下塔米拉小姐常去的店。偷偷问问店员，舞台之下的塔米拉小姐有什么喜好。
E: I would like you to visit the store where Tamila often goes and ask the staff in secret what Tamila's likes and hobbies are beyond the limelight.

C: 我没太懂…
E: I don't quite get it...

C: 嗯，先帮我打包三十束吧。
E: Mmm, please wrap up thirty bouquets for me.

C: 明白了，我这就去。
E: Understood. I'm heading over now.

C: 哈，我就知道！你小子就是想找地方看禁书！
E: Ha, I knew it! You're just trying to find a spot to read that banned book!

C: 呵呵…「正当权益会社」啊，真是个久违了的名字。
E: Hahaha... The Rightful Rights Society. I haven't heard that name for a long time.

C: 真的吗？！谢谢你！快让我看看……
E: Really!? Thank you so much! Let me see...

C: 哈哈，原来是这样。我说最近怎么找不到他人……
E: Hahaha, I see. I was wondering why I couldn't find him lately...

C: 啊…抱歉。我只顾着自怜自艾，都忘记向你道谢了。
E: Ah... I'm sorry. I was so engrossed in feeling sorry for myself that I forgot to thank you.

C: 哈哈，今天真是挺开心的，谢谢你。多亏了「正当权益会社」啊——能像现在这样忙里偷闲，真是非常宝贵的机会。
E: Haha, today has been fun. Thank you. The Rightful Rights Society is great — It's a precious chance to have a break like this.

C: 不过，你别看我这朽样，我当年也是和阿丽萨大人上过战场的人…没什么能吓倒我，放心吧。
E: I may look old and useless now, but I once fought on the battlefield with Madam Alisa... Nothing will faze me.

C: 留下一张灿烂的笑脸，这位乖巧懂事的孩子便散发黯淡的光芒，在裂界的街道中散去。
E: This nice and polite child puts on a bright smile as their figure radiates a dim light, then disappears from the streets constructed by the Fragmentum.

C: （看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: 但不能因此放弃调查，对吧？
E: But we cannot give up on our investigation because of that, can we?

C: 没错，我们还会再去海上搜索的。
E: You're right, we will continue our search at sea.

C: 还是把信交给阿浮吧。
E: I should hand the letter over to Fulie.

C: {NICKNAME}辛苦你了，我可得好好教训这放生帮不可。
E: Good work, {NICKNAME}. I will teach this Unshackled a good lesson.

C: 温润的液体入喉顺滑无比，带有几分暖意，你的嘴角不禁挂上几丝笑意，准备提前恭喜杜老板的新品研究又取得了重大进展。
E: The warm liquid goes down your throat smoothly, and its comforting warmth causes the corners of your lips to curl into a smile. You're about to congratulate Boss Du on his progress with his new recipe.

C: 砰咚、砰咚，你能感受到它在脉动，好像随着你的抚摸加快了速率。
E: You can feel its pulse beating, seemingly accelerating with your touch.

C: 「藏书所」
E: "Librarium"

C: 此处离天空很近，虽然看不到「晨昏之眼，艾格勒」，但你可以在这里俯瞰整个奥赫玛的风景。
E: This place is very close to the sky. You can't see Aquila, the Eye of Twilight, but you have a scenic view that overlooks Okhema.

C: 种质库
E: Gene Bank

C: 奥赫玛的种质库，记载着末世中灭绝的物种信息。等到这趟开拓之旅结束，或许可以令它们再度重现银河——你的朋友中一定有不少对此感兴趣。
E: Okhema's gene bank, archived with the information of organisms that went extinct during the apocalypse. When this trailblazing expedition ends, they may, perhaps, resurface across the Cosmos once more — many among your friends will be quite interested in that.

C: 冷风吹进你的领口，继续前进恐怕会有不好的事发生……
E: The cold wind slides down your collar — something bad might happen if you venture farther...

C: …还是算了。
E: ...I'll pass.

C: 矿场负责人称，袭击发生前曾收到匿名警告。目前，由于网络瘫痪，挖掘工作已暂停。
E: The head of the mining site reported receiving an anonymous warning prior to the attack. Currently, excavation has been halted due to a network outage.

C: 啊，神话中的伟丽天神啊，你竟已成如此模样！
E: Ah, the majestic divinity of legends past, look what you have become!

C: 云石天宫
E: Marmoreal Palace

C: 自那疯王的魂魄散逸，斗技的号角已长久沉寂。
E: The horn of martialism has not been sounded since the mad king's spirit scattered.

C: 靛石传送区
E: Indigo Steel teleportation zone

C: 爱与智慧，本是同一个生命；
E: Love and wisdom are but one life.

C: 可笑，悬锋人的字典里没有害怕二字。至于实力，你可以现在就试试……
E: Don't make me laugh. The Kremnoan dictionary does not contain the word "scared." As for a battle of strength, you are welcome to try me right now...

C: 于此「天谴之矛」神殿、尼卡多利淬炼神锋之处，我等将举行加冕仪式。
E: We will hold a coronation ceremony here, in the Lance of Fury's temple where Nikador tempered the divine blade.

C: 不伏鳞伤之躯，以铸坚韧之品格；
E: Unbending from wounds to flesh, forging characters of tenacity.

C: 你记住了「消失的探险家与藏在言语背后的诡计」
E: You remembered "The Missing Explorer and the Ruse Behind the Words"

C: 不知道它究竟是在守护树庭，还是在等待某个永远不会归来的人。
E: One wonders whether it guards the Grove or waits for someone who will never return.

C: 剑锋向处，誓言以血色浮现。
E: Where the blade points, a crimson oath is revealed.

C: 唉…信仰艾格勒的布利萨，是个微风和煦的城邦。
E: Ah... Bulsa that worships Aquila, the city of gentle breeze.

C: …果然。《一拳神王•艾格勒卷》？哼，换作以前，我见一本销毁一本。
E: ...Just as I expected. One Punch God: Aquila? Hmph, if this were the old days, I'd have burned this on sight.

C: 呼呼…也就是说，危急时刻就应该相信最有力量的人对吧？听上去很合理。
E: Phew... So, in times of crisis, we should trust the strongest person, right? Sounds reasonable.

C: 呼呼…上班还真不容易……
E: Phew... Being at work really isn't easy...

C: 寻求场外援助，并非是智慧的表现，要被老师扔粉笔头的吼！
E: Seeking outside help is no sign of wisdom — it's something that would get you scolded by the teacher, like a piece of chalk being thrown your way!

C: 解答这个难题的思路有两重：其一，作为擅长交际的公民，在谈话过程中要寻找合适时机夸赞对方，这是聊天的智慧吼！
E: There are two ways to approach this riddle: First, as a citizen skilled in socializing, one must know the perfect moment to compliment others during conversation — that's the true art of chatting!

C: 至于第二个原因…当然是本狮从小就很可爱吼！
E: As for the second reason... well, I have been adorable since childhood!

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>房间顶层的边缘</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>at the edges of the topmost room</color>...

C: 这么不情愿？
E: You sound reluctant.

C: 立刻起身离开。
E: Leave immediately.

C: 我们发现，数月前，嫌疑人买下了这物件，堂而皇之摆在城中，实在有些可疑，便组织了调查…结果不出所料。
E: We discovered that the suspect bought it months ago and displayed it openly in the city. Naturally, this raised our suspicions, and we began an investigation... And the result is as we expected.

C: 虽然那听上去很痛…但是，最后印在画壁中的我，一定展露着笑容。
E: It might sound painful... But in the end, I will surely be smiling even as a carving in the mural.

C: 记忆的残像似乎晃了晃，过往对话的回忆因其承载的情感之重杂糅在一起……
E: The fragment of memory seems to waver — memories of words once spoken blend together due to the emotion they contain...

C: 背叛的骗徒应当吞下焦炭和烈火。我本当如此。
E: The lying traitor should eat coal and fire. This I vow.

C: 感觉也没什么可试的了。
E: Welp, that about covers all the experiments.

C: 还是赶紧撤退吧。
E: Perhaps time to get out of here.

C: 一个属于小妖精的房间…或者说是洞穴更贴切？
E: A room fit for a fairy... or maybe burrow is a better word?

C: 据说将龙牙撒入土地中，便能长出龙骨士兵。这条长长的脊柱并非来自巨龙尸体，而更像是龙的血肉流向土地，滋生出的奇特造物。
E: They say if you plant a dragon's tooth in the earth, skeletal soldiers will rise. But this massive spine isn't from Netherwing — it's as if the land itself drank in dragon's blood and birthed something... else.

C: 昔涟…认识我？
E: Cyrene... knows me?

C: 你一眼就看出这些瓶瓶罐罐必定价值不菲，但也仅限于此。要是白厄或者赛飞儿也在就好了——在鉴宝这方面，两位可都是行家。
E: One look, and you can tell these bottles must be worth a fortune — but that's as far as your appraisal skills go. If only Phainon or Cipher were here. Those two are pros when it comes to treasure.

C: 小小灰和小小丹都是好人，一定不会责怪缇安的，嘿嘿。
E: Little Gray and Dannie are such good people — they definitely wouldn't blame us, hehe.

C: 不小心聊了这么久…走吧，学者恐怕已经等待我们很久了。
E: We've been chatting for far too long... Let's go, the scholar's been waiting for us already.

C: 那一刻，你变成一道光。
E: At that moment, you became a beam of light.

C: {NICKNAME}，你回来啦！
E: Oh good, you're here, {NICKNAME}!

C: 镜子对你的善意表示感谢，但问题是，它是什么时候出现的？你不记得列车上曾经有这么一面镜子。
E: The mirror is grateful for your kindness. But the question is... when did it appear? You don't remember there being such a mirror on the Express.

C: 那太好了——
E: Huh, perfect.

C: 流光忆庭？啥玩意。
E: Garden of Recollection? What is that?

C: 还不大适应…
E: I don't think I'm used to this...

C: 哎？我记得我向你解释过的吧？你还真健忘耶。
E: Huh? I thought I already told you about that. You really are forgetful.

C: 另外，你还需要再次调度禁区里的齿轮栈桥。
E: You'll also need to configure the gear bridge in the restricted zone once again.

C: 哔——啵。
E: Beep-boop.

C: 那、那个，奥列格兵长请我向您转达一件事。
E: W—Well, Captain Oleg asked me to pass on a message to you.

C: {NICKNAME}！能见到您真是太好了。奥、奥列格兵长对您大加赞赏，他说您不止有过人的胆识，还有绝顶的头脑……
E: {NICKNAME}, it's so great to see you again! Captain O—Oleg is full of praise for you, saying that you're incredibly brave with brains to match...

C: 以后一定。
E: Next time for sure.

C: （{NICKNAME}，接下来由你来指挥，带我从这里穿过去——一定要保证我不被怪物发现噢。）
E: ({NICKNAME}, you'll be in command to lead me across. You must promise me that we won't be spotted by the monsters.)

C: 开启同步模式。
E: Activate sync mode.

C: 有人吗？我好冷…好寂寞……
E: Anyone there? I'm so cold... So lonely...

C: （还是等我找小姐复命了再说吧，而且舱段封锁和修复也需要时间。）
E: (Let's wait until I report to Miss Asta. Also, the locking and repairing of the zone will take some time.)

C: 真是的，累了的话，就去休息呀。快去快去，我会来浴宫检查的哦。
E: Seriously, get some rest if you're feeling tired. Off you go — I'll swing by the bath chamber to check on you later.

C: 要人家说，一定是因为两人各有所长。力量、体质、军略，是迈德漠斯更胜一筹，但白厄更全面均衡，更重视技巧，而且——运气也很好！
E: If you ask me, it must be because they have different strengths. Power, endurance, strategy — that's where Mydeimos excels. But Phainon is more balanced and well-rounded, more focused on technique, and — he's also really lucky!

C: 什么都知道，不会无话可说吗？
E: What is there for us to talk about if I already know everything?

C: 嘻嘻，下次别自己说，想要夸夸，就暗示一下，人家马上接话！
E: Hehe, if you want praise, there's no need to do it yourself — next time, just drop me a hint, and I'll take it from there!

C: 不会听腻吗？
E: Won't the stories ever get old?

C: …哎呀，现在不许笑！快回答人家的问题。
E: ...Hey, now's not the time to laugh! Answer me!

C: 哎呀！{NICKNAME}的睫毛在颤抖哦？是那种心里在想事情的表情！
E: Oh! {NICKNAME}'s eyelashes are fluttering! That's the look of someone lost in thought!

C: 迷迷，迷迷迷！
E: Memem, mememem!

C: 如果有人问起我们，该怎么讲述她的故事呢？
E: If someone were to ask about us, how should we tell her story?

C: 嘻嘻！想看到人家惊讶的样子吗？{NICKNAME}等了人家一千年，人家只会很开心呀！
E: Hehe! Want to see my surprised face? {NICKNAME} waited for me for a thousand years, so I'm just really happy!

C: 对呀，不知不觉，在这个故事里，{NICKNAME}也写下了自己的名字呢。
E: Yep! You had written your name into this story before I knew it, {NICKNAME}.

C: 大鸟鸟，视力好！
E: I'm a bird with perfect eyesight!

C: …怎么进去呢？
E: ...How are we supposed to go in?

C: 我近来坐卧难安，需要用穷观阵算算，安自己的心。
E: I've been feeling restless lately, and want to use the Matrix of Prescience to run some predictions and set my mind at ease.

C: 上次只是入门级别的测试，这次的棋局可非同一般。
E: The last one was only a beginner's test. This game will be much harder.

C: 这不是挺简单的吗？
E: Isn't it still kind of easy?

C: 那就开始了。
E: Then let's go.

C: 哎呦，盼星星盼月亮，总算把您给盼来了。那你看，咱们什么时候开始？
E: You're finally here! Oh, you don't know how long I've been waiting for this! So, when shall we start?

C: 贵客，是你啊，谢谢你救了我。作为交换，有个秘密你要不要听？滴答！我和三个好朋友支撑起了空艇的半边天。你要是能把我们四个都修好，那你将见到剩下的那「半边天」。
E: Ah, it's you, our esteemed guest! Thank you for saving me! As a token of my gratitude, would you like to hear a secret? Tick-tock! My three buddies and I make half the contribution that keeps this airship running. If you can repair all four of us, you'll meet the one who contributes the other half.

C: 所以，就像您看到的一样，我也被抓起来了…不过你放心，那个架设私服的判得更重！十王司对私服绝不姑息！
E: In the end, as you can see, I was apprehended too... But don't worry, that private server people were punished even harder! The Ten-Lords Commission will never tolerate private servers!

C: 你见过许多出故障的迷钟。对，我们是有些不对劲，被古怪的积木影响了心智。但我们同样拥有自主意识，在无止境的梦中活着，并不断适应。
E: You have met many malfunctioning Tickers in your time. Indeed, we may be a little off, our minds have been affected by strange building blocks. But, we still have our own consciousness. We live inside the endless dream and constantly adapt.

C: 于纷争世，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}因意外失去了神体。{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}无法接受爱人负伤的事实，便搜集瑟希斯四散的身躯，意图用丝线将其收拢、令它回归。
E: In the Era Bellica, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} accidentally lost their divine form. {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}, unable to accept the fact that their lover was injured, collected Cerces' scattered bodies, intending to weave them together with threads to bring the other Titan back.

C: 你只需要把见到的若虫带回来，剩下的交给我就好，贵客。
E: All you need to do is bring back any nymphs you encounter, and I'll handle the rest, distinguished guest.

C: 能复述下预言的内容吗？
E: Can you repeat the prophecy?

C: 嗯…有位织者迎难而上，逆风飞翔。金丝带来消息，它正在挑战<color=#dbc291ff>热水池上空的蒸汽</color>。请让它暂歇兴致吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who rises to the occasion and flies against the wind. The golden thread brings tidings: They now challenge <color=#dbc291ff>the steam above the hot pool</color>. Please ask them to take a break.

C: 嗯…有位织者对尼卡多利甚是崇拜。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>中央雕像的剑柄上</color>耀武扬威呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who admires Nikador. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>at the hilt of the sword on the central statue</color> in a display of strength.

C: 桀桀，看到街角的裁缝铺了吧？那间铺子里摆着个古董花瓶，只可惜人来人往，不好下手。
E: Hehe, you see the tailor's shop on the corner? There's an antique vase in there. Unfortunately, the foot traffic is high in there, and it's tough to get a moment to strike.

C: 从来只有我取笑别人，还没人敢拿我取乐——桀桀，准备付出代价吧！
E: I'm the one that makes fun of others. No one has ever done it to me before... Hehe, you will pay for this!

C: 本以为在这么曲里拐弯的地方，除了那个人之外没人能抓住我……
E: I thought they were the only person who would be able to catch me in a place so full of twists and turns...

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: （笑而不语）
E: (Smile silently)

C: 怎么，终于不惦记我的宝箱了？
E: Oh? Not interested in my treasure chest anymore?

C: 从前，巴特鲁斯听说这个故事的时候，也想剪一缕自己的头发试试，看看能种出什么。你猜怎么着？
E: I once thought of trying the same — cutting my hair to see what would grow. But guess what?

C: 奉陪到底！
E: I'm with you till the end!

C: 喂，老伙计——我们打一架吧，互相确认一下彼此是不是真实的存在！
E: Hey, old buddy — let's fight to verify our existence!

C: 现在站稳不就好了。
E: You seem stable enough already.

C: 言归正传，我之所以要把刚才那只吞掉，不过是回收一些数据罢了。也不知应该高兴还是悲伤…越是接近再创世，那种野生的愚蠢数据就越是泛滥。要是你再看到它们……
E: To be frank, I only absorbed that one to recover data. I'm torn between joy and sorrow... as Era Nova approaches, these wild, stupid data fragments multiply. If you see more of them...

C: 那老巴特鲁斯长得这么像葡萄，怎么就没人想着踩踩老巴特鲁斯呢？
E: Then why's no one ever tried stomping on old Bartholos? I mean, look at me. I'm basically a walking grape here!

C: 得了吧，我早就玩腻了。
E: Oh please. I've been bored of this for ages.

C: 怎么感觉像打劫似的…
E: I feel like I'm being robbed...

C: ——怎么样，还是像上次那样找个僻静之处，我跟你好好说道说道？
E: Well? What do you say? Should we go somewhere quiet like last time so I can tell you what I think?

C: 每当学生的研究陷入瓶颈的时候，我都会这么宽慰他们。
E: That's how I tell my students whenever they hit a roadblock in their research.

C: 做得好，辅祭，这是你值得纪念的第一个委托，来看看拓写出的结果吧。
E: Well done, acolyte. This is your first request, a notable occasion. Let's see the transcription.

C: 某种哲学理论？
E: A philosophical theory?

C: 辅祭…能麻烦你把这石板交给那孩子吗？我在这等你。
E: Acolyte... Could you deliver this slate to the child? I'll wait here for you.

C: …布？心？我知道了！是上衣口袋里面，妈妈给我做的护身符！妈妈的灵魂就在里面吗？
E: A cloth? A heart? I understand now! It's the amulet in my jacket pocket — the one Mom made for me! Is my mom's soul inside?

C: 你回来了…结果如何？
E: You're back... How did it go?

C: 我用球棒帮你加深理解。
E: Let me help you understand with my bat.

C: 哗啦，这种洁净的感觉，真让虫心旷神怡——
E: *whoosh* This clean feeling—it's so refreshing for a bug—

C: 他以这种方式为自己写下了最后的结局。
E: This is how he chose to write his final chapter.

C: 「通过试炼，则证明你的力量已动摇了天秤。」声音说，「诸界因此改变，从而…均衡；你将面对更强的敌手，更难的谜题，以及…更丰厚的报偿。」
E: "Passing the trial will prove that your strength has shaken the scales of power." The voice said, "Worlds will change, and thus... equilibrium. You will encounter stronger enemies, harder puzzles, and... greater rewards."

C: …我听说过「不朽的龙」和其子裔的故事。许多神话故事都称颂祂拥有完满不朽的生命。
E: ...I've heard the story of Long the Permanence and THEIR descendants. Many myths and legends praise the Aeon for a rich and immortal life.

C: …神奇。
E: ...Curious.

C: 当然！为了你的安全，我要确保你见到的景色是熟悉可控的。我可不想你被一台虚拟设备弄到发疯！
E: Of course! For your safety, I want to ensure that everything you see is manageable. I don't want you to lose your mind in the simulation!

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 我没想到阿哈会出现…看来得启用正式版本了。我们得花点时间升级，测试服先废弃了。
E: I never thought Aha would show up... Looks like I'll have to deploy the official version. We have to spend some time on upgrading, the test version will be abandoned.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「斯蒂芬•劳艾德提了一堆把『模拟宇宙』做有趣的点子，对于钓星神这件事毫无帮助，不过也许能让你玩得更开心点。」</color>黑塔叹气，<color=#dbc291ff>「就这样吧，我也得想想有没有更方便的觐见星神的法子。升级完成后我会通知你的。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Stephen Lloyd has come up with a bunch of different ideas for making the Simulated Universe more fun. It won't help us attract more Aeons, but it might just make you have more fun."</color> Herta sighs. <color=#dbc291ff>"That's it then. I have to think whether there's an easier way to have an audience with an Aeon. I'll buzz you once the upgrade's complete."</color>

C: 等等，我还有问题。
E: Hang on. I still have questions.

C: 喔，没事，更新用不了几秒钟。斯蒂芬特别热情，内容早就做好了。
E: Oh, that's alright. The update only takes a few seconds. Stephen is particularly enthusiastic, and the content's all ready to go.

C: 「欢愉」是个很奇怪的星神，祂混乱又清醒，同时不像别的星神那样固执。阿哈不会停留在单一的概念里，或许祂看破了「模拟宇宙」的本质。
E: Elation is a very strange Aeon. THEY are both confused and clear-minded, and not as stubborn as the other Aeons. Aha won't stay confined to a single concept. THEY may have seen right through the nature of the Simulated Universe.

C: 新的版本嘛，变化还挺多的，要我给你个更新清单吗？
E: The new version has lots of changes. Do you want me to give you the patch notes?

C: 结束。
E: Finish.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「很有用的纪念品。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Some truly useful souvenirs."</color>

C: 「这会儿没有纳努克。」黑塔不是很快乐，「那我们还走毁灭命途干嘛，就为了狠狠打碎那些可破坏物？——都寰宇蝗灾了，还惦记你那可破坏物呢？」
E: "If there's no Nanook in this time period," Herta sounds upset as she continues, "then why are we still taking the Path of Destruction? Just to break those destructible objects? Swarm Disaster is going on! There's no time for those destructible objects of yours!"

C: 「就这么暂停了？{NICKNAME}…螺丝咕姆为了你的安危把模拟宇宙暂停了。可惜，也不知这会阿哈有没有炸掉阿基维利的车。」黑塔不是很开心，「祂刚刚说的把戏是怎么回事？我们得检查下系统有没有受到影响，螺丝。」
E: "It paused just like that? {NICKNAME}... Screwllum has paused the Simulated Universe for your safety. It's a shame that we have no means to find out whether Aha has blown up Akivili's train at this time." Herta sounds disappointed. "What about the trick Aha mentioned? We need to check whether the system is affected, Screwy."

C: 他对你表示感谢，微笑，接着对你破口大骂！
E: He thanks you, smiles at you, and then lets out a torrent of furious curses!

C: 「你让模拟宇宙的模拟英雄把他和他的『小笼包』一起打包带回来不行么？」黑塔说，「诺巴蒂III型会背负前人的使命活着！」
E: "Why didn't you just ask your superheroes bring him and his Xiaolongbao back together?" Herta asks. "But don't worry, for Norbati III will carry the will of his predecessors on his shoulders and live on!"

C: 就在此时，酒杯中突然漾起混沌不清的波纹，愚者们对着那图案争吵了三日三夜，最终认为这是阿哈的启示：<color=#dbc291ff>别喝了，去帮助众神！</color>
E: At that moment, a blurred ripple appeared in the goblet. After three days of intense debate about its significance, the Masked Fools finally reached a consensus that it was a divine revelation from Aha. <color=#dbc291ff>"Stop drinking, and go assist Aeons!"</color>

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 帝皇复苏的那一刻，曾被它推导、并植入无机生命体内的反有机方程即刻启动；没有理由，没有妥协。无人有权发问：为什么？为什么它的苏醒换来的是更多的永眠，为什么它如此*神圣*，却要通过灭绝来改变世界？它经历过什么——它和有机生命一样思索过吗？
E: The moment the Emperor awakens, the inorganic lives implanted with the Anti-Organic Equation will be activated. There is no reason, and no compromise. No one has the right to ask: Why? Why does its awakening bring more eternal sleep? Why is he so *sacred*, yet wants to change the world through destruction? What has it been through? Has it ever pondered, just as organic life does?

C: 「但公司运作也加剧了星际贫富分化，矛盾日积月累，直到两位高层特劳拉•法恩莎与柯拉帕乌引爆了『边星贸易战争』。这是博识尊计算中的第一个时刻。」
E: "Nevertheless, the operation of IPC exacerbated the economic inequality in the universe. Conflicts built up over time, leading to the outbreak of the Borderstar Trade War by two IPC executives, Telora Farnsha and Korapao. That is the first moment calculated by Nous."

C: 极致有机：「血色吊唁」•其一
E: Supreme Organic: Sanguine Condolences (I)

C: 「嗯…智械。你来自鲁珀特帝国！」安达吐尔•扎扎罗突然感觉十分自豪，「你会变成强大的战士。没错，你有<color=#dbc291ff>科技</color>。你蕴含无穷的潜力，请坚信这一点！」
E: "Hmm... An Intellitron. You're from the Empire of Rubert!" Andatur Zazzalo is overcome with a sudden sense of pride. "You'll be a strong warrior, as you have <color=#dbc291ff>technology</color>. Please believe that you contain unlimited potential!"

C: 「哦！你得出了正确结论！」安达吐尔•扎扎罗突然跳了起来，「无机生命只有『判断』，没有『相信』！一位合格的无机生命！你不需要被定义！期待你的自我认知发展，旅途愉快啊！」
E: "Oh! That's the right conclusion!" Andatur Zazzalo suddenly jumps and explains, "An inorganic life only evaluates, yet trusts nothing! As a qualified inorganic life, you don't have to be defined! I look forward to seeing your development of Intra-Cognition. Have a great trip!"

C: 他是你的同伴吗？你不知道谁能对抗「智识」的计算…或许「神秘」可以，或许「记忆」可以，但你不知道。
E: Is he your companion? You contemplate who can counter the calculation of the Erudition... It can be the Enigmata or the Remembrance, but you can't be sure.

C: 你并不打算放弃什么，建筑承载了人们幸福的回忆，而你势必会让它们在计划中重现。记录、言语与设计慢慢吻合，来自天南地北的舰船和救援队也陆续抵达你的身边。比过往更高的高楼耸立，屋檐下再也不会有人流离失所，地上的空洞被填补，不安终于离开了饱经磨难的双眼。
E: You don't plan on giving anything up. Architecture can carry people's happy memories with it, and you are bound to see them recreated in your plan. Your records, words, and designs are all slowly coming together, and starships from all over the galaxy trickle through to you alongside rescue teams. The lofty towers soar higher than before, beneath which gables shall never see the scourge of homelessness. The potholes have all been filled, and a sense of apprehensiveness finally departs from those tormented eyes.

C: 砂石间偶有花朵生长，它们在烈日下休眠，在雨落时发芽。望着这些小花，你终于找到了想要留给人间的礼物。
E: The occasional flowers grow out from among the gravel. They lie dormant beneath the hot sun and sprout shoots once the rain falls. Looking at these little flowers, you finally discover the gift that you want to leave behind for the mortal world.

C: 第三件报酬是红宝石的天平，来自塔拉克联邦的总统。八个星域的叛乱令他焦头烂额，暴民们甚至不惜投身毁灭的熔炉，只为向这个呼吸权都要购买的独裁者复仇。如何夺回自己的土地？他问道。
E: The third reward is a set of ruby scales from the president of the Taraka Federation. Rebellion across eight star segmenta had placed him in a bind. The rebels were even going so far as to hurl themselves into the Forge of Destruction just to take revenge against this dictator who requires payment even for the right to breathe. He asked: How can I take back my own land?

C: 你修改成员脑内的电刺激强度，调整外部思考器官的检索路径，可这些在更庞大的流向前都显得杯水车薪。
E: You modify the intensity of the electrical stimulation to the members' brains and alter the retrieval paths of their external thinking organs, but this is a drop in the ocean in the face of the even greater flow before you.

C: 答错了，很遗憾你不是人，但你的存储能力远强于人，你可以记录这颗星球上所有的图文资料。
E: Incorrect. Unfortunately, you are not a person. However, your storage capacity far exceeds that of a person. You can record all graphical and literary materials on this planet.

C: 待推演。
E: Further information needed.

C: 「有可能！如果命途之力与个体记忆相绑定，那么『流光忆庭』将是成功的窗口……」
E: "That could be it! If a Path power is bound to an individual's memory, then the Garden of Recollection is our window to success..."

C: 「很遗憾，我没有机会觐见那些伟大的存在。正如我在第一节课说的，只有极少数人有幸得到星神的瞥视。」
E: "Unfortunately, I have not had the chance to meet with one of these great beings myself. As I said in my first class, only an extremely small number of people will be fortunate enough to see an Aeon."

C: 「而联觉信标就像一个在你耳边低语的恶魔，它把所有声音收束，只允许一种音色存在，美其名曰『知识』。更可怕的是，我们甚至无法甄别音色中有多少人为干预的「杂音」。」
E: "But the Synesthesia Beacon is like a devil that whispers in your ear, silencing all of these sounds and allowing for only one tone that we glorify as 'knowledge.' What's more terrifying is that we cannot discern how much 'static' of human interference exists between these tones."

C: 信件石沉大海，你在无意义的等待中接受了结果，也接受了这个彻底唯心的世界。连一只蚂蚁对宇宙的认识，都比这群蠢货客观。
E: Your letter is like a drop in the ocean. As you wait in vain, you come to terms with the obvious result. You also come to accept that this world is entirely too idealistic. Even an ant has a more objective view of reality than this army of fools.

C: 「先把那奇怪的信号给弄清楚再说吧。」帕提维娅的回答中未掺杂犹豫。
E: "I'll figure out the weird signal first, then we'll see." There is hesitation within Patavia's response.

C: 莫利特学士的目光扫向死寂的同步指数，内心绝望如一只闯入星舰的猿猴。
E: Scholar Mollett's gaze sweeps over the lifeless sync index, his heart's despair akin to an ape that barged into a starship.

C: 它们是无核的神经元，不具备思考的机能。
E: They are coreless neurons, devoid of the function of thought.

C: 无智慧的细胞，死亡的同义词，将成千上万的世界碾碎在熵值里的帝皇之枪。
E: Cells without sentience, synonyms of death... The Emperor's spear that crushes thousands upon thousands of worlds in entropy.

C: 「写下黑塔序列的最后一行时，我曾短暂看到过另一个世界。它是如此简洁，就连觐见博识尊的感觉也比不上那种精妙。但…」天才凝望身下来来往往的学士，目光停留在更远的地方——
E: "When I wrote down the last line of Herta's sequence, I momentarily saw another world. It was so utterly simple, and even the feeling of meeting Nous pales in comparison to its intricacy. But..." The genius gazes down at the bustling scholars below, her eyes lingering at a place even farther away...

C: 以外部时间看，帕提维娅迟疑了数秒左右。然后，她放弃了以「权杖」自我加冕，选择将目光向上迁移，看向<color=#dbc291ff>「智识」的尽头</color>。
E: Patavia only hesitates for a few seconds in terms of external time. Then, she gives up on crowning herself with the Scepters and decides to move her gaze upwards, fixing on the <color=#dbc291ff>end of the Erudition</color> above.

C: 你们想研究「权杖」？
E: You lot wish to research the Scepters?

C: 你尝试重新接入「权杖」系统，但一无所获。
E: You attempt to reconnect to the Scepter system, to no avail.

C: 疼痛，只要不睁开眼，就一定是错觉。你继续描摹世界，能让所有人都幸福生活下去的，真实的世界。
E: If you close your eyes, all pain is no more than an illusion. You continue to picture your world, the real world in which everyone can live happily ever after.

C: #27鲁珀特，俱乐部里我最感兴趣的家伙之一。它自号帝皇，掀起了寰宇皆知的机械帝国危机——「第一次帝皇战争」。
E: For me, #27 Rubert is one of the most intriguing members in the Society. It proclaimed itself to be an emperor and started a crisis in the Machine Empire known throughout the universe — The First Emperor's War.

C: 你又来到了富丽堂皇的图书馆。你抬头看去，可以看到众多星系，它们如银河污泥般被搅成胶状，缓慢流动。
E: Once again, you arrive at the opulent library. You look up and see a multitude of star systems. Like cosmic sludge that has been stirred into jelly, they swirl around slowly in the sky.

C: 「我们被誉为『琥珀王后援队』，*塔拉梵•基恩*制造我们、使用我们，并最终放弃了我们。」机器人向你展示它用尽力气保存的物品。
E: "We were hailed as the Amber Lord's Support Team. Taravan Keane created us, used us, and ultimately abandoned us." The robot shows you the items it is trying its best to keep safe.

C: 或者，更伟大一点，西格玛圣女的不插电伴奏，那位永恒的「圣女」是拥有黄金比例的男性，世人都铭记他托举太阳的虬曲姿态。
E: Or, to be more mighty, the Sigma Maiden's unplugged accompaniment. That eternal "Maiden" is a man whose figure contains the Golden Ratio. His coiled posture when lifting the Sun is forever etched in the memory of the entire world.

C: 你吃到了一块开拓者留下的金币。这块金币一分为二，接着二分为四，不停分裂、增殖……你拥有了意外的财富。
E: You have eaten a Gold Coin left behind by a Trailblazer. The Gold Coin splits into two, then into four. It constantly divides and proliferates... giving you a surprising windfall.

C: 你闻到一股并不冷峻的糕点香氛——你的目光落至面前的一盏芸豆糕点，上缀有惊惶鹿花朵。
E: You catch a whiff of the aroma of warm pastries. Your eyes fall on a bean pastry adorned with Startled Deer petals.

C: 「我的存在即是虚无…我没有权限终止黑匣。我尝试翻越防护，仅做到将自灭火种传至黑匣外。希望你接收它，贯彻我的信念。」
E: "My existence is Nihility... I do not have the authority to terminate the black box. I've tried to get out of the defensive walls, but I've only managed to send the self-extinguishing kindling outside the black box. I hope you can take it and see my belief through."

C: 你得到了一杯鸡尾酒！你「咕嘟咕嘟」地喝了下去……
E: You receive a glass of cocktail! You gulp it down...

C: 他被你拒绝，立刻面露忧愁，看来他的内心十分敏感——但这并没有影响到他的狂热！
E: He looks upset when you turn him down. He seems to be a very sensitive person, but that does not dampen his fervor!

C: 你不慎一脚踏入高科技流线的悬空矩阵中——你相信这是斯诺星最*新式作风*的猎人才会使用的陷阱。
E: You accidentally step into a high-tech, streamlined suspended matrix — a trap you believe to be used only by the most cutting-edge hunter on the Planet Snowland.

C: 你的博弈成功了！
E: You make the right choice!

C: 「没错。实验成功后，善的我占据了身体的主导权。」他大笑着，「通过这样『癫狂』的求知，可以打开通往更自由、更高阶意识的状态！」
E: "That's right. After the experiment succeeded, my good self took over my body." He guffaws, "Through such a deranged pursuit of knowledge, we can reach a more liberated and higher-dimensional consciousness!"

C: 你意识到自己这次上当了！你一无所获。
E: You realize you have been duped! You gain nothing.

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 在空无一物的房间正中间，摆放着一个巨大的红色按钮，没有任何说明，也没有任何保护，仅是孤零零地立在中央的机械装置上。
E: In the center of the empty room is a giant, red button. There is no explanation or protection. It stands alone atop a mechanical device in the center of the room.

C: 富贵险中求，你囫囵吞下菠萝，口中泛起阵阵苦涩。
E: One doesn't get rich without taking risks! As you swallow the pineapple, a bitterness runs over your tongue.

C: 冉比希三世尊重你的选择，他佯装悲戚地呼唤来克隆桶亲信，嘱咐他们，留给你一个「体面」的结局。
E: Rumbas the Third respects your choice. He fakes his sadness as he summons his cloned trash kin, instructing them to give you a "dignified" end.

C: 你奄奄一息地走进阿莉达星的宾馆，不知道为什么，这里的居民在做事时，个个都显得慢条斯理又心不在焉。
E: You enter a hotel on the Alda Star System on the brink of death. You have no idea why, but it seems that all of the residents here seem extremely slow and absent-minded with everything they do.

C: 「嘿！我在哪？为什么有这么多人在我的脑子里吵架？」在发出疑问的同时，一股深深的愤懑浮现在你的脑海，想要破坏，想要把一切都撕裂。
E: "Hey! Where am I? Why are there so many people arguing inside my head?" As you put forth your inquiries, a wave of deep rage surfaces in your cognition, desiring destruction and the ruination of everything.

C: 「瞧，这些分裂的思维单位，就是它开始思考的证明。」学士向众人展示眼前的电子培养皿。
E: "Look. These fissured thought units are the proof that it has begun to think." The scholar displays the digital incubator before them to the crowd.

C: 在悬锋人的歌谣里，不过是天空的百眼巨鸟心生畏惧，藏身在云端，才令尼卡多利不得不追逐太阳，昼夜不息。
E: The Kremnoans sing that only the fear of the hundred-eyed giant bird, cowering in the clouds, caused Nikador to pursue the Sun endlessly, day and night.

C: 聆听一则警世的睡前故事，关于傲慢与荒诞的寓言。
E: Listen to a Lullaby to Warn the World — a fable of arrogance and absurdity.

C: 当国王在宴会上拉开幕布，将精心准备的礼物赠予爱人，她却在画布上看到了自己的笑容。
E: At a grand banquet, the king unveiled a carefully prepared gift for his lover. The queen was greeted by her own smile painted upon the canvas.

C: 愿真诚永不破败。
E: May sincerity never falter.

C: 蝴蝶的翅膀残破。
E: The wings of the butterfly are torn.

C: 可高贵的墨涅塔仍尝试振翅，它希冀一种优雅的死因，将灼热的火种传递到谁人的手里。
E: Yet, the noble Mnestia still tries to flap their wings, seeking an elegant demise, passing the fiery Coreflame to another.

C: 雅努斯亦会愤怒。
E: Janus too can rage.
