C: 山羊学派的评委应该会对这个成果感兴趣，但是标题似乎不太行，奇美拉有「产后」这个说法么？
E: The Caprism reviewer might find this particular outcome intriguing... but the title? A bit questionable. Do chimeras even have postnatal physiology?

C: 然而过量的人口已经占满了大地的各个角落，竭泽而渔的索取方式也令生态不堪重负，无数人因饥饿而相互争斗，无数骇人听闻的惨剧每天都在发生。
E: However, the excessive population had already filled every corner of the land. The exploitative way of taking from nature had overwhelmed the ecosystem, and countless people fought each other out of hunger. Terrifying tragedies occurred every day.

C: 然而人子为了存活于世，光是麦子也并不足够。他们仍需要橄榄、土豆和洋葱，还有那曾漫山遍野为他们生长的甜美果实。
E: Yet for humanity to survive in the world, wheat alone was insufficient. They still needed olives, potatoes, and onions, as well as the sweet fruits that once grew abundantly across the hills and valleys.

C: 艾格勒在翁法罗斯的边界建立起它的神国。它翅膀上短的羽毛，化作天上的霞光和火焰；那些长的羽毛，则被它制作成雷霆和闪电。
E: Aquila established their divine realm at the border of Amphoreus. The short feathers on their wings became the glow and flames in the sky. The long feathers were fashioned into thunder and lightning.

C: 当人子初降于世，他们仰头看去，却险些被艾格勒锐利的眼眸夺去了视力。
E: When the children of humanity first descended to the world, they looked up, yet lost their sight to Aquila's piercing gaze.

C: 全知全能的造物违背了世界的平衡，作为惩罚，艾格勒和怂恿他违背律法的欧洛尼斯，永远只能占有一半的天幕，不可逾越。
E: The omniscient, omnipotent creation had disrupted the balance of the world. As punishment, Aquila and Oronyx — who had encouraged this defiance of cosmic law — were each condemned to rule only half of the sky, never to cross into the other's domain.

C: 现在才发现，灯下黑？
E: They only realized it now? Does that count as a blind spot?

C: 生命在大地上繁衍，最后没入死亡。死亡滋生争斗，争斗滋生战争。当手无寸铁的人子被杀死，坠入冥河，越来越多的哀怨和憎恨在塞纳托斯的神国里增长。
E: Life spread across the land, but in the end, all living things met their death. From death arose conflict, and from conflict, war. As unarmed mortals fell, their souls plunged into the River of Souls, and within the realm of Thanatos, sorrow and hatred festered and grew.

C: 你正准备离开伤心地，却发现旁边有位科员在看着你。你强忍住泪水，向他礼貌性地点点头，在转过身时，他却叫住了你。
E: You are about to leave this sad place, but then you notice a researcher watching you from the side. You hold back your tears and nod politely to him, but as you turn around, he calls out to you.

C: 「当这个世界只剩下五分钟的时候，我只愿选择你，我只想望向你的眼睛。」
E: "When there are only five minutes left in this world, I only want to choose you, I only want to look into your eyes."

C: 请回答下一个问题——您在空间站取得的最优异的成果是？
E: Please answer the next question: What is the most outstanding research result you have achieved on the space station?

C: 选定时间后，页面弹出了窗口，要求勾选「参会人」，你没有找到退出按钮。
E: After selecting your time, an interface pops up asking you to select Participants. You cannot find the Exit button.

C: 算了，不打榜了。
E: Forget it, I won't upvote.

C: 奇怪的声音不断重复，你追溯声源，仔细聆听——
E: The strange voice is saying something over and over. You trace it back to the source and listen carefully...

C: 我又不能走动，除了听人类说话，也没别的事儿干呀。
E: I can't even walk, so I've got nothing better to do than listen to humans chatting.

C: 一阵令人不适的眩晕感后，你被「新世界大门」带到了基座舱段。
E: After a period of uncomfortable dizziness, you are transported to the base zone by the Door to A New World.

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 这金黄色的液体真是香甜可口，我要去和更多同伴分享嗡。
E: This golden nectar is so sweet. I want to share it with all my friends.

C: 具体的…我、我也不是很清楚……
E: I, I'm not too sure about the details...

C: 这柄「天谴之锋」，铭纹里仍涌动着持矛君王当年注入的神性。我好像感受到了…感受到了…感受到了——
E: The inscriptions etched into this Blade of Fury still pulse with the divinity that the Spearlord injected into it. I think I can feel it... Yes, I feel it... I feel it...

C: ——咳，算了，把专业设备就这么交给彻头彻尾的外行，我也有责任……
E: Ahem. Anyway. I suppose I'm partly to blame. I did give professional equipment to an absolute noobie.

C: 我听到你们说话了。
E: I heard you talking.

C: 不满意
E: Unsatisfactory

C: 再说一遍——场地是这条岔路到后面的广场！藏到其他地方算犯规哦！
E: I'll say it again. The play area starts from this intersection all the way to the plaza! Hiding anywhere else is against the rules!

C: 但虎克还是很好奇……
E: I'm really curious though...

C: 哈哈哈…理解理解～毕竟是你们列车的最佳三人组嘛。
E: Hahaha... I get it. You are the top trio of the Express.

C: …去打开它吧。如女人所说，这是敢于与命运抗争之人应得的回报。
E: ...Open it up. The lady did say this is the reward for those who dare to defy fate.

C: 我从未讨厌过「后巷」。任何人都不会讨厌「后巷」。
E: I've never hated the "back alley." No one hates the "back alley."

C: 当然，全凭您的意思！现在还不是时候……
E: Of course, it's all up to you! It's not time yet...

C: *只是*三天没吃饭？
E: JUST because I haven't eaten for three days?

C: 不管怎么样，下次陪虎克他们一起玩的时候，不那么上纲上线也可以……
E: Just remember, when you play with Hook and the others next time, you don't need to play like it's a battle of wills...

C: 应该不会有人躲在垃圾箱里吧……
E: No one would try to hide in a dumpster...

C: <size=36>无语了！</size>
E: <size=36>Too shocked to talk!</size>

C: 板条箱后面吧。
E: Behind the crates.

C: 看来你得换个藏身的地方才行。那么，哪里更合适呢？
E: Looks like you'll have to find another spot. What'll do the trick?

C: 或许你说得对…
E: Maybe you're right...

C: 「没吃饭吗，小东西？」
E: "You didn't eat a good meal, little one?"

C: 不仅如此，还有更过分的喀！你猜怎么着——
E: And oh boy, that's not even the half of it, crrk! Guess what else—

C: 伟哉！欧洛尼斯！
E: Praise be to Oronyx!

C: 六…这下应该就完成了。
E: Six... It's probably done by now.

C: 希望明天还能有阳光，晒干我被露水打湿的翅膀。
E: I hope for sunshine tomorrow to dry my dew-soaked wings.

C: 冲锋，突破迷雾！
E: Charge! Break through the mist!

C: 记住，以后别再穿一身黑了嗡！
E: Listen, don't ever wear all black again!

C: 我要坚强嗡…
E: I must be strong...

C: 再见了，陌生的朋友。
E: Goodbye, dear stranger and friend.

C: 哎呀，出了事儿我担着，别担心了，画册要紧。
E: Come on. If anything happens, I'll take care of it. Don't worry. The photo books are more important.

C: 不过，你相信它肯定会信守承诺回到梓桥那里，不知道为什么，你心中如此确信着。再见了，绅士，请一定要飞得再快一些！
E: But, you believe that it will keep its promise to return to Ziqiao. You don't know why, but you trust this cycrane. Goodbye, gentleman. Fly faster!

C: 要不，干脆就别回鹤运物流了。
E: How about you just don't go back to your job at Heron Express?

C: 看来是我赢了，你愿赌服输吗？
E: Looks like I won. You bet, you pay.

C: 梓桥让我找你回去。
E: Ziqiao sent me to get you back.

C: 那你就竖起耳朵给我听着。
E: Alright, please pay attention to what I'm going to say.

C: 等下！这都哪儿跟哪儿啊？！
E: Hold on! What is going on!?

C: 一头铺面而来的兽…那个流着金血的家伙…他、他看向了你…他是谁？他是谁？！
E: A beast charging toward you... A man dripping with golden blood... H—He looked at you... Who is he? Who is he!?

C: 可它好像离开我就会爆炸…
E: But it felt like it will go off once I leave...

C: 那怎么没见着人？
E: So why haven't we seen him?

C: 某位自称是卜者的和自称在工造司干活的家伙吵了起来，还闹着要在工造司门口约架。
E: Some guy who claims to be a diviner was having a feud with some guy who claims to work for the Artisanship Commission, and they even wanted to have a fight-off in front of the Artisanship Commission.

C: 等着瞧好了，我这就过去…等我先找个趁手的…咦，我的扳手呢？
E: Just you wait, I'll go meet him myself... Wait, let me find a suitable one first... Hm, where's my wrench?

C: 唉，没了这批粉丝，之后不知要过多久才会有人欣赏我的光辉了。
E: If it weren't for these fans of mine, who knows how long it'd be before anyone discovered me in all my glory?

C: 每个人的一生都在被镜头记录着，有时是监控摄像，有时是他人的双眼。
E: The entire life of each and every person is captured by a lens — be it closed-circuit cameras or the eyes of others.

C: 情侣们总是在打卡后配上这样一句文案，还在单身的广告牌先生对此嗤之以鼻。
E: Couples always post a phrase like this when they take pictures here. Mr. Billboard, who is still single, can't help but turn his nose up at the words.

C: 你毫不犹豫地选择了留下，谁能拒绝一辆神秘莫测的列车呢？
E: You choose to stay without hesitation. Who could resist a mysterious train?

C: 变身变身！
E: Transform!

C: 有趣的栏杆缝隙，这个角度看向丹恒的床铺，你只看得清变幻的水流图案。
E: This is an interesting gap in the railing. If you look at Dan Heng's bed from this perspective, the only thing you can see is the ever-changing flowing water pattern.

C: 就让我期待一下吧…
E: I shall look forward to it...

C: 要不要再去抽一罐？
E: Wanna go smoke another vat?

C: 幸亏来这了，对吧？
E: Good thing we came here, eh?

C: 秒毛！
E: Defeat my foot!

C: 该去见圣女了！
E: Let's go see the Holy Maiden!

C: 啊啊…刻法勒…
E: Ahh... Kephale...

C: 她把命搭上了！
E: She even threw her life away!

C: 这里，安全，呆好。
E: Here, safe, stay here.

C: 得想办法囤点吃的！
E: Gotta stock up on some food!

C: 沙发的褶皱处夹着几缕柔软的毛发，从颜色上看——倒是和帕姆的色泽一致。
E: There're a few tufts of soft hair tucked into the corners of the couch. Its color — is a dead match for Pom-Pom's.

C: 呜哇！呜呜…帕姆…帕姆不能接受…怎么回事嘛！为什么帕姆只有一分！
E: Wow, Boohoo... Pom... Pom-Pom can't take it... How can this be! Why did I only get one point?

C: 谢谢你，乘客。这件事不要说出去帕，倒不是怕丢人，只是不想让其他乘客担心列车长。
E: Thank you, dear passenger. Please don't tell anyone about this. Pom-Pom's not embarrassed, Pom-Pom just doesn't want other people to worry unduly about me.

C: 一张小纸片被夹在缝隙中，你小心翼翼将它取出来。
E: There's a small piece of paper stuck in the crack, and you carefully fish it out.

C: 好主意！提前准备上车申请的话，就能很轻易地判别，要带上车的究竟是什么物种，是否适合上车了！
E: Great idea! If we take applications in advance, then we can easily judge what species are allowed on the Express, and whether a pet is okay to board or not!

C: 停停停！你看看你干的好事！
E: Stop, stop, stop! Look at what you've done!

C: 只要有碟片，一切都好说。
E: As long as they have discs.

C: 布洛妮娅。
E: Bronya.

C: 丹恒乘客睡在资料室里，我以前查房的时候，还有些担心他就这么睡觉会不会睡不着和着凉什么的……
E: Passenger Dan Heng sleeps in the archives. I don't know how he manages to get a good night's rest in that room, though. I was always worrying that he'll catch a cold.

C: 这次禁区演练就到此结束。去和「副官」聊聊，领取你应得的酬劳吧。
E: That's enough drills in the restricted zone for now. Go chat with the aide and claim your well-deserved reward.

C: 我还是乖乖去打铁卫吧…
E: I think I'll be good and take the Guards instead...

C: 但好消息还是有的！下一次，就在下一次，我们能够将它们一网打尽！
E: But here's the good news! We'll be able to catch them all in our next operation!

C: 感觉比前几次好玩？
E: It felt more fun than the previous hunts, I guess?

C: 说到底你也不知道隐身的原因？
E: And you still don't know why they were invisible, do you?

C: 神秘的孩子
E: Mysterious Kid

C: {NICKNAME}，看好了！在你面前的这三位，是我们地下擂台的「四大天王」——
E: {NICKNAME}, the three people in front of you are the "Formidable Four."

C: 可这所谓的「黑暗拳斗大赛」不过是小孩子们过家家、不过是一场幼稚的童年游戏…你真的有必要如此上纲上线吗？他还只是个孩子啊！
E: But the so-called Dark Fist Tournament is just a game and he's just a kid. Do you really want to rub it in his face?

C: 不…不…怎么会这样……
E: No... No... How could this be...

C: 我只是想恢复一下状态…
E: I'm just trying to stay in shape...

C: 什么井盖？！真没素质！我叫米歇尔，懂？
E: What manhole cover!? How rude! I'm Michel, get it?

C: 此处贴着一幅狂放不羁的画像…或者说，通缉令。画中的人物长得很是别致——两只眼睛一个鼻子一张嘴；如果描述得再深入一点——他的头发是蓝的，眼睛是绿的。
E: There's an expressively unbridled portrait here... or rather, a Wanted poster. The figure is highly unique: Two eyes, a nose, and a mouth; or to be more descriptive, his deep blue hair and jade-green eyes.

C: 为什么要通缉我们？
E: Why are we on this Wanted list?

C: 因为你们意图颠覆贝洛伯格啊，忘了？
E: Because you tried to overthrow Belobog, remember?

C: 看看这里有些什么东西…
E: Let's see what's in here then...

C: 等你做好了之后再说。
E: We'll see, once you've finished.

C: 你就这水平也敢唱歌？
E: That's the extent of your singing?

C: 这…不得从互相了解开始吗？
E: Shouldn't... things start out by getting to know each other first?

C: ——棉花糖？嗯…借着这一闪而过的比喻，你开始想象棉花糖的味道了——虽然你不确定自己是否真的尝试过这种食物。或许你该去问问那位列车长……
E: Cotton Candy, eh...? You begin imagining how it would taste based on the brief description, even though you're not sure if you've ever had it. Perhaps you should ask the conductor...

C: 你进来了！后悔已经晚了。假如你现在逃跑，所有人都会嘲笑你的。
E: You're already inside and it's too late for regrets! You'll be mocked if you run away now.

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 你站住不动，紧盯着罐子。罐口在你的眼中越来越大，仿佛可以吞没你。又或许，它的确吞没了你。
E: You stand still and stare at the vase as it expands before your very eyes, as if trying to engulf you. Or perhaps, it does indeed engulf you.

C: 托您的福，流云渡的问题算是暂时解决了，鹤运物流也离恢复正常状态更近了一步。
E: Thanks to you, Cloudford's problems have been temporarily resolved, and Heron Express is one step closer to fully operational.

C: 这台出了故障的栖木周围也聚拢了不少怪物。天底下哪儿有这么巧的事情，真古怪。
E: There are also monsters gathered around this malfunctioning roost. It's strange that there are so many coincidences.

C: 世上还是好人多…
E: There are still many kind people in the world...

C: 虽然是个人的私事，告诉您也无妨，我丢了一枚很重要的零件。
E: It's a very personal matter, but I guess it's okay to tell you that I've lost a very important component.

C: 我这人虽然是老外，但是我就喜欢当地人自己的东西，当地人用什么我就用什么。那些干净漂亮的「鲛人泪」都太虚假了，没有收藏价值。
E: Me, I may be an Outworlder but I like local customs and use whatever the locals use. Super-clean and clear Draconic Tears are too fake for me, and aren't worth collecting.

C: 我跟你是一样的。
E: Same.

C: …你是？
E: ...And you are?

C: 再见了，陌生人。愿你与所爱之人可以平安幸福，直到宇宙的终结。
E: So long, stranger. May you and your loved ones remain safe and happy until the universe ends.

C: 那些在路边偶然玩到了「枘凿六合」，爱上了「枘凿六合」的，我们称之为「社会招收」，对象广泛但效率不高。
E: We call it social recruitment when there's someone on the roadside obsessing over the Hexanexus. This casts a wide net, but few candidates are successful.

C: 还应该增加其他维度。
E: Add in extra dimensions.

C: 我就不一样了，我没有母星。
E: I'm different. I don't have a home planet.

C: 为什么？为什么不出货？！
E: Why? Why not!?

C: 一定有什么地方出错了——对，是游戏，一定是游戏本身的问题！
E: Something must have gone wrong — yeah, the game. Something must be wrong with the game itself!

C: 我觉得自己好像弄丢了什么东西…我本该非常讨厌它才对，可现在却只觉得怅然若失……
E: I feel like I've lost something... I should really hate it, but now I feel frustrated and lost...

C: 哈哈哈，挺敏锐的嘛！见过「我」的人都觉得我们是疯子…我是搞不懂，这有什么好大惊小怪的？每次看到他们惊慌失措的白痴样子，我都忍不住想笑！
E: Haha, very perceptive! Everyone who's met "me" thinks that we're nuts... I just don't get what all the fuss is about though? Every time I see those panicked idiots, I lose it and start laughing!

C: 呼——吓死我了…我还以为他又多了个帮手呢，本来就已经够吓人的了……
E: Whew — you freaked me out... I thought he'd roped in yet another accomplice. Things were already getting scary enough...

C: 请、请您一定要对我的状况守口如瓶！我不想再和那家伙扯上任何关系了！
E: Please, you absolutely have to keep this under wraps! I don't want to ever have anything do with that guy again!

C: 真够缺德的。不说闲话了，接着巡逻吧。不能再让他祸害别人了。
E: It's just wicked. Okay, enough chit-chat. Keep up with patrols. We cannot let him harm others.

C: 总、总之，希望我能对此做出一些微不足道的补偿。
E: A—Anyway, I hope I can make up for this in a small way.

C: 那个…W…他是我的梦魇，但也是我的稻草。他既极端又强势，但也是我唯一的陪伴与救赎。我讨厌他，又离不开他…我们相互支撑，又相互伤害。
E: And W... He's my nightmare, but also my last hope. He is extreme and strong, but also my only companion and salvation. I hate him, but could never leave him... We support each other, but we also hurt each other.

C: 的确，我们偶尔会遇上一些比较…极端的求助者。他们可能会表现出明显的偏执或暴力倾向。
E: Indeed, we sometimes encounter some more... extreme clients. They might display overt tendencies for obsession or violence.

C: 这应该就是科琳要的东西了…回去找她看看吧。
E: This must be what Colleen wanted... Let's head back and see her.

C: 你知道吗…他曾经对我而言是最重要的人——是他毫不吝啬地将自己的研究成果与我分享，将我引向「智识」的正途。
E: You know what... He used to be the most important person in my life — he shared his research results with me without hesitation and led me along the correct Path of Erudition.
Er...

C: 那当然——别的不说，家族在这方面还是很贴心的。
E: Of course — If anything, The Family treats us pretty well when it comes to that.

C: 等年纪大了呢，因为亏心事做得太多，被自己折磨得夜不能寐，就干脆变卖了所有积蓄，跑到这个所谓的「梦想之城」来。
E: Once we got a little bit older, the evil deeds racked up day after day to the point where she couldn't sleep at night. She decided to sell off everything she owned, and come to this so-called City of Dreams.

C: 我承认，这一身确实贵气了些。不过来这种地方要想不被人看扁，多少还是得注意些扮相的…要是我把平时那身行头穿来，估计要吓坏不少人。
E: I admit, this look is indeed a little more bling. But if you don't want to be looked down upon in a place like this, you should pay attention to dressing up... It would freak out the lot of you if I were to wear my usual get-up here.

C: 呃…这里面涉及到很多暴力细节。我看你年纪轻轻，还是少听点不健康的内容为好。
E: Well... there was lots of violence in the details. I can tell you're young, though, so don't want to expose you to all that.

C: 是吧？大名鼎鼎的巡海游侠也做不到更好了。而这只是我传奇生涯中的一个小小注脚。
E: Right? Not even the illustrious Galaxy Rangers could do any better. And this is but one small, micro footnote in the annals of my legendary career.

C: 当我们打开舰长室的大门时，眼前只有空空如也的玻璃缸和杂乱丢弃的输液管——其中最大的那根链接着韦兰的后背……
E: When we opened the door to the captain's quarters, all we could see was an empty glass tank and scattered drips hanging about the place — the largest of which was hooked up to Wyland's back...

C: 但这并不是胜利。逃出黑洞之后，我发现日子已经过去了好久，比想象中还要久……
E: But this was no victory. Outside the vicinity of the black hole, I discovered that a long time had passed — far longer than I could've imagined...

C: 已经实锤了？
E: Is there solid proof?

C: 这件事交给我来解决吧。
E: Leave this up to me.

C: 宇宙秘宝？
E: Secret treasure of the universe?

C: 嘶~我冷静的头脑又重新占据了高地…最近的情绪可真多变。
E: Hiss... My logical mind has regained control... My mood has been all over the place lately.

C: 你想到了什么？
E: Did you just think of something?

C: 或早或晚，奥特兰终会灭亡，就像一场无法治愈的慢性疾病…除非有人修复被星核污染的太阳，但那又谈何容易呢？
E: It's only a matter of time before Outerland perishes, like a terminal chronic illness... Unless someone can fix its star contaminated by the Stellaron, but what are the chances of that?

C: 嘿，{M#好小子}{F#好姑娘}，够敏锐的。
E: Wow, you're sharp, {M#smart boy}{F#smart girl}.

C: 嗯？你又不是家族的人，是怎么……
E: Eh? You aren't part of The Family. How did you...

C: 这锅可不能扣我头上啊…
E: Don't pin this on me...

C: 这事确实是我冲动了——不管怎么说，人家才是金主。脑子里怎么想的不重要，还得是合同上的白纸黑字才有效力。
E: Well, I acted a little rashly... After all, they're the boss. What they think doesn't matter, as long as they fulfill their obligations on the contract.

C: …这么点小事也要惊动家主？不至于吧……
E: ...You want to disturb the family head over such a small matter? Think again...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「斯坦威游隼」豪华飞车、观景望远镜、还有「推销员」广告牌</color>——你就先去分析这几样东西吧！记得，拿到分析报告以后速速向我汇报！
E: Go analyze a <color=#dbc291ff>"Steinway Falcon" luxury speedster, a viewing telescope, and a "sales" billboard</color>! Remember, report back to me as soon as you have the analysis results!

C: 真奇怪，我手上有这么厉害的发明，之前怎么没想着用呢…算了，想那么多干嘛？现在动手也不算晚！
E: Weird... I have such an awesome invention, yet I didn't think of using it before... But never mind! It's better late than never!

C: 对，没错…对于像你这样的人来说肯定不是什么难事吧？毕竟你既不胆小，也不拧巴……
E: Yeah, that's right... Shouldn't be too hard for someone like you, right? I mean, you're not a scaredy-cat or a screw-up...

C: 我对音乐演出不感兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in musical performances.

C: 你这样做只会从梦中醒来。
E: You'll only wake up from the dream if you do that.

C: 像你这样的人一定不会明白……
E: People like you will never get it...

C: 智械陷入了沉默。一滴无机的泪——也可能是油——从她眼角滑落，在金属脸颊上留下一道湿痕。
E: The Intellitron falls silent. An inorganic teardrop — which is probably oil — rolls down from the corner of her eye, leaving a mark on her metal face.

C: 如果是从前的我，见到它应该会很激动。
E: The old me would have been thrilled to see it.

C: 但我还是需要警告您，关于我此前行为失控的诱因…我猜您自己也心知肚明。
E: But I still need to warn you about what caused me to lose control previously... I'm guessing you already know.

C: …好吧，是我干的，不过真没受伤。你还不知道吗？那些惊梦剧团见了我，跑都来不及。
E: ...All right. I did it, but I'm really not hurt. Don't you get it? Those Dreamjolt Troupe cowards turn tail at the sight of me.

C: 我知道了。如果有需要，随时来找我。
E: Got it. Let me know if you need something.

C: 先不了，我还有事。
E: It's fine. I've got something else on.

C: 没什么问题了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 我没有勇气去面对他们…所以我需要你的帮助。等你<color=#dbc291ff>把他们带回来</color>，我会把事情的来龙去脉和你解释清楚的。
E: I haven't the courage to face them myself... so I need your help. I'll tell you the whole story <color=#dbc291ff>once you bring them back</color>.

C: 已经完成了。
E: All done and dusted.

C: 作为朝露公馆的代理执行者，我有义务提醒您：任何企图剽窃或破坏家族资产的行为都有可能导致严重的后果。
E: As the acting executor of Dewlight Pavilion, I am obliged to inform you that any attempts to plagiarize or destroy Family assets may result in grave consequences.

C: 麦考先生双眉颦蹙，你成功激起了他内心的不快。
E: Mr. McCoy's brows grew furrowed, you have successfully brought his sadness to the surface.

C: 再见，小家伙，希望未来不会在银河尽头的战场上见到你。
E: So long, buddy. I hope we never have to meet again on the battlefield at the end of the cosmos.

C: 更何况，我还让基金会用这些钱去援助战区的民众，四舍五入，我不是帮老百姓把钱给抢回来了嘛。
E: And what's more, I'm always asking the foundation to put this money back into aid to help war refugees. If you round everything up, am I not actually helping the people get their own money back?

C: 说得好像你见过似的…
E: You speak as though you've personally witnessed such events before...

C: 啧…阿图罗先生，居然也有大智若愚的时候。他对商业、对整个宇宙运作规律的理解，都太肤浅了。我对他的评价下降了一些。
E: Tsk... It seems that even the great Mr. Arturo can have moments of folly as well. His understanding of commerce and the way the universe works is too superficial. After hearing these words, I actually think less of him than before.

C: 给我的信？谁会挑这个时候……
E: A letter for me? Why now and from who?

C: 还有好多东西要批复…哦，是你啊。
E: There are still so many things waiting for me to approve... Oh, it's you.

C: 当校长是什么感觉？
E: What is it like being the dean?

C: 你本想打开它一看究竟，但盖子冻得很严实。
E: You intend to open it, but its lid is frozen shut.

C: 这么多书放在这里肯定是有原因的，比如为了解闷——或者更糟，为了取暖。
E: There must be a reason why so many books are placed here. They could be used to whittle away the time... or even worse, to keep this place warm.

C: 当你沐浴在喝彩中时，想必也有人这样远远观望着你。
E: As you bask in the applause, you imagine that there must be someone observing you from afar as well.

C: 啊，是你啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}.

C: …哈哈，开玩笑的。我不是服务员啾，我只是来随便玩玩的！
E: Haha, just kidding! I'm not a waitress, tweet. I'm just goofing around!

C: 肺部的撕裂感愈演愈烈，或许在几分钟后你就会休克，永远地被封装在这里。
E: The tearing sensation in your lungs grows worse and worse. You may end up going into shock in a few minutes, sealing your fate here permanently.

C: 只要有了这一系列设备，造物引擎就能不断开辟疆域、拓展边界，它们脚下的大地皆是贝洛伯格的沃土。
E: If we have this set of equipment, the Engines of Creation will be able to keep opening up new territory and expanding our borders. Every bit of earth they tread upon will become a part of Belobog.

C: 好，关于造物引擎的所有议题都结束了，我们总算得出了一份方案。
E: Alright, discussions on all the Engine of Creation proposals are complete, and we have finally found a plan.

C: 你该回大树了。
E: You should return to the Great Tree.

C: 什么！竟然是这样啾！
E: What! Is that so, tweet!

C: 我还有事…
E: I still have something on...

C: 嘿呀？有话就问——是关于那些偷懒的小家伙们，还是其他偷摸闯进来的坏蛋啾？
E: Hi-yah? Speak your mind — is this about those lazy little ones, or other baddie intruders, tweet?

C: 在下会努力回想新线索的啾，请您先把提到的那个孩子带回来吧！
E: I'll try my best to recall any clues. Please help bring back that kid from before!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个笨手笨脚的助手<color=#dbc291ff>总被自己找来的树枝压倒</color>啾，它现在是不是又被压在哪片叶子下了呢…
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a clumsy helper <color=#dbc291ff>who always gets crushed by the twigs it finds</color>, tweet. Not sure if it is currently being crushed by leaves somewhere...

C: 外面太危险了，我要回黄金公子身边了啾！
E: It is too dangerous out there, I need to get back to Young Master Gold, tweet!

C: 呀！不好了，下一场戏要开始了！再见了啾！
E: Ah! Oh no, the next act is starting! Goodbye, tweet!

C: 糟糕糟糕，怎么都从鸟巢里跑走了啾…
E: This is terrible, just terrible! They've all run away from the nest, tweet...

C: 这是哪里？
E: What is this place?

C: 朝露小屋是全小镇最安全也是最隐蔽的地方——不是每位小镇居民都能随意进出的哦！
E: Dawndew Hut is the safest and most hidden location in all of Dreamville... This is not a place that any old townspeople can come and go to as they please!

C: 关于猫头鹰教授…
E: About Professor Owl...

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 对不起，亲爱的，我实在是没法忍受这样落魄的生活，我要回大树了啾。
E: Sorry dear, I simply can't stand this downtrodden life. I'm going back to the Great Tree, tweet.

C: 再见，我要回大树了，这场比赛已经没有悬念了啾。
E: Goodbye, I'm returning to the Great Tree. This match is a done deal, tweet.

C: 朋友，你也有支持的选手吗？啾啾？
E: Friend, do you have a contender that you support too? Tweet?

C: 有什么好怕的，我还能长得比大树还高啾。
E: What's there to fear? I bet I can grow even taller than the Great Tree, tweet.

C: 如果每只小鸟都变得这么高，就连石头老板也要躲着我们啾。
E: If only all birdies could get so tall, even Boss Stone would have to hide from us, tweet.

C: 啾！你这坏蛋，为什么要打死我的坐骑，你赔我一只啾！
E: Tweet! You savage, why did you take my mount's life? Pay me back, tweet!

C: 为何音符能和钟表成为朋友，鸟儿却不能爱上一只猫？
E: Why can notes and clocks become friends, but birds can't fall in love with a cat?

C: 我、我现在就去找湛蓝爵士问问啾！
E: I... I'm going to look for Dr. Blues right now for answers, tweet!

C: 棒下留鸟，邪恶的海盗大统领向你投降啾。
E: Spare the bat! This evil pirate captain yields to you, tweet.

C: 下一题是…填空题——请问您还有什么意见或建议啾？
E: Next question... is an open-ended question — do you have any additional comments or suggestions, tweet?

C: 得回去向猫头鹰老师反馈，不然我的社会科学实践就泡汤了啾。
E: I'll have to go and give my feedback to Professor Owl, otherwise my social science project will go up in smoke, tweet.

C: 不认识，不认识啾啾！
E: Dunno, dunno, tweet tweet!

C: 看在你态度诚恳的份上，这次就先放过你。不过要是下次还被我抓到，必须好好修理你一顿。
E: Given your sincere attitude, I will let you off this time. However, if I catch you again, I'll make sure I fix you up properly!

C: 现在这游戏真是一天比一天肝了。每次想拿奖励，都得来竞技场打上好久......
E: This game is getting more tedious by the day. Each time I want rewards, I have to spend ages fighting in the arena...

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 可我从未没伤害过同袍，我还用这一手「药王秘传」内授的医术救了不少人——还有你，你那开药摊的经验也是我传授给你的。
E: But I never hurt my comrades. I even used the techniques from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus to save many knights. And you! I even taught you my pharmaceutical skills.

C: （等待永仁的决定）
E: (Wait for Yongren to make his decision.)

C: 这种东西趁早销毁比较好…
E: You should destroy such dangerous books before it's too late...

C: 一加一等于几？
E: What's one plus one?

C: 更厉害的是，用着用着，小鱼就能听到丹枢大人的声音了，就像现在这样。过去丹枢大人事务繁忙，没有空和小鱼一起玩，现在终于有时间了。
E: What's more, as I used the tablet, I gradually became able to hear Lady Dan Shu's voice, like I'm doing right now. She was always too busy with her official duties to play with me, but now we can finally play together.

C: 小鱼跌跌撞撞地从你的视线范围内消失了。
E: Stumbling and wavering, Xiaoyu disappears from your sight.

C: 宝贝、宝贝、宝贝…
E: Good luck, good luck, good luck...

C: 在这一瞬间，你感觉自己似乎失去了某种极为宝贵的东西。你忙不迭地检查了全身，完好无损，奇怪，究竟是丢了什么东西呢？这东西真的重要吗？
E: In a flash, you feel as though you have lost something extremely precious. You hastily check over your whole body: Everything remains in place. Strange... what was it that you lost? And was it important?

C: 那么现在，是「开盲盒」的时候了。你伸手打开了供品的包装盖，上面的灰尘弄脏了你的手，但这有什么所谓呢，反正你戴着手套，双手早就不干净了。
E: So now, it's time to open a mystery box. You reach out and open the offering's packaging. Your hand gets dirty from the dust on it, but it doesn't matter because you're wearing gloves. So your hands were dirty from the get-go.

C: 我是受人所托来擦灰的！
E: Somebody asked me to wipe the dust!

C: 我只是路过，随便看看。
E: I'm just a passerby taking a look.

C: 也没人拦着我上台啊？
E: Nobody stopped me getting up though?

C: 算啦，难得有人听我的戏…就不和你计较了。
E: Whatever, I never get any listeners... so I won't hold a grudge at you.

C: 再来一次！再给我最后一次机会。这次我一定能变出你无法察觉的完美拟态！
E: Let's go again! Give me one, final chance! This time I will create the perfect mimicry that you will never be able to detect!

C: 哪还有什么情况可了解？事实不是已经很清楚了吗——
E: What's there to sort out? Aren't the facts already clear enough...

C: 随着砰一声巨响，我的车被弹出去好几米，像是怼在了一块石头上似的。真离谱！
E: My car got sent off-course by several meters with a loud bang, as if I was hit by a rock. It's outrageous!

C: 我有好多话想和你说。
E: I have so much I want to say to you.

C: 是猎犬家系干的？
E: The Bloodhound Family did this?

C: 把这个收着。不用怕啦，是从我身上掉下来的零件，好好装在衣服口袋里，别告诉其他人。
E: Take this. Don't worry, they're parts that fell off of my body, keep them in your pocket, and don't tell anyone.

C: 我愿意帮你。
E: I will help you.

C: 就当是个吉祥物也好嘛，赌神的手指，很珍贵的。信我的，不会错。
E: Take it as a lucky mascot, the finger of the Ace Gambler is very precious. Trust me, you can't go wrong.

C: 喂，你怎么看？
E: Hey, what do you think?

C: 还是免了吧。家母在的时候曾教导过，随意提起自己的难处，对贵客未免太过不敬重。
E: I probably should not talk about it. She taught me that it would be disrespectful of me to speak of my troubles to guests.

C: 缘何起…望何期…多别离……
E: Oh why... When shall we meet again... So many partings...

C: 只是…有件事始终萦绕在心中，也不知当不当讲……
E: It's just... There is something that still weighs on my chest, I am uncertain whether I should tell you...

C: 当然可以。不过你得做好心理准备，和「黄金的时刻」不一样，那里的逐梦客行事都比较…狂野，他们平时喜欢喝的也都是些粗制滥造的烈酒。
E: Sure. But you have to understand that the place is totally different from Golden Hour. The Dreamchasers there are more... unruly, and they enjoy drinking spirits of inferior quality.

C: 其实这趟也算不上那么危险啦，咱们一路上不是都没被怪物拦下嘛……
E: Actually, this trip isn't as dangerous as we think. At least we haven't found ourselves running into any monsters along the way, right?

C: ——茄子！
E: ...Cheese!

C: 我能感觉到，自己的身体正愈发接近祂的国度，头颅化作桶盖，躯体化作桶身。
E: I can feel my body gradually getting nearer to THEM. My head shall turn into a can lid, and my body shall become a can.

C: 总之，诈骗就像炒股，一个路数行不通就得换一个更吃香的。
E: In any case, scams are like buying stocks. If one stock doesn't work for you, just change to another one.

C: 我以前确实在这里当老师…哎，你能学明白再说吧。
E: Well, I did use to be a teacher here... Hey, come back when ya manage to learn it.

C: 再见，好心人，我在苏乐达地窖的颁奖台等你！
E: Farewell, kind soul. I shall await you at the podium in the SoulGlad cellar!

C: 事情也许还有转机。
E: We might still be able to turn this thing around.

C: 从我们在流梦礁重逢时起，我就隐隐有种预感。也许，我们的道路再也不会有交集了……
E: When we reunited at Dreamflux Reef, I had an ominous feeling. That maybe, our paths would not cross again...

C: 我看您不在里面，我还在想直接放里面是否有点不合适…正好您来了，哈哈。
E: I didn't see you, so I was wondering if it'd be okay to leave it inside... Haha, but you came at the right time.

C: 无从预知，无处抵挡…内心深处好像有某种声音，盖过了一切理智。从什么时候起，向来不知天高地厚的开拓者也会害怕了？你沉默着不愿再想下去。
E: Unpredictable, horrifying... A noise from deep in your heart obscures all rational thought. When did the fearless Trailblazer discover what it means to be afraid? You fall silent and refuse to think anymore.

C: 虽然这么比喻对囚徒不太合适——就像是你去了动物园，满心期待热门动物在园区视野最好的地方被你观察，可是它却不知为何躲在某块大石头下面睡觉，什么也看不着。
E: This analogy doesn't quite fit for prisoners, but it's like a visit to the zoo — you eagerly anticipate seeing the star attraction in the prime viewing area, only to find it hidden and asleep beneath a boulder, leaving you nothing to see.

C: 走吧，我倒要看看是谁！
E: Let's go. I'm curious to find out who's upstairs!

C: 你把你们这里的管事的人叫出来，雪衣呢？寒鸦呢？藿藿呢？再不行，就把你们仙舟的神策府将军景元叫过来！
E: Get your supervisors here. Xueyi? Hanya? Huohuo? If they are unavailable, request the presence of General Jing Yuan from Xianzhou's Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 幽府武弁！把嫌疑人甲立刻逮捕！
E: Wraith Warden! Arrest Suspect A immediately!
WHAT!?

C: 跟你喜不喜欢没关系，你这是在协助它越狱！
E: It's got nothing to do with whether you like to read or not. You are helping it to escape from jail!

C: 这比较符合我的常识…
E: That is more in line with my common sense...

C: 很多次。
E: Many times.

C: 这幽囚狱之中潜藏着五名逃犯，或生或死，统统需要查证清楚，不可留下隐患。汝受十王恩赐在幽囚狱内自由行事，如有发现这些逃犯，请及时通报吾等，自有冥差处置。
E: There are five fugitives in The Shackling Prison. Dead or alive, their statuses must all be verified, no stone left unturned. I have been bequeathed free rein of The Shackling Prison by the Ten Lords — if these fugitives are discovered, please report their whereabouts to me immediately. My spiritfarers will handle them accordingly.

C: 哎，多事。
E: Tsk, meddlesome.

C: 你注意到犯人散发着比阴寒狱更加寒冷、肃杀的气息。幸好，你并不需要与她交手，你只需要把她的位置告诉司狱大人就可以了。
E: You notice the fugitive emanating an air even colder and more murderous than the Grimfrost Hold itself. Good thing you don't have to fight her — just transmitting her location to the Jailer will do.

C: 在「演武仪典二十一响」的炮声里，你终于理解了——放炮一时爽，一直放炮一直爽。
E: In the booming of the "Wardance <unbreak>21</unbreak>-Gun Salute," you finally understand... One explosion can make you feel great for a moment, and constant explosions can make you feel great forever.

C: 我需要你协助我守住这扇门。目前犯人还没被惊动，我去搬些救兵。
E: I need you to help me guard this door. The criminal is not aware of us yet. I need to go and get reinforcements.

C: 你已经没有孙子了。
E: You have no grandsons left!

C: 我感化了劫匪。
E: I have reformed the kidnapper.

C: 喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！
E: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, make your dreams a blast!

C: 瑟希斯在上，愿以拙作课题献于您光芒之下，以此回报您赐下「启蒙之光」。
E: Cerces above, I offer my unworthy research topic before your brightness in dedication to your radiant enlightenment.

C: 诶，这位{F#小姐}{M#兄弟}你还好吧？刚才看你一直傻笑，我还以为你怎么了呢…现在没事了吧？
E: Hey, you alright, {F#miss}{M#mister}? I saw you grinning like a loon and thought something went wrong for you... you alright now?

C: 公司式外骨骼机甲。
E: An IPC-style exoskeletal mech.

C: 这和「时尚」有半毛钱关系？
E: What does that have to do with fashion?

C: 噢！真遗憾，你一定熟读文物保护法规，或者受过吉奥里亚的赐福，竟然能无视这只石狮子的存在。但仔细想想，过分谨慎是不是会错过什么？
E: Oh! How unfortunate. You must be versed in cultural artifact preservation rules, or once blessed by Georios — to think that you would ignore this stone lion's presence. But if you think about it, isn't being overly careful causing you to miss out on something?

C: 在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
E: In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...

C: 结果，大地兽的标价涨到了<unbreak>25</unbreak>万利衡币。请问，这时你应该还给商人多少钱？
E: But by the end of the month, the dromases' price has gone up to <unbreak>250,000</unbreak> Balance Coins. Question: How much do you owe the merchant now?

C: 仿佛有哪里不对。
E: Something's not right here.

C: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
E: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

C: 好痛！忘了这只狮子也是瑟希斯的忠实信徒了……
E: That hurt! I forgot that this lion is also a loyal disciple of Cerces...

C: 可以不回答吗？
E: Can I refuse to answer?

C: …对不起，我没想到会是这种结果。嗯…请你稍等我一下。
E: ...My apologies. I didn't think it would turn out this way. Mm...please wait for me.

C: 造桥的匠人阿吉说：「吉奥里亚在上，我怎敢偷工减料？哪怕石材上存在一丝裂痕，城主都不会放过我！」
E: The bridge builder Aji said: "By Georios above, how would I dare cut corners? The lord would have me in irons if there was even a sliver of a crack on a single stone!"

C: 怎么把我的冰箱都给塞满了？这都是谁放的东西？让我看看！
E: How could they stuff my refrigerator full like this? Who's been putting this stuff in here? Let me see!

C: 呼呼，大地从不吝啬回报。这样吧，呈出令我满意的供品，我必将丰厚还于你。
E: *crackle* The earth always rewards those who sow. How about this? Make a satisfactory offering, and I will repay you abundantly.

C: 当然。呼呼，表现出你的虔敬与诚意，大地自会有赠礼。
E: Of course. *crackle* Show your reverence and sincerity, and the land will reciprocate.

C: 赶紧跑开。
E: I'd take off immediately.

C: 所以说，一定要让那些犯下过错的人接受惩罚，而不只是轻飘飘地对他们说教。看来你也同意这点。
E: All in all, it's imperative to make sure those who have committed wrongdoings are punished, instead of just giving them verbal warnings. Looks like you're with me on this point.

C: 你已经完全掌握了痛击邪恶的诀窍。长久以来，家族的手段都太小儿科了！
E: Now, I believe you've mastered the way of striking down evil. The Family's been too lenient for way too long.

C: 发生甚么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 保安呢？！哦，原来我就是啊——
E: Where's security?! Oh wait, I'm security...

C: 接着替白厄回信。
E: Keep replying for Phainon.

C: 还是平实地结尾吧。
E: Maybe just wrap it up nice and simple.

C: 首先是开篇…咪发迷很疑惑为什么回信这么快，该怎么解释呢？
E: First things first: the opening. Mifamem was very puzzled by how you managed to reply so quickly. How should you explain?

C: 这是那只名为麦田守望者 / 神圣呜呜伯 / 好好奇美拉 / 黄豆粉糍粑 / 奇美啦迷的小奇美拉。自从你们给它取了名，它便留在秋千附近。
E: This is the little chimera named Guardian of the Wheat Field / Holy Wubbaboo / Curious Chimera / Soy-Dusted Mochi Cake / Chimeramem. Ever since you named it, it's been hanging around near the swing.

C: 你挖开泥土，将种子播进花盆中。
E: You dig into the soil and sow the seeds with care.

C: {NICKNAME}听过这样的说法吗？两个人独处时，难能可贵的不是说不完的话题，而是沉默下来也不会尴尬的默契。
E: Has anyone ever told you this, {NICKNAME}? When two people are alone, what's truly special isn't having endless things to talk about, it's being able to sit in silence without it feeling awkward.

C: 旅途前方还会有更多美景。
E: There are even more captivating sights awaiting on this journey.

C: 你不知道他究竟遭遇了什么，但结局已然清晰摆在你的面前，或是一队偶然路过的卫兵，或是冰冷无情的眷属…无论如何，悬锋城容不下除胜利之外的任何事物。
E: You have no idea what it was that happened to him, but the ending he met is clear to see. Perhaps he happened to bump into a troupe of wandering guards or a merciless Titankin... Whatever it may have been, Castrum Kremnos will tolerate no outcome but victory.

C: 啊，我知道了！您是在为我的不敬而愤怒对吧，既见神迹，当然要跪拜。我这就把您喜爱的物品放在神迹前，供您享用。嗯，都放好了。
E: Ah, I understand! My disrespect has enraged you, hasn't it? When in the presence of a miracle, it is only right for me to bow before you. I will arrange your favorite items before this miracle for you to enjoy. There, they are all in place.

C: 左左…右右…上上…下下…您突然发怒，是在说我不该前往神悟树庭吗？我明白了。
E: Left, left... Right, right... Up, up... Down, down... This sudden rage of yours... does it mean that you do not wish for me to go to Grove of Epiphany? I understand.

C: 嘎…吱…尽管你使出了全身力气，木马的车轮仍旧像是牢牢固定在地面上，并未产生任何位移。恍神间，你似乎听到了轻微的吸气声。
E: Creak... Creak... You try to pull with all your strength, but the wheels on the wooden horse remain firmly fixed in place. They don't seem to move at all. Suddenly, you hear a faint moan.

C: 古老的言语还在耳畔回荡，但活窗已然合上。恍神间，你似乎看到木马的周身亮起微光，像是无形的门扉正在开启，难以用言语描述的空洞感忽地涌上心头。
E: The ancient words linger in the air, but the sliding window has been sealed shut. In your daze, you notice a faint glow around the wooden horse, as if an invisible portal opens — an ineffable emptiness suddenly grips your heart.

C: 原来你是活的？！
E: So you're actually alive!?

C: 多谢你，好心人，我感觉暖和多了。
E: Thank you, kind soul. I feel much warmer now.

C: 呼呼——
E: Zzz...

C: 对不起，我确实也太偏激了。请让我也来帮忙，就当作换取这一餐的回报吧。
E: I'm sorry, I was being too extreme. Please, let me help as well, consider it my way of repaying this meal.

C: 但他们依旧不满足，仍希望让大地兽替自己分担更多忧愁。替自己戍守城墙、替自己品尝蜜酿、替自己向情人低语——当然，应和的也不过是另一只大地兽。
E: Yet they remained unsatisfied, still wishing for the dromases to bear even more of their burdens, to guard the city walls on their behalf, to taste the mead for them, to whisper sweet words to their lovers. Though, of course, the only response would come from another dromas.

C: 你叫佩佩是吧？
E: Are you calling Peppy over?

C: 身为空间站的一份子，即使是小狗也要遵守空间站的规则，你决定对佩佩进行——
E: As a member of the space station, even puppies have to abide by the rules of the station. So for Peppy, you decide to...

C: 我有些问题想问你…
E: I have some questions for you...

C: 在这里的时间转瞬即逝，对我而言，每一天都好像刚刚来到这里一样。
E: Time flies here. But for me, every day still feels like the first.

C: 给你个忠告，出门在外要学会保护自己，知人知面不知心……
E: Here's my advice for you. Learn to protect yourself when you are outside. You never know what people are thinking.

C: 总之，你在空间站待得越久，以后一定会认识她的。
E: Anyway, if you stay long enough on the space station, I'm sure you'll get to know her in the future.

C: 真不是我说，你们年轻人其实不爱听这句，但我还是得说——没有啥忘不掉的事儿，没有啥过不去的坎儿！真要是有，那就是当时没琢磨明白，当局者迷了！
E: I know young people these days hate to hear this, but nothing is truly unforgettable, and there's nothing you can't get over! If there is, it's only because you've been too lost to figure it out!

C: 我们有大量的资料被摧毁，它们不同于实验材料，可以凭借复刻一次实验就得到数据。里面的许多星神秘闻，是很难有机会再次听闻的……
E: A lot of our files were destroyed. Unlike experimental documents, which they can get the data by repeating the experiment, many Aeon mysteries will be lost forever...

C: 我没什么要问的了。
E: That's all from me.

C: 不过这件事还是需要佩佩自己同意才行，我也得尊重它的想法。
E: But Peppy has the final say in this. I have to respect his opinion.

C: 那我还是不打扰你了。
E: I'll stop bothering you.

C: 有是有…不过规模远远不如之前那个大，都是些交流兴趣爱好的小群。
E: There are... but none of them are as big as the one we dealt with. Most of them are just for people who share the same hobbies to exchange ideas.

C: 我们的造物主很忙很忙，她在很努力地做研究，我们也要努力地工作，好好修复这里的一切…否则就是在给阮•梅女士丢人！
E: Our creator is extremely busy with her research. So, we have to do our best to fix everything here, or we'll be a disgrace to her!

C: 我听我们中最聪明的「贤者」说，我和绿豆酥的配方有点特殊。
E: According to the wisest among us, Mung Bean Cake and I are made with a special recipe.

C: 算了，这天是聊不下去了。
E: Well, I'm struggling to keep this conversation going.

C: 我挺好奇的…
E: I'm curious...

C: 那就好，幸好没耽误我太久。
E: Great! I'm glad this hasn't taken up too much of my time.

C: 你要是有什么想问的想说的，尽管问，尽管说！
E: If you have anything to say or ask, feel free to fire away!

C: 阮•梅女士在为我挑选口味的时候，选了许久，最后加了大量的野心与自信，这才造就了我，其他人哪里比得上我啊？
E: Miss Ruan Mei spent a long time deciding on my recipe. In the end, she added lots of ambition and self-confidence to me. I'm superior to everyone else!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 你一定是被我骁勇善战的气息吓到了！这也正常！
E: You must find my gallant vibe pretty daunting, which is normal!

C: 芝士流心，不，现在是洞悉者，它眼神坚定地望着你。
E: Molten Cheese Tart— nope, the one who identifies as Insighter, looks at you with a firm gaze.

C: 你要是感兴趣，或者有什么想问的，我会尽量回答你。
E: If you're interested or have any questions, I'll do my best to answer them.

C: 我这几柄长矛，正是以当年战矛的碎片重铸而成，如假包换！
E: These lances of mine are forged from the shards of that very lance all those years ago! They're as good as the real artifact!

C: 假如用你的矛攻击他的盾…
E: If you used your lance to attack his shield...

C: 并不准确，比试。
E: Not accurate, the duel was.

C: 平平无奇的箩筐，由翁法罗斯的草本植物编织而成，经年的日晒雨淋使得表面有些褪色。
E: An unremarkable basket woven from plants native to Amphoreus. Years of direct sunlight and rain have caused its color to fade.

C: 我就是路过的。
E: I'm just passing by.

C: 学生的成就超过老师，是什么稀奇事吗？按你的观点，世界岂不是始终在倒退？
E: Is it that rare for a student to surpass their teacher? If we follow your view, surely the world would only ever be regressing?

C: 异乡的智者，请解答我的疑惑——
E: Wise one from beyond, please enlighten me...

C: 哎，今天我们正是因此而争吵…
E: *sigh* That's precisely what we were arguing about today...

C: 我也有种不好的预感…哈托努斯，他们有告诉你这些东西要送去哪儿吗？
E: I've got a bad feeling about this, too... Chartonus, did they tell you where this stuff was going?

C: 今天的每条线索，都指向一件事——宁芙正在被家人逼迫。
E: Every clue so far today points to one outcome and one alone: Nympha's family put her under duress.

C: 你们要带我去哪儿？你真打算这样对你的女儿？
E: Where are you taking me? Are you really going to do this... to your own daughter?

C: 时至今日，我才恍然大悟——其实牵起这条金丝的，一直都是你——你的勇敢、你的善良、你的执着……要守护这份感情，我也需要与你一同抗争。
E: But it's only today that I finally realized... that the one pulling on this golden thread has always been you: Your courage, your kindness, your perseverance... To protect our relationship, I also need to fight alongside you.

C: 啊，那孩子…嗯，我确实有看到。可惜我眼花，没太看清她的去向。
E: Ah, that kid... Mmm, I sure did. Unfortunately, my eyesight is no longer the best, so I couldn't really make out which direction she was going in.

C: 那孩子每天都忙忙碌碌的，想必是经历过许多事才变得如此持家。如果能帮到她就好了……
E: That kid's always beavering away at something. She must've been through a lot if she's running household affairs so well. I wish there was a way I could help her...

C: 有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
E: Did you see a child running this way?

C: 我不怕危险，我要爸爸妈妈。我已经和叔叔阿姨们在外面走过一遍了，再走一遍也没关系！
E: I'm not afraid of danger. I just want my mom and dad. I've been out for a walk outside the city before with the grown-ups, so if I go out again, I'll be fine!

C: 这就够你操心的了。你知道赚钱不是件容易事吧？
E: You worry about all that stuff first. You know it's not easy earning money, right?

C: 今天的风儿好喧嚣啊。
E: The wind sure is noisy today.

C: 就这？我才刚做完热身运动。
E: Is that it? I only just finished warming up.

C: 吟游诗人从来不说谎。我再也回不到家乡，再也见不到爸爸妈妈了……
E: A bard never lies. I'll never be able to go back to my hometown... and I'll never see mom and dad again...

C: 我会尽量和{RUBY_B#比如旁边那位}其他有识之士{RUBY_E#}一起行动，保持团结…「逝者只能停下脚步，但生者还必须前行。」
E: I'll try to act with {RUBY_B#the person beside me}other smart souls{RUBY_E#} and stay united... "The dead can only stop, but the living must move forward."

C: 不用给我钱…
E: No need to pay me...

C: 总算清静了…让我看看，这帮小兔崽子有没有又往典藏里放些大逆不道的东西……
E: Finally, it's quiet again... Let me see, I wonder if these brats have been sneaking impure content into the collection...

C: 哎呦，太好了——年轻人，你可算回来了！风堇小姐才刚来过，得知你独自去了树庭，她很担心你的安全。
E: Oh thank goodness — you're back, young one! Miss Hyacine was just here, worried sick about you going to the Grove alone.

C: 有空的话，能不能替我跑一趟，去瞧瞧其他人呢？
E: If you're not too busy, could you spare some time to see how they are doing?

C: 这里是大地兽乐园！
E: This was a paradise for dromases!

C: 俗话说得好：没有一顿红土解决不了的大地兽，要是有，那就再给它来一顿。
E: As the saying goes: There's no dromas a meal of redsoil can't handle. If there is, give it another meal.

C: 呜嗡嗡嗡嗡！
E: Grumphhhh!

C: …嗡嗡！
E: ...Grumph!

C: 嗡嗡嗡……
E: Grumphhh...

C: 嗡嗡嗡……
E: Grumphhh...

C: 必须听从王的命令。
E: We must obey the king's command.

C: …嗯？找我有事吗？
E: ...Oh? Looking for something?

C: 因为神明很器重你，这是试炼。
E: Because the gods value you. This is a trial.

C: 什么乱七八糟的？
E: What nonsense is this?

C: 今日，于排练场中，演员伊俄，试图谋害编剧，事件——
E: Today, in the rehearsal hall, actor Eio stands accused of attempting to murder the playwright. This case—

C: 不，观测是取决于第三者的。
E: No, observation depends on the third party!

C: 赛飞儿，这个名字我有印象，确实是背负着神权的黄金裔，她的画像也有记录在册，容我看看。
E: Cipher... I do recall that name. She's indeed a Chrysos Heir endowed with divine authority. Her portrait should be on file — let me check.

C: 很好，很有精神！
E: Great, you're in good spirits!

C: 这您就问对人了，我别的没有，就是鬼主意多。
E: You've come to the right person for this, I don't have much, but I sure have a lot of clever ideas.

C: 听着就很像假货啊！
E: Sounds like counterfeit goods to me!

C: {RUBY_B#泰坦嘶吼}Dilas{RUBY_E#}！
E: {RUBY_B#Titan roars}Dilas{RUBY_E#}!

C: 那我，那我……
E: Then I... I...

C: 战火已经烧到了奥赫玛。阁下虽然武艺高强，但若没有要紧的事，还是别在外面闲逛了，速去避难吧！
E: The war's already reached Okhema. You might be pretty skilled and powerful, but if you don't have anything urgent that's keeping you out here, it's best not to linger outside and find shelter!

C: 斐第斯，斐第斯，放我们进入负世祭坛，又假扮刻法勒回应希瑞雅的「好心的守卫叔叔」，原来是叫这个名字。
E: Phedes, Phedes... Oh, "Mr. Nice Guard" who sneaked us into the Worldbearing Altar and impersonated Kephale for Serena — that was his name.

C: 可是，为什么你背负的黎明机器不再发出光芒了？大司铎大人不是说它会照拂圣城…直到永远吗？
E: But why does your Dawn Device darken? Didn't the chaplain say it would protect us till... forever?

C: 结束了，呃，希瑞雅…竟然还没走？悄悄躲着她离开吧！
E: It's over. Huh? Serena... is still here? Better sneak away from her quietly!

C: 看这信纸的折法，是小维吉妮娅吧，一定又写了漂亮的新诗……
E: Looking at how this letter is folded, it must be from little Verginia. She must have written another beautiful poem...

C: …阁下，你先回去吧，就说我还在考虑。拜托你了。
E: ...You should head back. Just tell her I'm still thinking about it. I'm counting on you.

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}阁下…真不愧是你，能在这里找到我。
E: Ah, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... I knew you would be the one to find me here.

C: 真是僻静的居所啊，此地…也不属于欢宴吗？
E: What a secluded dwelling... Is this place also not meant for festivities?

C: 那么，我就先行告退……
E: Well, I should be going now...

C: 有什么问题吗？
E: Yeah, why?

C: 没想到正好碰见你…
E: I didn't expect to bump into you...

C: 列车在星星间穿行…别说是孩子们，哪怕对我这样的大人而言，这场景也足够浪漫了。
E: Traveling between the stars... Even an adult like me can't help but find it captivating, let alone the children.

C: 帕姆…呜呜呜…帕姆……
E: Pom-Pom... *whimper* Pom-Pom...

C: 我要参加！
E: Sure thing!

C: 不过…它确实很可爱，也很软！老爹肯定会喜欢的！
E: But... it does look cute. And it's soft too! Daddy will love it.

C: 而且它还是荣誉队员的造型呢，是帮了虎克和老爹大忙的优秀队员！虎克觉得这个纪念品真的很棒哦！
E: It's modeled after you, honorary member! You did a big favor for Hook and daddy, so I think this is a fitting gift!

C: {NICKNAME}，能不能和你打个商量，列车留声机借我带回家几天？
E: {NICKNAME}, can I borrow the Express' phonograph for a few days?

C: 虽然小姐已经为大家购买了人体工学的座椅，但依然觉得差了点什么。如果能使用这个材质的坐垫，应该可以让小姐和科员们都感觉轻松一些。
E: Lady Asta bought ergonomic chairs for everybody, but I feel like there's still room for improvement. Cushions like this one might actually be the missing piece.

C: 想象一下，在一列长夜孤灯似的列车里眺望窗外的文明。纷争、痛苦、绝望、悲鸣，仿佛都被隔绝在了另一个世界……
E: Such a train can be likened to a solitary candle in the darkness of night... One may peer upon civilizations where strife, hardship, desperation, and sorrow exist seemingly in a separate plane of existence...

C: 呜，糟了……
E: Oh no, this is bad...

C: 你看看我是不是长高了……
E: What do you think? Have I grown taller?

C: 我原本不做梦的。现在开始做起到处旅行的梦，一定是被关的太久了。
E: I dreamed about travel. I must've been locked away too long...

C: 哎呀，我刚才说的「变高」不是那个意思。
E: Ugh, it's not what you think! I wasn't dreaming about getting taller...

C: 重新做人是有点困难的。
E: It's a bit hard to start over again.

C: 不过我看你最近气色不是很好哦，是不是太忙碌了呢？要记得好好休息才行，日常营养摄入也不能掉以轻心。
E: But you're the one who seems a bit out of it. Are you doing too much work? Do remember to rest, and keep up a nutritious diet.

C: 这年轻时候的爱情就是炽热，我怀疑伯纳德那老东西，就是在洛奇身上，看到了自个儿年轻时候的影子吧，嘿。
E: Young love is always full of passion. I guess Bernard just saw his younger self in Rocky, haha.

C: 喏，瞧见没，这个小玩具。可别觉得是给小孩儿玩的！这辆装甲车跑过的路，比我喝的酒都多！这个小模型，里头完美复刻了原型的机动轨道呢。
E: Here, check this out. Don't think this is some child's plaything! The armored car this miniature model is based on has traveled on more roads than I could count! This model even has a perfect replica of the real thing's mechanized track.

C: 登上列车之后，看着在城里和雪原中根本无法见到的景色…这种念头也变得越来越强烈了。
E: That thought has been growing stronger ever since I boarded the Express... and saw views that would never have been visible from the city or the Snow Plains.

C: 一二三四五~
E: One, two, three, four, five...

C: 再到后来，咖啡几乎完全从市面上消失了——只有极少数地下渠道才能拿到货源。听说一些贪心的黑商会把劣质的咖啡豆炒至天价……
E: As a result, coffee beans became a rare sight — now you can only procure them if you have the right connections. I've even heard the tales of greedy merchant guilds driving up the cost of substandard coffee beans...

C: 你的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 我想问的是，帕姆它…究竟是学会了人类语言的兔子，还是被变成了兔子的人？
E: What I'd like to know... is Pom-Pom a rabbit that learned to speak...? Or a person that was turned into a rabbit?

C: 假期也不一定非得做些什么…
E: It's fine to do nothing while on vacation...

C: 哦！原来如此。
E: Oh! I see what you mean.

C: 唔，没有什么可回赠于你的…我身上这些小物件，都是闲暇时自己绣的。{NICKNAME}，如果你喜欢，我也可以做一些赠予你。
E: Hmm, I don't have much with me to offer in return... These little fancies I wear are what I embroider in my free time. {NICKNAME}, I can craft some for you too if you like.

C: 不知道「海水熔岩」味的糕点，你们会不会感兴趣……
E: I wonder if you'd be interested in seawater magma flavored pastries...

C: 蠢材之所以为蠢材，正是因为无法自知。希望你不要变成那样。
E: What defines a fool is the inability to recognize their own shortcomings. Don't let that be you.

C: 可惜，大多数人都不明白这道理…知识看似免费，却最为昂贵。
E: Regrettably, most languish in ignorance... They fail to grasp that while knowledge appears costless, its true value is immeasurable.

C: 智库播报留声机，统统都能介绍
E: The data bank, the Phonograph... I'll give you a tour!

C: 暂时忘记烦忧和愁苦吧。
E: Forget all your worries and sorrows for now.

C: 我也喜欢，不愧是知更鸟小姐！
E: Impressive, Miss Robin! I like it too.

C: 我们无法决定人生，但梦境注定还是梦境。对于那些正在坠入深渊的人，我希望尽我所能帮助并治愈他们，让他们能安稳地回到现实……
E: We may not be able to decide our lives, but the Dreamscape is doomed to be just a Dreamscape. For those who fall into the abyss, I can only hope to help them heal and return to reality in peace...

C: 列车上不能玩火！下车！
E: No playing with fire on the Express! Disembark immediately!

C: 福袋在发光！
E: The pouch is glowing!

C: 谢谢你的邀请，{NICKNAME}，我们又见面了，请容许我赞美你诚挚而热情的心灵！
E: We meet again, {NICKNAME}. Thank you for the invitation. Please allow me to praise your sincere and compassionate soul!

C: 我会潜心求教，避免类似的事件再次发生。
E: I will seek advice, to prevent something like this from happening again.

C: 好、好香的味道！会在哪里呢，是列车上的厨房么……
E: That smells so, so good! Where is it coming from? Is it coming from the kitchen on the Express?

C: 一下就找到了最佳观星点！
E: You found the best stargazing spot in no time!

C: 你觉得我要是和这样的金主成了朋友，还能赚他那么多钱吗？那还有人性吗？
E: Do you think I could make that kind of money if I became friends with guys like him? And would that even be ethical?

C: 好像也没什么特别的事情发生。
E: Eh, there doesn't seem to be anything special going on.

C: 你怎么突然回来了，是在外面惹上什么麻烦了吗？
E: Back already? Did you get into some trouble?

C: 对了，你要是在这附近发现了什么好玩的人或事，别忘了叫上我一起研究讨论。人生嘛，就是要及时行乐！钱不是问题，图的就是一个新鲜。
E: By the way, if you find anything or anyone interesting, let me know too. Life is all about having fun! Money is no issue, curiosity fuels me.

C: 猫，狗，雪地里的野狼和一些抗寒的鸟类…没别的了。其它动物只能去博物馆里看标本，一睹往日模样。
E: Cats and dogs. There are wolves and birds in the wild... That's about it. You'll have to check out the museum's specimens to see what other kinds of animals there were in the past.

C: 努力加强下写作技巧吧。
E: Write some more and you'll get the hang of it.

C: 能问你一些别的事吗？
E: Can I ask you something else?

C: 最近生意怎么样？
E: How's business?

C: 那么我就直接问了——您会如何评价《雪原》、《三个三重音》这两部作品？
E: I'll get straight to it. How would you rate these two books, Snow Plains and The Three Trebles?

C: 我身上没带副本…这样吧，你去行政区找一个叫亚诺的人，我之前委托过他改编《雪国冒险奇谭》，还塞给了他全本作为参考。或者您也可以找找其他门路。
E: I don't have a copy with me at the moment... I'd suggest you go find Amo in the Administrative District. I commissioned him to adapt Tale of the Winterlands and sent him a copy a while ago. Or if you can get the book through other means, feel free.

C: 就能解读平行宇宙传达的信息！
E: That you can interpret messages sent from another universe!

C: 不就在这儿嘛，我这么大个脑袋没看到？我们天才从来不需要借助外力——包括纸笔——靠这一副好脑袋就够了！
E: It's right here, obviously. Can you not see my big brain? A genius does not require the help of external tools, including pen and paper. All a genius needs is their own brain!

C: 在看我的过去，现在和未来。
E: Things that were, things that are, and things that are yet to happen.

C: 既然你已经听到了，那就没什么好隐瞒的了。对，是我。
E: Since you've heard it already, I have nothing to hide anymore. Yes, it was me.

C: 不过是不是都不重要，黄金歌剧院的音乐剧演员塔米拉随时欢迎采访。
E: Doesn't matter either way. Tamila of the Golden Theater always welcomes interviews.

C: 不管您是想送人还是自己欣赏，「暖阳花」都是个不错的选择。
E: It's a great choice for a gift or even to keep for yourself.

C: 给我介绍下这些花吧。
E: What about these?

C: 这种情况的确不多见，但导演执意要小女子给塔米拉小姐的每首歌配音，小女子也推不掉呀。
E: Usually, no. But the director insisted that I do the voice over for Tamila's songs.

C: 她怎么对你不满意？
E: Why is she unhappy with you?

C: 烦心事可真多…干嘛，没见过发牢骚的人啊？
E: I've got a lot on my mind... What? You've never seen someone express emotion before?

C: 两只眼睛都看出来了。
E: From every word you've just yelled...

C: 又不是在相亲…我说话一直都是这个语调。
E: It's not like I'm on a bad date or something... This is just how I talk.

C: 去去去，你赶紧走吧，可别让那边的铁卫听到我们在议论这些……
E: Scram. Don't let the guards hear us talking about this...

C: 不打扰你啦。
E: I should stop bothering you now.

C: 难道是搏击俱乐部？
E: Are you hinting at the Fight Club?

C: 那么，以后就请{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}多关照啦！
E: It's really nice to meet you!

C: 哦、哦哦！又见面了，咱们还真有缘。
E: Oh... Ooh! We meet again! It seems we have a connection.

C: 其实我很好奇…
E: I'm curious...

C: 哼，算了，不和你开玩笑了。我就是尤利安，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}没认错。找我有什么事嘛？
E: Hmm... Fine. I'll stop messing with you. You are right, I'm Julian. What do you want from me?

C: 我把费斯曼老爹的事摆平了。
E: I sorted things out with Fersman.

C: 因为父女情深吧。
E: Because a father and daughter's love knows no bounds.

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 如果不能按时还债的话，爸爸就会…所以，所以我才被迫去外面偷东西……
E: If papa doesn't pay the debt on time, he would be... So that's why I started to steal...

C: 你、你们不知道「地火」？不、不可能，你肯定是在开、开玩笑……
E: Y—You don't know what Wildfire is...? You must be kidding...

C: 我也能理解他们的浪漫幻想啦。不过对我自己来说，能让机器人拥有近似人类的感情，才是最值得投入精力的研究目标……
E: I get why they think that's cool. But for me, the most worthwhile research is to make robots that have human emotions...

C: 你是问宾馆的生意呢，还是问老头子我啊？宾馆的话还好，不算特别忙。至于我，这日子倒是挺有盼头。
E: Do you mean how's business been, or how I've been doing? The hotel's fine, not too busy. As for me, I'm looking forward to good times.

C: 这都快十年了，我终于收到第一封信…看来贝洛伯格是要变天了！你看看，我这亲戚信里也说了：「大守护者马上就要解除封锁政策」……
E: It's been almost ten years, and I've finally received my first letter... Looks like Belobog is back, bay-bee! Check it out, my relative even said in their letter, "The Supreme Guardian is lifting the blockade soon"...

C: 你后来买到礼物了吗？
E: Did you manage to buy a gift?

C: 是啊…忙活了这么久，抓洞螈赚的钱还不够我去集会所买杯饮料呢。不过我的洞螈烹饪手艺倒是有进步……
E: Yes... I can't even afford a drink at the Gathering Place with what I've earned from catching olms. Still, I've become a better cook of olm dishes...

C: 假如现状不能改变，那上下层区的再融合也就无从谈起。我已经安排了与几位财政大臣的会面，希望能商量出基本的改革方向。
E: If things don't get better, then you can forget about reintegrating the Overworld and the Underworld. I've booked meetings with several of the finance ministers to try to hammer out a basic direction for reforms.

C: …但那都不重要了，我该反思的是自己当时的状态。我差点就被压力击倒了…在那个瞬间，我能想到的只有逃避责任、一了百了。
E: ...Well, that's no longer important. What I need to reflect on is how I felt at that moment, I almost caved to the pressure... At that moment, all I wanted was to escape my responsibilities, once and for all.

C: 不必给自己那么大压力。
E: There's no need to put so much pressure on yourself.

C: …我离书里说的境界还差得很远。之前在大矿区的时候，我果然还是被一时的火气给左右了…要不然，我说不定还能从那些黑衣人嘴里套出更多信息。
E: ...I am still far from the standard this book sets out. When I was in the Great Mine, I was thrown off by a moment of rage... If I had stayed cool, I might have been able to get a little more information from those people in black.

C: 话说回来，那些黑衣人，他们虽然惹出不少乱子，但一个个的好像都挺见多识广的……
E: Having said that, those people in black clothes... though they've caused a lot of trouble, they all seem pretty educated...

C: 忙碌，充实。并不是每个人都能一下适应生活中发生的剧变，或许也有人的生意会因为封锁解除受到影响……
E: Busy, and well. Not everyone can just get used to all the changes so fast, and some businesses might be impacted by the lifting of the blockade...

C: 现在这状况…真是难为老弟了。
E: Now though... Things are really tough for Gepard.

C: 狠话也放了，吉他也砸了…我要是再不从阴影里走出来，那可就太不摇滚了——你说是吧？
E: I did the growly voice and smashed up my guitar... It wouldn't be very rock 'n' roll if we just hid in the shadows and said nothing, right?

C: 对于贝洛伯格这座城市来说，我掌握的知识还能派上不少用场。我要用自己的能力去多帮助周围的人，把逃离这里的念头暂且放一放。
E: As for the city of Belobog, I can put my knowledge to lots of different uses. I'll use my talents to help people around me, and put aside for now any thoughts of escape.

C: 我要购物。
E: I want to buy something.

C: 加入鼹鼠党的条件很复杂哦，而且我可是会经常换的，你要记好了！
E: The requirements are complicated, but I change them all the time. So listen up!

C: 哎呀，瞧瞧，这不是咱的老顾客{NICKNAME}吗？
E: Ack, look here — isn't this our old friend {NICKNAME}?

C: 哟…听好。
E: Right... Listen up.

C: 不打扰你科考了。
E: Then I'll leave you to your research.

C: 这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，你的手机也出现了卡顿、过热、运行阻塞的情况吗？不如来我这里升级一下系统吧。
E: Hey, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! Are you experiencing issues with your phone such as lagging, overheating, or system-based stoppages? I can help you upgrade your system.

C: 总之，你试试就知道了，不满意不要钱。
E: Anyway, give it a try and see for yourself. And don't worry. I won't charge you if you're not satisfied.

C: （假装不懂）星轨？
E: (Pretend to be clueless) Star Rail?

C: 好嘞。你放心，我已经帮助过二十多个人了。
E: No problem. I've already helped over two dozen customers.

C: （故作卖力）嘿...呀...哈！看，完成了。
E: (Pretending to work hard) Hmmm... Hyaa... Hah! Look, it's done.

C: 好吧，为了打消你的十万个为什么，我想我还是解释一下比较好。
E: All right, to cease your seemingly endless confusion, please allow me to explain.

C: （先不对猪弹琴了）
E: (Give up trying to reason with a pig)

C: 「哦！宏伟的贝洛伯格……」
E: "Oh! The Magnificent Belobog..."

C: 女士您看，孩子从小到大总得发展些兴趣爱好……
E: Look, madam — children will always need a few hobbies as they grow up and develop...

C: 我车钥匙呢……
E: Where did my keys go...

C: 你先等等……
E: Hang on...

C: 他去的是后勤部，放心吧。
E: He went to the Logistics Department. Don't worry.

C: 后勤部特供红肠罐头！
E: The Logistics Department's special supply of Belobog Sausages!

C: 你那课题怎么样？
E: What about that research?

C: 还是别深究了。
E: Best not to ask.

C: 妈妈，「牛奶」是什么呀？
E: Mom, what's "milk"?

C: 我也要到外面去…
E: I wanna go outside, too...

C: 那我陪你一起！
E: I'll go with you!

C: 当心货物，请避让。
E: Please maintain a safe distance from the cargo.

C: 哟，你哪位？这儿是博物馆修理间，可没展览给你看哪……
E: Hey, who are you? This is the restoration room of the museum, nothing here is on display...

C: 想问一些事…
E: I have some questions...

C: 我，贝洛伯格的大守护者，谨代表贝洛伯格和她的全体子民向你表示诚挚的谢意。
E: As the Supreme Guardian of Belobog, I would like to express my sincerest gratitude to you on behalf of Belobog and all her people.

C: 听说实物比这个还要大呢。
E: Apparently the real thing is bigger than this.

C: …咬到舌头了。
E: ...I bit my tongue.

C: 我并不擅长与人在智慧上交锋，那种感觉就像是躺在案板上任由持着砍刀的屠夫随意宰割…相信我，你不会喜欢那种感觉的。
E: I'm not good at battles of wits. Those make me feel like I'm on a chopping board waiting to be butchered by whoever has the knife... Trust me, it's not a nice feeling to have.

C: 所以这家小小陈机铺，就是给人心和旧物的一点自留地。总有一些难以替代的东西需要这样的旧物翻新的服务。
E: So this little Oldies Depot is a place for people's keepsakes and old things. There's always gonna be something irreplaceable that needs fixing up.

C: 人各有所长嘛。
E: Everyone's got their own strengths.

C: 写得很不错啊。
E: Beautifully written.

C: 噢。我好悲伤。
E: Oh, I'm so sad.

C: 他们的技术已经可以创造出一个规模庞大的虚拟生活社区，而不是个电子游戏。
E: Their technology is already capable of creating a large-scale VR community, rather than just some video game.

C: 等到我们破获了十王司都没能处理好的大案要案时，我得让全长乐天的人都知道，我们地衡司有多了不起…目前这个阶段就低调一些好了。
E: Once we crack a major case that even the Ten-Lords Commission can't solve, then I'll let the whole Exalting Sanctum know about how great the Realm-Keeping Commission is... Until then, we'll keep things on the down-low.

C: 不过啊，长期征战的士兵比老百姓更容易引发魔阴身，好像是因为什么创伤后应激啥啥啥，我也不记得了，总之就是很危险。
E: However, veteran soldiers are far more likely than everyday citizens to be stricken with mara — something to do with post-traumatic stress. Anyways, it's very dangerous.

C: 那小子也不是一直这样的，据说他以前是总务处的王牌精英。因为某次失误之后一蹶不振，就被调任到我们这个辖区来了。
E: That little punk wasn't always this way. Apparently he used to be an elite at the General Affairs Office — but he became completely demotivated after some kind of setback, and was transferred to our jurisdiction.

C: 组织灾后重建、追捕药王残党、清算趁火打劫…唉，灾难虽然结束了，但该干的工作还没干完啊……
E: Organizing post-disaster reconstruction, pursuing the Sanctus Medicus remnants, and arresting looters... Alas, there is plenty of work to be done despite the disaster being over...

C: 那时候…地衡司的人忙得都都没空来稽查我的小摊了，不知道…广大什么时候会回来呢……
E: At that time, people from the Realm-Keeping Commission were so busy that they had no time to inspect my stand. I wonder when Guangda will return...

C: 我们仙舟人嘛，不老不死——反正爹娘是乐意管我一辈子的，那我就随他们去呗。
E: We Xianzhou people, we don't grow old — and anyway, my parents are willing to take care of me for the rest of my life, so I'll just let them.

C: 关键是我也想不通他们为什么要这么举例子…建木生发又不是啥好事，我长大了可是好事啊！这也能相提并论？
E: The point is, I don't get why they have to make this kind of metaphor... The Ambrosial Arbor growing is far from good news, but me growing up is a good thing! What kind of comparison is that?

C: 十个人里九个在付款，还有一个在想着成为我的下家，你就放心吧。
E: Nine out of ten people have become paying customers, and the tenth is definitely thinking about becoming my down line. There's absolutely nothing to worry about.

C: 你嘴硬吧！怎么会有短生种不想长命百岁的。
E: You're a stubborn one, aren't you? How can any short-life species not want to live long?

C: 行雪…是吧。我想想——虽然未必有印象就是。
E: Xingxue... right? I'll think about it — despite not really having much of an impression.

C: 啧啧…啧啧啧…这位{F#姑娘}{M#兄台}真是衣冠楚楚、仪表堂堂啊！
E: Tsk-tsk... Tsk, tsk, tsk... This young {F#lass}{M#lad} is dressed to the nines and looking fantastic!

C: 你到底是什么身份？
E: Who exactly are you?

C: 朔雪不理解仙舟的「巡猎」，只当景元一去不返…它在神策府门口等啊、等啊…这一等，就等了三百年。
E: Snowmoon didn't understand what The Hunt meant for Xianzhou, and thought Jing Yuan would never come back... It would wait at the front gates of the Seat of Divine Foresight, just waiting... And waiting... for three hundred years.

C: 咦？这不是前日随云骑军一道缉凶的{NICKNAME}大人嘛！
E: Hmm? Well if it isn't {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, back from hunting criminals with the Cloud Knights!

C: 仔细一看，这不是{NICKNAME}吗？上次见面，老夫还多亏你搭救呢。
E: Hey, aren't you {NICKNAME}? I'm indebted to you for your help the last time we met.

C: 老夫也要继续忙了。路上小心，下次见。
E: It's back to the grind for me. Take care out there, and see you next time.

C: 至于那个存储案牍的玉兆阵列在哪里…我也不知道。我怀疑压根不在「罗浮」，甚至不在仙舟联盟。
E: As for where the jade abacus array that holds all the documents is stored... Well, I don't know. I suspect it isn't even on the Luofu, or even the Xianzhou Alliance at all.

C: 我嘛…从进入十王司开始，人生就结束了。现在这书吏的身份，只不过是一个永无止境的结局罢了。
E: As for me... Ever since I joined the Ten-Lords Commission, the curtains have essentially already come down on my life. My current role as scribe is but an "ending" that simply stretches on forever instead of ceasing to exist.

C: 师傅，不要再念经了。
E: I get it. Please stop this monotonous chanting.

C: 我原本想能帮上大毫大人的忙就好，但是你看现在…我经常加班处理地衡司杂务到半夜，已经远远不止是「帮个忙」的程度了。
E: I thought it would be great to help out Official Dahao, but as you can now see... I'm always putting in overtime with chores until midnight, which is far more than just "doing a solid" for someone.

C: 听上去就很休闲。
E: Sounds very casual to me.

C: 带着棺木的行商？我没有见过…我也不认识所有的行商，要是我知道那位辛克莱也卖超导合金，我一开始就不会做这门生意，太晦气了。
E: A traveling merchant with a coffin? Not that I've seen... But then again, I don't know all the traveling merchants here. If I knew that Sinclair was already selling superconducting alloys, I wouldn't even have gotten into this trade. What rotten luck.

C: …你说的真是青雀吗？
E: ...Are we still talking about Qingque here?

C: 我就不打扰了，您接着忙。
E: I won't bother you any further. Please carry on with your work.

C: 算了，我没什么想问的了。
E: Forget it. I don't have any more questions.

C: 所幸这一次神策府应对及时。如今他们成不了气候，我等只需要站在此处，他们便不敢随意造次。
E: Luckily, the Seat of Divine Foresight acted quickly this time. These days, the Disciples can't get up to anything. I just need to stand here, and they dare not make a move.

C: 他们持明族只要能浴月蜕生，便能洗去一切烦恼重新来过，而我却要背负着痛苦继续生活下去。
E: Because the Vidyadhara can wash away all their troubles and get to start again with their hatching rebirth, but I have to keep on living with this burden of pain I bear.

C: 我这人喜清净，何况我开的还是药店，药店嘛，还是清净点好。太热闹了，也未必是什么好事…长命钱呐，还得长命挣。
E: I'm a person who likes peace and quiet. Not to mention that I run a pharmacy. That's right, a pharmacy. So peace and quiet is best. If things are too bustling around here, it's not necessarily a good thing... Long-life species earn their salaries the long way, y'know.

C: 太卜司的人曾给我算过一卦，说我会是大富大贵的命。可我不信，江湖行医嘛，为的不过就是一口饭而已。
E: Once, this diviner read my fortune and told me I'd be rollin' in dough and living large. But I ain't buying it. I mean, I'm just a wandering healer trying to make ends meet.

C: 我见多识广，连景元都认识……
E: I've been around the block. Ever heard of my friend, Jing Yuan...?

C: 想问你点事。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 你看起来心情不太好。
E: You don't seem to be in the best mood?

C: 「建木」重生那天，我听到了消息，拿起潮信叉——喔，那是咱们护珠人的武器，回到了鳞渊境，想提供些力所能及的帮助。
E: The day I heard the news about the Arbor's resurrection, I picked up my tidal trident — the weapon that we Pearlkeepers use — and ran back to Scalegorge Waterscape to try and give as much support as I could.

C: 没事，不打扰，不打扰。要是想聊聊天，你可以随时来找我。我平时也找不到谁能跟我聊这些。
E: All good, it's no bother at all. Any time you want to chat, just come and find me. I usually can't find anyone to talk with about this stuff.

C: 转念一想，这就是持明轮回的神圣之处。龙祖赐予了我们肉体的永生，但也给了我们不受往日罪孽枷缚的机会。
E: On second thought, this is the reality of the sacred Vidyadhara reincarnation cycle. Long granted us eternal life of the flesh, but also blessed us with the opportunity to absolve ourselves from the sins of our previous lives.

C: 要是一个人永远被同一个念头、同一个自我所困，那岂不是很可悲？
E: Wouldn't it be a tremendous tragedy if someone was eternally stuck with the same thoughts and the same ego?

C: 你看起来心情不太好？
E: You don't seem to be in a good mood.

C: 说是有这么回事，然后云骑军封锁了部分地区，正在缉拿乱党呢。
E: It seems to be true. The Cloud Knights have sealed off some areas and are hunting them down.

C: 你为什么是一只机巧鸟…
E: Why are you a cycrane...?

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 当时场面一片混乱，很多犯人乘机逃了出去。哼，浑水摸鱼算什么好汉，有本事就靠自己的技术出去。
E: The entire place was in chaos. Lots of prisoners used it as their chance to escape. Hmph, what kind of hero tries to capitalize on an advantage like that? If you've got the skills, then you should rely on nothing but yourself!

C: 这地方多好呀。
E: What do you mean? This place is great.

C: 看来{F#小老~妹}{M#小老~弟}是个听不懂人话，也不珍惜生命的家伙，哈哈——跟我一样，有点意思，我俩是同一个类型的人。
E: Oh! A bodacious {F#lass}{M#lad} who has a death wish and never listens. Haha, how interesting! We're more alike than you think.

C: 这个得分情况，放生讲究的是「因物制宜」，看你放生什么东西就去什么地方。
E: Well, it depends on the situation. Each entity has its favorite niche.

C: 放生帮最近怎么样？
E: How is the Unshackled doing these days?

C: 地衡司的监管部门和税率都要求，敝庄出售的「是」且「只能是」茶。希望客人能知悉。
E: According to the regulations issued by the Realm-Keeping Commission, we can only sell TEA to customers. I hope you can understand, dear customer.

C: 信不信由您了。
E: It's up to you to believe it or not.

C: 当然，要是新品研发顺利，我还会感谢您呢。
E: Sure it won't. I would even express my gratitude if the development of new products goes well.

C: 你们化外民对旧物的价值判断和我们不同，所以周围很多朋友都暗搓搓劝我提高些价格…可旧物就是旧物嘛。
E: These outworlders value artifacts differently to us, so my friends keep telling me to up the prices but... well, it's just old stuff, isn't it?

C: 至于我是什么…我就是我啦！就像你就是你那样！
E: As for what I am.... I'm just me! Just like you're just you!

C: 当然了，要论烟火气息，方壶确实不如罗浮这般热闹。咱们做生意的求财，无非想沾点烟火气。
E: I have to admit that the Fanghu is not as lively as the Luofu, and that's why I came here. I'm a merchant, and we chase after this bustling atmosphere.

C: 哈哈哈哈，我知道你心地善良，不过倒也不必为我操心。
E: Hahaha, thank you, kindhearted traveler, but don't worry about that.

C: 换言之，你没有评价？
E: So, you don't have any remarks on IPC?

C: 哎，希望我的办公椅没有被收走吧。
E: *Sigh* I hope they haven't taken the chair out of my office.

C: 幽囚狱现在情况如何？
E: How's The Shackling Prison faring?

C: 好的，请您保重。
E: Alright, take care.

C: 你看见的是仙舟「方壶」，持明游荡于方寸烟海之中，「护珠人」静默凝思，隐隐有肃杀的龙吟声传来。
E: You are seeing the Xianzhou Fanghu, with Vidyadhara roaming around the Miniature Myriads and Pearlkeepers meditating. The sound of belligerent dragon chants echoes through space from time to time.

C: 但战事不同，帐下将士都是鲜活的人，他们的喜怒哀乐、他们的士气高低都远比这些死气沉沉的棋子更加难以掌控。
E: Well, the same doesn't apply to warfare. Every soldier in my army is human. Their emotions and morale are way harder to anticipate than some lifeless pawns on a predetermined chessboard.

C: 你是想说「慧眼识珠」吧？
E: You meant "eye for talent," right?

C: 那你去忙吧，下次有空的时候，咱们捉鬼小队再好好聚一聚。
E: Alright, go take care of your stuff. Next time you're free, let's get the ghost-hunting squad together for a proper catch-up.

C: 最佳回答：「我们」不知道。
E: Best answer: We do not know.

C: 想找你聊聊天。
E: I wanted to chat with you.

C: 呀～这不是{NICKNAME}吗？你来金人巷玩啦～
E: Ah, if it isn't {NICKNAME}! You're back in Aurum Alley~

C: 咱这个时代，网络世界瞬息万变，成名和过气都是刹那间的事…线下杂技和曲艺演出才是我的基本盘。
E: These days, the online world changes every minute, going viral and getting cancelled can all happen in the blink of an eye... Acrobatics and folk arts are still where my skills lie.

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}来绥园，还有什么事情要找我吗？
E: Oh yeah, did you come to Fyxestroll Garden to see me, {NICKNAME}?

C: 真的假的？
E: You're joking?

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I won't bother you.

C: 想问你些事。
E: I would like to ask you some questions.

C: 哈哈，将军的确光顾过，不过状况百出。
E: Haha, the general has visited before, but it was a... wayward occasion.

C: 工造司的「解玉坊」开放「民用玉兆制作标准」之后，各种各样的品牌也像雨后春笋一样，不过我还是最推荐亲亲「瑞兆」。
E: After the Jade Decipher Workshop from the Artisanship Commission developed their Standards for Manufacture of Civilian-Purpose Jade Abaci, various brands have sprung onto the market — but I still recommend the Auspicious as the best of the lot.

C: 嗯，亲亲多考虑考虑，欢迎随时光临。
E: Have a good think about it, sweetie. You're welcome back, any time.

C: （太长了，下次再听吧）
E: (This story is taking too long. I'll listen to it another time.)

C: 说来也是有趣，这建木竟然以这样的方式，对在下的工作造成了显著的影响…这估计寿瘟祸祖本尊都想不到吧，哈哈。
E: Who would have thought the Ambrosial Arbor would significantly affect my work in this way... I bet even the Plagues Author couldn't have expected this, haha.

C: 无意冒犯，我可能比你多活数倍，要是生活不如你精彩，这不是很可笑吗？我要活得比你精彩百倍！
E: I didn't mean to offend. I've probably lived much longer than you — it would be a travesty if my life was that less exciting than yours! It's almost imperative that I lead a more interesting life!

C: …不是咸不是淡不是辣不是甜，是一种难吃的极意，是凡人到达不了的境界。
E: ...It's not salty, nor bland, nor spicy, nor sweet — it is the epitome of "yuck." It is not a culinary state that mortals can attain.

C: 你怎么知道我不是其中的一员呢？
E: And how do you know I'm not one of them?

C: 想想也是，我不就是让几只动物会说人话，教当地人种改良的星芋，治好了几个糖尿病患者——虽然他们最后还是土法炼丹害死了自己……
E: In hindsight, all I did was make a few animals talk, teach the locals how to plant modified startaros, and cured a few diabetics — though they still ended up killing themselves with primitive alchemical practices...

C: 那时我当然是和现在一模一样，但是老周已经苍老得像是一块蜷缩的木头…他攥着我的手，和我说：「够了，够了。」
E: I, of course, looked just as I am now, but Old Zhou looked more like withered wood than flesh... He took my hand and said, "Enough. Enough."

C: 我昨日算到风雨将至，结果半夜起风了。你说咱这不就是太卜司卜者的证明吗？
E: I predicted a storm was coming yesterday, and just like that, a gale started blowing in the middle of the night. Isn't that proof enough that I'm a Divination Commission diviner?

C: 那些伟大的事业，在最初的时候总是被视为「疯狂」，我不在乎他人看法！
E: The greatest feats are often seen as mania in the beginning. People can think of me however they want.

C: 怎么样，这个故事精彩吧？神仙姐姐的神迹可不止这些喔。
E: How is it? Was this story exciting? The celestial lady has done a lot more than this.

C: 我在仙舟，上面有人…
E: I have someone on Xianzhou...

C: 但是现在我听说了些消息，改变主意了，并不想着急马上回去…这里毕竟是「仙舟」，藏着人人都感兴趣的秘密，你是「化外民」，也懂的吧？
E: But I've changed my mind after hearing certain information, and am not in a hurry to leave now... A secret that everyone is interested in is hiding in Xianzhou. Surely you know this, even as an Outworlder?

C: 就算这里人人守口如瓶，那巨大的建木可不会沉默，它很快会告诉我们秘密到底是什么，玉界门的封锁就是一个信号。
E: Even if everyone's traps are sealed shut, that giant Ambrosial Arbor won't stay silent. It will soon tell us what the secret is. The Jade Gate's closure is the first clue.

C: 你别哪壶不开提哪壶嘛…老实说建木的影响还蛮大的，虽说这事算是过去了吧，但好多仙舟老板还没反应过来呢。
E: Can you not bring that up... If you ask me, I'd say the impact of the Arbor is quite significant. The crisis might be over, but many Xianzhou business owners haven't shaken it off just yet.

C: 笔记上说，她希望春分也能像她那样，度过美好的一生。所以春分也把这本笔记当做旅行指南，想要好好体会一下「美好的一生」！
E: In the notebook, she hopes that I can live a good life, just like her. So I treat this notebook like a kind of travel guide as I try to experience "a good life"!

C: 唔…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}真是不留情面！明明就是有进步。
E: Oh... {F#Miss}{M#Sir} is simply brutal! I've made big strides.

C: 没别的事了，下次再见。
E: I don't have anything else to ask. See you next time.

C: 唉…这真的很难过，也很无力。每当这种时候，就不由得感受到人的渺小无助……
E: Ahhh... I feel so bad and powerless. I can't help but feel small and insignificant when such emotions hit me...

C: 没有听说过。
E: I've never heard of this.

C: 现在的人心理怎么这么阴暗，尽做这些损人不利己的事…你不买不就结了嘛。
E: Why are people nowadays so heartless, doing things that harm others even though it doesn't benefit them... You could always just not buy from me.

C: 你好像不推荐好梦气泡饮？
E: You don't seem to be promoting Sweet Dreams Soda at all.

C: 暂时没处可去的旅客！
E: Travelers with nowhere else to go!

C: 真是喧嚣啊。
E: What a raucous bunch.

C: 明白。
E: Yes sir.

C: 不会，我动这引擎干什么…
E: Course not, why would I touch this engine...

C: 仙人快乐茶推出新品了。
E: Immortal's Delight has launched a new tea.

C: 嗯，能听到你这么说，如果星槎有知觉，肯定是十分开心吧。
E: Mmm, when I hear you say that, I think that if a starskiff had consciousness, it'd be very happy indeed.

C: 是我，你有什么不满意的吗？
E: It's me. Have you got anything you're not happy with?

C: 我与文远之间的关系，本就有悖于天理，我也知道这段关系如果继续下去，只会迎来对他而言更糟糕的结局。
E: The relationship between Wenyuan and I ran contrary to nature. I knew that, had we kept things up, it'll only lead to a worse outcome for him.

C: 你就不能安静会儿？
E: Can't you just be quiet for a bit?

C: 也是，你是给十王司干活的人，没有理由记得我。
E: True. You also work for the Ten-Lords Commission, so there's no reason for you to remember me.

C: 是的，身为岁阳，我确实无处花销金钱——但每当你们人类获得金钱后体内涌出的那股幸福感，品尝起来就好像是浓稠的蜜糖，实在美味！
E: Yes, as a heliobus, I have no real capacity for spending money — but every time you humans get hold of money, the happiness that gushes out of you tastes like rich honey — so sweet!

C: 那是「黑塔」空间站。
E: That's the Herta Space Station.

C: 还有这好事？求求你把人家打坏了啦～
E: I yearn for such fortune! Please, hit me till I break!

C: 联盟信任景元将军的处置，不过仍然有一些胆小怕事的家伙在摇动唇舌，不过这些已经不打紧了，联盟面临烬灭祸祖的威胁已经是不争事实了。
E: The Alliance has faith in General Jing Yuan's abilities to handle matters, but there are still a number of cowards that let their tongues wag freely. However, this is no longer important. The fact that the Alliance is faced with the descending threat of the Ruin Author is no longer a matter of truth or fiction.

C: 暂时一切都井然有序…
E: Everything's in order for now...

C: 吾有一言，名之曰「零」。
E: I've got one word for you: "Zero."

C: 哎，事情就这样顺利解决了。
E: Ah, well that's everything taken care of, then.

C: 里面是培育星槎的肥料。
E: There's fertilizer for growing starskiff inside.

C: 我真是搞不懂你的口味。
E: I really can't understand your taste.

C: 你知道吗，你们的丹士长…
E: Did you hear that your chief alchemist...

C: 你可不能诬陷好人呐。
E: You shouldn't throw mud at good people.

C: 别的不说，你这样子怎么出席「慰灵奠仪」呢？你要好好活下去，无论如何，你都得振作起来……
E: Other matters aside, how are you going to attend the soul-soothing ceremony looking like this? Your life must go on, and you need to buck up...

C: 你摊了摊手，示意自己没有任何指示。
E: You spread open your hands, indicating that you have no order to give.

C: 希望它能让你铭记这一点。
E: I hope this will help you remember that.

C: 但无论如何，这些都是阿格莱雅最真实的样子。
E: But in any case, this is who Aglaea truly is.

C: 没有纷争的无聊世界…
E: A boring world without strife...

C: 需要提醒才能记住的东西，恐怕本来就没有记住的必要吧？
E: If you need a reminder to remember something, maybe it wasn't worth remembering in the first place, huh?

C: 不嘛。*我们*现在就要见到妈妈！
E: No way! We want to see mom right now!

C: 哈哈…这么久不见，是不是都快认不出我了？
E: Haha... It's been so long. You almost didn't recognize me, did you?

C: 能走到今天，多亏了一路上结伴而行的朋友，我的老师、我的对手，还有…最好的伙伴。
E: I couldn't have made it this far without the friends who walked this path with me: my teachers, my rivals, and... my best companion.

C: 可以好好居家修养了。
E: Time to get some proper rest at home.

C: 嗷呜嗷呜~荒笛大人，奇拉拉总算追随上你的脚步了。
E: Awoo awoo~ Lord Terravox, Chirara has finally caught up with you!

C: 小家伙怎么也嗷呜上了。
E: Why's the little one howling too?

C: 吉奥刻勒斯他，常常为从前的那桩背叛痛心，对那位奥赫玛的君王——刻律德菈，态度总是有些别扭。
E: Geocles is often heartbroken over that betrayal from the past, and his attitude toward the ruler of Okhema, Cerydra, has always been somewhat awkward.

C: 当年法吉娜把它们埋进海床，本就是为待黑潮退去后，与子嗣们共饮。如今拿来庆祝不是正好？
E: Back then, Phagousa buried them in the seabed because she wanted to share them with her descendants after the black tide had receded. Aren't they perfect for a celebration now?

C: 大概是因为我在游向这里的途中，已经找到属于自己的火焰了吧。
E: I guess it's because on my way here, I've already found my own flame.

C: 因为我是「海洋」的女儿。这副身躯，本来就是由灵水捏塑出来的。
E: Because I am the Ocean's daughter. This body of mine was originally molded from spirit water.

C: 愿下一场宴席永不散场。
E: May the next feast be eternal.

C: …那我怎么办？
E: ...What am I supposed to do then?

C: 呵呵…看她们的样子，让我也想起了一同被圣殿收养的姐妹。
E: Heh... Looking at them reminds me of my sisters who were also taken in by the temple.

C: 你们都哪儿不舒服？
E: So, what's bothering you all?

C: 「兽皇」老师，你好。
E: Hello, Professor "Beast Emperor."

C: 你说的这些事，我也全都做过。
E: I've done all those things you mentioned, too.

C: 征途结束，功业也已告毕。暂时收起压在心头的烦忧，陪我对酌一杯吧，凯撒。
E: The campaign is over, and our deeds accomplished. Set aside the worries weighing on your mind for now, and share a drink with me, Imperator.

C: 狼狈？巴特鲁斯，你如今顶着一副…葡萄样貌，真不知有何立场说这些尖言冷语。
E: "Mess," you say? Bartholos, with that... grape-like appearance of yours, I don't think you're in any position to throw shade.

C: 谁知道是药王秘传密信！
E: How could I have known that what I stole contained secret letters of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 都说「宁失金玉，不进幽狱」，我这是占全了啊……
E: People say that it's "better to lose gold and jade than to enter the Shackling Prison," but it seems like I've hit the jackpot...

C: 江湖上人们都说仙舟大盗「北阿峰，南阿蓉」，没想到你就是阿蓉。
E: People speak of the legendary bandits of Xianzhou, "Feng of the North and Rong of the South." I didn't expect to meet Rong here.

C: 你看，还是用地髓的暖炉！
E: See! That's still a heater that uses Geomarrow!

C: 哦，这确实没有。那皮皮西人能练内功么？
E: Oh. True. We don't. Then, can the Pepeshi practice inner cultivation?

C: 你们还算好，他带我弯弯绕绕找到一处矮墙，费了吃奶的劲才翻进来，脚都扭了......
E: You still had it good. My scalper took me along several nooks and crannies before finding a low wall. It took me so much effort to scale it and get in, and I even twisted my ankle...

C: 就不要考虑头筹的事了。
E: So stop thinking about winning.

C: 跟你出门旅游真累…
E: It's so exhausting to travel with you.

C: 据说仙舟民以宠物健壮庞然为美，可这笼子看起来实在是太小了。
E: It is said that Xianzhou citizens prefer large-sized pets that are strong. In light of that, this cage seems way too small.

C: 生活最大的乐趣是什么？
E: What's life's greatest pleasure?

C: 数量众多的炮塔，铆接的工艺技术，蒸汽机的审美传统，刚性悬挂…美哉！壮哉！多就是好，大就是美！如果你失败了，那是因为你的炮塔还不够多！
E: Numerous turrets, riveting craftsmanship, the traditional aesthetics of the steam engines, rigid suspensions... How beautiful! How magnificent! More is superior, and bigger is grander! The only reason for your failure is not enough turrets!

C: 你认识我？
E: You know me?

C: 总不至于动用基石吧？
E: There's no need to activate the Cornerstone, is there?

C: 可是他是公司通缉犯…
E: But he's a wanted criminal by the IPC...

C: 那用手枪发射微型飞剑…
E: Then use a pistol to fire miniature flying swords...

C: 你慢点说，我要先点哪里？
E: Hold up, where do I click?

C: 太帅了！打得真不错！
E: Superb! Your moves were incredible!

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 「根据曜青派遣的云骑军送回情报，该星区间许多真空地带被某种吸光的不明絮状物质填充。天舶司的天象学士达成共识，某种存在『吞食』了那些恒星。」
