E: "According to the intel collected by the Cloud Knights from the Yaoqing, a lot of the vacuum spaces in the Yvanna chain were filled by an unidentified light-absorbing flocculent material. The astrologists of Sky-Faring Commission reached a consensus that some beings had devoured those stars."

C: 你看不懂，但你大受震撼，犹如被人夺走了初恋。你将稿子放回原处，将它和箱子一起留在了街边。
E: You don't understand why, but feel shocked as though your first love has been stolen away from you. You put back this manuscript and leave it with the box on the side of the road.

C: 这台售卖机长时间未得到维护，已经不能正常使用了。
E: This vending machine has fallen into disrepair and can no longer function properly.

C: 你痛苦、你怀疑、你挫败…但你很快释然，因为你眼下成了一位随列车遨游星海的年轻人，到处旅行的感觉多么美妙。
E: You sink in misery, self-doubt, and dejection... Yet, it doesn't take too long for you to move on, as you find yourself turning into a youngster riding aboard the Express on a journey through the cosmos. It is nice to be able to travel around.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 「这真的是人吃的东西吗？」你不禁认真分析起来，与此同时脑海中似乎传来一道强烈的认同感，声音朦胧而有力，回答了你的疑问：「所以我尝了尝。」
E: "Is this really edible?" You can't help analyzing the dish. At the same time, you hear a faint yet firm voice in your head affirming your opinion and answering your doubt. "So I tasted it."

C: 你见过许多快递盒，但从没一只像眼前这样，它在微微颤抖，犹如雨巷里被遗弃的小狗。
E: You have come across many courier packages, but none of them is like the one before you. It trembles slightly like an abandoned puppy on a rainy day.

C: <unbreak>10</unbreak>段。
E: <unbreak>10</unbreak> pieces.

C: 这什么破玩意儿…
E: What garbage is this...

C: 我从洪炉里逃出来之后…
E: After I escaped from the Furnace...

C: 是我看到之后亲自放出去的。
E: I was the one who released it after watching him work on it.

C: 阵阵音乐从门后传来，里面或许正在举办一场舞会。
E: A chorus of music resounds from behind the door. There may be a ball or something happening inside.

C: 房间里只余一片死寂……
E: The room falls deadly silent...

C: 对于苏乐达而言，经典的永远是最好的。
E: For SoulGlad, classics are always the best.

C: 书是人类进步的阶梯——在这里，它的确堆成了一座向上的阶梯。
E: Books are humanity's staircase to progress. Here, they have literally become a staircase that leads upwards.

C: 尚未拆封的盒子，里面藏着孩子所能想象到的最棒礼物。
E: An unopened box, inside it stashed with all the best gifts that a child could think of.

C: 等一切结束后，你们还会再见的——你如此相信着。希望那时她一切安好。
E: When all of this is over, you will see each other again — that is what you believe. You hope she will be safe and well then.

C: 记载于纸上的资料，效率比梦泡更低，但更加可靠。
E: Information recorded on paper may be less efficient than dream bubbles, but is far more reliable.

C: 是谁从梦境之河里舀出了它们？
E: Who scooped them up from the Dreamscape's River?

C: 你究竟是谁？
E: Who exactly are you?

C: 我就像是美梦剧团里拿肚子敲鼓的茶壶，烧头发照明的蜡烛，用愚蠢的行为逗人发笑，从掌声里博得可怜的存在感，还沾沾自喜以为得到了认同。
E: I am like that teapot in the Sweet Dreams Troupe that plays its own belly like a drum, and the candle that burns its own hair to light the room, employing silly antics to make people laugh, garnering meager ounces of worth from their applause, yet still revels in it as recognition.

C: 明媚的少女肉眼可见地晴转多云，整个人都蒙上一层雾霭般的忧郁。
E: The radiant girl's eyes turn clouded, her whole being is enveloped in a layer of misted melancholy.

C: 这位身高还不到门把手的皮皮西门卫在你的腰部比划了下，又掏出尺仔细量了量你的腿长。你突然很好奇她平时是如何打开大门的。
E: The Pepeshi guard, who stands no taller than the doorknob, makes a gesture at your waist before taking out a ruler to carefully measure the length of your legs. You're suddenly curious about how she manages to open the door.
...Groo?

C: 靠旁边站点，别影响我表演！
E: Move aside and don't ruin my performance!

C: 仔细听……
E: Listen carefully...

C: 您的反馈我已经收到了，等我下去以后再训练训练，未来就能推出「双人共舞」节目了！
E: I accept your feedback and will train it further. Next time, it will be able to do a two-person dance performance!

C: 整个梦境都清静了，只剩下一声又惊又气的嚎呼……
E: The entire Dreamscape becomes quiet. You can only hear the surprised and angry wails...

C: （静观其变）
E: (Stay calm and observe)

C: 太好了，{F#小姐}{M#先生}——您真是个大好人！
E: Thank you, {F#miss}{M#sir}... You truly are a kind person!

C: 我也很好奇！
E: I'm curious, too!

C: 动画家、梦境大亨、匹诺康尼之父…虽然「钟表匠」的成就举世皆知，但匹诺康尼中有关他真容的记录极少。
E: A great animator, a Dreamscape tycoon, father of Penacony... Though the achievements of the Watchmaker are known by all, there are very few records of his true appearance in Penacony.

C: 最顶尖的钟表匠人不会为自己设下限制，任何材料都可以成为钟表制作的原料。
E: The greatest watchmakers would never set limits on themselves. Anything can become material for watchmaking.

C: 没关系，这也是他预想中的结果。
E: It's fine. This was the result that he had predicted.

C: 我前两天才听过。
E: I listened to them just a couple of days ago.

C: 他们…不用在意这些人，他们有自己的事要忙，对吧？
E: They... no need to mind these people. They're busy with their own stuff, aren't they?

C: 好啊，我喜欢聊天——前提是你足够尊重音乐。
E: Sure, I'd love to chat — only if you respect the music.

C: 或许演奏家终有一天会被这些没有灵魂的机巧淘汰吧——就让我在被世人遗弃的边缘演奏至最后一刻吧。
E: Perhaps one day, musicians will be replaced by these soulless ingenia. Allow me to perform till I'm forsaken by the world.

C: 布罗娜深呼了一口气，收回了对自动乐团投出的锐利目光——你感到一种知性的气息回到了她的身上。
E: Brona lets out a deep sigh, withdrawing her sharp gaze towards the automated orchestra. You feel an air of intellectualism returning to her.

C: 我向您保证，这批新车都是经过严格的质检程序才上市的，安全方面绝对有保障，这是我们的售后记录，可以给您翻阅，至今维持着全好评的成绩。
E: I can guarantee that this batch of new cars has all undergone stringent quality assurance testing before launch, and they're absolutely safe. This is our after-sales record, feel free to browse through it — they're all highly rated to this day.

C: 自动驾驶就不会出事吗？
E: Does self-driving mean there won't be accidents?

C: 这哪是员工福利呀，分明就是把卖不出去的产品低价清仓…还吃准了我不敢投诉的想法，品牌形象受影响，我的奖金也要减少。哎。
E: How is this to the employees' benefit? It's clearly just clearance for unsold stock... They knew I wouldn't dare complain about fear of affecting the brand's image and my bonus taking a hit... Argh!

C: 所以我一直以为，我们的动漫产业已经足够好了…直到来到匹诺康尼，我才意识到危机离我有多近。
E: So, I always believed that our anime industry was just fine... It wasn't until I came to Penacony that I realized how close we were to crisis.

C: 建筑不是艺术，建筑也不该是艺术。只有能力低下者才执着于「艺术」，因为他们没有运用「技术」的知能。
E: Architecture is not an art, nor should it be. Only those with low capability are obsessed with "art" because they do not have the capacity to utilize "technology."

C: 好像和你说过，我在卡戎•塔尔金的时候也是大学教授。在「赫尔辛格•塔尔金纪念大学」建筑设计系任教。
E: I think I mentioned to you before, I was a university professor when I was in Charon-Targin. I was an instructor in the department of architectural design at Herzinger Targin Memorial University.

C: 大学五百年校庆的时候，我主导设计了一个三万人大礼堂。当时我受矫饰主义建筑学派影响很深，也执着于做一些极繁的、非用户友好的建筑。
E: For the school's <unbreak>500</unbreak>th anniversary celebration, I led the design of an auditorium with a thirty thousand person capacity. At the time, I was heavily influenced by mannerist teachings, and I was obsessed with making overly complex and non-user-friendly buildings.

C: 1、请保持心境平和，以免造成非常规的入梦感受。
E: 1. Please keep your mind calm to avoid unusual experiences.

C: 另外…一个小小的建议——请善用「梦境护照」，它将彻底改变您在匹诺康尼的游梦体验。
E: Also... Here's a small pro-tip: Make the most of your Dreamscape Pass, as it will greatly enrich your dream experience in Penacony.

C: 唔，下次记得陪我玩啊。
E: Well, come and play with me next time.

C: 据说这一次的谐乐大典，享誉银河的知更鸟小姐也会为匹诺康尼十二时分的所有宾客献上歌喉…令人期待！
E: Rumor has it that during the Charmony Festival, the renowned Robin will grace all the Twelve Hours of Penacony with her enchanting voice... What an extraordinary fest!

C: 脚步声停了下来，四下一片死寂。
E: The footsteps cease, an eerie silence enveloping the surroundings.

C: 我在宇宙万物之中寻找你的身影，伊德莉拉…一朵花、一条河、一颗星…四处都是你留下的神迹，四处却又不见你的踪影……
E: I've been searching for you throughout the universe, Idrila... in flowers, rivers, and stars... Your divine traces are everywhere, yet nowhere could you be found...

C: 蛋糕上仰望星空的鱼头只是画面效果，该产品并不含有海鲜成分。
E: The fish head on the cake that stares into the starry sky is just for illustration purposes. This product doesn't contain any seafood.

C: 哈哈哈，我还以为是什么事呢。不用担心，疾风侠会替你解决的。
E: Hahaha, I thought it was the end of the world! Relax, I'll help you.

C: 所以我必须代为完成！绝不偏袒任何行为！哈哈哈哈。
E: So, I must do it for the sake of justice! No favoritism! Hahahaha!

C: 请问有什么能帮您的吗？本车设备齐全，配有最新自动驾驶系统，绝无事故风险。
E: How can I help you? I come with the complete set of equipment and the latest autonomous driving system. The risk of accidents is zero.

C: 送我去「黄金的时刻」。
E: Bring me to the Golden Hour.

C: 别哭啊你！
E: Please don't cry!

C: 可惜不管它更新得再快，也跟不上我追剧的速度。到离开校园的时候，我已经把所有钟表小子相关的衍生剧集都刷过至少三遍了。
E: It's a pity that no matter how fast it got updated, it could never catch up to the speed at which I watched. By the time I left school, I'd already seen all of Clockie's related spin-offs at least three times over.

C: 算什么卦?
E: Get your fortune told?

C: 你的梦想是什么？
E: What is your dream?

C: 真是大坑啊！难道人与人之间连最基本的信任都没有了？！愿神主教训这些破坏「同谐」的商人！
E: That was an outright scam! Can people nowadays still be trusted!? May the Great One punish the merchants who disrupt Harmony!

C: 附近的话，首选当然是艾迪恩公园！仓鼠球竞速和哈努兄弟角色扮演可都是必玩项目。
E: If you mean nearby, my first stop would obviously be Aideen Park! You have to try the hamster ball race and the Brother Hanu roleplay!

C: 服务？别人又看不到你…
E: Serve me? But no one else can see you...

C: 我从来不认为自己很聪明，但比我蠢的人实在太多了。
E: I have never thought that I was that intelligent, but there are far too many people who are more foolish than I am.

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's it. Bye-bye.

C: 我没有辜负她的期待，在那个领域取得了不错的成绩。艾米绮就是在那时候认识的，她是我的后辈，同样是备受期待的孩子，在演出方面拥有非凡的天赋。
E: I did not disappoint her and managed to achieve a lot of success in this field. I met Amiky back then, too. She was my junior and also a child who shouldered a lot of expectations due to her outstanding acting talents.

C: 艾米绮那边要怎么交代呢？
E: How do you deal with Amiky?

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 画上的折纸鸟与你见过的小鸟们不尽相同，或许这反映了家族内部艺术风格的变迁。
E: The origami bird in the picture is unlike those that you have met before, perhaps reflecting the changing of artistic styles within The Family.

C: 您放心！有我在，这家酒吧绝对不会出事！就算出事，也是小事！
E: Rest assured! There will be no issues in this lounge! If there are, they will only be small ones!

C: 想听听你对这家酒吧的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about this lounge.

C: 我好爱这个地方，空气中都弥漫着甜腻的香味！
E: I love this place! It's got a sweet aroma in the air!

C: 观看驯物表演。
E: I'll watch the prop-taming show.

C: 想听听你对这些饮料的看法。
E: It seems to be asking for your thoughts on the drinks.

C: 多关心关心自己的身体健康，抽空回去看看爸妈，到公园里去躺着发会儿呆，再去海边弄点薯条。听起来不错吧？
E: Things like being mindful of your health, taking time to see your parents, stretching out at a park to space out for a while, or enjoying some fries on the beach. That all sounds pretty good, right?

C: 我们乐团总共有<unbreak>72</unbreak>位成员，算上我。布莱茨是我们的第一小提琴，施托赫森是首席双簧管，洛莲负责竖琴。
E: We have <unbreak>72</unbreak> members in our orchestra, including me. Blite sits as our first violin, Storsen is our first oboe, and Lorraine is our harpist.

C: 给我燥起来！——<size=28>「我们要用生命燃烧下去，点燃孤独的白矮星！」</size>
E: Let's mosh! — <size=28>"We'll burn with our life, 'cause the white star needs a spark to ignite!"</size>

C: 他们面对红巨星的时候怂了吗？没有，那咱们也不能怂！鸢尾花的评委毁灭不了一整个星系…他们连根毛都算不上！
E: Were they scared when they faced down the superstar? No — so neither should we! The Iris Family judges can't destroy an entire star system... They're small fry.

C: 所以是谁？
E: So, who was it?

C: 嗯…是骗你的。我能做到的，只有改变会场的光线而已。
E: Mmm... that was all a lie. All I'm good for is changing up the lighting at a venue.

C: 飞船航行的轨迹就像张网，星星就是网里活蹦乱跳的鱼。我从哪里经过，那附近的星星就都属于我。我来到，我看见，我拥有全部。
E: The trail my spaceship leaves behind is like a net, and the stars are like frolicking little fish. Wherever I go, those stars belong to me. I came, I saw, and I owned everything.

C: 前阵子我在美梦里取材，可以说是处处碰壁。那些沉迷美梦的体面人啊，我好声好气地请教，他们讲不出个所以然就算了，还要反过来教育我不懂美梦的规矩。
E: Before, when I would gather materials in the dream, you could say I was just banging my head into a brick wall. I'd politely ask these dream-obsessed, upstanding, moral people for advice, but they couldn't give me a straight answer. What's more, they'd go on a tirade about how I didn't understand the rules of the dream.

C: 哎，我确实没法否认这个指控，所以…能请你不要把它放在心上吗？
E: Ah, I can't deny that, but... I hope you aren't bothered by it.

C: 不过，为表歉意，我还是送你个赔罪礼吧——拿好哦！
E: To show my remorse, here's a token of my apology. Please keep it!

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 孩子们来自阿斯德纳星系的各处，有空便通过入梦装置聚在这里。虽然在现实中他们可能永远无法拥有接受音乐教育的机会，但在梦中我们得以自由自在地歌唱。
E: Children from all over the Asdana star system use dream devices to gather here when they get time. Though they may never have opportunities to receive musical education in the real world, they can sing freely as they please here in the dream.

C: 作为学者，我也知道自己有时不合时宜，有时过于死板严谨，甚至令人不可理喻——但流梦礁的人们包容了我的缺点，为我的研究提供了许多方便。
E: As a scholar, I acknowledge that at times I may have acted inappropriately, overly rigid, stringent, or even incomprehensible — yet the people of the Dreamflux Reef have embraced my shortcomings and supported my research in numerous ways.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 所以对我来说，它已经不是一个动画形象了！它就像我的伙伴和家人，一个永远不会变老的守护者！
E: So, to me, it is no longer just an animated figure! It is like my partner and a family member, a guardian who never ages!

C: 可我只能看着，因为历史不可改变。我没法治好哈努努的伤，没法从忆质黑洞里救回拉扎莉娜，更没法把铁尔南带离虫群的包围圈。
E: But I could only watch, for history can never be changed. I couldn't heal Hanunue's wounds, rescue Razalina from the Memoria Singularity, or even save Tiernan from the Swarm's encirclement.

C: …或许我有些反应过度了，但我确实感到恼火——当然，这情绪并非针对小号先生，而是我自己。
E: ...Maybe I overreacted, but I felt really angry at the time — not at Mr. Trumpet, of course, but rather directed at myself.

C: 我不喜欢食物。
E: I don't like food.

C: 我带着孩子们来和音符小姐学唱歌，结果一个不留神，它们就全跑掉了啾。
E: I was watching the kids while Miss Note was giving singing lessons, but I lost concentration for just a moment, and they all disappeared, tweet.

C: 我梦见呻吟掩埋于糖浆，泥泞污浊\n我梦见真心困死于形骸，可鄙可唾
E: I dream of moans buried in syrup, mired and foul.\nI dream of bared hearts dying in their mortal shells, despicable and contemptible.

C: 帷幕后晨曦露出边角，将鸟的翎羽点燃\n翼羽携自由逐风追日，将人所应得偿还
E: Dawn peeks out from behind the curtain, setting alight the bird's plumes.\nWings of freedom to chase winds and sun, repaying what those deserve.

C: 哦~没问题！请尽情向我灌注你的情感吧，可爱的有机生命！
E: Ohh no problem! Please project your emotions on to me to your heart's desire, lovely organic being!

C: 我在蓝调的时刻的舞厅找了份工作，直到…一只好酷好酷的大怪物撕裂了我——天呐，那真是我被生产以来体验到的最刺激的事情！
E: I found a job at a dance hall in the Blue Hour, until... A super cool monster ripped me to shreds. Gosh, that really was the most thrilling incident I had experienced since I was made!

C: 欢迎来到流梦礁。如你所见，这才是梦境原本的样子…没有声色犬马的狂欢和派对，这里有的只是一团混沌的忆质、还有一群在噩梦中努力抗争的人们。
E: Welcome to the Dreamflux Reef. As you can see, this is the Dreamscape's original form... No wild celebrations nor parties, just a bundle of chaotic memoria, and a resistance force battling ardently within nightmares.

C: 我很幸运，因为我遇到了米哈伊尔。他从硝烟弹雨的战场上将我救下，又把我当作自己的孩子一般抚养。对我来说，他就是真正的「父亲」。
E: I was lucky, because I met Mikhail. He rescued me from the smoke and ashes of war, and raised me as one of his own. To me, he was my real father.

C: 「钟表匠」的小把戏对我这个级别的家徒并不好用。如果你想了解我，可以不必采取这种方式。
E: The Watchmaker's paltry tricks are no match for a Family member of my level. You don't have to resort to such antics if you want to learn about me.

C: 众人表情各异，一番踌躇后各自散去。莱斯特望着他们远去的背影，长舒口气。
E: After some hesitation, the rest of the assembled crowd take their leave, a motley of expressions on their faces. Lester sighs deeply as he gazes at their receding figures.

C: 我一直在等一个机会，能让我凭空消失，当熟悉我的同僚有一天再次听闻我的消息，会突然发现——
E: I've been waiting for an opportunity to disappear into thin air. When my close colleagues hear of me one day, they'll suddenly realize that...

C: 比起开始，更像是准备结束一餐时的选择。不过，无妨——
E: Instead of choosing something that'll stimulate your appetite, you seem to have made a selection that is more suitable for the end of the meal. However, that's quite all right...

C: 这位客人随身携带的…兵器，看起来还真是相当…别出心裁。
E: This... weapon that you've brought with you is certainly quite... unique.

C: 我原本还以为，或许像苏乐达一样，时过境迁，其中几样食材已经完全不存在了。
E: At first, I thought it was just like SoulGlad, where some of the dish's original ingredients no longer exist thanks to the passage of time.

C: 我们免不了要和数字打交道，毕竟它实在方便得很，您看——
E: We can't avoid using numbers. They make our lives so convenient, after all. Look...

C: 很久以前，我从书上看到了一种名为草履虫的微生物。
E: A long time ago, I read about a microorganism called the paramecium.

C: 教导，爱，友情…不外如是。从很多角度来看，我们和它们也没什么区别。
E: Don't we interact with each other in the same way when we're teaching, falling in love, and making friends?

C: 我很好奇…
E: I'm very curious...

C: 要我帮忙吗？
E: Do you need any help?

C: 呵…很多人都对律师抱有偏见，认为我们是冷血动物。
E: Hmph, many people out there hold a prejudiced view about lawyers, considering us to be cold-blooded animals.

C: 你在做什么项目？
E: What case are you working on?

C: 你在法律界很有名吗？
E: Are you famous in the legal profession?

C: 啾…客官觉得寂寞了吗？那人家这就把孩子们叫回来啾~
E: Tweet... Are you getting lonely? Then I shall call the children back, tweet~

C: 你注意到你的画像出现在广告牌上，你被它广告词的厚颜无耻所震惊。
E: You notice your portrait on the billboard and are shocked by the shamelessness of the advertising slogan.

C: 我想说…
E: Actually...

C: …啊，这个……商品每天都有财务部门来盘点的，您看看要不跟他们说一声？
E: ...Um, about that... Finance does an inventory check every day. Maybe you can check in with them?

C: 搞音乐不赚钱啊，连吃饭的钱都没有……
E: Music wasn't making me any money. I wouldn't have survived otherwise...

C: 其实我心里也清楚，刚玩乐队的那一年…是我人生中最快乐的一年。
E: Deep down, I know that too. I was the happiest during my first year in the band.

C: 这么多年来，校园明媚或险恶的模样我都见过，令我欣慰的是，无论何时，年轻人从未忘记对音乐的热爱。
E: Over the years, I have seen both the glorious and the sinister aspects of the school. However, I find comfort in knowing that even today, youngsters have never forgotten about their passion for music.

C: 你怎么还赖着不走呢？莫非是真的热爱音乐？
E: Why are you still here? Could it be that you're actually truly passionate about music?

C: 要不我换个新梦想试试？你有什么梦想，也可以告诉我，我来帮你实现。
E: Maybe I'll try to find a new dream. Got any dreams yourself? Tell me, and I'll help make it come true!

C: 必然是我们财富学院！多犹豫一秒都是对罗密欧的不尊重，他已经带领财富学院连拿两届冠军咯。
E: Why, Fortune Academy, of course! I have absolute faith in Romeo representing us. I won't be caught wavering, not even for a split second. And he already has two consecutive championships under his belt!

C: 放着好好的球笼赛派对不来，跑去组乐队，哈，躲在教室里对着键盘噼里啪啦地乱按，能有什么意思？会比今年冒出来的那个皮皮西车手好玩吗？
E: Skipping the Spheroid race's party just to form a band? Bah! What fun is there in holing up in a classroom and bashing away on a keyboard? Is that going to draw any more attention than the fresh-faced Pepeshi racing this year?

C: 「她的球笼『飞翔的皮皮西号』在枪响后一骑绝尘，这可是令全场车手嫉妒的顶尖之作，不难想象她背后赞助商对其不计成本的投入。」
E: "Her Spheroid, The Flying Pepeshi, left all of her competitors in its dust from the moment the starting gun was fired. It is a masterpiece of craftsmanship that has inspired envy in all of her fellow drivers. It is clear that her sponsors have spared no cost in their investment towards her and her future."

C: 你要是撞见《折纸时报》的那个小编，打我电话，我马上到！
E: If you come across that Paperfold Times editor, give me a call, and I'll be there in a jiffy!

C: 无奈之下，我只能开着过于宽敞的球笼车参赛……
E: With nowhere to turn, I had no choice but to drive an oversized Spheroid in the competition.

C: 唯利是图，小家子气。就因为我前些日子跟他起了冲突，就开始处处找我、甚至找整个筑梦学院的麻烦！
E: He is a petty man who only cares about profit. Ever since I got into a little dispute with him, he's been causing trouble for both me and everyone in Dreamweaver Academy!

C: 为什么有八个？
E: Why are there eight now?

C: 偶尔在喜剧社里客串演出，帮前辈们录制下梦泡什么的。
E: Sometimes I make cameo appearances or help my seniors record dream bubbles.

C: 哈哈，说到这个，自从「缭乱」把那个肆意妄为的学院代表赶走后，我在学院里的地位可谓是如日中天啊，同学和老师们都对我很尊敬。
E: Haha, speaking of this, ever since The Dazzling chased away that unscrupulous academy representative, my standing in the academy has soared. All my classmates and teachers greatly respect me now.

C: 这里是我们曾经的排练室，不过现在…已经和乐队没什么关系了。
E: This was once our rehearsal room, but now... it's got nothing to do with the band.

C: 这里是我们曾经的排练室，不过现在…已经和乐队没什么关系了。
E: This was once our rehearsal room, but now... it's got nothing to do with the band.

C: （写下幽默的寄语）
E: (Write a witty message)

C: …不知道乱破同学会不会感兴趣。
E: ...I don't know if Rappa will be interested.

C: 没有。不仅如此，结业日期临近，我却还未收到她的答辩论文，实在令人担忧。
E: No. Not just that, as the deadline closes near, I still haven't received her dissertation. It's simply worrying.

C: 说句实话，筑梦学院就不该参与到这件事里来。街头的自动乐团，懂什么是音乐吗？知道什么叫做*触动心灵*吗？
E: To be honest, Dreamweaver Academy shouldn't have even been involved in this. What would street automated orchestras know about music? Can they even comprehend the concept of music that touches the soul?

C: 哎，最开始他们邀请我来负责，我是拒绝的，毕竟我已经有很多代表作了，这种难得的机会，应该让给有需要的学生才对。
E: *sigh* When they initially invited me to head up the event, I refused. I already had so many masterworks — such a rare opportunity should be left to other students who need it more.

C: 还整天阴阳怪气地喊我「大老板」，看到我出身不好、成绩不好就上嘴脸…不就是一群恬不知耻只知道花家里钱的蛀虫嘛！
E: And sarcastically calling me "big boss" all the time, belittling me for my poor family background and bad grades.... They're just a bunch of shameless parasitic brats who flaunt their families' money!

C: 生意不错，这学期的生活费和学费应该稳了，老爹这下可以休息一阵子了。
E: Business has been good. This semester's tuition and living expenses should be covered. My old man can take a break for a while.

C: 或许芮克先生选中我，真的是看走眼了吧…嘉宝娜的视频号，恐怕也不会有很多人喜欢，毕竟谁会对一个不入流演员感兴趣呢？
E: Perhaps Mr. Reca made an error in judgment when he chose me... Gabbana's channel probably won't be really popular either. I mean, who would be interested in watching a non-mainstream actor?

C: 你找我有什么事吗？
E: What can I do for you?

C: …可以麻烦{NICKNAME}同学帮我写一段吗？我、我其实…也很好奇，在{NICKNAME}同学心里会有什么想跟我说的话，所以……
E: ...Can I trouble you to write something for me, {NICKNAME}? I—I've... I've been very curious about what you want to say to me since the start, so...

C: 哦、哦…是我听错了吧，哈哈……
E: O—Oh... I guess I heard wrong, haha...

C: 但我会为会员等级最高的客人，提供我最为「妙手天成」的笑话。虽然我并无「妙手」，只有调酒的「扳手」；并无{RUBY_B#天成}「天秤」{RUBY_E#}，只有出酒的「天窗」。
E: But just for my highest-tier members, I will provide my most handcrafted heavenly jokes. Though I have no hands for crafting, only a lever for craft cocktails. And I {RUBY_B#heaven}haven't{RUBY_E#} a soul, but a haven for the inebriated.

C: 耐心和优雅能赋予一个人绝妙的吸引力，你也试着放慢些步调吧？
E: Patience and elegance can give people an irresistible charm. Perhaps you should consider slowing down a bit?

C: 不如说，是我个人的目的。
E: It's better to call it my personal goal.

C: 每个人都有成为巨星的潜力，下一个被匹诺康尼记住的名字，就是未来的你！
E: Everyone has the potential to become a Superstar. The next name that everyone in Penacony remembers could be yours!

C: 这是新的搭讪方法吗。
E: Is this a new way to flirt?

C: 呃…
E: Umm...

C: 我现在感觉正嗨呢！
E: I feel really high right now!

C: 加长型「侯王之剑」，全梦境限量三辆——他大手一挥就是三十亿苜蓿币，直接全款拿下，眼睛都没眨！
E: There are only three stretched "The Prince's Sword" vehicles in the whole dreamscape — he tossed out 3 billion Alfalfa credits to pay in cash up front without so much as blinking!

C: 旅游也好累啊。
E: Going on a trip is tiring.

C: 想喝冰汽水的冲动。
E: The urge of wanting to drink iced soda.

C: 别跳了，小心摔下去…
E: Stop jumping! You might fall...

C: 哎，真难挑啊…
E: *Sigh* So hard to choose...

C: 总有一天…
E: Someday...

C: 饿死了，我要吃爆米花！
E: I'm starving. I need some popcorn ASAP!

C: 你今天有点怪，怪可爱…
E: You look a bit unusual today, unusually cute...

C: 我就不该跟你一个皮皮西人聊这个…真让人火大！
E: I shouldn't waste my time talking about this with a Pepeshi... It's frustrating!

C: 这水还挺清澈，看着就让人心情愉悦……
E: The water looks pretty clear. Just looking at it puts me in a good mood...

C: 您看这事…
E: Do you think...

C: 抱歉，我们不提供相关服务…
E: Sorry, we do not offer those services...

C: 请时刻注意人身安全。
E: Please be aware of your safety at all times.

C: 怎么连您都来了…
E: Even you're here...?

C: 念错词了，是苏乐达！
E: Ah. Sorry. Mispronounced that one. SoulGlad!

C: 万一是被诬陷的呢？
E: What if he was framed?

C: 盛会海选刚刚结束，作为观众，您印象最深的是哪场比赛？
E: The Festivity Auditions have just ended. As part of the audience, which round gave you the most profound impression?

C: 第一次参加海选，你…
E: To be joining the auditions for the first time, you...

C: 嘘，闭嘴！在人家的地盘说这个，真的是…还有，无名客怎么了，伴随着开拓的就是无限商机…你懂什么！
E: Shhh, shut it! Saying this on their turf? Sheesh... Also, so what if it's a Nameless? Unlimited business opportunities always accompany Trailblazing ... You know nothing!

C: 他过来干嘛？看我笑话吗…总、总之他来了也没用，反正我不回去……
E: What's he here for? To get a laugh outta me? A—Anyway, it doesn't matter if he's here. I'm not going back...

C: 很抱歉，最近的人手都在筹备谐乐大典，展品的运输时间还没确定……
E: I'm sorry. All our staff have been busy preparing for the Charmony Festival. We haven't been able to finalize the shipping details for the exhibits...

C: 忆域里没有实体，怎么会有虫子呢！
E: The Memory Zone has no physical entities. How can there be bugs?

C: 嗯，这个新增的流程我也有所耳闻，的确是知更鸟小姐的嘱托。
E: Yes, I've also heard about this newly added process. It was Miss Robin who passed it down.

C: 可以考虑投资一下…
E: Could be worth investing in...

C: 好的，老大！
E: Got it, boss!

C: 再让我看看风景…
E: Let me admire the scenery a little longer...

C: 就讲究个天时地利！
E: It's all about the right place and time!

C: 可以考虑投资一下…
E: Could be worth investing in...

C: 能有我背吗？
E: You think YOU'RE down on your luck?

C: 感觉有点吓人……
E: Feels a little scary...

C: 虽然不知道这人是谁，但既然能将画像挂在这里，他必定身价不菲吧。
E: You don't know who this person is, but if he can hang a painting here, he must be worth a fortune.

C: 眼尖的你注意到某个泛黄的书本封面上，写着什么「██王子」的字样，你感到好奇，但课本已被虫蛀得稀碎，你无法得知这位「王子」的真实身份。
E: Your sharp eyes notice a faded book cover, written with what seems like "Prince ██." You are curious, but the textbook is so riddled with wormholes that you can't tell the true identity of this "prince."

C: 你很清楚，没有人喜欢看严肃的学术报告，最高效的宣传方式永远是走下沉市场，于是你号召你的部员，仿照睡蕉小猴的模式拍摄了数十个以你为主角的短视频。
E: You are clear that no one likes stuffy academic reports. The most effective promotional methods are always aimed at the lower end of the market funnel. So, you call upon your members, and, "inspired" by the Slumbernana Monkey's style, film dozens of short videos where you're the main character.

C: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
E: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

C: 「咔哒」，柔和的光线充盈了整个房间。
E: "Click," and soft light fills the entire room.

C: 水温逐渐稳定，热气开始升腾……
E: The water temperature gradually stabilizes, and steam begins to rise...

C: 水珠蹦跳，悬浮的肥皂泡「啵」地破碎，散出一朵水花姗姗落下。你乐此不疲地吹向指间的肥皂膜，一串五彩斑斓的泡泡鱼贯而出。
E: Water droplets bounce, and a floating soap bubble pops with a "plop," sending a splash of water falling gently. You joyfully blow towards the soap film between your fingers, and a string of colorful bubbles flows out in succession.

C: 「超智能病毒」凭一己之力阻止了系统不合时宜的自动更新。
E: The Supersmart Virus single-handedly prevented the system from unnecessary automatic updates.

C: 扑满的逃跑天赋同样反映在它身体的各个部位上。你试图抓住它灵巧的耳朵，手速却怎么都不够用。
E: The trotter's instinct for escape is reflected in every part of its body. You try to catch its dexterous ears, but your hand is just not fast enough.

C: 哼，哼哼！哼——
E: Oink, oink oink! Oink...

C: 哼！
E: Oink!

C: 如果你看到它总是把头藏在{RUBY_B#兽舍}自家{RUBY_E#}的篷布里面，还请体量下一位迟暮英雄只愿安度晚年的心情。
E: If you ever catch Asterion seeking solace in their {RUBY_B#barn}sanctuary{RUBY_E#}, please remember they're just an old hero looking for a quiet retirement.

C: 嗯，我正好去看看在烧的陶罐，下次再聊。
E: Sure, I'll go check on the dolia in the kiln. Catch you later.

C: 我想看下陶罐古玩。
E: I'd like to take a look at your dolia and artifacts.

C: 这种晚上赶稿，白天看店补觉的生活，我早都习惯了，可脱口而出创作情节还是头一回，一定是这次的故事写得太有沉浸感了！
E: I've gotten used to the routine of running the store and sleeping by day, and writing at night, but coming up with a plot on the spot is a first for me. Maybe my tale is just too engrossing this time!

C: 瑟希斯信徒直营藏书所，想看点什么？
E: ...Cerces Followers' Librarium. How may I help you?

C: 没关系~有需要的话，欢迎随时光临哦。
E: No worries at all! Feel free to drop in whenever you need.
[★★★] Neither satisfied nor dissatisfied

C: 眼前一黑。
E: Everything goes black.

C: 干嘛？就一颗苹果一颗石榴而已，你不会还打算要回去吧？「公正之秤」在上，你可不能克扣我的正当酬劳。
E: What's up? It's just an apple and a pomegranate. You're not going to take them back now, are you? Praise the Scale of Justice, this is my fair payment for the service.

C: 说来黄金裔中那位万敌阁下就来自悬锋城，他偶尔路过这里时，总会买些石榴。托他的福，这种水果的销量一直不错。
E: Speaking of which, Lord Mydeimos among the Chrysos Heirs hails from Castrum Kremnos. He always picks up some pomegranates whenever he swings by. Thanks to him, the sales of pomegranates have been thriving.

C: 说说你们冒牌信徒的活动。
E: Tell me about your activities as imposter believers.

C: 至于具体的「祭拜」形式，那当然完全自由…唱歌跳舞吟诗作画——毫无美感也没有任何关系，只要自己开心就行！毕竟{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}对谁都一视同仁嘛。
E: When it comes to how we "worship," it's totally up to the individual... Singing, dancing, chanting, painting... even if your work is ugly. It's all about you having fun! After all, {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} treats everyone equally.

C: 组织？一群享乐主义的{RUBY_B#唯物论}泰坦自然论{RUBY_E#}者怎么可能有什么组织。我们借来塞纳托斯的名号，不就是不想参加那些恼人的迷信仪式？
E: Organization? Oh, come on, how could a bunch of hedonistic {RUBY_B#materialists}Titan naturalists{RUBY_E#} have an organization? We borrowed Thanatos' name because we wanted to avoid those pesky superstitious rites.

C: 你是这里的管理员？
E: You're an administrator here?

C: 那到不至于。逃难过来打一份临时工而已，没有什么工作热情也很正常吧？
E: Well, I'm here as a refugee, and this job is just to make ends meet temporarily. So it's natural I'm not too excited about it, right?

C: 发生了什么…我、我…我记不清…只记得…那天，黑潮来袭，等等，我们是为什么出现在那儿来着？
E: What happened...? I, I... I can't quite remember... I just remember... That day, the black tide came. Wait, why were we there again?

C: 你看到那杯饮料了吗？能麻烦你帮我递过来吗？演讲太久了我有点口渴。
E: Do you see that drink over there? Can I ask you to pass it to me? I have been speaking for too long, and I am thirsty.

C: 听上去很荒谬，是吧？奥赫玛最著名的演说家，居然害怕面对观众。我每次站在台上，都感觉像是面对一群饥饿的野兽。我的手心冒汗，喉咙发干，脑子一片空白。
E: It sounds absurd, right? The most famous orator in Okhema is scared to speak in front of people. Every time I stand on that stage, I feel like I am facing a pack of hungry beasts. My palms start to sweat, my throat goes dry, and my brain goes blank.

C: …？寒腿叔叔…是什么有名的江湖骗子吗？
E: ...? Mr. Cold Feet... Is that supposed to be a famous hustler?

C: 我的家乡已经被黑潮吞掉了——亲人都不在了，仅此而已。
E: My hometown has been swallowed up by the black tide... My family is all gone. That's all.

C: 能给我讲讲大地泰坦的故事吗？
E: Can you please tell me the story of the Earth Titan?

C: 我？我没有什么故事啦，只是一个无所事事的奥赫玛本地人而已。
E: Me? I have no stories. I'm just an Okhema native with too much time on my hands.

C: 你有什么好东西？
E: Have you got anything good for me?

C: 听说欧利庞王当年御驾亲征，在战场上杀死了足足一百个敌人！以我悬锋伙友的身份，至少也得打二十个才行。
E: I heard that when King Eurypon personally fought in battle, he slew a hundred enemies on the field! As a Kremnos vanguard, I have to at least take out twenty.

C: 但是——叮，叮，叮。
E: But... *ding* *ding* *ding*

C: 阿格莱雅？
E: Aglaea?

C: 小火筒，金属翅膀，铁马…我也能造，可爱。
E: Small rocket launchers, metal wings, iron horses... Craft them, I can. Adorable, they are.

C: 再会，勇士。祝福你，大地。
E: Farewell, warrior. Bless you, the earth does.

C: …入口有非常明确的泥土、青草、风信子的香气……
E: ...Distinct earthy, grassy, and hyacinth aromas on the palate...

C: 用魔法打败魔法。
E: Defeat magic with magic.

C: 是啊，翁法罗斯还有那么多有趣的事物等着你去开拓，为什么非得花时间来思考这些无用的内容呢。你不认为这是个有价值的话题。
E: You're right. Amphoreus has many interesting things awaiting trailblazing. Why must you waste time reflecting on such pointless conversations? This topic is clearly of no value to you.

C: 我正在尝试用不同深浅的灰色来表现天空的光照变化，艾格勒的仁慈赋予了奥赫玛如此美妙的景象。
E: I'm experimenting with various shades of gray to capture the shifting light in the sky. Aquila's mercy has blessed Okhema with such breathtaking scenery.

C: 让我尝尝！
E: Lemme have a taste!

C: 嗯嗯，消化不了的。还是不要跟它们抢了。
E: Yep, indigestible. Best not to compete with them for it.

C: 当然啦，自从菜单丰富起来，其他的饲养员都跟我报告说它们更温顺了！
E: Oh, absolutely! Ever since we expanded the menu, the other caretakers say they've become a lot more docile!

C: 我有点好奇…
E: I'm surprised that...

C: 那可不行，我要是走了，这些大家伙们没人照顾怎么办？
E: That won't work for me. Who would take care of these big guys if I left?

C: 不打扰你啦，「主厨」！
E: I won't keep you any longer, Chef!

C: 别担心，我喝西北风都能饱。
E: Don't worry. I could live on air.

C: 人们应当告诉彼此，这些缺憾绝非过失所致。而我要做的，就是用我的才智倾力相助。
E: People should tell each other that these flaws are not the result of mistakes. What I must do is use my intelligence to offer my utmost assistance.

C: 这项发明的出资人劝我不要急，他说，很多事都在所难免，况且他都已经习惯了，再者——
E: The sponsor of this invention advised me not to rush. He said that many things are inevitable, and besides, he's already gotten used to it. Furthermore —

C: 眼见两人间火药味越来越浓，你聚精会神地围观着，生怕一不小心错过战斗开始的精彩瞬间。
E: As the tension between the two keeps building, you watch closely, not wanting to miss the exciting moment when the fight kicks off.

C: …我最后说一遍，不要再无理取闹了，动动你那木头一样的小脑袋瓜，仔细回忆一下你到底是来做什么的。
E: ...I'll say it one last time. Stop causing trouble. Use your wooden little brain and think carefully about what you actually came here to do.

C: 我从小便听城邦里的人提起，每位黄金裔自出生时便有征兆——我们身上都有区别于常人的独特缺陷。体现在我身上的，是语言能力的不足。
E: Since I was young, I have heard people in the city talk about it. Each of the Chrysos Heirs has a sign from birth — we all lack something that sets us apart from ordinary people. For me, it manifests in a deficiency in language ability.

C: 这…真是太可惜了。那幽光给我的印象和永夜天帷太像，我原以为您也是一位欧洛尼斯赐福之人呢。
E: That's... such a pity. The eerie glow reminded me so much of the Evernight Veil. I had thought you were also someone blessed by Oronyx.

C: 最近？主要是和一位老前辈合作，进行壁画修缮…量又大，还遍布城内各处，要不是因为憧憬那位前辈，这工作我都不想接。
E: Lately? Mostly collaborating with an old senior to restore murals... It's a big job, spread all over the city. If I weren't so admiring of that senior, I wouldn't even want to take on this work.

C: 我只是想欣赏音乐。
E: I just want to enjoy some good music.

C: 果然知识就是力量！
E: Knowledge is indeed power!

C: 掌粮官都做些什么？
E: What does a food provisions officer do?

C: 感觉有精神了？那就好。
E: You feel more lively? That's good then.

C: 宁战死…咳，还是别战死了。本分地活着才是幸运啊。
E: To pursue death in battle... Ahem, better not die at all. Living your part, that's what fortune should be like.

C: 不错，需要的就是这个。神驹得到了满足，将为你打开雅努斯的大门。
E: Great, that's what I need. The divine foal has been satisfied, and will open up the gate of Janus for you.

C: 看看其他人的留言。
E: Let's see what messages others have left.

C: 风景确实壮丽。
E: The view really is beautiful.

C: 「在塔兰顿的天秤中放上足够的分量」…我记得之前家父在求取神谕的时候，也足足供奉了我们领地半年的收成……
E: "Place enough weight atop the scales of Talanton..." I remember when my father came in search of a prophecy, he offered up half a year's yield from our land...

C: 我都想…整理好了，翁法罗斯正史第一章，万径之门开天辟地……
E: I want to... I've already prepared what I would write. Historical account of Amphoreus, chapter one: The Gate of Infinity splits the heavens and the earth...

C: 不过我最爱做的，还是烤点心。人在难过的时候，来块小甜饼，心情都会好很多。所以，神殿里那么多庄严的事，我偏生对这种小事最上心。
E: But what I love most is baking. There's something about a sweet that can brighten a gloomy day. Amid all the grave responsibilities in the temple, it's these little joys that I hold dear.

C: 哎，每次看到她那个眼神，我的心都感觉要化了。虽然那时候我还没成家，但是…咳咳，说句大逆不道的话——从那时候起我就觉得她跟我的孩子没什么两样。
E: Her gaze always made my heart melt. Even though I had no children of my own at that time... *cough* It may sound sacrilegious, but I felt as if she were no different from a daughter to me.

C: 「死亡是大自然的常态。不平凡的是我们活着。」
E: "Death is nature's norm. What is extraordinary is that we live."

C: 哎，这位朋友，对小玩意感兴趣不？拉冬城的祭仪烛台，哀地里亚的奶酪块，圣女大人亲手做的玩具，开价合适，全都能卖！
E: Hey there, friend! Interested in knick-knacks? I've got ritual candlesticks from Ladon, fine cheese from Aidonia, and toys handmade by the Holy Maiden herself — all at great prices!

C: 来聊聊吧。
E: Let's chat.

C: 与她相处的这些时日，想必你已发觉，遐蝶比绝大多数人要更加热爱生活、珍视生命。这样的人却身负死亡的诅咒，不能不说是命运的玩笑。
E: Now that you've spent time with her, you must have noticed that Castorice cherishes life and loves living far more than most. For someone like her to bear the curse of death — it's nothing short of a cruel joke by fate.

C: 千年以后，如命运所暗中谕示，背负雅努斯神权、行于逐火途中的黄金裔，只有三位。
E: A thousand years later, as if fate quietly decreed it, there are only three Chrysos Heirs continuing the Flame-Chase Journey and bearing the divinity of Janus.

C: 谢谢你，为我实现这个心愿。
E: Thank you for fulfilling this wish of mine.

C: 还想听旧昏光庭院的历史。
E: I'd like to hear more about the history of the old Twilight Courtyard.

C: 你好，搭档！这段日子辛苦了…你果然在翁法罗斯逐笔写下了属于自己的英雄史诗。未来的逐火征程里，还请继续与我们并肩作战！
E: Hey there, partner! Must've been tough for you lately... Sure enough, you've been writing your own epic in Amphoreus. Let's keep on chasing that flame together, you and me!

C: 怎么样，打算接着聊聊吗？
E: What do you say? Want to keep chatting?

C: 哈哈哈哈！确实，赚钱是一切的基础，没人会记得赔钱的戏剧。
E: Haha! That's a good one. Yes, money is the foundation of everything. Nobody remembers a play that leads to bankruptcy.

C: 啊，抱歉…是我失态了，最近总是忍不住自言自语。你也是来寻求指引的吗？
E: Ah, sorry... I've lost my composure. Lately, I can't help but talk to myself. Are you here looking for guidance as well?

C: 不是，这……
E: Hold on a sec—

C: 元老们沐浴着黎明机器的光辉，却没有天父那般背负世界的魄力，只敢用淬毒的匕首戳刺英雄的脊梁……
E: The elders bask in the glory of the Dawn Device, yet they lack the determination of the sky father to bear the weight of the world. They only dare to stab heroes in the back with poisoned daggers...

C: 这是给贵客的奖励，我就继续做个迷糊衣匠好了。
E: This is your reward, honored guest. I'll just keep being the confused garmentmaker.

C: 这些石板的主人，那位名叫库玛的女预言家确实犯下过禁忌：她曾试图染指「浪漫」的权柄，好让自己化身若虫、从塞纳托斯指缝中逃脱。
E: The owner of these slates, the prophetess named Kuma, did indeed commit a taboo: She tried to seize the authority of Romance to transform herself into a nymph and escape Thanatos's grasp.

C: 这里是专为虔诚信徒提供的朝圣平台。而你，阿那克萨戈拉斯，从不向那些伪神跪拜。
E: This is a pilgrimage platform dedicated to devout believers. But you, Anaxagoras, never kneel to false gods.

C: 佩特拉，牺牲了。我那时，在做别的！如果我，再认真点的话！
E: Petros sacrificed himself. But I was busy, elsewhere! If only, I had paid more attention!

C: 呃啊…这种生物叮人很疼，还容易泛滥成灾，要不还是让它毁灭算了？
E: Ugh... these creatures bite painfully and often become pests. Maybe we should just let them perish?

C: 你还记得他们呀，亚森和拉缇娜，那两个小鬼，现在都可听话了！
E: You remember them! Yason and Lathena – both rascals behave properly now!

C: 你还好吗？你好像很激动。
E: Are you alright? You seem agitated.

C: 说起来，克拉特鲁斯那家伙还邀请我指导这里的防卫任务呢，真拿他没办法。
E: Believe it or not, Krateros invited me to oversee defense operations here. What am I going to do with that fellow?

C: 英雄阁下……
E: Hero...

C: （我很害怕，但他们向我解释说，没关系，我没有做坏事，而且为了我，姐姐一定会消失。）
E: (I was scared, but they explained that it's okay, I haven't done anything bad, and that the lady will definitely disappear for me.)

C: 你本该更敏锐些的。我可以提醒你，只要提供<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>就好。
E: You should have been more attentive. Let me remind you, all you need to do is provide <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>.

C: 呵呵，那妈可要时不时到谷堆上看看，有没有像山一样的大地兽来哀丽秘榭附近了。
E: Then I'll have to keep watch from the haystack. Just to see if a mountain-sized dromas is headed for Aedes Elysiae.

C: 哈，就算没有炊烟，我也能找到家在哪儿。除了老爸，应该没人比我更熟悉这片麦田了。
E: Hah, even without the smoke, I'll always know where home is. I know these wheat fields better than anyone — except dad, maybe.

C: 虽然老师没去过，但听说，树庭各学派的贤人都是极其卓越的智者，学识渊博，技艺超群。若是你能师从其中一位继续深造，肯定会大有收获吧。
E: Though I've never been there myself, they say the sages of its various schools are all brilliant minds — learned, skilled, and deeply respected. Studying under one of them would surely take you far.

C: 我知道啦。但是，我也想去外面冒险，去遇见好多好多有意思的事。呜……
E: I know. But I still wanna go outside, and see all sorts of exciting things. Agh...

C: 但是一听到这个音，就感觉心里暖洋洋的，心情好多了迷。
E: But when I hear this note, it feels all warm and cozy inside. And suddenly, everything's better again, mem!

C: 往届的赢家都许了什么愿？
E: What have past winners wished for?

C: 有时他们会走上不同的道路，但友谊坚固如初，好像不受岁月磨损一样。
E: Sometimes, they would step on different paths, but their friendships remained as strong as ever, as if time could never wear them away.

C: 嗯…有位织者擅长借助环境掩蔽身形。金丝带来消息，它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>屋旁的麦垛中</color>，期待与行人的视线较量一番。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who excels at blending in with their surroundings. The golden thread brings tidings: They are hiding in <color=#dbc291ff>a stack of wheat next to the house</color>, waiting to make eye contact with passers-by.

C: 好呀！人家也有想做的事，可以和你一起吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Great idea! I have something in mind too. Can I join you, {NICKNAME}?

C: 唔，一时没什么想法呢…有了，不如随性一些，四处看看找点灵感吧？
E: Hmm, I'm drawing a blank right now... Oh, I know! How about we take a walk and look for some inspiration?

C: 想四处看看，多了解这里。
E: We could hang around here and get to know this place better.

C: 如今，泰坦已是逐火军竭力才能打败的敌手。而未来那般遥远的征程上不知还有多少强敌……
E: Today, the Titans are enemies that the Flame-Chase Army can only beat through great struggle. And there is no certainty about how many powerful enemies await along that long journey to the future...

C: 你都增设了什么项目？
E: What new projects have you added?

C: 呵呵…哈哈…呵哈哈哈…诶呦，好大一只海蛞蝓……
E: Heh... Hah haha.... Hahaha... Whoa, what a huge sea slug...

C: 呵呵…什么是真…什么又是假？我只知道…是我主令我长留此处……
E: What's real... and what's false? All I know... is that my lady wills me to linger here...

C: 在凯撒大人赐下的欢宴之中，无论你有着哪般身份、何种秘密，只要置身满场秘酿、珍馐与欢声笑语之间，就可以暂且将烦恼悉数忘却。
E: In the feast granted by the Great Imperator, regardless of your identity and secrets, as long as you wished to indulge yourself in ambrosia, delicacies and laughter, you could temporarily put all your troubles and frustrations aside.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 都来都来，都来看看迷！多来多来，多来尝尝迷！
E: Come one, come all! Take a look, memi! Step right up, step right in, come and taste it, memi!

C: 那又如何？艺术性高于一切。
E: So what? Artistry is above all else.

C: 不了，爷爷，我还是更喜欢冷水浴，这样能让我的身体更强壮。
E: No, grandpa — I still prefer my cold baths. They help strengthen my body.

C: …我不明白，以您的身份地位，就算离开了雅努萨波利斯，也应当受到众人的尊崇敬仰，而不是……
E: ...I don't understand. Even if you have left Janusopolis, with your accomplishments and status, you should be respected and admired by all, instead of being...

C: 大姐，我是实诚人，买东西童叟无欺！您看我这肥皂，用传说中的西尔菲翁和顶好的橄榄油手工做的，是黑潮前才有的货哩……
E: Madam, I'm a decent merchant who sells quality goods at honest prices! Check this soap. It's handmade with the legendary Silphion and top-notch olive oil. Usually you can only find such good stuff before the black tide...

C: …唉呀，你这丫头说话还真有意思。按你的意思，孩子们吃不完的糖，也只能靠我们这些年纪大的努力吃完了吧？
E: ...Oh dear, you really have a way with words. But if I follow your advice, guess there will be plenty of leftovers, and the elders would have to finish them all.

C: 说到吃的，最重要的肯定是外观。
E: When it comes to food, appearance is definitely what's most important.

C: 但是不可否认，它们的处事方式与行为动机，有时候却往往比人类更有逻辑。
E: But their ways of handling things and the motives behind their behaviors are undeniably often more logical than that of the humans'.

C: 你为什么不离开这里？
E: Why didn't you leave?

C: 我势单力薄，影响力或许会让你失望。
E: I am powerless on my own. My influence may disappoint you.

C: 不过你能看出我身上的穿搭风格与妆容安排，想来也是一位关注时尚的小年轻呢。
E: However, I guess you are a stylish youngster yourself if you can see my fashion style and my makeup.

C: 不过，就算明天世界要毁灭了，我也得给自己找个要完成的事情来做。如果我现在回到家，瘫坐在那里，什么都不做，末日也不会有改变……
E: Still, even if the world's gonna end tomorrow, I need to find something to keep myself busy. If I just go home and slump there doing nothing, it's not gonna change doomsday anyway...

C: 当然，我也该去准备下潜到灵水里了，希望我能找到我的论文。
E: Well, I should get ready to dive into the spirit water, too. Hope I can find my thesis.

C: 荒笛大人说过，行走的诀窍，便是不能只是低头注视着大地前进，我们还需要停下来并抬起头，确认前进的方向。
E: Lord Terravox once said, the key to walking isn't just keeping your head down and watching the ground as you move forward. We need to stop and look up to make sure we're heading in the right direction.

C: 对于人类来说或许有些超前，但对于本虫来说刚刚好喀！
E: It might be a bit ahead of its time for humans, but it's just perfect for this nymph, crrk!

C: 瑟希斯大大，我们敬爱你喀！
E: Great Cerces, we love and respect you, crrk!

C: 嗯…有位织者正在研究墙上的符号。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>路旁的壁画前</color>，宣扬自己的成果呢。
E: Hmm... There's a weaver who is poring over the symbols on the wall. The golden thread brings tidings: It's showing off its findings before the <color=#dbc291ff>roadside mural</color>.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

C: 这则预言应该有答案…可是我忘了。
E: The prophecy should have an answer... but I forgot.

C: 之后再见吧。
E: See you later, then.

C: 我将在此长久伫立，愿清风常伴你身。
E: I shall stand here for a long time. May the cool breeze always be by your side.

C: 又见面了。托你和那些黄金裔的福，我得以亲眼目睹「再创世」。看来我的推论没错——世界循环，而灵魂不灭。
E: We meet again. Thanks to you and those Chrysos Heirs, I witnessed the "Era Nova" with my own eyes. It seems my theory was right — the world cycles, and souls are eternal.

C: 前辈的箩筐也是…哈哈，两位一过来就都是有房人士了，当真让人羡慕。
E: Your weaved basket, too... Heh, you both became homeowners right off the bat here, I'm seriously jealous!

C: 小阿格莱雅和小赛飞儿？
E: Little Aglaea and little Cipher?

C: 以柯库翁先生的实力，本届的桂冠必是他囊中之物！让我们预祝冠军的凯旋——
E: With Mr. Glykon's prowess, this year's wreath is as good as his! Let's toast to the champion's triumphant return.

C: 去去去——老东西，哪壶不开提哪壶！你……
E: Oh, come on — you old geezer, way to bring up exactly what you shouldn't! You...

C: 你是…为什么我觉得你有些熟悉，却想不起究竟何时见过……
E: You seem... familiar. I feel as though we've met, but I cannot place when or where.

C: 嗨，没关系，我们曳石学派和那些运动员都身强体健的，不怕磕碰！
E: Don't worry about that! We Helkolithists are tough as nails, and so are the athletes!

C: 你早说你有这种东西，我们还用在这里吵来吵去吗？
E: Why didn't you say you had that earlier? We wouldn't have spent all this time arguing!

C: 到头来，你们都清闲了，就我还是这么忙。
E: In the end, you all get to take it easy while I'm still swamped with work.

C: 还在的，这是常驻活动。
E: Yes, it's still there. This is a permanent event.

C: 嘿嘿，现在我把它转交给你——我同意了迷！
E: Hehe, I'm handing it over to you now — You have my permission!

C: 村长放心，我保证——下次出发前，一定会叫上你的迷！
E: Don't worry, Chief! I promise - next time before I head out, I'll definitely bring you along!

C: 呜嗡！（好痒，好痒——哈哈哈——）
E: Gruuuuumph! (That tickles! Hahaha—)

C: 我去问问他都有什么书。
E: I'll go ask him what books he has.

C: 会把包裹炸坏的啦！
E: But that would blow up the packages!

C: 如果担心晚上会做噩梦的话，就抱着它睡觉吧。
E: If you're worried about having nightmares, just cuddle it in your arms.

C: 并无大事，我只是想找人讨论一下，最近街头新流传的泰坦神话。
E: Nothing major, I just wanted to find someone to discuss the new Titan myths circulating on the streets lately.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 至少在我加入逐火之后，见到的两位就是这样了。
E: At least that's how the two of them were when I joined the Flame-Chase.

C: 无妨，我能理解，新世界的岁月平稳流淌，但平凡的生活不等于一成不变，她大概是想为大家带来点新鲜事。
E: It's alright, I understand. Time flows peacefully in this new world, but an ordinary life doesn't mean it has to stay the same forever. She probably just wants to bring something fresh and exciting to everyone.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 辛苦你守望了昨日。
E: Thanks for keeping watch over yesterday.

C: 当然啦！这名头可是本姑娘靠实力赚来的！
E: Of course! This title was earned by me, fair and square!

C: 人的精神是不可测算的，唯有神明能掌控一切。正如赞达尔无法剔除自身的人性，吕枯耳戈斯亦无法抹杀生命的出路。
E: The human spirit is immeasurable. Only the gods can control everything. Just as Zandar cannot remove his humanity, Lycurgus cannot eliminate the path of life.

C: 她是那种…极具热情的人；她的热情就像一颗剧烈燃烧的太阳。多数时候，她很神秘；但偶尔，你会觉得她在燃烧自己，朝着梦想飞驰而去。
E: She's... extremely passionate, like a burning sun. However, she remains mysterious most of the time. Once in a while, you feel that she's burning herself out trying to accomplish her dream.

C: 人生有许多发展本就是出乎意料，不受控制的。就像你来到列车的经历一样。
E: Many developments in life are inherently unexpected or uncontrollable, just like your experience with the Express.

C: 矿车工平时都负责些什么？
E: What does a mine cart operator usually do?

C: 报酬你先拿着，等我再给你来一道……
E: Take this reward, and I'll get another one for you...

C: 找艾丝妲帮忙？
E: Have you asked Asta for help?

C: 嗯，如你所见…我中了对方的陷阱！
E: Mmm, as you can see... I fell right into their trap!

C: 就是我手边这台电脑，你调查一下就明白了。
E: This computer I have here. Take a look at it and you'll see what I mean.

C: （按下后退键。）
E: (Press Backspace.)

C: 咦，我们是不是之前见过……
E: Hmm, have we met somewhere before...

C: 没问题，该怎么做？
E: Alright. What should I do?

C: 我自己也给你准备了些报酬，还希望你能笑纳！
E: I put together something to thank you. Go ahead and take it!

C: 非常合适。
E: Very much so.

C: 重点描述「封锁政策」吧。
E: Emphasize the blockade policy.

C: 诞生自筑城纪元<unbreak>280</unbreak>年间的首饰盒，岁月无法掩盖它的精致。
E: A jewelry box made in <unbreak>280</unbreak> AF. Its delicate nature cannot be concealed by its age.

C: 它拘束了从天而降的灾祸、贝洛伯格的未来，以及一位大守护者的漫长的噩梦。
E: Imprisoned inside it is a calamity descended from the sky, the future of Belobog, and the enduring nightmare of a Supreme Guardian.

C: 驭空…我们需要聊聊……
E: Yukong... We need to talk...

C: 我听会长说「公司会毁掉金人巷」，我有些担心。
E: I was a little worried when I heard the president say that the IPC is going to destroy Aurum Alley.

C: 来一份「鸣藕糕」。
E: I'll have a songlotus cake.

C: 这家伙的货物有问题，会损坏其他客人的商品，害得码头一直在赔偿……
E: There's something wrong with the stuff this guy is shipping — it's causing damage to other people's goods, and our dock here is liable for the compensation...

C: 出示。
E: (Present evidence)

C: 会长是公司派来的奸细吧？
E: Maybe he's an IPC spy?

C: 明曦，我想听听你的想法。
E: Mingxi, I would like to hear your thoughts.

C: 但是你们可以成为不同于商会，也不同于公司的第三种可能。
E: ...And yet all of you now represent a third choice — different from both the Merchant Guild and the IPC.

C: 看来我老爸点头了，咱们开始吧？{NICKNAME}，恰巧有熟客送来个坏掉的机巧，要不咱们就露一手，修好这个。
E: That sounds like a "yes" to me. Let's get on with the job, shall we? {NICKNAME}, here's something from one of our regulars. Show him what you can do.

C: 依我对会长的了解，他现在才算是放心将金人巷的未来交给你们。
E: Knowing the president, I think he's now ready to entrust you with the future of the Alley.

C: 公司不打算参加竞标了吗？
E: Have they decided to drop out of the bidding?

C: 去拍摄「{NICKNAME}与金人巷入口」。
E: Shoot "{NICKNAME} at the Alley Entrance".

C: （我自己再想一句）
E: (Need to come up with one more...)

C: 在这之前，我总是用斯科特的形象去想象公司的一切，总以为他们盛气凌人、手段肮脏。
E: Before I met Xiaohan, I always imagined everyone at the IPC would be like Skott — overbearing and dodgy.

C: 你不会觉得商会肯定中标了吧？
E: Do you think the guild won the bid?

C: 我不忍心就这样欺骗你，告诉你吧，我是被雇来考验你的人，不是「云骑」。
E: I can't bear to trick you like this, so let me tell you: I've been hired to test you, and I'm not a real "Cloud Knight."

C: 不玩虚的。东西好不好吃，看月销量就能看出来了……
E: That won't do. Good reviews mean nothing if our monthly sales figures can't back them up.

C: 行不行啊，我只讲一遍——我要一份葱醋鸡、一份月华饭，大碗的。
E: Okay, I'll say this only once: One portion of scallion chicken, and one portion of moonlight rice. Large bowls, please.

C: 没错，你这都是「不治之症」了，我怎么治得好？
E: Right, you said this disease is "incurable." How am I supposed to treat that?

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 商会不能脱离商铺存在，商会会把金人巷打造成「新•罗浮第一夜市」。
E: The guild serves the sole purpose of helping local businesses. We will help the Alley reclaim the title of "the best night market on the Luofu".

C: 码头临时安全检修，先去处理其他的要紧事吧。
E: The dock is undergoing an unscheduled safety inspection. It would be best if you took care of other urgent issues first.

C: 最近金人巷游客变多了，买仙人快乐茶还得排队。
E: There has been an influx of tourists in Aurum Alley lately. There's even a long line for Immortal's Delight.

C: 货运星槎成本不低，我们应当充分利用。
E: Freight starskiffs can be costly. We should make the most of them.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，多亏了你呀。
E: Thank you very much, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

C: 原来如此…多亏你帮忙，收集了「杜氏茶庄」的路径数据不说，还将它带到我身边。
E: I see... Thank you for collecting the route data for Du's Teahouse and bringing it back to me.

C: 可能送得慢，菜都凉了…
E: Maybe the delivery was so slow that the food was all cold?

C: <size=36>{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！</size>
E: <size=36>{NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}!</size>

C: 想不到你还这么关心我的宝贝感应仪！
E: You care so much about my precious sensor! That's unexpected!

C: 不过，你必须向我保证，绝对不会将这事儿告诉别人，甚至不能让人知道委托你的人是我。
E: However, you must promise me that you will never reveal anything to others, not even the fact that I was the one who asked for your help.

C: 和平常不一样就是异常啊！哎，你到时候去看了应该就知道了。
E: "Abnormal" is something that's out of the norm! Gah, you'll know when you get there.

C: （猛踹雪堆）
E: (Kick the Snow Drift)

C: 那就是你勘测得不够仔细呗！我是不会给你支付酬劳的！
E: Then you're not detailed enough! I won't pay you!

C: 没有任何画面显示在屏幕上，似乎已经彻底报废了。
E: Nothing is showing on the screen, it seems like it's completely busted.

C: 哎呀，你呀你，科学不能基于幻想做延展，这个思想很危险啊！
E: Oh, hey, you um... Science cannot be based solely on the extension of imagination, that mindset is dangerous!

C: 咳咳——哎呦，忘词儿了。
E: Ahem... Oops, I forgot the lines.

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: 逃狱啊。难道你以为自己已经自由了？
E: We're breaking out of prison. Do you actually think you're already a free man?

C: 这带有甜味的汽水让囚犯们的精神大为提振，就像在黑暗中看到了光……
E: The sweetness of the soda lifts the spirits of the inmates — as if they can see the light in the darkness...

C: 他说了什么？
E: ...Go on.

C: 滴答，所有「美梦剧团」都是为宾客服务的梦境机器，我们被筑梦师创造，由鸢尾花家系管理，和艺者们一同为梦境带来快乐。
E: Tick-tock, everyone in the Sweet Dreams Troupe are Dreamscape machines that serve our guests. We were created by our Dreamweavers, are managed by the Iris Family, and with our fellow artistes, bring joy to the Dreamscapes.

C: 我觉得那地方很不对劲。
E: I think there's something wrong with this place.

C: 好吧，简单来说就是这么回事——电视台的信号被不明团体劫持了，它们自称是什么「惊梦电视台」，接连开了好几档节目。
E: To put it simply, Penacony TV's signal has been hijacked by an unknown organization. They called themselves the "Dreamjolt TV" and have aired several TV programs.

C: 对了，根据家族送来的情报，我们发现了一个有趣的现象——
E: By the way, we've noticed something interesting from the intel sent by The Family.

C: 噢，原来你是直奔主题的类型？单纯点是好事，但太直接有时会不太讨喜哦？
E: Oh, I see you like to be straightforward. It's good to keep things simple, but you might get on people's nerves for being too direct.

C: 聊天不过是拉近关系的方式，只要达到了目的，具体聊什么并不重要，不是吗？
E: Chatting is just a way to get closer to each other. As long as the conversation fulfills its purpose, it doesn't matter what we actually talk about. Don't you think so?

C: …感觉怎么样，还顺利吗？
E: ...Is everything going alright?

C: 酒单上的品类可满足不了这种需求，你要怎么处理呢？
E: Nothing on the menu fits the requirements. What should you do now?

C: 呜呜…新人，我好委屈，我是冤枉的，你可得帮我评评理呀。
E: *sob*... I'm being framed, newcomer. You've got to help me out.

C: 汪！我才刚捡到新的收音机，你别过来哇！
E: Woof! Be careful with the new radio I just found! Don't even think about touching it!

C: （…那个闹钟先前这么威风，情绪平静下来后还是挺懂事的。）
E: (...That alarm clock was a pain, but now he seems quite prudent when he is calmed down.)

C: 舒翁…舒翁和上次来酒吧的那个坏人一起走了，她再也不愿意待在这里了哇！
E: Siobhan... She left with the baddie who showed up at the lounge last time! She doesn't want to stay here anymore!

C: 快住手！
E: Stop it!

C: 那些怪物没有变得狂乱，只是不愿再听从命令而已。
E: They didn't become frenzied. They simply just don't want to follow orders anymore.

C: 为了共同的目标「开拓」，不同世界的无名客们都站了出来——有人不断深入未知的星域，有人传唱无名客的故事，都是为了让「开拓」更强大一些。
E: To complete our shared goal of Trailblaze, the Nameless on different worlds all rose up. Some continued to go out and explore unknown segmenta and others shared the story of the Nameless through songs. Everything they did was to make Trailblaze a little stronger.

C: 过了太久安稳日子，心态也变得怠惰，因为大剧院在匹诺康尼的地位，就理所当然地认为叛徒不可能在这儿，这都是我们失察的过错。
E: After enjoying an extended period of peace, our attitudes have indeed grown indolent. We thought the traitor would never be in the Grand Theater because of the building's status in Penacony. This error is a result of our own ignorance.

C: 千万不要放松警惕，危险随时都可能出现。
E: Stay vigilant. Danger lurks in every corner.

C: 不靠家族，贵影业该如何解决这些难题呢？难道在银幕外有人能用「钟表把戏」来帮你们吗？
E: How is Clock Studios going to solve all these problems without The Family's help? Is there anyone outside the silver screen that can save the company with "clockwork"?

C: 看看现在的克劳克影视乐园——最具有标志性的银屏遭到破坏，天空散发着阴森的气息，惊梦剧团四处横行。
E: Just look at Clock Studios Theme Park right now — The most iconic silver screen is broken, the sky is all gloomy, and the Dreamjolt Troupe is walking all over the place.

C: 行了，还有宾客在这呢，别让人家看笑话了，快点去工作吧！
E: Well, let's not bother our guest with our problems. Get back to work!

C: 这是…「钟表匠」先生的帽子！
E: This is... Mr. Watchmaker's hat!

C: 我试试吧…
E: I'll try...

C: 有话好好说。
E: Please don't resort to violence.

C: 可惜，现实里没几个像左轮队长这样的英雄，石头老板这种欠喵的小可爱倒是不少，为了点儿破石头就糟蹋别人的家园——如果是我，第一幕就会把他的脑袋打开花。
E: Shame, ain't many heroes like Captain Revolver 'round these parts. Plenty of muddle-fudgers like Boss Stone wanderin' 'bout causin' trouble. For a nugget of rock, they'd ruin folks' homesteads. If it were me, I'd open his bean right in the first scene.

C: 「加油，哈努兄弟！请在广告牌的掩护下击溃敌人，逃出生天吧！」
E: "Good luck, Brother Hanu! Please defeat the enemies under the cover of the billboards and escape!"

C: 你听，屋子深处传来了解锁的声音——我们破解了石头老板的谜题，汽水先生的牢门解开了！
E: Listen, there's a sound of unlocking coming from the depths of the house — we've solved Boss Stone's puzzle. Mr. Soda's cell door is unlocked!

C: 勉强合格吧。
E: It's barely passable, I guess.

C: 记住，要<color=#dbc291ff>让所有演员入镜</color>，明白了吗？
E: Remember, <color=#dbc291ff>all the actors must be in frame</color>. Got that?

C: （拍摄打戏让它退场）
E: (Shoot the action scene to get it to leave)

C: 「苏乐达能够为美梦小镇带来快乐与欢笑，但邪恶的石头老板讨厌所有美好的东西，于是囚禁了汽水先生，也藏起了小镇中所有的苏乐达…」
E: "SoulGlad can bring joy and laughter to Dreamville, but the evil Boss Stone hates everything nice, so he's imprisoned Mr. Soda and stashed away all of the town's SoulGlad..."

C: 开始剪辑。
E: Begin editing.

C: 用汽水控制镇民的心智。
E: Use the soda to control the minds of the people.

C: 哦，这只该死的坏鳄鱼，真符合他的作风！
E: Huh, that darned crocodile. That is SO like him!

C: 「日子一天天过去，镇民们逐渐忘记了石头老板的凶恶，但这个坏蛋一定还在觊觎着美梦小镇。终有一日，他和他的爪牙会再次归来……」
E: "As the days passed by, the townsfolk gradually forgot about how brutal Boss Stone was. But still, this bad guy coveted Dreamville for himself. The day would come when he and his lackeys would rise up once again..."

C: 咳咳，莫要打扰，老朽正在思考……
E: *cough* Please don't disturb me, I am thinking...

C: 等等！你等等！导演，你快帮我想想办法！
E: Wait! Wait up! Director, please can you help me come up with something?

C: 「嘿嘿…情况越混乱，咱们就越是有机会从中捞点油水」——咳咳，这是温世齐大哥的原话，他说有好事就应该是第一时间跟好朋友分享，所以把你喊过来了。
E: "Hehe... The more chaotic a situation is, the more money we stand to make from it"... Ahem, that's what Wen Shiqi said verbatim. He told me that good news should be shared in the first instance with good friends — and so he called you over.

C: 你感到自己的脑袋晕乎乎的，录像带散发的波纹往四周蔓延，似乎把这里变成了一口迷幻的池塘……
E: Your head spins, as ripples cascade from the unraveling tape, transforming this place into an enchanting pool...

C: 前面的通关之路艰难无比，来点美味小吃补充能量吧！
E: The road ahead is can be quite tough. Why not buy some tasty snacks to replenish yourself!

C: （拿出变身器，准备变身）
E: (Take out the transformer and prepare to transform)

C: 这么坚持人设吗，兄弟…
E: Is staying in character this much REALLY necessary...?

C: 流程越来越复杂了，救命…
E: Ah, the plot thickens. Help!

C: 是钟表小子啾？快救救我啾，要变成烤全鸟了啾！
E: Is that Clockie, tweet? Please save me, tweet! I'm being roasted alive, tweet!

C: 真是奇怪…{NICKNAME}，我们去前面看看吧。
E: Strange... {NICKNAME}, let's go inside and take a look.

C: 感觉很开心。
E: Pretty good.

C: 你还搜集了哪些末日的忆泡？
E: What other Memory Bubbles of the apocalypse are in your collection?

C: 「数百个琥珀纪以来，烛墨学派收集了大量的史料，它们完全公开。但仰望星空的『天才』们大概无暇关注这些在沟壑里腐烂的历史残渣。」
E: "Over countless Amber Eras, the Candelagraphos has amassed a wealth of historical material, openly accessible. However, the geniuses busy gazing at the stars might not spare any time to delve into these remnants of history rotting in the gutters of time."

C: 参与学术研究的酬劳将按照特级研究助理的待遇定期支付。当然，与你为研究提供的帮助相比，不过是太阳面前的些许微尘罢了。
E: Compensation for your participation in the research will be provided regularly, equivalent to the rate of a class-A research assistant. Of course, it pales in comparison to the immense assistance you provide.

C: 而依我之见，尽管这一概念诞生自有机体的主观感受，但艺术的殿堂自身并不拒绝任何一位来客。
E: In my opinion, even if this concept was borne of a subjective feeling of organic life, the pantheon of art does not discriminate against any of its guests.

C: 对哦！害我白高兴一场。
E: Oh, you're right! I almost got all excited for nothing.

C: 别磨叽了，请我俩喝奶茶吧，喝完之后，你就老实回来学剑！如何？
E: Let's just stop wasting time. Just treat us to some milk tea, and then we can start our real swordplay training, okay?

C: 藿藿在尾巴大爷建议下做了些准备，随后你们如期赶往金人巷赴约……
E: Following Mr. Tail's advice, Huohuo made some preparations, and then you head to Aurum Alley as promised...

C: 是我，你姑奶奶我！啊不对，感觉姑奶奶好像不太帅气…{NICKNAME}，你说！
E: It's me! March 7th! Cause more trouble and I'll show you who your mommy is... Wait, that sounded lame... Hey, {NICKNAME}, say something for me!

C: 真是一些奇奇怪怪的本事，不过能如此自然地将它们运用在剑招之中，这足以被称为三月小姐自己的独门绝技了。
E: Those moves were pretty unconventional, but the way you blended them into your swordplay was impressive. It's like you've developed your own unique style, Miss March.

C: 这句话听多了，我都会唱了。
E: Oh, I've heard that line so many times before!

C: 最后，此二人都被值勤的十王司冥差「九叔」劝返回家，于次日发作异常。
E: Finally, these two were shooed home by the Ten-Lords Commission spiritfarer-on-duty, Uncle Jiu. They started acting funny the following day.

C: 加油藿藿，早点将犯人捉拿归案！
E: Good luck, Huohuo! Hope you catch the culprit and close the case soon!

C: 幸好藿藿比较忙，没让你得逞。
E: Luckily Huohuo was too busy to let you have your way.

C: 老斯科特，你涉嫌收受巨额贿赂，跟我们走一趟吧。
E: Skott Sr., you're suspected of accepting a huge bribe. Now, come with us.

C: 哇～还有这种神药！但…不会有什么副作用吧？
E: Whoa! Sounds incredible! But... are there any side effects?

C: 哼哼～很喜欢仙舟人的一句俗语：「知己知彼，对手狗殆。」
E: Yeah, there's a Xianzhou proverb for such an occasion: "Know yourself and know your enemy, and you'll never have to sleep in the doghouse."

C: 你能提高武器性能？
E: Can you enhance weapons?

C: 尝试共情斯科特。
E: Try to empathize with Skott.

C: 三月，你可不是什么吸血鬼哦！
E: March, you're not some blood-sucking vampire!

C: 反倒是负责气氛组的三月七有些不太对劲……
E: On the contrary, there's something odd about March 7th, who is in charge of the overall ambiance...

C: 可是老夫已经做不出来了……
E: But I can no longer make it...

C: 屋漏偏逢连夜雨…你们知道丹鼎司的新任司鼎大人吧？她大手一挥，说是要把药王秘传那里缴来的禁书送至太卜司书库封存起来…无形之中，我的工作量又又又翻倍了。
E: As if that wasn't bad enough... You know the Alchemy Commission's new Cauldron Master, don't you? As soon as she started her position, she waved her hand and ordered that the forbidden books confiscated from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were to be brought to the Divination Commission repository for sealing... Before I knew it, I was absolutely buried in work.

C: 但是，我们都知道这样的想法只不过是一厢情愿……
E: However, we all know that beliefs like this are just blind optimism...

C: …说不定剑魔也是这样想的，但是他已经回不去了。
E: ...Maybe that is what the Blade Demon wanted, too?

C: 你和我一样酷，还是一样能打？
E: Are you as cool as I am? Or as great a fighter?

C: 不、不，我想你误会了…我说的相似仅仅基于兴趣爱好的层面而言。
E: No, no I think you misunderstand me... I just mean that we have interests in common.

C: 至于你，我的朋友，你在这次的研究中居功至伟，我答应过的报酬绝不会少你的。
E: As for you, my friend, I would never deny you the payment I promised for your invaluable assistance.

C: 我亲爱的助手{NICKNAME}！如果你还想补拍，可以随时来找我。
E: My beloved assistant, {NICKNAME}! If you want to retake any pictures, you can come and find me any time.

C: 言归正传吧，星穹列车来去匆匆，留给咱们共处的时间相当宝贵。这几天，贝洛伯格发生了一件怪事……
E: Allow me to get back to my original point. The Astral Express is always on the move and any time you and I can meet is precious. Something strange has been happening in Belobog these past few days...

C: 您是卢卡先生的朋友吗？自我介绍一下，我是星际和平娱乐的实习记者「卡美丽」。
E: Are you a friend of Mr. Luka's? Allow me to introduce myself: I am an Interastral Peace Entertainment journalist-in-training, Carmella.

C: …我在卢卡选手身上感受到了这种节目潜力！
E: ...I can sense the potential of a juicy program just through Luka alone!

C: 不管各位的世界有没有昼夜的概念，总之先祝你早上中午晚上好！ 我是你们的好朋友——叽米！
E: And whether or not your world has a day-night cycle — good morning, good afternoon, and good evening! I'm your good buddy Owlbert!

C: 没想到卢卡选手初出茅庐就获得了胜利，但他能在这条道路上走多远呢？让我们，拭目以待！
E: Who'd have thought a rookie challenger like Luka would win? But how much further will he make it? Let us stay tuned!

C: 怎么会，我哪来的资格看不起公司的大人物啊？
E: Of course not. I wouldn't dare look down on one of the IPC's legendary employees.

C: 这太卜司又是做什么的地方……
E: What does the Divination Commission do again...

C: 我也要去！我也要去！
E: I wanna go too! I wanna go too!

C: 好了，{NICKNAME}，我们也出发吧。
E: Okay, {NICKNAME}, we should get going too.

C: 可爱是可爱，但，它能帮我治病？
E: It's pretty cute, but how can it make me better?

C: 如果多像这样独自在街上逛几次，也许还能克服自己对大都会的恐惧。毕竟往后我也要像伊戈尔一样，为了贝洛伯格在银河各处打比赛。
E: If I can walk along the streets alone for a few more times, I might be able to conquer my fears of the big city. After all, I'll have to be like Igor, competing all over the cosmos for Belobog in the future.

C: 算是吧，作为武者，总要不断挑战自我嘛。
E: I guess, as a warrior, I always have to keep challenging myself.

C: 我猜，是因为在寒潮降临前，我们与很多世界有过联系。卢卡，你听说过「伊戈尔•哈夫特」的故事吗？
E: My guess is that it's because we had communications with many worlds before the Eternal Freeze. Luka, have you heard of the story of Igor Haft?

C: （当然了，是坏人我也不怕。我这铁拳就是为了痛揍坏人才造出来的！）
E: (Of course, I'm not afraid of criminals. My Iron Fist is made to punish bad guys!)

C: 我在和卢卡老弟说话！让他自己回答我！
E: I'm speaking to Luka! Let him answer me!

C: （发生了什么…我…死了？）
E: (What's going on... Am I... dead?)

C: 克拉拉给我准备了几条备用拳套…但有什么用？还不是被波提欧一枪一个？
E: Clara prepared a couple of spare boxing gloves... But what's the use? They'll just get shot up one by one by Boothill anyway.

C: 对了，卢卡先生还好吗？我看新闻上他下场时都快站不稳了。
E: Oh right, is Mr. Luka doing all right? The news said he couldn't even stand.

C: 没事的，卢卡先生的人气也很高，肯定能通过「人气复活」重返赛场！请您给他加油鼓劲！
E: Since Mr. Luka is really popular, he'll definitely clear the popularity revival vote and return! Please cheer him on!

C: （长叹一声）
E: (Heave a long sigh)

C: 再见！人气复活赛一定要加油哦～
E: Bye! Do your best in the popularity revival repechage!

C: 快跑啊！快跑！逃命吧，你赢不了的！
E: Run away, quickly! Flee! You can't win!

C: 回贝洛伯格吧，你的水平差得太多了！你会死的！
E: Run back to Belobog. The skill gap is too much! You'll die!

C: 听说罗浮请来了一位颇有声誉，以美德著称的战士作为评判复活挑战者的「裁判」。你们知道「纯美骑士」吗？
E: It is said that the Luofu has invited a highly reputable warrior known for his virtue to serve as the referee for the repechage. Have you guys heard of the Knight of Beauty?

C: 当然没问题！我绝不会辜负你对我的欣赏，银枝先生！
E: No problem! I won't disappoint you, Mr. Argenti!

C: 你的「成长」。
E: Your improvement.

C: 哼，没问题，史瓦罗大佬。出招吧！
E: Hmph, no problem, Svarog. Bring it on!

C: 现在退赛，没人会怪你。可现在上场，就是去挨揍。明白吗？
E: No one will blame you if you withdraw now. But if you step into the ring, you'll be crushed. You get what I'm saying?

C: 直到我亲身踏上这片英雄的土地，感受到仍未消亡的冰雪如烈火般灼烧皮肤…我才察觉，这份「存护」的意志是多么厚重，挣扎在这片土地上的人民又是多么伟大。
E: It wasn't until I stepped onto this land of heroes myself and felt the burn of the perpetual ice on my skin... that I finally realized how solemn the belief of the Preservation is and how great the people struggling there are.

C: 我不过是个取悦他们的玩具。看看我都干了什么…切掉了自己完好的手臂，换上公司的义肢，这一切只为了让比赛变得更凶险、刺激。
E: I'm just a plaything for their entertainment. Look at what I've had to do... Severing my perfectly good arm and replacing it with an IPC prosthetic, all to make the matches more dangerous and thrilling.

C: 我在听。我可以帮你赢得胜利。
E: I'm listening. I can help you achieve victory.

C: 对不起，走错门了？
E: Sorry, wrong door?

C: 指令：尖兵<unbreak>0089</unbreak>，诊断机体情况。
E: Order: Elite Soldier <unbreak>0089</unbreak>, diagnosing corpus status.

C: 他们从边缘星域而来，立誓前往罗浮仙舟，为一万余名寺僧与一万三千名平民孩童请愿，求取仙舟人的庇护。
E: They originate from a frontier star quadrant, swearing to journey to the Xianzhou Luofu to petition to the Xianzhou natives for the protection of over ten thousand monks and thirteen thousand civilian children.

C: 我看你这婆娘更像青蛙，呱呱叫个不停。希望在我把你开膛破腹的时候，你也能继续聒噪下去。
E: I think you're more like a frog here, hag! Croaking about like a witch! I hope you'll keep yammering on when I split your belly open.

C: 在历史已无法追溯的年代，反有机方程引领的帝国曾占领了大半个宇宙，作为鲁珀特帝国的尖兵，我，是帝皇意志的延伸。
E: In an era forgotten by history and drowned in time, the empire that the Anti-Organic Equation ushered in once extended across more than half of the universe. As an elite soldier of the Rubert Empire, I am an extension of the Emperor's will.

C: 怎么说呢，比起希儿或者托帕小姐那样的对手，她给我的感觉，更像是娜塔莎大姐头。
E: How do I put this... compared to opponents like Seele or Miss Topaz, the feeling she gives me, feels more like Lady Boss Natasha.

C: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和——「扑满战线」！
E: In this match, the two opposing sides are, Luka "Strongarm" and the Trotter Battlefront!

C: 看你现在这生龙活虎的劲儿，本大爷的治疗应该还算成功。
E: Looking at how energetic you are, it seems like my treatment is working well.

C: 我确实没什么对付「植物」的经验…只希望这场比赛能顺利吧！
E: I honestly don't have much experience dealing with plants... Let's hope this match goes smoothly!

C: 咱们俩这谁跟谁啊！
E: Hey, I thought we were buds!

C: 欸？我怎么被点到了，我是不是站错位置了啊，其实我…连问题都没想好。
E: Eh? Why was I chosen? Am I standing in the wrong spot? Actually... I haven't even thought of the questions yet.

C: 竞技体育与他们俩之前的交手都不太一样。选手自身实力固然重要，合适的战术也会起到举足轻重的作用。
E: Competitive fighting is quite different from the fights they got into against each other before. While the opponent's strength is an important consideration, the right tactics are also crucial in turning the tide.

C: 上啊！兄弟们！为了绩效！
E: Let's roll, people! For our performance evaluation!

C: 「罗浮庙会，庙在哪里？妙在你心里！」
E: "How was the Luofu Temple Fair? It was fair-bulous!"

C: 当然是我。不然还能是谁？
E: Me, of course. Who else could it be?

C: 差点摆错，还好我技高一筹。
E: Almost set it wrong. Luckily my skills are superior.

C: 你们社团，都有些什么活动？
E: What activities does your society have?

C: 全梦境金奖！
E: Obtain the DREAMSCAPE GOLD MEDAL!

C: 等等，你会作曲吗？
E: Hang on, do you know how to compose a song?

C: 仅靠观察音律现象，便能从中得到如此丰富的灵感，实在是…高明！
E: To be able to glean such a wealth of inspiration from mere observation of musical phenomena, you are truly... ingenious!

C: 或许…我最开始就不该参加乐队。
E: Maybe... I shouldn't even have joined the band to begin with.

C: 主公，我等该何时出战，就交由你决定吧。
E: Sound Master, I shall leave it to you to decide when I shall take to the field of battle.

C: 毫无疑问，大家都很喜欢「缭乱」的音乐！不仅新潮有趣，还很酷！我熟悉的朋友现在都是你们的粉丝，争着想要乱破大人的签名呢。
E: Without a doubt, everyone loves the music of the Dazzling! It's not just trendy and making waves, it's also really cool! All my friends are your fans now, and everyone is fighting for Rappa's autograph.

C: 关于音乐派对…
E: About the music party...

C: 学院代表会说什么…「音乐派对是对外展示折纸大学活力与创造性的窗口」，但学生们才不在乎这个，只要活动办得有意思就好。
E: What did the academy's representative say... "The music party is a showcase of the energy and creativity of Paperfold University." But the students don't care about this. They only want the event to be interesting.

C: 嗯，我相信乱破大人绝对会按时归来的！这可是忍者的承诺！
E: Yes, I believe Rappa will definitely return in time! This is the promise of a ninja!

C: 啾！原来是制作人，忙着给乐队准备演奏曲目和场地，你也很不容易啾！
E: Tweet! So you're the producer then, scurrying about preparing tracks and venues for the band. Your job's tough too, tweet!

C: 汪！汪汪…汪汪汪！
E: Woof! Woof woof... Woof woof woof!

C: 是免费的，免费！
E: They're free! Free!

C: 既然如此…
E: If that's the case...

C: 舞台竞技，实力说话。想证明你很强，就在这场竞赛中堂堂正正击败我们吧！
E: Show what you got on the stage. If you want to prove you're stronger, defeat us fair and square in this competition!

C: 和乐队的日程有冲突，所以就想问问…能不能允许我暂时离开，不参加后续的活动？
E: It clashes with the band schedule, so I want to ask... Would you allow me to leave on a temporary basis and not take part in any further activities?

C: 莫、莫要慌张，容在下先去探探虚实！
E: Th—There's no need to panic. I will get to the bottom of this!

C: 太有了。
E: Nothing but faith!

C: 也罢，《银河忍法帖》有云——「时机未现，静候其变」。
E: Either way, the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions states: "If the time is not yet right, one must simply await change."

C: 经理阁下——请随在下去劝服诸位音忍，重振「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的旗鼓！
E: August Manager... please come with me to convince the other sound ninja and fly high the flag of Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party once more!

C: 诸位音忍，请先随在下返回道场吧。
E: Fellow sound ninja, please follow me back to the venue first.

C: 求之不得。
E: That's all I've ever wanted.

C: 乱破小姐先前曾拜托音乐派对的工作人员，把乐队使用的乐器都搬到排练室。现在过去的话，应该还能碰到她哦。
E: Miss Rappa asked a music party staff member to move the band's instruments to the rehearsal room. If you head there now, you might still be able to meet her.

C: 原来是知更鸟小姐的委托吗？
E: So it was a request from Miss Robin?

C: 很久很久以前，老鸟收到了一封恩人的邀请函。于是老鸟只身来到了美梦小镇，帮助这里的镇民修建房屋。
E: Once upon a time, an old bird received an invitation from a benefactor. So that bird came to the Dreamville, to help its residents build houses.

C: 这种事很常见的。
E: This is quite common.

C: 经过对所有成员的全面考察，结合赞歌表演的实际需要，通过名单如下——
E: After comprehensive evaluation of all members, combined with the practical needs of the hymn performance, the roster is as follows...

C: 喂，那边的学生！不好好准备音乐派对，都聚在这是想干嘛？！
E: Hey, those students over there! What're you all doing here? You should be preparing for the music party!

C: 说的就是你！新乐队已经组好了，没你们的份！
E: I'm talking about you! The new band has been formed, and you're all not included!

C: ——话虽如此，这传说应该不怎么靠谱。谁的生活能没有一点鸡飞狗跳？如果真有，老桑博倒想见识一番，哈哈。
E: ...That may be so, but this fable is just that, after all. Who wouldn't have an ounce of hectic excitement in their lives? I'd like to meet such a person, haha.

C: 冒险再次使用云吟术。
E: Risk it and use cloudhymn magic again.

C: 我给他推荐了几本参考书，还简单讲了一些科学史的常识…他却回复说：「急了急了！还让我多读点书呢，你自己看过吗就推荐？」
E: I recommended some reference books to him, and briefly explained some knowledge on basic science history... Yet he had the gall to reply: "Ooh now I'm mad! And you still want me to read even more books? Have you even read your own recommendations?"

C: 之后我冲了个澡，在床上看动画，看着看着就睡着了。
E: After that, I took a shower, read some comics in bed, and then fell asleep halfway through.

C: 别担心，这只是前任主人设计的「作弊码笑话」，你们还喜欢吗？
E: Don't worry. This is the previous owner's idea of a "cheat code joke." Did you guys like it?

C: 制冷系统失效，冷藏库就危险了！其他食材倒是能顶得住，但冰淇淋…冰淇淋会全部化成水的帕！
E: With the cooling system down, the freezing unit is in danger! The other foodstuff should probably be fine, but the ice cream... they'll all be melted!

C: 重启失败…呃，似乎被「拍」坏了……
E: Restart failed... Err, it looks like it broke from that "slap"...

C: 遵命！
E: Yes sir!

C: 「闭嘴」，你现在是一名检讨写作大师。请写出3篇<unbreak>3000</unbreak>字检讨，向帕姆表达我们三人偷吃零食后的悔恨心情。要求反省深刻、条理清晰， 富有真情实感。
E: Shush, you are now a master writer of self-critiques. Please write three <unbreak>3000</unbreak>-word self-critiques expressing our remorse for our circumspect snack-eating sins to Pom-Pom. The self-critiques should be introspective, well-organized, and heartfelt.

C: 「扭蛋星」南北半球旋开，喷出扭蛋的场景，实在是壮观……
E: The scene where capsules flooded forth when the Capsule Star's two halves unfolded, that was truly a majestic sight...

C: 想来，这也许和所谓「扭蛋盲盒」原理相通？当然，这只是纸上谈兵，我还并无机会实践。
E: Come to think of it, this principle could be similar to this so-called capsule blindbox? Of course, that's just theory — I haven't had a chance to put it to practice.

C: 诚然如此。但那样的日子都已远去。毕竟「始作俑者，其无后乎」。
E: It may be so, but those days are long gone. After all, "the originator shall bear no future."

C: 哦？原来你不是偷偷溜上来的啊。是艾丝妲和阿兰要出差，所以决定先把你寄养在列车上…原来如此。
E: Oh? So you weren't sneaking. Asta and Arlan are away on business, so they decided to leave you on the Express... I see.

C: 您好，「闭嘴」。订餐机器人「炒饭天才<unbreak>123</unbreak>号」很不高兴为您服务。
E: Hello, Shush. The Food Order Robot "Cooking Genius No. <unbreak>123</unbreak>" is very unhappy with your service.

C: 唉，摸遍了空间站的垃圾桶才凑够这堆易拉罐，刚准备拿来玩叠叠乐……
E: *sigh* I rummaged through all the trashcans around the space station just to gather those cans. I wanted to play Jenga with them...

C: 那就交给你啦，拍好看一些哦！
E: I'm counting on you then! Take a good one!

C: {NICKNAME}，交给你了！
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm leaving it to you!

C: 请随意拍摄。如果有不明白的…就多动动脑子吧。
E: Photograph to your heart's desires then. If something isn't clear... just think harder.

C: 我的本质怎么就是折纸小鸟了呢！
E: My true nature is an origami bird!?

C: 还是帮挺有文化的岁阳呢。
E: They sure are a cultured bunch of heliobi.

C: 这么一说，更想试试了…
E: I'm even more eager to try it now...

C: 这类民间收缴，十王司没有规定如何补偿…不介意的话，请收下这瓶「热浮羊奶」吧。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission does not have any compensation policies for items confiscated from citizenry... If you don't mind, you can take this bottle of steamed puffergoat milk.

C: 哼哼，这就是人剑合一的境界！
E: Heh-heh, this is the state of unity between owner and sword!

C: 希望自己的努力得到认可是人之常情，我在切磋前也常心有忐忑。
E: It's only natural to hope that your hard work will be acknowledged. My mood is usually also a mess before a duel.

C: 这种历史性的时刻，「星穹列车一家人」怎么能错过？正巧，这会儿他们都有空。
E: How could we let the Astral Express family miss out on such a momentous occasion? Coincidentally, they're all free right now.

C: 就让这张合影，成为摄影展的压轴之作吧~
E: We'll have this group photo be the grand finale for this exhibition~

C: 他们说乌拉尼娅永远得不到他人的善意和爱，因为乌拉尼娅是个没爸没妈的孤儿……
E: They say I will never receive kindness and love from others, because I am an orphan with no parents...

C: 抱歉，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，暂且听我一言——
E: Sorry, {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, please hear me out...

C: 哈哈，在这些小家伙面前说话可得注意点哦，它们非常机灵，听得懂我们究竟在说什么。
E: Haha, you ought to be more careful when you're talking in front of these little ones. They're very bright, and they do understand what we're saying.

C: 啊，不对不对。这个管理方式的问题也太大了，小奇美拉可比你以为的要能干得多。
E: Ah, no no. Such a management method presents too many problems. The little chimeras are far more capable than you think.

C: 灰宝，等等。别便宜了这种家伙。
E: Grayie, wait. Don't make it easy for this fellow.

C: 还是说，元老院只有在符合自身需要的时候，才会想要倾听大家的意愿？
E: Or does a Council Elder only listen to the will of the people when it suits his own needs?

C: 这样，我带你们去看看目前奇美拉小队的排名情况。
E: How about this? I'll bring you all to see the current squad rankings.

C: …不行了，不行了…累死了，实在做不动了…怎么还有这么多啊……
E: ...I, I can't do this anymore... Too tired to move... Why're there still so many...

C: 优秀的奇美拉，需要一位更优秀的管理员才能得到充分发挥。而我相信，在您的带领下，我能完全施展自己的才干，提升队伍成绩，进而实现双赢。
E: Superb chimeras need an even more outstanding administrator to fully wield their potential. And I believe that with your leadership, I can fully demonstrate my own talents and raise the squad's performance for a win-win partnership.

C: 但是…虽然获胜了是好事，不知道为什么，我总觉得什么地方有点奇怪。
E: But... it's a good thing we won, but I don't know why I still feel weird about it.

C: （换套别的话术试试）
E: (Try a different approach)

C: 小风堇，还有小灰。你们好呀。
E: Cinny, and Little Gray. Hello to the both of you.

C: 到时候可别哭鼻子哦？
E: You better not be bawling later on, 'kay?

C: 留在这里后，我才发现需要我做的事，远比想象的要多，也更困难。「昏光庭院」能治愈大家的伤病，可城市受到的破坏，需要更多时间才能修复。
E: After staying here, I began to discover that there were many more matters with great difficulty that needed my attention. The Twilight Courtyard can heal everyone's wounds, but damage to a city requires much more time to fix.

C: 拒绝哦。小灰在游戏里获胜了，当然要有奖励。
E: Rejected! Little Gray won in the game, and thus must be rewarded.

C: 来吧，我准备好了！
E: Come get it. I'm ready!

C: 况且，神话嘛，总会因凡人的无知，出现牵强和杜撰。
E: Moreover, these are myths after all — they are bound to be subject to mortal ignorance, giving rise to embellishments and fabrications.

C: 说摆就摆！奖杯被搬到了指定的位置。
E: Fine! The trophy is moved to the designated spot.

C: 那我可不管，没有<unbreak>20</unbreak>只小海豹的人，暂时无法成为大哥我的对手。
E: I don't care. If you don't have <unbreak>20</unbreak>, you can't become my opponent.
(:３っ "Someone, anyone, save us..." )∋

C: 看来接下来的交手，就会决定谁小组出线了！
E: The next fight will determine who advances to the knockout stage!

C: 当然，还有最令人期待的四位冠军角逐者，他们都已经到场了！
E: Not to mention, our four championship contenders are all ready and waiting!

C: 正如大家所见，咱们比赛的「金海豹杯」丢了。
E: As you can all see, our Gold Seal Cup is gone.

C: *热烈的欢呼声*
E: *Thunderous cheering*

C: 我有个新提议：灰子你来和我比一场，怎么样？赢了，奖杯还你；输了，奖杯归我。
E: Here's an idea: Gray Mystery, how about a little showdown? If you win, I'll return the trophy. If I win, the trophy's mine.

C: 你还是和从前一个德行，嗯，现在我已经确定了。
E: You're still the same as before. Hmm, now I'm sure.

C: 预言梦…是什么梦？
E: Prophetic dreams? What is a "prophetic dream"?

C: 如果小灰感兴趣的话，明天就去浴场报名比赛吧。
E: If Little Gray is interested, sign up at the baths tomorrow.

C: 嗷呜嗷呜～认输吧，黑厄势力！
E: Awooo, awooo! Give up now, Pie-non's Legion!

C: 好了，你差不多该醒来了。
E: Alright, it's about time you wake up.

C: 许多年之后，面对逐火之旅的终局，{NICKNAME}会回想起，被询问是否参加「豹豹碰碰大作战」的那个遥远的上午。
E: Many years later, when facing the finale of the Flame-Chase Journey, {NICKNAME} recalls that distant morning, so long ago, when {F#she}{M#he} was asked to participate in Seal Slammers.

C: 就调查到这吧。
E: Let's end the investigation here.

C: 总之去找你就完事了？
E: So I just need to talk to you?

C: 有些失落，但是比赛还得继续。
E: I'm a bit disappointed, but the match has to go on.

C: 帕拉黛星？是哪里？
E: Paradoxe? Where is that?

C: 快来人啊，有愚者混进来了！
E: Someone help! A Fool has snuck in!

C: 这个嘛…当然是你自己啊，我的朋友。
E: Well... of course, it was you, my friend.

C: 那么，祝你游玩愉快~
E: So, enjoy your gaming~

C: …还真给骗过来了？行吧，那就速战速决——大伙一起上，争取早点收工！
E: ...The trick worked? Well, let's end this then — Everyone, go get them together! We'll try to wrap this one up quick!

C: 他来报名时可温柔了，一口一个「爱你」「宝贝」的，大家都很喜欢他。
E: He was such a gentleman when signing up, calling everyone "fudge" and "son of a nice lady" and whatnot, everyone really liked him.

C: 不过现在我得走了，要是让某些烦人的家伙追踪到信号可就不好玩了。回头有空我们再联机吧。
E: But I have to go now. It wouldn't be fun if some annoying people managed to track the signal. Let's play online again when we have time.

C: 呃，大家比赛快乐？
E: Um. Happy championship?

C: 如果我没有被「四尺圣堂」绑架过，我就真的信了这句话了。
E: I'd buy that if I hadn't been kidnapped by the "Four-Foot Hall" that time, thank you very much.
