C: 至于剩下的东西，用你自己的眼睛去看吧。
E: As for the rest, go and take a look for yourself.

C: 你、你不要欺人太甚！
E: Y—You're pushing it too far!

C: 不错，果然有大师风范。我来尝尝看。
E: Impressive, I can see you know what you're doing. I'll sample it myself.

C: 哼哼，一看你就不懂扑满的魅力。公司的「宠物友好型办公空间」还划出了扑满专用区呢，加班累了吸一口，瞬间精神抖擞！
E: Hmph, you clearly don't get Trotters' appeal. IPC's "pet-friendly workplace" even has a designated Trotter section! When overtime leaves you drained, just cuddle one and you'll feel instantly energized!

C: （心有余悸的叫声）
E: (Terrified oinking)

C: 哦，是你啊？在这儿勤工俭学？
E: Oh, it's you? Working part-time at a lounge?

C: 真理医生抿了一口调饮。
E: Dr. Ratio takes a sip of the drink.

C: 感谢支持！我一定给你多加些料~
E: Thanks for the support! I'll throw in something extra special~

C: 绝对不能在岗位上倒下！
E: Do not collapse on duty!

C: 那是一杯无糖饮料，味道实在乏善可陈。矫饰欲望再声称它的无害，公司就爱做这种事。
E: It was a sugar-free drink, so it's dull and uninspired. The IPC loves to repackage desire and pretend it's harmless, that's their style.

C: 你未曾见过我。但玻璃杯里泛起的涟漪，会和漂泊的星光一样，为我们记下这瞬间。
E: You've never seen me, but the ripples in this glass, like the drifting starlight, will remember this moment for both of us.

C: 「替友人照看孩子」？
E: "Looking after a friend's child"?

C: 大功告成！
E: All done!

C: 难道是欠费了？
E: Or did I run out of credit?

C: 说不准，古代遗物千奇百怪，很多东西我也叫不出名字。
E: I'm not sure. There're lots of varied and strange relics there, and I don't even know what most of these are called.

C: 但不管找到啥玩意儿，能卖个好价钱就行了，你说是吧？
E: But no matter what we find, what's important is that we can sell it for top money — right?

C: 上层的东西都被挖空了，我们去下面看看吧！
E: Everything on the surface has all been carved out. Let's take a look further down!

C: 您别打断我啊，这是个好开头。我接着往下说——
E: Don't interrupt me. It's a good start. Next, it'll go...

C: 初稿而已，不必在意，日后还要改稿润色的。咱们这个初稿主要就是讲究灵感迸发。
E: It's just an outline for now. Don't think about it too much. We'll polish it later. The first draft is mainly about getting that flash of inspiration.

C: 「书中暗表，这乃是初代司鼎封入炉中的丰饶恶兽！多少庸才觊觎天材地宝，却饮恨死于恶兽之口！」
E: "The book implies that this is an Abundance Beast, sealed within the cauldron by the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission! O, how the mediocre covet such glorious treasures, yet die filled with hatred at the maw of a beast!"

C: 「{NICKNAME}将三味药材依次投进了丹炉中。先是『冰火玄莲』，它身上蕴含的至温至寒，在丹炉中调和为一，迸发出无穷的自然伟力。」
E: "{NICKNAME} placed the three medicinal herbs into the crucible, one by one. First came the Icefire Lotus: Its fiery heat and blasting cold blended together, bursting out infinite natural force."

C: 俗称脑子进水。
E: I think they call that going "soft in the head."

C: 真的吗？要不再试几次？
E: Really? Sure you don't want a couple more trials?

C: 第一、{NICKNAME}缺乏一些更吸引人的成长。吃个丹药就变强，这种东西可能在你们评书界行得通，但我们幻戏业界早就不流行这种过时的仙侠幻戏了。
E: Firstly, {NICKNAME}'s character development needs to be more compelling. Swallowing a medicinal pellet to get stronger may work in your world of storytelling, but it's long gone out of style in the Immersia genre.

C: 会不会让嘴变大？
E: Won't your mouth grow bigger?

C: 嗐，损别人可以，损观众老爷可不行。传出去定让人笑话咱俩小年轻的不会办事。
E: Come on, it's one thing to joke about others and a whole different thing to joke about our audience. If we do that, we'll end up becoming the joke in this business.

C: 有了这录音表演，反倒是好事，这意味着会有更多的「听众」。他们大可以反过来利用听众来试验自己的新段子，定期回访听听大家的意见，总比闭门造车好。
E: Recording their performance could be beneficial for them, as it means they'll have a bigger audience to test out their new materials and get more feedback. This is way better than talking to themselves!

C: 你清晰地感受着它的口感，一半像泉水，甘甜可口，一半像是火焰，灼热滚烫。两者合二为一，顺着食道渐渐下落，温润而平静。
E: It tastes like a miraculous mix of sweet spring water and searing flame. The calm yet warm liquid slowly descends your esophagus, providing a comforting sensation.

C: 嗯嗯，希望我们接下来也能合作愉快，让更多的人尝到茶庄的烈焰浓茶。
E: Absolutely! I hope that our cooperation will be fruitful and bring your tasty Flaming Potent Tea to an even larger customer base.

C: 是我，你有什么事吗？
E: Oh, it's you. How can I help?

C: 现在眼力劲儿我是有了，就是还缺点人气——所以，我打算在店门口这儿搞一个「真假鉴宝」的活动。
E: Now all I need is a little boost in popularity, and that's why I'm planning to host a treasure appraisal event right in front of my store.

C: 好像是罗浮本地节目吧，应该和公司的电视台没关系。
E: No, I don't think it has anything to do with IPC. A local Luofu event, it seems.

C: 对吧对吧，我早就知道你也是个重度游戏爱好者！咱俩要不顺路去看看？
E: Right? I knew you were a gamer! Wanna check it out on the way?

C: 走起！
E: Let's do it!

C: 这不重要，朋友。重要的是我们在这里相遇了！
E: It doesn't matter, my friend. What matters is that we're now acquainted!

C: 无事献殷勤，非奸即盗！
E: Something's off...

C: 在那之后，我会向各位仔细介绍本届庆典的内容…至于现在，就让我们留个悬念吧。
E: After you've successfully created and registered your account, I'll delve into all the details of the festival... But for now, you'll have to deal with the suspense for just a little bit longer.

C: 呵呵，我是说——既然各位都是玩家，何不按照以太战线的规则进行一场「对决」呢？
E: Hehe, what I'm getting at is this — since you're both players, why not have a showdown to settle the matter? Following the proper rules of the game, of course.

C: 不过，你说了算～还是说，你想要再考虑考虑？
E: It's up to you... Do you wanna try something different?

C: 这下你满意了吧？
E: Happy?

C: 好啦，该学的东西都学会了…是时候开始我们的旅途了！
E: Okay, looks like we've learned all the essentials — let the fun begin!

C: 赞助人还得亲自下场玩游戏啊？
E: So, do sponsors have to play the game, too?

C: 就是就是，多亏了我！
E: Yeah, it was all me!

C: 哼哼！哼哼，哼！
E: Oink! Oink! Oink!

C: 哈？但我看你脸色还行呀？别装啦，我看你就是想赖床吧……
E: Huh? You don't look that tired to me... Stop playing around.

C: 来，就这座<color=#dbc291ff>「流云渡的决胜乐园」</color>，我来给{NICKNAME}和小三月好好说道说道——
E: Alrighty, let me explain how <color=#dbc291ff>Cloudford's Victory Zone</color> works.

C: 哦对，留影器就是你们常说的那<color=#dbc291ff>「相机」</color>！咱的解释二位可听清楚了？
E: Oh, right, you guys call it a <color=#dbc291ff>"camera"</color>! Anyway, did that all make sense?

C: 你懂什么，那家伙对托帕总监意义重大，我们必须把它搞到手！
E: You just don't get it, do you? That Aether Spirit of yours is of vital importance to Director Topaz!

C: 您一直让各个庆典场地的「冠军首席」给我们带话…究竟是为了什么？
E: You keep asking the champions of each venue to give us cryptic hints, don't you? What's that all about?

C: 次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神好像感知到了什么危险…能让我再问最后一个问题吗，黑塔女士？
E: Seems like Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord can sense some kind of danger... One last question, please?

C: 哼！哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 怎么是你？
E: It's... you?

C: 嘿嘿，正合我意。其他人都怀疑我会耍赖，不敢跟我对战。真伤心，老桑博明明那么诚实......
E: Hehe, you read my mind. Everyone thinks that I'll cheat and refuses to battle me. It's so sad, old Sampo is nothing but honest...

C: 让我看看……
E: Let me see...

C: 下班玩玩《以太战线》曾是我生活中唯一的乐趣，但自从参与跟它相关的工作后，每天为它忙得精疲力竭，我现在听见这游戏的名字就烦。
E: It used to be that playing Aetherium Wars after work was my one joy in life. But since I started working for them and exhausting myself here every day, just hearing the name makes my jaw clench.

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。希儿刚跑去维持秩序了，我正发愁比赛前该做些什么呢……
E: We meet again, {NICKNAME}. Seele's gone to help out with the crowd, meanwhile I'm stuck here still worrying about what I should do...

C: 真是精彩的战斗。
E: What a fight!

C: 赢…赢了？！
E: Did we win!?

C: 会夸就多夸两句！
E: Do I not get a compliment?

C: 嗯？无名客、云骑、十王司判官还有街头艺人…这个组合倒是新奇。
E: Oh? What do we have here? A Nameless, a Cloud Knight, a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, and a street performer? Quite the group.

C: 那就再来！
E: Then what are we waiting for!

C: 嗯…嗯？啊对！我是专专专家…能办到的！别说云吟，咱们狐族人表演戏法时也会玩弄些狐火之术，隐去身形的！
E: Huh? Umm... Ah, yes! I—I'm a very professional expert... and I'd be happy to share my expert knowledge! In fact, Cloudhymn magic isn't the only magic out there that can achieve such feats — we foxians can use our foxfire to make ourselves invisible!

C: 两位好好歇着，由咱们帮你一块儿找找吧。白露小姐一定是瞧见你们到处找她，不敢出来了。有她的老朋友{NICKNAME}在，说不定她就愿意见人了呢？
E: Be sure to get some rest! We'll take over from here. Lady Bailu must have seen you and gone off to hide... but with her old friend {NICKNAME} here, maybe she'll be willing to come back out.

C: 这下终于彻底解决了！呼…可以好好休息一下了。
E: It's over! Whew... Now I can finally get some rest.

C: 雪衣怎么不在？
E: Where's Xueyi?

C: 又到了小桂子的童年故事模式了。
E: Gather round children!

C: 老大，咱还是放了人质吧？
E: Yo boss, maybe we should let her off with a warning this time?

C: 藏月瓠已经设置好了，只要把白露小姐赶到这儿，我们就能抓住她……
E: The Lunaumbra Gourd is in place. If we can chase Lady Bailu to this spot, we should be able to catch her...

C: 看她念念有词的模样，应该是跟过去一样，演算着航路或未来……
E: Judging by her chanting, I think she's performing navigation calculations, or divining...

C: 嘿嘿，我也觉得自己镇日游手好闲地不成体统，一边打牌一边拿着太卜司的薪俸…实在有些，那句话怎么说来着……
E: Eh-he, my days here really have been unproductive — loafing around outside and playing Celestial Jade — all while taking a Divination Commission salary. It's... how to put it...

C: 「禽兽食禄」？
E: Living high on public expense?

C: 抱歉，小女子走神了，想必是案牍工作有损心识。今日之事已经完毕，还请各位好好休息吧！
E: I apologize, I was getting carried away. I think all the paperwork must have worn down my mental acuity. Today's business is finished. Please get some good rest!

C: 如果你敞开心扉接纳我，我可以带你去见证你的命运喔？
E: If you open your heart to me, I can take you to witness your destiny.

C: 今日之事已经完毕，请各位好好休息吧！
E: Today's work is finished! Please make sure to get some rest!

C: 不过我现在没心情听你说话，一边儿呆着去。
E: I'm not in the mood for your chatter — go away!

C: 不吉利的话还是不要讲了！
E: If it's not auspicious, you'd best not say it out loud!

C: 今天这当口，我算是想明白了，她想说的该不会是「剑可折，志不可夺」吧？
E: Today I just realized I misheard her. I think she actually said: "The edge may break, but the heart remains..." probably.

C: 这份理由，必须由他自己寻得，没有人能教得了他。眼下，正是他踏出这一步的时刻。
E: This truth must be discovered by himself — no one can teach it to him. Now is the time for him to take that step.

C: 心疼啦？我可没有折磨她太久，我告诉她「尾巴现在躲在流云渡，正准备随星槎逃出仙舟」。
E: Aw, does it hurt? You'll be pleased to know I didn't drag out the suffering. I told her that her Tail was hiding in Cloudford — preparing to flee the Xianzhou on a starskiff.

C: 「杀穿中阵，我便与你重续当年的战斗。」我一诺千金。
E: Defeat my army, and I'll give you the rematch you seek. My word holds true.

C: 你来了，刚才我已经帮藿藿重绘了尾巴的封印，接下来就该处理浮烟的事情了。
E: You're here. I've just finished re-inscribing the seal on Huohuo's tail. Next, it's time to address the matter of Cirrus.

C: 嗯，按照十王司戒律，岁阳尾巴还是应该由判官看管，所以…尾巴大爷就交给我了。
E: Mm... According to the Ten Lords, Tail must be supervised by a judge... I'll make sure to take good care of Mr. Tail.

C: 尾巴附身到藿藿的母亲身上，试图将她带回藿藿身边。
E: Tail possesses Huohuo's mother and tries to bring her back to Huohuo.

C: 岁阳难道不会躲起来吓人吗…在街头摆残局到底是什么目的啊？
E: I thought heliobi were supposed to hide and scare people from the shadows... What would one be doing causing chaos on the streets?

C: 彦卿要跟她下棋吗？
E: Are you going to play chess with her, Yanqing?

C: 彦卿联系好医馆的医者，妥善处理现场人员，随后离开。
E: Yanqing contacted the healers at the apothecary, took appropriate measures on-site, and left thereafter.

C: 呵…你们以为我不知道吗？你们以为我蠢到看不出来吗…你们为什么非要戳穿呢？
E: Ah... Do you think I didn't know? That I was too stupid to realize...? What'd you have to lay it all out like that for?

C: 我、我明白了。可是，我想我们还能做些什么……
E: I—I understand. But I think there's still more we can do...

C: 即使一切都做对了，结果依然可能令人不快…这就是十王司的工作。
E: Despite getting everything right, the results can still leave us feeling unhappy... That's the job of the Ten-Lords Commission. That's the job of a Judge.

C: 嘿嘿，一切不合常理的事情都是因为看不见的妖魔鬼怪作祟，这是原始人的思考方式。
E: Hehe, the idea that anything that does not align with common logic must be the work of some unseen ghost is a very primitive way of thinking.

C: 不过，如果一个人啥都没干，却突然性情大变，确实有可能是咱岁阳干的。
E: However, if someone's personality undergoes a dramatic change without them doing anything, that could indeed be the work of a heliobus.

C: 这个女孩的脑袋里面燃烧着一股不正常的贪欲，尝起来火辣辣的。
E: There is an abnormal greed burning in this girl's mind, it tastes spicy.

C: 都散了都散了啊！
E: Stand back, get out of here!

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 没事就好。对了，别再让我逮着你上班时间瞌睡了，快快去收拾书库吧。
E: As long as you're okay. Oh, right, don't let me catch you slacking off during work again! Go and tidy up the repository.

C: 可惜帝垣琼玉的规则太古老陈旧了，如果想让全宇宙不同文明的人为它疯狂，必须给它注入全新的活力。
E: Unfortunately, the rules of Celestial Jade are outdated. If we want different cultures across the entire universe to go crazy for it, we have to give it a new lease on life!

C: 金色的…垃圾？
E: Golden... trash?

C: 还能再赌一赌，朋友！
E: You can afford the risk, my friend!

C: 其实我也不确定消息是真是假，不好麻烦大家……
E: I'm not actually sure if these messages are reliable, so I don't want to trouble you all...

C: 这位风水大师不会是个骗子吧？
E: Are you sure this geomantic master isn't just a con man?
*Crash*

C: 断裂的云骑阵刀。很锋利，先拿走吧，也许能用得上。
E: It's a broken Cloud Knights' devastator glaive. It is extremely sharp, so you decide to take it with you in case it comes in handy.

C: 还是先跟它聊聊吧。
E: Let's chat with it first.

C: 你过得怎么样？
E: How have you been?

C: 藿藿大人，您需要的「物流机巧鸟」已经备妥。
E: Judge Huohuo, the courier cycrane you need is ready.

C: 咱们在这里瞎猜也起不到什么作用。既然求助者是列车组的人，这件事就交给{NICKNAME}去办吧。
E: No point in making wild guesses here. Since the requester is a member of the Crew, we'll leave this matter to you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 没事啦，姬子姐。
E: It's nothing, Himeko.

C: 为什么要当主播？
E: Why did you become a vlogger?

C: 哇哦！不知道这位提问的观众老爷对这个答案是否满意呢！
E: Wow! I hope you're satisfied with the answer to that question there, boss!

C: 当然是真的啦，这柄剑可是我娘给我的，我也是练了很久才勉强使得动。
E: Of course it's real~ My mama gave it to me, and I had to practice for an eternity before I could manage to lift it.

C: 上次在流云渡我们扑空了一次，这次在金人巷又踩了一次坑。
E: We missed out last time at Cloudford, and this time we were hustled again at the Aurum Alley.

C: 已签收。感谢使用鹤运物流服务。鹤运速递，啥都能寄。
E: There you go. Thank you for using Heron Express services. Heron Express — We Ship Whatever You Want.

C: （向它转述刚才的事）
E: (Recount the recent events to it)

C: （呃，糟糕，好像喷错了…还是赶紧改回来吧。）
E: (Er, drat... I think that's the wrong symbol... Better change it back, quick.)

C: 空间站的研究基本完成了，不过，还有最后一件事想麻烦你……
E: The space station's research has basically been completed. However, there's one last thing I'd like to task you with...

C: 你想让阮•梅探望它们？
E: Do you want Ruan Mei to pay them a visit?

C: 真的发生过吗！呃…我还以为全都是它编的呢！游辞讲的故事都有些不着四六，怎么听都不像是真的发生过。
E: It happened!? Um... I thought it was all made up! Youci's stories are all a bit zany and never sound as though they really happened.

C: 如若银河是一颗行星，你便是最主要的卫星。关于你的传奇，牵动着每一片海的潮汐。
E: If all the cosmos were a planet, you would be its largest moon. And your legend would impel the tides in every ocean there is.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 底层是白色？
E: Is the bottom layer white?

C: 漂亮！就喜欢看你这副模样！
E: Awesome! I love seeing you like this!

C: 对、对不起…我会注意的，会注意的。您要…大还是小？
E: I—I'm sorry... I won't make this mistake ever again. Do you want... big or small?

C: 「请听好我的问题。」
E: "Riddle me this."

C: 还不快去通知？打算让我等到什么时候？！
E: What are you waiting for? How much longer do you expect me to wait!?

C: 就是你？穿得像模像样，怎么就教不出几个靠谱的工具？是脑子不好使，还是水平太差，连这些破烂废都管不住？
E: You're the one? You might look respectable, but you can't even teach your tools how to do things right? Are you too stupid or too incompetent to manage this junk?

C: 呜呜呜，我也不认识，不过…不过她刚才骂那个人的样子真的好帅嘎嘎嘎嘎！
E: Hmm, I don't know her, but... but she looked so cool when she was scolding that bad guy! Mwahahaha!

C: 哇嘎嘎！我、我想要个最响亮的名字，听着就能把人吓到腿软的那种！
E: Mwahaha! I... I want the coolest name you can think of, the kind that scares people just by hearing it!

C: 咔咔？哪里适合我了！你这只…傻…傻狗！呼哈哈哈哈，傻狗！
E: Mwa? How does it suit me? You... you silly... silly dog! Hah hah, silly dog!

C: ——停！说过不准在这里打架。这么有精神，来帮我布置酒吧啊。
E: Hey, stop! No fighting here. If you're so energetic, come help me set up the lounge.

C: 从我演过的剧本里随便挑个好了。嗯，你就叫…就叫「铁皮人」吧！看着块头很大，但有点缺心眼，不错，我决定了，很适合你嘛。
E: I'll just pick one from the show I used to act in. Let's go with... Tin Man! It suits a big guy like you, a bit tactless and all. Alright, that settles it.

C: 呐呐。您才刚来这不久，不知道有没有注意到…这家酒吧外面，不是很太平？
E: By the way, you've only been here for a short while. I wonder if you've noticed that... things aren't very peaceful outside the lounge?

C: 哎，人家发现了，您就喜欢打听这些说出来会害羞的事， 弄得人家都有些过热了。
E: Well, it seems you enjoy discussing embarrassing topics. It's making me a bit flustered, to be honest.

C: 很棒的提议，对吧？你收钱，我享受服务，双方都有得赚。
E: A great deal, isn't it? You get paid, and I get served. A win-win situation for both of us.

C: 你是喝多了吧？
E: Are you drunk already?

C: 唉，就很郁闷，离别总是让人感伤，但请…不要后悔和我的相遇。
E: *sigh* Farewells always carry a tinge of bitterness, but please... do not lament our encounter.

C: 我不需要得到你的认可吧？
E: I don't think I need your approval, do I?

C: 算了。问你也得不到答案，人类都很会撒谎，说的话不能算数。
E: Forget it. You wouldn't give an answer even if I asked. Humans are all good at lying, and their words don't hold any water.

C: 直接说！
E: Just spill it!

C: 在我看来，丰富鲜艳的东西是美的，混乱单调的东西是丑陋的。虽然喝饮料是舒翁交代过必须要做的事，但我认为增添些趣味才会更有意思！
E: In my opinion, vibrant and bright things are beautiful, while chaotic and monotonous things are ugly. While Siobhan said I have to have a drink, I think it's more interesting to add a touch of fun!

C: 这样的要求…对您来说不算过分吧？要是觉得麻烦，我立刻改…我现在就改……
E: Is this... too much to ask for? If it's too much trouble, I'll change it... right away...

C: 哪有！您使我迷途知返，这是我理应做的事！
E: I'm flattered! You guided me to the right path, so it's only natural to repay your kindness!

C: …对了，还有件事要跟你说下。
E: ...Oh, there's something else I need to tell you.

C: 汪！但你是酒吧的调饮师，就算再生气，你也得给我调制饮料。对不对？
E: Woof! But you're the drinksmith for this lounge, so even if you're mad, you still gotta make me a drink. Isn't that right?

C: （开始调制）
E: (Start preparing the drink)

C: …这，只能说是年龄问题，代沟嘛……
E: ...Well, that's how they named games back in the day, you know...

E: Woof      Woof

E: WoofWoof

C: 汪      汪
E: Woof      Woof

E: Let's rehearse the beat first.

C: 好像没什么特别的。
E: There's nothing special about it.

C: …铁皮人呢？
E: ...Where is Tin Man?

C: 不留神讲了这么多，再给我调杯饮料吧。要<color=#dbc291ff>大杯，特别甜，味道柔和的类型，清爽点最好</color>。或许我需要冷静下。
E: Oh, just look at me chattering away. Make me another drink please. I want a drink that's <color=#dbc291ff>large, very sweet and tastes mellow. Best if it's refreshing</color>. Perhaps I need to calm down.

C: 最可气的是，外包工还不给买保险，万一有个受伤什么的，连赔偿都拿不到。
E: You know what's the most annoying part? We outsourced laborers aren't even covered by insurance. And if we get injured, we won't receive any compensation.

C: 没什么事的话我就先走了，您玩的开心——别忘了游玩条款，拍摄作品版权归克劳克影业所有哦！
E: If there's nothing else, I'll take my leave. Have fun! And don't forget the terms! The copyright of the animations belongs to Clock Studios!

C: 既然您应邀而来了，那么首先请让我为您简单介绍一下本次的测试内容吧：
E: Since you've come, let me briefly explain the test to you:

C: 总算走了，这新手教程可真不怎么样……
E: She's finally gone. This tutorial kind of sucks...

C: …我竟然赢了？
E: ...I actually won?

C: 在缇娜闪闪发光的企盼眼神中，你将翡翠小鸟摆上了最后的街机。
E: As Tinah looks on, her eyes sparkling with anticipation, you place the Jadebird on the final arcade machine.

C: 我就知道，不愧是您！
E: I knew it. There's no one better!

C: 卢卡选手…事情恐怕不会像你想的那么顺利。负面印象一旦形成，就没那么容易恢复了……
E: Luka... things might not turn out the way you hope. Once a negative perception sets in, it's difficult to reverse it...

C: 好吧，我明白了。我不会强求你接受任何帮助。
E: Alright, I understand. I won't insist on you accepting my help.

C: 没错，现在卢卡选手所佩戴的那一款，正是我们所开发的新产品！卢卡选手，举起你那胜利的手臂，向大家展示一下吧！
E: Yes, the model that Luka is wearing right now is our newly developed product! Luka, raise your victorious arm and show it off to everyone!

C: 免费体验？不得了了，公司难得要发善心了！有便宜不占是王八蛋！
E: A free trial? Don't miss out — The IPC is rarely this generous! It would be foolish to pass up such a bargain!

C: 这么大的广告牌，印着我的脸…哎呀，真是的，想想就刺激。几百年了，终于混出头了。
E: Such a large billboard with my face on it... Ah, just the thought is thrilling. After hundreds of years, I've finally made it.

C: 你是什么时候出现的…
E: Were you here all along...?

C: 哎，看着这一地杂物，就不由得想起了{NICKNAME}乘客刚成为无名客的时候……
E: Aw, looking at this mess reminds Pom-Pom of the time when {NICKNAME} first joined the Nameless...

C: 那倒不至于。只是有些危险，下次不要这么做了。
E: Hehe, let's not go overboard. Still, it was dangerous — let's not do anything like that again.

C: 成为无名客
E: Yes, I do.

C: 欢迎，各位亲爱的无名客。嗯？看诸位满面春风，难道是发生了什么好事？莫非，「派对时刻」终于要到来了？
E: Greetings, my Nameless friends. My, look at those sunny smiles! Has something good happened? Don't tell me — is it finally Party Time?

C: 根本就没得选嘛！
E: Why is there only one option!?

C: 希望你们不要有养这种宠物的歪心思。
E: I hope you aren't actually thinking about keeping those things as pets...

C: 但你隐约感到，它今后会成为你最熟悉的天花板。
E: But you have a vague feeling that it will become the ceiling you know best in the future.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你准备好参与值日了吗？
E: Passenger {NICKNAME}, are you ready to start your shift?

C: 你房间哪里有浴缸？
E: Is there even a bathtub in your room?

C: 确实，也是时候让{NICKNAME}享受一下个人时间了。
E: All I know is, {NICKNAME} deserves to take some time off for {M#himself}{F#herself}.

C: 哦？关于帕姆衣帽间的位置，{NICKNAME}乘客有更好的想法吗？
E: Oh? Do you have a better idea for Pom-Pom's Coatroom, Passenger {NICKNAME}?

C: 门开了！不愧是你，光凭我自己可解不开这个。
E: Ooh, it's open! I knew I had to bring you along. I wouldn't have been able to open it on my own.

C: 行，我来带它长大！
E: Alright, I'll raise this little one!

C: 呜，呜嗡？呜嗡嗡！（哇！我不会继承不及格基因吧？哦对，我压根不是你亲生的。没事啦，哈哈——）
E: Grumph? Grumphhhh! (Whoa! Don't tell me I inherited the failing-grade genes? Oh wait, I'm not even your biological child. Phew, that's a relief. Haha —)

C: 呵，我就当作这是你的夸奖了。
E: Heh, I'll take that as a compliment.

C: 子不教，家长之过。眼下它或许是过度劳累，腰腿酸痛，精神不振，好像身体被掏空……
E: Parents must answer for their children's mistakes. Though right now the poor thing looks worn out. Sore limbs, zero energy... It looks completely exhausted...

C: 呜，呜嗡……（我的…欧洛尼斯之力…要控制不住了……）
E: Grumph, grumph... (My... power of Oronyx... is getting out of control...)

C: 而且想成大器不得失败个几百几千次的…支棱起来，我还等着你给我养老呢。
E: Besides, if you want to become someone strong, you'll have to fail hundreds or even thousands of times... Chin up. I'm still counting on you to look after me when I'm old.

C: 吃饭去吧？
E: Wanna grab some food?

C: 没错，它可是你家孩子，一定能轻松地解决问题，在众人面前大放异彩。
E: That's right, it's your kid after all. They'll breeze through this problem and shine in front of everyone.

C: 这只幼兽究竟能做到什么程度呢？连我也久违地期待起来了……
E: Just how far can this young dromas go? Strangely enough, even I'm getting so excited about this...

C: 这是我曾曾曾祖父在那儿当祭司时，命运三泰坦赐予他的，在我家放了几千年，这能有假吗？
E: This was bestowed upon my great-great-great-grandfather while he served as a priest there by the Three Titans of Fate, and it's been in my family for thousands of years. How could it be fake?

C: 材料没带着吗…我这会儿不太方便走开，要麻烦你去取过来了，真不好意思。
E: You don't have the materials with you? I'm tied up at the moment, so you'll need to go get them. Sorry for the inconvenience.

C: 嗯。本次赛事还会持续很长时间，挑方便的时候来玩就好咪。
E: Alrighty. The event will be running for quite a while, so just drop by whenever it's convenient for you!

C: 你想得到怎样的奖赏呢？
E: What kind of reward would you like?

C: 人们在大臣的棺椁前哭泣，称王子为「可耻的刺客」、「暴君的余孤」、「断送王国未来的灾星」。
E: People wept before the Minister's coffin, calling the prince "the shameful assassin," "orphan of the tyrant," and "the ill-starred harbinger who would doom the kingdom's future."

C: 作为目标而言，似乎有些空泛了，需要更明确的判断标准。
E: A little vague for a goal. We need something that can be evaluated more concretely.

C: 唔。
E: Hmm.

C: 缇宝再加上我，总共是两票。

C: 迷迷！甜之天王在此，我的美食理念是：甜食是餐馆与顾客的美妙约会迷！
E: Memem! I'm the Sweet Overlord! My culinary philosophy is that dessert is a magical date between the restaurant and the customer!

C: 迷…被激辣的食物杀死，正是食客最大的幸福迷……
E: Mem... To be slain by the taste of chili peppers is the ultimate bliss for any true foodie, mem...

E: Sure thing. What's the challenge this time? But waiting another six days sounds way too long.

C: 还有呢，经过这轮意料外的巨量消耗，我们的库存也快见底了。

E: (Cuts in with enthusiasm)

E: In your trance-like state, you detect rustling noises, like plants stretching toward the sky, or perhaps the earth whispering its secrets.

E: No worries. I haven't forgotten. Well then, duel's over. Let's clean up those empty plates.

E: It's just changing your Blessing parameters. It's easy.

C: 惺惺相惜的说法并不尽然。\n记忆当中，\n母亲只对他说过<color=#9e5738>七句言语</color>。
E: It was not mutual appreciation. Nay.\nFor in his memories,\n<color=#9e5738>Seven sentences</color> were all his mother to him ever spake.

C: 如哀地里亚的诗歌所言，
E: As stated in Aidonia's poems,

C: 「还是讲些快乐的故事吧！」 孩童抹去因记忆而生的眼泪， 「*我们*最擅长翁法罗斯的童谣啦！」
E: "Perhaps we should tell you some happy tales instead!" The child wipes away her tears of reminiscence, "Our greatest talent is performing Amphoreus' nursery rhymes"

C: 神明眷顾沃土……\n巨人举杯对酌……
E: In this lush land by gods chosen...\nGiants raise their glasses in a toast...

C: 「收手吧，只愿如今生活不变！」 「停下吧，我等战果已经斐然！」 「休憩吧，生民只愿安身乐业！」
E: "Stop! We only wish to live life as it is, no more." "Cease! Our achievements already stand tall!" "Rest up! We only wish to live in peace and prosperity!"

C: 此间的故事，\n不知从何处而来。\n随着浪花，散落于浅滩大地。
E: We know not where\nThese stories arise.\nThey are scattered across the shallows with the waves.

C: 「这可是一个好长、好长的故事哦……」
E: "This is going to be a very, very long story..."

C: 「Philia093…原属『爱』的电信号。」\n「如今万籁俱寂，」\n「何不借着星空审视自我？」
E: "PhiLia093... the electrical signal originally belonging to 'love.'"\n"Now that silence has fallen,"\n"Why not look at yourself beneath the starlit sky?"

C: 笼罩翁法罗斯的地震，\n持续了三个昼夜。
E: The earthquake that engulfs Amphoreus\nLasts for three days and nights.

C:
而那晦暗的道理，
于日后更艰难的博弈时分，
灵光乍现——
一盘未完之局，
未尝不是对手终生的障壁。
E:
The concealed truths
Suddenly dawned on her
During a more difficult contest in the future...
An unfinished game
Might be the opponent's lifelong barrier.

C: 凯撒笑道， 「她么，怕是不喜欢猫的味道， 独自潜入浴池了吧。」
E: The Imperator replied with a chuckle, "Her? She probably disliked the scent of cats And submerged herself in the baths."

C:
群星的怒火扑面而来，
在银河帝国的边境翻涌。
各大派系将插进她的疆域，
渴望夺回旧日的尊荣。
E:
The fury of the stars surges forth,
Boiling at the edge of the galactic empire.
Mighty factions will surge into her realm,
Yearning to seize back the splendor of old.

C: 却无人知晓，\n那原是来自深海的孤独曲调。
E: Yet none knew,\nThat was once a lonely melody from the deep sea.

C: 可只有剑士发觉，\n少女脸上的笑靥，\n随着逐火的进展逐渐凋谢。
E: But only the swordmaster noticed\nThat the smile on the girl's face\nGradually faded as the Flame-Chase progressed.

C: 「就等你了，迟到的乐手。」
E: "At last you have arrived, our belated musician."

C:
在那画中，
名为塞涅俄丝的「少女」双瞳含怒，
淌着金血远离故土，
在荒原中磨亮箭镞。
E:
Within the frame of that image,
The one called Seliose bore fury in her gaze,
Her golden blood trailing as she turned from home,
Sharpening arrowheads beneath the wide and barren sky.

C: 如那背负世界的神明，\n男人从不哭泣。
E: Like that god who shouldered the world,\nThe man never cried or frowned.

C: 终于，在那道路尽头，\n于无人之地，\n男人双臂颤抖。
E: Finally, at the terminus of that road,\nIn a desolate, empty place,\nThe man's arms tremble.

C: 那里只有一团烈火，\n炤燎万物，永恒不熄。
E: But a ball of all-devouring fire,\nSetting the universe in conflagration, searing till the end of time.

C: 神悟树庭，智者的乐园，\n却有人背负愚钝的名。
E: Grove of Epiphany, the paradise of the wise,\nYet harbors one shouldering the name of a fool.

C: 为何不相信黄金世将要延续的许诺，\n像孩子相信流传已久的童谣？
E: Why not trust in the promise of an Era Chrysea unending,\nLike how children believe in fairytales passed down unceasing?

C: 「若你也像我这般，自泰坦的胸膛诞生，你便会明白，泰坦比人类更加单纯，对于自己的造物，没有偏爱、亦无厌恶。它们早已将命运的选择权交付于我们自己。」
E: "If you were like me, born from the bosom of the Titans, you would understand that Titans are more pure-hearted than humans. They hold neither preference nor hatred for their creations. They have long since handed over the power to choose our destiny to us."

C: 此时一人一马已然旅行至翁法罗斯的边缘，在这里无数城邦因黑潮而覆灭。

C: 「这封信里面…只有一张留影石机的合照。上面好像缠着金线，是阿格莱雅大人的吧……」
E: "In this letter... there's just a group photo taken with a photostone. It's wrapped in golden thread. It must be Lady Aglaea's..."

C: 第<unbreak>132905</unbreak>次循环，灵长类Dystop<unbreak>666</unbreak>萌发出利他行为，纯粹利他社会诞生。成员的自我认知由他人评价决定，随着人口增长，社会中出现有规律的自毁行为，并迅速崩溃。\n第<unbreak>176100</unbreak>次循环，Utop<unbreak>13</unbreak>出于「爱」杀害同类，「杀害」被定义为利他行为，系统进入高度无序状态，方程的感染强度急剧上升，后续<unbreak>99</unbreak>次循环结果相同。
E: In the <unbreak>132,905</unbreak>th cycle, primate Dystop<unbreak>666</unbreak> developed altruism. A society based purely on altruism emerged. Members' self-awareness was defined by others' evaluations. As the population grew, patterned self-destructive behaviors appeared, and society quickly collapsed.\nIn the <unbreak>176,100</unbreak>th cycle, Utop<unbreak>13</unbreak> killed a fellow being out of "love." "Killing" was redefined as an altruistic act. The system entered a highly chaotic state. The equation's contamination levels rapidly spiked. The next <unbreak>99</unbreak> cycles ended identically.

C:
检测到外部指令，指令来源：HertA，ScreW。内容：覆写第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环的「再创世」逻辑。
「再创世」逻辑已依据外部指令覆写。该指令可能干扰系统运算进程，已多次警告ID：LykoS。

【管理员无应答。】
E:
External command detected. Source: HertA, ScreW. Content: Overwrite the logic of Era Nova for the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive loop.
The logic of Era Nova has been overwritten according to external command. This command may interfere with the system's calculation progress. ID: LykoS has been warned multiple times.

"Administrator not responding."

C:
未知单位「长夜月」检索异常，命途能量高危波动中。
根据终极协议新增条款，若未知单位持续活动，系统将判断「再创世」进程异常，将启动权杖全域清理程序。已警告ID：LykoS。

【管理员无应答。】
E:
Unknown entity "Evernight" scan anomaly detected, Path Energy showing dangerous fluctuations.
According to the new clause in Ultimate Protocol, if this unknown entity remains active, the system will determine Era Nova's progress as anomalous and initiate the Scepter's full-range purge program. Warning issued to ID: LykoS.

"Administrator not responding."

E: I fell in love at first sight

C: 月光下，一位老人睡着了。\n他为自己热爱的土地、为故友、为「开拓」献出了一生。现在，他抵达「开拓」的终点，坠入此生最漫长的梦，徒留空洞的躯壳在人间，一如那枚过去承载着某人珍视之物的梦泡。\n如今，你们正共享同一片星空。两道「开拓」之旅于是交织——对此，你会做如何感想？
E: Beneath the moonlight, an old man falls asleep.\nHe has given his entire life to the land he loved, his old friends, and Trailblaze. Now, he has reached the end of Trailblaze and falls into the longest dream of his life, leaving only his empty shell in the mortal plane like the dream bubble once infused with someone's treasures.\nNow, you share the same starry sky, and two trailblazing expeditions intersect... How do you feel about this?

C: 「{NICKNAME}，我看你打倒了不少拦路的家伙，干得不错嘛！但我可不能让你把『地火』的风头全抢光，接下来就一起走吧！」
E: "{NICKNAME}, not bad for defeating so many of them on your own! I can't let you have all the glory though, so let's walk together now."

C: 「虽然我学习过古代遗物的知识，但这里还是有许多我无法理解的科技…看来作为『大守护者』，我要学习的事情还有很多——{NICKNAME}，麻烦你继续陪我走下去吧。」
E: "Even though I did learn about ancient relics, there are still many technologies here that I can't understand... Looks like there are still plenty of things to learn as the supreme guardian... {NICKNAME}, keep me company, will you?"

C: 「这、这是『古代地髓能热切割锯刃』！还有『古代磁流聚能护盾』！以前只在资料里见过，没想到这里有这么多真品…咳，{NICKNAME}，把文物拿好，千万别弄丢了！」
E: "Th—This is an ancient geomarrow-powered heat sawblade! And this is an ancient magnetic flux convergence shield! I've only seen it in documents before. I never expected to find so many genuine artifacts here... Ahem, {NICKNAME}, take good care of these relics. Make sure not to lose them!"

C: ——镇守遗迹的强敌藏匿着门卡，想要将其击败，就先破坏强化它们的掩体吧。

C: 角色有属于自己的<color=#f29e38ff>【站位】</color>，被分为<color=#f29e38ff>【前台】、【后台】</color>。\n部分角色属于<color=#f29e38ff>【前后台】</color>，既可以放在前台，也可以放在后台。
E: Characters have their own <color=#f29e38ff>"positioning"</color>, classified as either <color=#f29e38ff>"On-Field" and "Off-Field"</color>.\nSome characters are <color=#f29e38ff>"On/Off-Field"</color>, meaning they can be placed either on-field or off-field.

C: 在战斗、遭遇、首领节点获得胜利时，小队生命值维持不变。\n若未获得胜利，则会失去一定小队生命值。\n小队生命值降低至0时，对局失败。
E: When you achieve victory at Battle, Encounter, or Boss Nodes, the squad HP remains unchanged.\nIf you do not achieve victory, you will lose a certain amount of squad HP.\nThe match is lost if the squad HP drops to 0.

C: 「货币战争」中，可在玩法主界面或对局内备战阶段界面处查看攻略大全。\n可查看其他玩家推荐的阵容，作为对局的阵容参考。
E: In Currency Wars, you can view the complete Strategy Compendium on the main gameplay interface or within the preparation phase interface during a match.\nYou can view lineups recommended by other players to use as a reference for your match lineup.

E: When Sparkle uses a Skill on a teammate, the teammate's next <color=#f29e38ff>three Skills will not consume Skill Points</color>.

E: After interacting with the <color=#f29e38ff>Reviver</color>, you can use <color=#f29e38ff>Cosmic Fragments</color> to reset RAM, revive downed characters, and restore a certain amount of HP to them.

C: 每次移动后，将会减少1点倒计时；当倒计时减少为负数时，所有敌方目标会进入<color=#f29e38ff>「位面紊乱！」</color>状态，获得属性强化；<color=#f29e38ff>「位面紊乱！」</color>状态下，每次移动后会增加扰动等级；扰动等级越高，敌人的强化效果越强。
E: The countdown is reduced by 1 with every movement. When the counter becomes negative, all enemy targets will enter <color=#f29e38ff>Planar Disarray</color> mode and receive stat enhancements. While in <color=#f29e38ff>Planar Disarray</color> mode, every movement on the map will increase the Disruption Level. The higher the Disruption Level, the stronger enemy buffs become.

C: 在<color=#f29e38ff>「差分宇宙」</color>、<color=#f29e38ff>「模拟宇宙·寰宇蝗灾」</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>「模拟宇宙·黄金与机械」</color>中完成特定挑战后，可获得<color=#f29e38ff>藏品</color>。

C: 有极少数的人在观看一些视觉影像时可能会突然癫痫发作，这些影像包括电子游戏中出现的闪光或图形。在进行电子游戏时，这些人可能会出现癫痫症状。甚至连不具有癫痫史的人，也可能在进行电子游戏时，出现类似癫痫症状。如果您或您的家人有癫痫史，请在进行游戏之前先和医生咨询。如果您在游玩电子游戏时出现以下症状，包括眼睛疼痛、视觉异常、偏头痛、痉挛或意识障碍（诸如昏迷）等，请立即中止游戏，并且请您于再次进行本游戏之前咨询您的医生。
E: A very small percentage of individuals may experience epileptic seizures when exposed to certain visual images, including certain light patterns or flashing lights in video games. Playing video games may induce an epileptic seizure in these individuals. Certain conditions may induce previously undetected epileptic symptoms even in persons who have no prior history of seizures or epilepsy. If you, or anyone in your family, have any history of prior seizures or epilepsy, consult your doctor before playing. If you experience any of the following symptoms while playing a video game: Eye soreness, altered vision, migraines, muscle twitching, convulsions, blackouts, loss of awareness or disorientation, IMMEDIATELY stop playing and consult your doctor before resuming play.

C: 由顿派菲昌英的意志化身的实体，他的意志如盾牌一般坚硬。
E: An entity incarnated from the will of Gigantus Shieldus, whose will is as unyielding as a shield.

C: 「星际和平公司」的基层员工，主要负责处理上不得台面的「业务疏漏」。工资不高，只能在公司旗下的企业舰上合租房间。
E: An Interastral Peace Corporation grunt worker whose job mainly deals with shady "business oversights." With a meager salary, the only lodging they can afford is a shared room on one of the IPC's enterprise ships.

C: 随玄鹿足迹而生的建木枝梢。出现于此的是基于你的记忆模拟出的幻影。
E: A branch of Ambrosial Arbor created from the Ebon Deer's footprint. This entity is a phantom borne from your memories.

C: 美梦剧团中扮饰囚徒的艺者。本应于「谐乐大典」之中献演，如今却被「秩序」所缚，上演着关于「过去」的剧目。往昔是不朽的锁链，安宁的火苗在笼中点亮，以烛光招引司狱的权臣。
E: An artist playing the role of the prisoner in the Sweet Dreams Troupe. It should be performing in the Charmony Festival, but it is now bound by Order and keeps performing scenes of the "Past." The past is an immortal chain, its tranquil flame igniting within a cage, beckoning the jailer's authority with mere candlelight.

C: 朱明三人组的终极形态。
E: The ultimate form of the Zhuming trio.

C: 度过了漫长岁月的奥帝，其形象在匹诺康尼历史中的投射。嫉妒、讥讽、憎恶，所有不堪的话语和犀利的评价汇聚到这位商人身上，使其成为了兼具理智与疯狂的<unbreak>Berserker</unbreak>。
E: How Oti, who had lived through countless years, is projected in Penacony's history. Envy, mockery, hostility... all sorts of unbearable words and searing criticism gathered upon this merchant, turning him into a Berserker who possesses both rationality and insanity.

C: 要陪我去拍照吗？还是去喝仙人快乐茶？
E: Wanna go take some pictures? Or maybe we can go drink some Immortal's Delight?

C: 云璃师父的教学风格非常自由，她最常和我说的话是：「这是一种感觉！」…也许这就是「体验式教学」吧？
E: Master Yunli has a very freestyle approach to teaching. The thing she always says to me is: "You just feel it!" Maybe that's what they call experiential guidance?

C: 我的过去，或许不在从前，而是在我的未来里。所以我一定会一站站走下去，哪怕有一天…没有列车。
E: Maybe my past isn't behind me, but in front of me. That's why I'm gonna keep going forward, one stop at a time... train or no train.

C: 我就说吧，瓦尔特，我们登场的机会多着呢。
E: See, Welt, I told you we'd have lots of chances to shine.

C: 退下吧。
E: Stand down.

C: 很快就好。
E: This won't take long.

C: 我都有了。
E: Do I have this already?

C: 别想了，免得晚上睡不着。
E: Best not to ponder, you'll be scratching your chin all day.

C: 可以可以可以。
E: Awesome. Cool. Can we go now?

C: 强敌么…我会暗中支援的。
E: A formidable opponent? Hmph... I'll support you from behind the scenes.

C: 有时我觉得，我并不代表我自己，而是一个人形的符号——「大守护者」继承人这个称号下，也可以是别的什么人。我不知道这种感觉从何而来，但我不希望变成这样。
E: Sometimes I feel like I don't represent myself... that I'm a symbol in human form, and anyone could have been given the title of "heir to the supreme guardian." I don't know where the feeling comes from, but I hope it doesn't become the truth.

C: 那丫头不怎么爱和人说话，但我知道…她不排斥我们。
E: That girl doesn't talk much, but... I know she doesn't see us as her enemy.

C: 头儿说得没错，对付不讲道理的家伙，刀尖子就是道理。
E: The chief's right — sometimes a sharp blade is the only way to get people to come to their senses.

C: 尖叫，还不够热烈！
E: Turn up the volume!

C: 正义已至。
E: You will know justice.

C: 得给你展示一下「巫婆」的手段了呢，虎克。
E: Room for an "old witch," Hook?

C: 我可是…医生啊……
E: But I'm a... doctor...

C: 我只需要这个就可以了。
E: This is enough for me — take the rest.

C: 好有意思……
E: Wowwww... *clears throat*

C: 其实…史瓦罗先生的手，可以变成帮克拉拉吹头发的机器，还可以把大石块切成小桌子和小椅子呢……
E: Did you know Mr. Svarog's hands can turn into machines that dry my hair? Also, they can cut big stones and turn them into little tables and chairs...

C: 是希儿姐姐！「地火」能来…真是帮大忙了！
E: Miss Seele! With Wildfire here... nothing can stop us!

C: 背后就交给你了！
E: Keep patching me up!

C: 休息一会儿…把手机振动关掉吧！
E: Time for a break. Silent mode activated!

C: 司鼎大人太讨厌了！有那么好几次，聊着聊着天，她突然一脸严肃地说：「太卜来了。」吓得我一个箭步就躲到她身后，结果才发现根本就没人！她总这样逗我，真是的……
E: The Cauldron Master is the worst! A few times when we were chatting, she suddenly said, "The master diviner is coming." I ran behind her to hide, only to find out that no one was actually coming! She's always teasing me like that, so infuriating...

C: 为了支援「存护」之主，天瑛矿石的收购价近来翻了一番。只是对那些矿藏富裕的世界来说，究竟是时来运转还是无妄之灾，到头来还得凭「公司」的主张……
E: The purchase price of Sky-Amber doubled to support the Lord of Preservation. However, it is up to the Corporation's fancy whether this becomes good or bad fortune for worlds rich in ores...

C: 要说四两拨千斤的手段，将军大人最是得其精髓，小女子自愧不如。
E: The general is a true master of maximizing returns for minimal effort. I cannot match him on that front.

C: 来了呀，若是有什么旅行异闻，也同我讲讲吧。
E: Ah, you're here. If you have any interesting stories from your travels, do share them with me.

C: 「月光一线，九百生灭」——西衍先生关于镜流的话本里，我最喜欢这句。这样的剑士，在云骑军的史册中怎么却没记载呢……
E: "One sliver of moonlight, nine hundred lives" — in Mr. Xiyan's stories about Jingliu, I love this sentence the most. How come the Cloud Knights' records didn't say anything about such a swordmaster...?

C: 有趣有趣。
E: Cooool.

C: 裳裳是我最好的朋友。在罗浮，除了那些街上的兄弟，就属她和我认识得最久。我之前还想拉着她结拜来着，可惜她不乐意。
E: Shangshang is my best friend. Aside from my street-performing brothers, she's the person I've known the longest on the Luofu. I wanted to become sworn sisters with her, but she didn't seem interested.

C: 恭喜发财！
E: Fame and fortune!

C: 剑出无回！
E: Swordward!

C: 一切仍如昨日所见……
E: All remains as it did yesterday...

C: 《不适合人偶的职业》，这本小说，汝可有读过？不知是何人以吾为原型写下的…怪哉，作者莫非是十王司同僚？
E: "An Unsuitable Job for A Puppet" — have you read that novel? The story is based on my life. I wonder who wrote it. Could it be one of my colleagues?

C: 没人知道十王司选拔人才的方法，很多人不记得自己是怎么进来的，甚至不记得自己曾经做过什么。但既然世人也不必再见到他们，这对彼此来说未尝不是件好事。
E: No one knows how the Ten-Lords Commission selects its talent, and many of its members don't remember how they got in or even what their previous occupation was. But since they don't need to show their faces to the outside world, it's not a bad state of affairs.

C: 来都来了，不如吃过再走。
E: Since you're already here, why not have a meal before you leave?

C: 文火慢熬，抑或武火爆炒？
E: A slow simmer over low heat, or a quick stir-fry over high heat?

C: 罗浮龙尊？在金人巷有幸跟她拼了一桌，吃了不少葱醋鸡、团油饭，我们还交换了联系方式，约定以后再来金人巷大吃一顿。
E: The Luofu's high elder? I once got to share a table with her in Aurum Alley. We ate tons of scallion chicken and fried rice balls. We even exchanged numbers and agreed to come back to Aurum Alley for a big dinner sometime.

C: 有点本事。
E: Not bad.

C: 下绝地纪，灭——
E: To earth, it descends with might, eradicate!

C: 战场已清扫完毕。
E: The battlefield has been cleared.

C: 往前走，我来应付。
E: Keep going. I'll handle it.

C: 如果哪天你看到一只发疯的茶壶，或者一台到处爬行的电话亭——那多半是遇上了「惊梦剧团」的捣乱鬼。别担心，死是死不了，最多脱层皮。
E: If you ever spot a crazed teapot, or a phone booth scuttling around, chances are you've bumped into one of the troublemakers from the "Dreamjolt Troupe." No cause for alarm, though — you won't die, just maybe lose a layer of skin.

C: 来一口吧。
E: How's this taste?

C: 无论何时盛放，都会有被风吹落的…那一天。
E: Will be swept away... by the wind of time.

C: 翡翠女士亲自下场？怎么啦，这是对我不放心？
E: Lady Jade herself has come? What's wrong? You don't trust me?

C: 他抛却了原本的肉身，为了让那些愤怒与悲伤的记忆更加刻骨铭心。
E: He cast aside his physical form in order to etch the memories of rage and sadness deeper into his being.

C: 凡人只能看见物质，却不明白精神与灵性才是宇宙的本质。受「浮黎」的恩赐，我们摆脱易坏的实体，得以亲近真正的存在。
E: Mortals are bound to the perception of the tangible, failing to comprehend that it is the spirit and the spiritual that form the true essence of the cosmos. Through the grace of "Fuli," we may shed our perishable forms and attain closeness to the true essence of being.

C: 感谢命运的指引。
E: Destiny's hand has truly blessed me.

C: 「我作孩子时，话语像孩子，心思像孩子，意念像孩子。既成了人，就把孩子的事丢弃了。」——乱破小姐却始终用这样纯质的视角审视世界，未曾遭到污浊。
E: "When I was a child, my speech, mindset, and soul reflected immaturity and innocence. When I became an adult, I put away those childish aspects." — Miss Rappa always views the world through such a pure lens, untouched and uncorrupted.

C: 受到攻击。
E: Attack detected.

C: 火萤这种生物很神奇吧？它们或许会扑向火烛，或许会突然老化。但在那之前的每一个夜晚，它们的光芒会比星星更耀眼。
E: Fyreflies are such magical creatures, aren't they? They may throw themselves at a flame or suddenly grow old, but every night before that, they will shine brighter than the stars.

C: 先解决这些小喽啰，咱们再好好聊聊怎么收拾你吧？
E: Let's deal with these thugs first, and then we'll talk about how to deal with you, shall we?

C: 三月小姐，今日的穿搭依旧令人耳目一新。
E: Your outfit today remains as refreshing as ever, Miss March.

C: 还是改衣师的时候，我的工作就是打破形成已久的版式。如今，身为黄金裔，我同样有责任革除积弊，创造崭新的「美」。
E: When I was still a dressmaster, my job was already to break the ancient molds of fashion. Now, as a Chrysos Heir, I also have the responsibility to remove old wrongs and create brand-new "beauty."

C: 走开走开，不许欺负大家！
E: Move aside, no bullying allowed!

C: 一闪一闪亮晶晶~
E: Twinkle, twinkle, little star~

C: 嗯。
E: Mhm.

C: 上吧，赐予它战死的荣耀。
E: Alright, I'll give you the honor of dying in battle.

C: 日落时，我背负巨石，攀至山顶，当黎明将至，巨石滚落，我又一次将它背起，重新踏上通往山巅的征程…痛苦而绝望的旅途，也是我唯一感到幸福的时刻！数亿枚火种…它们焚烧着我的灵魂，却也给我温暖。
E: I carried a huge rock up to the top of a mountain at dusk, but whenever the sun was about to come up, the rock would fall, and I'd carry it on my back to climb the mountain again... A road of agony and despair, yet it is the only moment I feel happiness! Millions of Coreflames are searing my soul to embers, yet they also cradle me in warmth.

C: 点燃黎明！
E: Light up the dawn!

C: 夜晚天凉，记得补充营养，不要熬夜。睡前泡个温水澡，喝些安神的羊奶花茶，会做好梦哟~
E: The nights are cold, so remember to eat healthy and don't stay up too late. Take a warm bath and drink some soothing goat-milk floral tea before bed, and you're guaranteed to have good dreams~

C: 凯撒，这一局会在第几手结束？
E: Which move will this particular chess game end on, Imperator?

C: 「三月七」，多么美妙、可爱、活泼、有趣的名字，还带着一丝生日的甜蜜。所以，她应当也会喜欢「长夜月」这个称号……
E: "March 7th." What a wonderful, adorable, lively, and interesting name, with a hint of birthday sweetness. Then, she should also like the title "Evernight"...

C: 行护卫之责，还需锤炼自身。
E: To fulfill the duty of a Guard, one must continue to temper oneself.

C: 昔涟小姐，我会履行好大地的职责。
E: I shall carry out the Earth's duty, Miss Cyrene.

C: 保持好身材的秘诀，请教教我！
E: Please teach me how you keep yourself so fit!

C: 到我了。
E: It's my turn.

C: 等着吧。
E: Just you wait.

C: 活动
E: Events

C: 秘技
E: Technique

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
若开拓者在以往版本完成过对应角色的试用关，可以直接领取奖励。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.
If Trailblazers have already completed the trials of corresponding characters in past versions, they can directly claim the rewards.

C: 对敌方单体及其相邻目标造成冰属性伤害，有概率使目标<color=#f29e38ff>陷入【冰蚀】状态</color>，并使受到攻击的敌方目标的持续伤害类负面状态<color=#f29e38ff>额外产生1次伤害</color>。
E: Deals Ice DMG to one enemy and adjacent targets, has a chance to inflict the <color=#f29e38ff>"Glacial Erosion" state</color>, and causes DoT debuffs applied on attacked enemy targets to <color=#f29e38ff>additionally deal 1 instance of DMG</color>.

C: 绝命死斗
E: Desperate Deathmatch

E: "Juvenile Sting's" "Rapid Evolution" state has been dispelled

E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge with the enemy boss triggering revive fewer than <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

C: 超级英雄片《黑焰骑士崛起》首映现场的采访记录稿。
E: Interview transcript from the premiere of the superhero movie The Darkflame Knight Rises.

C: 一株破土而生的新蕊，
E: A new shoot sprouted from the earth.

C: 所以，人们为何选择沉睡？我想，就像你说的一样……
E: So, why do people choose to sleep? I think it's as you said...

C: 抗压包
E: Tough Cookie

C: 对战开始时：对随机1名对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of combat: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to 1 random opponent.

C: 使随机3只奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: Increases <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> for 3 random chimeras.

C: 自身受到伤害时：召唤<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>级压力怪，单场对战最多触发<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>次
E: When this unit takes DMG: Summons <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Level <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Pressure Monster(s), which can be triggered up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s) per battle.

C: 购买携带有亲卫队徽章的奇美拉时：你最强的车厘比斯使自身和随机<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个拥有亲卫队徽章的奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When purchasing a chimera with Royal Guard Badge: Causes the strongest Krenabis in the team and <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random chimera(s) with Royal Guard Badge <color=#dc6f33>to have their <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> increased by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

C: 胶糖卷不能陷入【忘却】状态。回合开始时：队伍中最强的胶糖卷使随机<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>名对手陷入【忘却】状态。同伴攻击/追加攻击时：若攻击目标处于【忘却】状态，则立即对其造成<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点伤害

When companions use attack/Follow-Up ATK: If the attacked targets are affected by "Oblivion," immediately deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DMG to them.

C: 购买专属奇美拉时：你最强的车厘比斯使自身和随机<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个专属奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When purchasing exclusive chimeras: Grants the strongest Krenabis in the team and <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random exclusive chimera(s) <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color>

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的蝶糕糕为攻击最高的我方奇美拉施加【祝福】。拥有【祝福】的奇美拉被击倒时会以<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>重新对战，最多生效2次
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Butterfly Cake in the team grants "Blessing" to the ally chimera with the highest attack. When a chimera with "Blessing" is defeated, it will rejoin the battle with <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>. This effect can trigger up to 2 times.

C: 队伍中最强的燕麦粥被击倒时：使所有同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>

E: At the start of turn: Causes this unit's <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

E: For every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP this unit has at the start of combat, upon being knocked down: Summons <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Lv. <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Old Honest, with a minimum summon of 1

C: 购买携带有亲卫队徽章的奇美拉时：你最强的车厘比斯使自身和随机<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个拥有亲卫队徽章的奇美拉<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>

C: 胶糖卷不能陷入【忘却】状态。对战开始时：队伍中最强的胶糖卷使所有对手陷入【忘却】状态。同伴攻击/追加攻击时：若攻击目标处于【忘却】状态，则立即对其造成1次等同于<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的伤害
E: Gummy Roll cannot enter the "Oblivion" state. At the start of battle: The strongest Gummy Roll in the team inflicts the "Oblivion" state on all opponents. When a companion uses attack/Follow-Up ATK, if the attacked target is in the "Oblivion" state, immediately deal 1 instance of DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的蝶糕糕为攻击最高的我方奇美拉施加【祝福】。拥有【祝福】的奇美拉被击倒时会以<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>重新对战，最多生效2次
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Butterfly Cake in the team grants "Blessing" to the ally chimera with the highest attack. When a chimera with "Blessing" is defeated, it will rejoin the battle with <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP. This effect can trigger up to 2 times.

C:
<align="center">并非仅有你能引人入局，老朋友。</align>
<align="center">乐园将于子夜降诞，因我而永恒超然。</align>
<align="center">你我仍是行于殊途，再相见时，亦要遭你唾骂。</align>
<align="center">可米哈伊尔啊……</align>
<align="center">我也想修好你的钟表。</align>

不知是在何时，又由何人写下。从未寄出，也再无机会寄出。
E:
<align="center">You're not the only one who can draw others into play, old friend.</align>
<align="center">At midnight, paradise shall be born, eternal and transcendent because of me.</align>
<align="center">Our paths still diverge, and when we meet again, you'll curse my name.</align>
<align="center">But Mikhail...</align>
<align="center">I want to fix your clock, too.</align>

No one knows when or by whom it was written. It was never sent, and no chance remains to send it.

C: 未能送出的时祷书
E: Undelivered Prayer Book

E: Alright

E: Hehe, can't wait to see {NICKNAME} in action!

E: Hyacine invited {NICKNAME} to the group chat

C: 要加入我们吗？
E: Wanna join us?

C: 从黑潮中诞生的扭曲造物，对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志，此时获得强大力量的它，已经没有任何人可以阻挡。
E: A creature warped by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed. Having now acquired immense power, none can stand in its way.

C: 波涛夫人（错误）
E: Lady of Crashing Waves (Bug)

C: 从我方队伍左侧起横扫攻击我方3个连续目标，造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Starting from the leftmost target, uses a sweeping attack on 3 consecutive targets, dealing minor Imaginary DMG.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害，然后解除<u>【潜伏】</u>状态。仅可在<u>【潜伏】</u>状态下施放。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target, then dispels the <u>"Lurking"</u> state. Can only be used while in the <u>"Lurking"</u> state.

C: 暴风骤雨的
E: Tempestoso

C: 渐快
E: Accelerando

C: 战士不该再次倒下
E: Warriors Shan't Fall Overmore

C: 大丽花自称是星核猎手中的一员，「剧本」预见了你在匹诺康尼的死亡结局，但那已经被星核猎手阻止。大丽花称你关于匹诺康尼的「记忆」中有一部分遭人窃取，她必须帮你找回有关「终末」的一切，从而拯救银河的未来。
E: The Dahlia claimed to be one of the Stellaron Hunters, saying that the "script" foresaw your death in Penacony, but that fate was prevented by the Stellaron Hunters. The Dahlia revealed that part of your memories about Penacony had been stolen, and she must help you recover everything about the Finality to save the cosmos's future.

C: 大丽花请你允许她稍加触碰，这是她摸索记忆的唯一手段。大丽花带领你回到一切的最初，并请你告诉她，你看到了什么。
E: The Dahlia asked for your permission to touch you briefly. It was her only way to probe your memories. She guided you back to where it all had begun, and asked you to tell her what you saw.

C: 临时关闭中
E: Temporarily Closed

C: 敌方目标受到的【<u>呢喃</u>】伤害提高。敌方目标在自身回合外受到持续伤害后，为我方全体充能【<u>耀变</u>】。
E: Enemy targets take increased "<u>Murmur</u>" DMG. After enemy targets take DoT outside their turn, charge all allies with "<u>Blazar</u>".

C: 强化
E: Enhance

C: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。找风堇和缇宝学习对战的基础规则，成为奇美拉训练家吧！
E: The famous "Chimera World Tournament" is in full swing in Okhema! Learn the basic battle rules from Hyacine and Tribbie to become a chimera trainer!

C: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。找风堇和缇宝了解关于赛事的信息，成为奇美拉训练家吧！
E: The famous "Chimera World Tournament" is in full swing in Okhema! Talk to Hyacine and Tribbie to learn more about the tournament and become a chimera trainer!

C: 前往续订
E: Renew Now

C: 嗯？怎么啦？
E: Hm? What's wrong?

C: 就是，你到底怎么啦？
E: Exactly! What's wrong with you?

C: 可是，何必把回忆太当真呢？
E: But why take memories so seriously?

C: 我来此，只为向你说明一件事：你对「匹诺康尼」的「记忆」并不完整……
E: I'm here to tell you only one thing: Your "memory" of Penacony is incomplete.

C: 喘口气。等调试结束，我就让你正式「入梦」。
E: Take a breather. Once the calibration is done, I'll let you officially "enter the dream."

C: 不如就利用这一点吧。我会启动「火萤IV型」，突袭「白日梦」酒店。来的路上，我仔细观察过了，常规安保无法拖住我。
E: Then let's use that to our advantage. I'll activate Fyrefly Type-IV and attack The Reverie hotel. I studied their defenses on the way here. Their basic security won't be able to keep me in check.

C: 以防万一，描述一下你看到的情景。
E: Describe to me what you see, just to be safe.

C: 描述？
E: Describe?

C: 按照「剧本」指示，我们搞来了一台废弃的入梦池。费了点功夫，有个公司人非要跟咱们抢。
E: Following the "script," we secured a discarded Dreampool. Wasn't easy. Some IPC lackey decided to fight us for it.

C: 小心，这一次，我们要更加深入……
E: Be careful. This time, we're going to dig deeper...

C: 还有人……
E: There's someone else...

C: 打扰了，您见过两位游客吗？都是灰发，其中一位…是戴着发卡的少女。
E: Pardon me, but have you seen two tourists? They both have gray hair, and one of them... is a young lady wearing a hair clip.

C: 得靠近些，找个隐蔽的角落。
E: We need to get closer. Find a hidden spot.

C: 无眠之夜的开端 你初次入梦的时刻
E: The beginning of the sleepless night, the moment you first entered the dream.

C: 我刚才释放的力量，已经足以被他察觉，降下致死一击，但我们却安然无恙。
E: The power I just released should have been enough for him to notice and deliver a fatal blow, yet here we are, completely unharmed.

C: 真可惜——我更乐意看到你陷入窘境，然后对我更加依赖。
E: What a pity. I would've much preferred to see you in a pinch, so you'd have to rely on me all the more.

C: 潜入匹诺康尼时，你见到的也是她吗？
E: Was it her that you saw when infiltrating Penacony?

C: 在一切结束后，我想将她好好安葬，像普通人那样。
E: After all this is over, I want to give her a proper burial, just like any normal person.

C: 祝你在那里找到想要的答案…或者，解脱。
E: I hope you find whatever you seek there, be it answers... or salvation.

C: 咦…电话？这种时候……
E: Huh... a phone call? At a time like this...

C: 「…嘘████行于██毁灭██的亡命徒██什么时候怕过死亡…」
E: Shh—████ when have those ██ on the Path of Destruction ██ feared death?

C: 你也参与了行动？
E: You were involved too?

C: 抱歉，但她和其他焚化工不同，没有窃取记忆的打算。我也一样，从未想过破坏美梦，选择偷渡的方式入梦，也是迫不得已。
E: I apologize, but she's different from other Cremators: She has no intention of stealing memories. The same goes for me. I have never wished to destroy the sweet dream. Sneaking into the dream was my only option.

C: 稍后再为你展示吧，作为他的家人，如果不是眼见为实，你不会相信的。
E: I'll show you later. Belonging to his family, you wouldn't believe me unless you saw it with your own eyes.

C: 我的目的…只关乎<color=#dbc291ff>一次重逢，一次拯救，一场诀别。</color>
E: My purpose... is about <color=#dbc291ff>a reunion, a rescue, and a farewell.</color>

C: 哦？这是什么？<color=#dbc291ff>一节已被蛀朽的橡木？</color>
E: Oh? What's this? <color=#dbc291ff>A piece of worm-eaten oak?</color>

C: 他们进入了那枚梦泡吗？
E: Did they enter that dream bubble?

C: …这位路过的骑士，你算是找对人了。我是正被困于此地的公司使节——请您伸出援手吧，纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！
E: ...Ah, passing knight, you've found just the right person. I am an IPC envoy trapped here. Lend me your aid, for Idrila the Beauty is the most peerless beauty of them all!

C: …非得有一位令使出手不可。
E: ...We'll need an Emanator to step in.

C: 是你，另一条路也通往此处。
E: Ah, it's you. It seems the other path leads here too.

C: 我将代他了结此事——这道思绪，连同窗外的力量，才是完整的一句「律令」。
E: I shall end this matter on his behalf. This thought, together with the power beyond the window, completes a single, true "divine law."

C: 那是……
E: Is that...

C: 看不出异常之处，难道我选错了吗？
E: Nothing seems out of place... Did I pick the wrong one?

C: 我有些痛恨自己的无能了，此刻，我多希望自己能有办法，使你感到宽慰。别着急，一切早已过去。
E: I'm starting to hate how powerless I am. How I wish that I had some way to comfort you right at this moment. Don't worry. That was all in the past.

C: 但若考虑到计划的下一步，它又开始变得无比真实——太一之梦笼罩了整个星系，由此，寰宇蝗灾将逐渐与现实无异。
E: Yet this Swarm was frighteningly real when you considered the next steps of his plan... Ena's Dream had enveloped the entire star system, which meant the Swarm Disaster would gradually become indistinguishable from reality.

C: 你怎么也在？
E: Oh, you're here too?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>另外两重梦境，星核猎手来搞定。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The other two layers of the dreamscape will be handled by the Stellaron Hunters.</color>

C: 每个人的幸福和道路应当由他自己开创。虽然我不是无名客，但也愿意将飞上天空的勇气传递给每一个需要它的人。
E: Their path of happiness should be forged by themselves. While I may not be a Nameless, I'm willing to instill courage in all those who need it.

C: 可谁说…<color=#dbc291ff>这一切，不是一个普通少女的作为？</color>
E: But who's to say... <color=#dbc291ff>all of this isn't what an ordinary girl would do?</color>

C: 维里塔斯•拉帝奥
E: Veritas Ratio

C: 歌斐木
E: Gopher Wood

C: 我一直在等你找我。
E: I've been waiting for you to come find me.

C: 不过，我跟在你身后，偷偷看了你很久，还是不想打扰你。我希望你的梦…能笑着开始，也能笑着醒来。
E: I've been quietly following you and watching you from afar for a while, but I still didn't want to disturb you. I hope your dreams... begin with a smile and end with one too.

C: 我还算你认识的那个人吗？
E: Am I... still the person you once knew?

C: {NICKNAME}…艾利欧说，我们注定走向不同的终末，不可能拥有未来。
E: {NICKNAME}... Elio said we're destined to head to different finalities, that we can't have a future.

C: 「嗷呜~」小奇美拉垂头丧气地回到了工位上，开始加班。
E: "Awoo~" The little chimera trudges back to its workstation, ready for another round of overtime.

C: 「希望塞纳托斯善待我的母亲。」面容坚毅的男人将一枚陶碗投入火坑，走过来拍拍你的肩膀。轮到你了。
E: "May Thanatos be kind to my mother." The stern-faced man tosses a clay bowl into the fire pit, then walks over and pats your shoulder. It's your turn.

C: 来，有缘的过路人，把头伸进来，听听寂寞回荡的声音……
E: Come closer, fateful wanderer, stick your head in and listen to the echoes of loneliness...

C: 我无法从这个段位降级。
E: I can't be demoted from this rank.

C: 所以小灰有空的时候，要多来比赛！这也是为了保护世界！
E: So Little Gray, you should come to compete more often when you're free! This is also to protect the world!

C: …晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远。
E: ...The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome.

C: 贪心的愿望
E: Greed's Wish

C: 「赛事主持」
E: "Tournament Host"

C: 好啦，灰宝来挑战试试看吧！
E: Alright, Grayie, come and give it a try!

C: 关卡解锁倒计时
E: Stage Unlock Countdown

C: 关于大丽花
E: About The Dahlia
